folders.Agent of the Afterlife:
来世特工
Agent of the Afterlife

Adamantine Infusion.name: 精金灌注 Adamantine Infusion
Adamantine Infusion.description:
你已将最坚固的材料融入自身形态，使你难以受到伤害。你的坚固构造甚至能保护你免受精金攻击。此外，你的徒手攻击被视为精金。

You have added the strongest possible materials to your form, making you difficult to damage. Your Sturdy Construction protects you even against adamantine attacks. In addition, your unarmed attacks are treated as adamantine.

Aerial Castle.name: 空中城堡 Aerial Castle
Aerial Castle.description:
你创造出一座永久的魔法城堡，它能在你的指挥下在天空中飞行，让你居高临下地统治。你的空中城堡由云质构成，以凝固的云墙守护，并装点以奢华的居住设施。此城堡的运作方式等同于一艘@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.vehicles.Actor.VNlJ7zPnOPThFEmR]{飞空艇}，但它只需要1名驾驶员即可运作，它拥有魔法推进方式，其中包含可供至多10个生物使用的豪华私人寝室，并且具有以下额外能力。

环境防护：你的空中要塞内部温度由魔法维持。处于此载具内的生物免受严寒、酷热、极寒与极热的影响。

只是云：从下方看，你的空中城堡看起来就像一朵普通的云。

You create a permanent magical castle that flies through the sky as you command, allowing you to rule from on high. Your aerial castle is built out of cloud stuff, protected with walls of solidified cloud, and adorned with lavish accommodations. This castle functions as an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.vehicles.Actor.VNlJ7zPnOPThFEmR]{Airship}, except it requires only 1 pilot to crew, it has magical propulsion, it contains luxurious private sleeping quarters for up to 10 creatures, and it has the following additional abilities.

Environmental Protections: Your aerial fortress' interior temperature is magically maintained. Creatures inside this vehicle are protected from severe cold, severe heat, extreme cold, and extreme heat.

Just a Cloud: From below, your aerial castle looks like a mundane cloud.

Battlefield Manipulation.name: 战场操控 Battlefield Manipulation
Battlefield Manipulation.description:
你可以召唤一面地狱烈焰或刺骨寒冰之墙，按你的意愿放置以控制战场。你可以每天一次以5环神圣先天法术施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu]{Wall of Fire}（若你是冰魔，则改为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R5FHRv7VqyRnxg2t]{Wall of Ice}）。

You can conjure a wall of hellfire or frigid ice, placing it as you choose to control the battlefield. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IarZrgCeaiUqOuRu]{Wall of Fire} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R5FHRv7VqyRnxg2t]{Wall of Ice} if you're a gelugon) once per day as a 5th-rank divine innate spell.

Magical Translocation.name: 魔法传送 Magical Translocation
Magical Translocation.description:
你已恢复经常进行短距离传送以及在危机时进行长距离传送的能力。你可以每10分钟将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8] 作为神圣天生法术施放一次。此外，你可以每天将translocate作为5环神圣天生法术施放一次。

You've regained the ability to teleport short distances often and long distances in a crisis. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8] as a divine innate spell once every 10 minutes. Additionally, you can cast translocate as a 5th-rank divine innate spell once per day.

Boulder Throw.name: 巨石投掷 Boulder Throw
Boulder Throw.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你的融合的两名成员都空出一只手。

你与你的融合中的另一名同伴协同合作，耗费巨大力气举起并掷出一块巨石、一团压实的泥土或类似物。你将巨石投掷至最多120英尺远，它会在落点猛烈砸下，打击@Template[type:burst|distance:10]内的所有生物，对区域内所有生物造成 @Damage[(14 + 2*(@actor.level -13))d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell|traits:damaging-effect] 豁免，目标值为你选择在其回合执行“掷巨石”的那名融合成员的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。巨石会在该区域留下瓦砾，使其成为困难地形。在13级之后的每个等级，该伤害增加2d6，至20级时最多为28d6。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物几乎未被碎屑波及，承受 @Damage[(7 + (@actor.level -13))[bludgeoning]]{half minimum damage}（13级时起始为7，至20级时增加至14）。

成功 该生物大多避开巨石并承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物被正面击中并承受全额伤害，且坠落 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物被狠狠痛击，并承受等同于 @Damage[(14 + 2*(@actor.level -13))[bludgeoning]]{number of damage dice} 的额外伤害，被击倒为倒地，且为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements Both members of your fusion have a hand free.

You work in tandem with your other partner in your fusion and expend tremendous effort to lift and toss a boulder, a clump of compressed earth, or the like. You throw the boulder up to 120 feet, where it crashes down on all creatures in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10], dealing @Damage[(14 + 2*(@actor.level -13))d6[bludgeoning]] damage to all creatures in the area with a @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell|traits:damaging-effect] save against the higher of the class DC and the spell DC of the member of the fusion on whose turn you choose to perform the Boulder Throw. The boulder leaves difficult terrain in the area from the rubble. At each level after 13th, the damage increases by 2d6, to a maximum of 28d6 at 20th level.

Critical Success The creature is barely impacted by the debris, taking @Damage[(7 + (@actor.level -13))[bludgeoning]]{half minimum damage} (starting at 7 at level 13 and increasing up to 14 at level 20).

Success The creature mostly escapes the boulder and takes half damage.

Failure The creature is struck head-on and takes full damage, falling @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Critical Failure The creature is truly clobbered and takes additional damage equal to the @Damage[(14 + 2*(@actor.level -13))[bludgeoning]]{number of damage dice}, is knocked prone, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Angelic Weapon Familiarity.name: 天界武器熟悉度 Angelic Weapon Familiarity
Angelic Weapon Familiarity.description:
天使的古老形象常手持燃烧的剑，但在天界领域中也常见其他武器。毕竟，有时天堂的事业也需要敲碎几个脑袋。你对任何具有天使特征的武器都具备熟悉度，同时也对 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.6KWYmeRMxsQfWhhJ]{阔剑}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.UX71GkWBL9g41VwM]{巨剑}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.LJdbVTOZog39EEbi]{长剑}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.9iDqOLNFKxiTcFKE]{钉头锤}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.grmaV4GdoGD7sKbn]{弯刀}以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.rXt4629QSg7KDTgJ]{战锤}具备熟悉度——就熟练度而言，你将其中任何属于军用武器的视为简易武器，将其中任何属于进阶武器的视为军用武器。

在第5等级时，每当你用这些武器之一造成大成功或大失败命中时，你获得其大成功或大失败专精效果。

The ancient image of the angel bears a flaming sword in hand, but other weapons are common among the celestial realms as well. After all, sometimes the cause of the heavens requires bashing a few heads in. You have familiarity with any weapons with the angel trait, as well as with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.6KWYmeRMxsQfWhhJ]{Bastard Swords}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.UX71GkWBL9g41VwM]{Greatswords}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.LJdbVTOZog39EEbi]{Longswords}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.9iDqOLNFKxiTcFKE]{Maces}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.grmaV4GdoGD7sKbn]{Scimitars}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.rXt4629QSg7KDTgJ]{Warhammers}—for the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these weapons, you get its critical specialization effect.

Continual Repairs.name: 持续修理 Continual Repairs
Continual Repairs.description:
你可以比正常情况下更频繁地修复自己而不损害自身的物理耐久性，使你能够以无与伦比的迅捷恢复。你可以每10分钟使用一次紧急修理，而非每天一次。

You can repair yourself much more often than normal without compromising your physical durability, allowing you to recover with unparalleled alacrity. You can use Emergency Repair once per 10 minutes, instead of once per day.

Giant's Reach.name: 巨人之触及 Giant's Reach
Giant's Reach.description:
你不仅体型庞大，还拥有相当的触及，你可以利用这一点对抗较小的敌人。你的触及从5尺增加到10尺。

You're not just big you also have a substantial reach, which you can use to your advantage against smaller foes. Your reach increases from 5 to 10 feet.

Darkwood Sight.name: 黑木视觉 Darkwood Sight
Darkwood Sight.description:
你在森林最深处安家，你的夜视能力远胜于大多数树栖生物。你获得黑暗视觉，此外你还保留由树栖族裔已拥有的微光视觉。

You make your home in the deepest heart of the woods, and your night vision is far superior to most arboreals. You gain darkvision, in addition to the low-light vision you already possess from the arboreal ancestry.

Eternal Vigil.name: 永恒守望 Eternal Vigil
Eternal Vigil.description:
即使死亡或衰弱也无法阻止你继续守护你所保护之人的永恒警戒。无论经历这一切，你都持续注视。你停止衰老，且不会因年老而死。你获得对抗疾病与毒素的豁免检定+1状态加值。

Not even death or infirmity can prevent you from maintaining your eternal vigil over your ward. Through all of these, you watch on. You cease aging and can't die of old age. You gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons.

Springing Leaper.name: 弹跃跳跃者 Springing Leaper
Springing Leaper.description:
你的猫科四肢使你能够优雅地跃向你想去的任何地方。你可以以2行动行动进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}，使你垂直Leap的距离加倍；或以3行动行动进行Leap，使你垂直Leap的距离变为三倍。你不会因为跳跃方向不同于你的Stride而在@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jumps}中自动失败。

Your feline limbs allow you to leap, quite gracefully, anywhere you like. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} as a 2-action activity to double the distance you can Leap vertically, or Leap as a 3-action activity to triple the distance you can Leap vertically. You don’t automatically fail @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jumps} for jumping in a different direction than your Stride.

Death's Messenger.name: 死亡信使 Death's Messenger
Death's Messenger.description:
你改变自身形态，变形为一种由你的传承决定的动物，获得4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl] 的效果。你可以无限期维持你的替代形态，并且你可以通过再次使用此动作变回你的真实形态。

Morrigna：你的替代形态为一只超小型蜘蛛。你不再像4环害虫形态那样正常获得飞行速度，而是获得攀爬速度。

Nosoi：你的替代形态为一只超小型鸟，通常为夜鹰。

Shoki：你的替代形态为一只超小型蜗牛。你不再像4环害虫形态那样正常获得飞行速度，而是获得攀爬速度。

Vanth：你的替代形态为一只超小型鸟，通常为秃鹫。

You alter your form, transforming into an animal determined by your heritage, with the effects of a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]. You can remain in your alternate form indefinitely, and you can shift back to your true form by using this action again.

Morrigna: Your alternate form is a Tiny spider. Instead of gaining a fly Speed as normal for 4th-rank pest form, you gain a climb Speed.

Nosoi: Your alternate for is a Tiny bird, typically a whippoorwill.

Shoki: Your alternate form is a Tiny snail. Instead of gaining a fly Speed as normal for 4th-rank pest form, you gain a climb Speed.

Vanth: Your alternate form is a Tiny bird, typically a vulture.

Annihilation Beam.name: 湮灭光束 Annihilation Beam
Annihilation Beam.description:
频率 每日一次

你从眼中发射出一道彻底湮灭的光束，摧毁你末日凝视路径上的所有生物。位于 @Template[type:line|distance:120] 内的生物受到 @Damage[12d10[force]] 伤害，并需以你的职业DC或你的法术DC（两者取较高者）进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class|basic:true] 豁免。被降低至0 HP的生物会化为细粉，不过其道具仍然保留。于19级时，伤害提升至 [[/r 14d10]]。该光束也能摧毁其路径上的物体，但总计只能摧毁厚度最多为10尺的物体；若其路径上仍有更多物体，则光束在此处停止，并且它无法摧毁神器或其他同样难以摧毁的物体。该光束会自动摧毁力场构装，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Iela4GgVeO3LfAo]{Wall of Force}。

Frequency once per day

You fire off a beam of utter annihilation from your eye, destroying all creatures in the path of your apocalyptic gaze. Creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:120] take @Damage[12d10[force]] damage with a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class|basic:true] save against your class DC or your spell DC, whichever of the two is higher. A creature reduced to 0 HP is reduced to fine powder, though its gear remains. At 19th level, the damage increases to [[/r 14d10]]. The beam can also destroy objects in its path, but only up to a total of 10 feet of thickness, after which the beam stops if there are more objects in its path, and it can't destroy artifacts or other objects that are similarly difficult to destroy. The beam automatically destroys force constructs such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7Iela4GgVeO3LfAo]{Wall of Force}.

Branching Mental Paths.name: 分岔心智路径 Branching Mental Paths
Branching Mental Paths.description:
你的思维路径很容易分叉到不同方向，尽管通常你需要专注于你的超脑研习。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.OW3W2vMARiojda7e]{Psychic Dedication} 专长，但你必须满足先决条件。或者，如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xKKyS9nEQqolJ0SF]{Psychic Duelist Dedication} 专长的许可并满足其先决条件，你可以改为获得它。即使你尚未从 Overmind Dedication 中获得足够的专长来获取新的变体，你仍然可以获得任一变体。

Your mental paths easily branch off into different directions, despite the fact you would normally need to dedicate yourself to your overmind studies. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.OW3W2vMARiojda7e]{Psychic Dedication} feat, though you must meet the prerequisites. Alternatively, if you have access to the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xKKyS9nEQqolJ0SF]{Psychic Duelist Dedication} feat and meet its prerequisites, you can gain it instead. You can gain either archetype even if you haven't taken enough feats from Overmind Dedication to gain a new archetype yet.

Arboreal Strikes.name: 树木打击 Arboreal Strikes
Arboreal Strikes.description:
你已经训练自己使用树枝、根须或藤蔓作为强力的攻击来痛击敌人。你获得以下一种徒手攻击，由你选择。以下三种徒手攻击都属于斗殴武器组。

树枝：你获得树枝徒手攻击，造成1d8钝击伤害，并具有推撞特征。你进行树枝徒手攻击时使用的是你用来握持物品的同样树枝，因此如果你的双手都被占用，你就无法使用它。

根须：你获得根须徒手攻击，造成1d6钝击伤害，并具有横扫和绊摔特征。

藤蔓：你获得藤蔓徒手攻击，造成1d4钝击伤害，并具有灵巧、敏捷、擒抱以及多用（挥砍）特征。

特殊 你可以多次选择此专长。每次你这样做时，你从选项列表中获得一种不同的徒手攻击。

You've trained to use your branches, roots, or vines as a powerful attack to clobber your foes. You gain one of the following unarmed attacks of your choice. All three of these unarmed attacks are in the brawling weapon group.

Branch: You gain a branch unarmed attack, which deals 1d8 bludgeoning damage and has the shove trait. You make the branch unarmed attack with the same branches you use to hold items, so you can't use it if both hands are full.

Root: You gain a root unarmed attack which deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage and has the sweep and trip traits.

Vine: You gain a vine unarmed attack which deals 1d4 bludgeoning damage and has the agile, finesse, grab, and versatile (slashing) traits.

Special You can select this feat multiple times. Each time you do, you gain a different unarmed attack from the list of options.

Curse of the Evil Eye.name: 邪眼诅咒 Curse of the Evil Eye
Curse of the Evil Eye.description:
频率 每小时一次

你凝视敌人，使其遭受一种令其生病的诅咒。选择30尺内的一名敌人，并将目光聚焦在该敌人身上。其效果取决于其针对你较高的职业DC与法术DC进行的 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免。

成功 该生物不受你的诅咒影响。

失败 该生物在你目光的影响下变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心1}。

大失败 该生物完全屈服于你的目光，变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心2}。

Frequency once per hour

You gaze at your foe and place them under a curse that renders them ill. Choose a foe within 30 feet and focus your gaze on that foe. The effects depend on their @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC.

Success The creature is unaffected by your curse.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} as they fall under the influence of your gaze.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} as it succumbs fully to your gaze.

Swarm Familiar.name: 虫群魔宠 Swarm Familiar
Swarm Familiar.description:
你育群中的一名成员可以离开你的身体并独立行动，进行侦察并执行复杂任务。你获得一只魔宠，并且这只魔宠必须与构成你育群的动物相匹配。如果你拥有水栖（特征）虫群传承，你的魔宠必须拥有游泳魔宠能力；如果你拥有翼群传承，你的魔宠必须拥有飞行者魔宠能力。

One member of your brood can leave your body and act independently, scouting and carrying out complicated missions. You gain a familiar, and this familiar must match the animals that comprise your brood. If you have the aquatic swarm heritage, your familiar must have the swim familiar ability, and if you have the wingswarm heritage, your familiar must have the flier familiar ability.

The First Riddle.name: 第一道谜题 The First Riddle
The First Riddle.description:
当斯芬克斯提出谜语时，拒绝作答可能并不明智。你可以随意将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4]{Daze} 作为神圣先天戏法施放，但你的先天版本的该法术获得听觉与语言（特征）特征，并且其升阶条目改为“升阶（+1） 伤害增加2。”而非恍惚通常的升阶条目。照常，戏法会升阶至等于你等级的一半（向上取整）的法术等级。

When a sphinx asks a riddle, refusing to answer can be unwise. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4]{Daze} as a divine innate cantrip at will, save that your innate version of the spell gains the auditory and linguistic traits and has a heightened entry of "Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2.” instead of the usual heightened entry for daze. As normal, a cantrip is heightened to a spell level equal to half your level rounded up.

Ruin Stalker.name: 废墟追猎者 Ruin Stalker
Ruin Stalker.description:
为了守护遗迹，有时必须在其大厅中悄然潜行搜寻入侵者，而你已深谙此道。你获得瓦砾用的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{地形潜行者} 技能专长，即使你不满足该专长的先决条件也一样。此外，即使没有掩蔽或隐蔽，你也能在遗迹中进行 [[/act hide]]；并且如果你在遗迹中结束 [[/act sneak]] 时没有掩蔽或隐蔽，你也不会自动变为被观察。这些好处不适用于自然环境或非废墟的建筑物。

In order to safeguard ruins, it's sometimes necessary to stalk their halls stealthily searching for intruders, and you've learned that lesson well. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.beyw5bdA5hkQbmaG]{Terrain Stalker} skill feat for rubble, even if you don't meet the feat's prerequisites. Additionally, you can [[/act hide]] when in ruins even without cover or concealment, and you don't become automatically observed in a ruin if you end your [[/act sneak]] without cover or concealment. These benefits don't apply in natural environments or non-ruined buildings.

Aquadynamic.name: 水动力学的 Aquadynamic
Aquadynamic.description:
你已完全适应了在波涛之下的生活。你的风暴巨人传承提供的游泳速度提高至与你的陆地速度相同。

You've fully adapted to a life lived beneath the waves. Your swim Speed from the storm giant heritage increases to be equal to your land Speed.

Connect Hearts.name: 连结心灵 Connect Hearts
Connect Hearts.description:
需求 你以共情为中心重定

在物质世界中，心脏只是一个将血液泵送全身的器官；而作为情感所在的真正“心”，存在于认知世界中，共情能够弥合心与心之间的鸿沟并将其连接。你尝试进行一次交涉检定，承受 –5 的减值，以对 120 英尺内一名生物的意志 DC (@Check[diplomacy|against:will]{Diplomacy (vs Will)}) 或欺瞒 DC (@Check[diplomacy|against:deception]{Diplomacy (vs Deception)}) 建立连接，取两者中较高者。若你成功，你会粗略感知到其在当前情境下的迫切需求、目标或欲望，这些因素正驱使其与你对立地行动。若你成功，在你下个回合结束前的一次机会中，当你进行一次 [[/act request options="item:slug:connect-hearts"]] 时，你能够运用这份连接与对其所求之物的了解，恳请目标暂停冲突并进入谈判，即使其对你不友善或怀有敌意亦然。你在该次请求的交涉检定上承受 –5 的减值，且 GM 可能根据情境调整 DC。某些生物可能无论其个人欲望如何都无法停手（但在这种情况下，你在成功施展连心之后便会感知到这一点，因此无需花费一个动作来尝试进行一次请求），而即便同意停战交涉者，也可能最终认为你的论点不足而重归暴力。你会消耗你的重定状态，不过即使你不处于重定状态，你仍会获得与以共情为中心重定相同的、用于进行请求的交涉检定的状态加值。

Requirements You are Recentered to empathy

While in the physical world the heart is simply an organ that circulates blood through your body, true hearts as the seat of emotion exist in the cognitive world, and empathy can bridge the gap between hearts and connect them. You attempt a Diplomacy check at a –5 penalty to make a connection against the Will DC (@Check[diplomacy|against:will]{Diplomacy (vs Will)}) or Deception DC (@Check[diplomacy|against:deception]{Diplomacy (vs Deception)}) of a creature within 120 feet, whichever is higher. If you succeed, you gain a rough sense of their immediate needs, goals, or desires in the present situation that are causing them to act in conflict with you. If you succeed, once before the end of your next turn, if you make a [[/act request options="item:slug:connect-hearts"]], you are able to use your connection and your knowledge of what they want to beseech the target to pause the conflict and enter a negotiation, even if they're unfriendly or hostile to you. You take a –5 penalty on the Diplomacy check for that Request, and the GM might modify the DC based on the situation. Some creatures might be unable to stop regardless of their personal desires (though in that case you get a sense for this after succeeding at Connect Hearts so you don't have to spend an action to attempt a Request), and even those who agree to parley might ultimately find your arguments lacking and return to violence. You expend your Recentered state, though you still receive the same status bonus to your Diplomacy check to Request from being Recentered to empathy even if you aren't.

Bounding Wings.name: 振翼飞跃 Bounding Wings
Bounding Wings.description:
你拥有一对虚弱而脆弱的翅膀——当你毁掉你的炼狱契约时，它们受到了削弱。经过高强度训练后，你重新获得了部分使用能力。你飞行。若你通常没有飞行速度，则你在此次移动中获得15尺的飞行速度。若你在此次移动结束时未处于坚实地面上，你会坠落。

特殊 即使你没有飞行速度，你的翅膀也足够强壮，可以尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qm7xptMSozAinnPS]{Arrest a Fall}。

You possess wings that are weak and frail—weakened when you destroyed your infernal contract. After intensive training, you’ve regained some measure of use from them. You Fly. If you don’t normally have a fly Speed, you gain a fly Speed of 15 feet for this movement. If you aren’t on solid ground at the end of this movement, you fall.

Special Your wings are strong enough to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qm7xptMSozAinnPS]{Arrest a Fall} even though you don’t have a fly Speed.

Emergency Shunt.name: 紧急分流 Emergency Shunt
Emergency Shunt.description:
频率 每日一次

需求 你的融合的成员中没有任何人处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}。

你以令人筋疲力尽的强度用力，设法仅用你所控制的部分来移动你们共享的身体。你进行一次迈步。与所有其他移动动作不同，这不是一个联合动作。

Frequency once per day

Requirements None of the members of your fusion is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}.

With an exhausting amount of exertion, you manage to move your shared body using only the parts you control. You Stride. Unlike all other move actions, this isn't a combined action.

Creature of the Night.name: 夜之生物 Creature of the Night
Creature of the Night.description:
你的感官格外敏锐，并且能够轻松锁定甚至隐藏的敌人。你获得气味作为一种模糊感官，射程为30英尺。

在黑暗中，当其他所有光源都熄灭时，你的感官会得到超自然的强化。你获得强效黑暗视觉，使你能够看穿会阻挡普通黑暗视觉的魔法黑暗。此外，当你处于黑暗的区域时，你的气味射程增加至60英尺。

Your senses are especially keen, and you're capable of pinpointing even hidden enemies with ease. You gain scent as an imprecise sense with a range of 30 feet.

In the dark, when all other lights have gone out, your senses become supernaturally enhanced. You gain greater darkvision, enabling you to see through magical darkness that would block normal darkvision. Additionally, when you're in an area of darkness, your scent's range increases to 60 feet.

Vengeful Torment.name: 复仇折磨 Vengeful Torment
Vengeful Torment.description:
当附近的敌人对你造成伤害时，你会将些许地狱的折磨导入其心智，使其不敢重蹈覆辙，迫使其体验到自己所施加痛苦的映照。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SSsUC7rZo0CwayPn] 聚能法术（通常见于牧师的痛苦领域），作为神圣聚能法术。施放聚能法术需要花费1点聚能点。此专长给予你一个包含1点聚能点的聚能池，你可以使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OSefkMgojBLqmRDh]{再聚能（行动）} 来恢复。你可以通过筹谋并策划你的下一步阴谋来再聚能。

特殊 若你拥有“计中计”专长或其他能使用多个反应动作（）的方法，且触发生物正因你的“诡计把戏”反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则其对你的报应之痛进行强韧豁免时也承受相同的环境减值。

When a nearby foe damages you, you dissuade them from repeating their transgression by channeling a bit of Hell's torment through their mind, forcing them to experience a reflection of the pain they inflicted. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SSsUC7rZo0CwayPn] focus spell (normally found in the cleric pain domain) as a divine focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell. This feat grants a focus pool of 1 Focus Point that you can recover using the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OSefkMgojBLqmRDh]{Refocus} activity. You can Refocus by plotting and scheming your next machinations.

Special If you have the Schemes Within Schemes feat or some other way to use multiple reactions, and the triggering creature is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your Scheming Trick reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their Fortitude save against your retributive pain.

Angel's Amnesty.name: 天使的赦免 Angel's Amnesty
Angel's Amnesty.description:
频率 每日一次

需求 你正穿过你当前所在位置以递送一条消息，并且你未曾精心设计该消息及其传递路径，以利用天使的特赦的意图

天使意为“信使”，当你有消息要递送且并无恶意时，天堂残留的力量仍会保护你。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8xRzLhwGL7Dgy3EZ]{Sanctuary}的效果，使用你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You are passing through your current location to deliver a message, and you haven't engineered the message and its path to exploit the intent of Angel's Amnesty

Angel means "messenger," and the lingering power of Heaven still protects you when you have a message to deliver and mean no harm. You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8xRzLhwGL7Dgy3EZ]{Sanctuary}, using the higher of your class DC and your spell DC.

Awaken Purgatory's Wings.name: 唤醒炼狱之翼 Awaken Purgatory's Wings
Awaken Purgatory's Wings.description:
以前，你的断绝让你如同沉睡之人，但现在你已完全苏醒，你的翅膀也随之觉醒。你始终拥有25英尺的飞行速度。

Before, your Severing rendered you as unto a sleeper, but now you are fully awake, and your wings have awakened with you. You have a fly Speed of 25 feet at all times.

Shed the Skin.name: 蜕皮 Shed the Skin
Shed the Skin.description:
频率 每小时一次

你的育群从你的身体中排出，并携带你身体的一部分，化为由许多生物组成、蠢动的虫群状态，持续至多10分钟。在此状态下，你成为一个高度可塑的虫群。你失去任何给予AC的物品加值以及来自护甲的所有其他效果和加值，并且你使用你的无甲防御的熟练度调整值。你获得等同于你等级一半的物理伤害抗力。你不能施放法术、启用物品，或使用带有攻击、操作或虫群血脉特征的动作，并且只要你保持虫群形态，你会因使用虫群血脉动作而保留你对区域和溅射伤害的弱点。你获得等同于你陆地速度一半的飞行、攀爬或游泳速度（以最适合构成你虫群的生物者为准），并且可以滑过极细小的裂缝。你可以花费一个带有专注（特征）的动作，在你的新位置重新组装你的身体，并将你的育群收回体内。

Frequency once per hour

Your brood is discharged from your body and carries pieces of your body along with it, assuming the state of a stirring swarm of many creatures for up to 10 minutes. In this state, you become a highly shapeable swarm. You lose any item bonus to AC and all other effects and bonuses from armor, and you use your proficiency modifier for unarmored defense. You gain resistance equal to half your level to physical damage. You can't cast spells, activate items, or use actions that have the attack, manipulate, or swarmblood trait, and you retain your weakness to area and splash damage for using a swarmblood action as long as you remain in your swarm form. You gain a fly, climb, or swim Speed equal to half your land Speed (whichever best suits the creatures that comprise your swarm) and can slip through tiny cracks. You can spend one action, which has the concentrate trait, to reassemble your body in your new location and draw your brood back within.

Angelic Aura.name: 天使灵光 Angelic Aura
Angelic Aura.description:
你与自身天堂灵光的联系愈发强大，使你能够更频繁地运用它。你可以根据你的传承，每小时使用一次你拥有的灵光专长，而非每天一次。若你是巴利斯，你的忏悔者灵光是恒定的，并且你可以用一个单动作将其启动或停用；该动作具有专注（特征）特征。

Your connection to your heavenly aura grows stronger, allowing you to use it more often. You can use the aura feat you have, depending on your heritage, once per hour, instead of once per day. If you're a balisse, your confessor's aura is constant, and you can activate it or deactivate it with a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Golemborn Blockade.name: 魔像血脉封锁 Golemborn Blockade
Golemborn Blockade.description:
你的魔像裔之躯不仅高大结实——还棱角分明，并且比大多数人更稳固地占据你的空间。针对穿过你空间进行的攻击，你提供掩蔽而非次等掩蔽，并且在有人试图 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8] 你的空间时，你的反射 DC 获得 +2 环境加值。

Your golemborn body isn't just big and sturdy—it's blocky and fills your space more sturdily than most. You provide cover, rather than lesser cover, against attacks made through your space, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Reflex DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8] your space.

Antimagic Curse.name: 反魔法诅咒 Antimagic Curse
Antimagic Curse.description:
频率 每小时一次

你诅咒60尺内的一名敌人，随着时间推移抽干其魔法，使魔法能量外溢并对其造成伤害。该效果由目标针对你更高的职业DC与法术DC进行的 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] 豁免决定。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 持续1分钟，只要目标处于一个或多个具有持续时间的法术效果之下，则在其每个回合结束时，目标受到等同于你等级的力场伤害（@Damage[(@actor.level)[force]]）。每次它受到此力场伤害时，所有影响它的法术的持续时间减少1轮；若法术持续10分钟或更久，则改为减少1分钟。在生物的回合结束时，它可以尝试一次新的意志豁免以终止该伤害。

失败 同成功，但持续时间为无限；且每当该生物受到一个具有持续时间的法术效果影响时，力场伤害会再次开始，每次持续1分钟，或直到它每次成功进行意志豁免为止。

大失败 同失败，但力场伤害等于你等级的两倍（@Damage[(2*@actor.level)[force]]）。

Frequency once per hour

You curse a foe within 60 feet to drain away their magic over time, spilling out magical energy to damage them as you do. The effect is determined by the target's @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success For 1 minute, as long as the target is under the effect of one or more spells with a duration, the target takes force damage equal to your level (@Damage[(@actor.level)[force]]) at the end of each of their turns. Each time it takes this force damage, the duration of all spells affecting it decreases by 1 round, or by 1 minute for spells lasting 10 minutes or longer. At the end of the creature's turn, it can attempt a new Will save to end the damage.

Failure As success, but for an unlimited duration, every time the creature comes under the effect of a spell with a duration, the force damage begins again, lasting for either 1 minute or until a successful Will save each time.

Critical Failure As failure, but the force damage is equal to twice your level (@Damage[(2*@actor.level)[force]]).

Composite Kinship.name: 复合血亲 Composite Kinship
Composite Kinship.description:
每天与你的育群交流，使你在与蜂巢心智以及其他由许多相互连接的个体组成的存在交流方面获得洞见，并获得与相似动物交谈的能力。你可以向与构成你育群的动物相匹配的动物提问、从它们那里得到回答，并对它们使用交涉（技能），无论它们是否处于虫群之中。即使它们通常免疫，你仍可以尝试对虫群以及其他拥有多个有意识心智的生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}以及 Request。你在对虫群与匹配你育群的动物施展这些动作时，进行的欺瞒、交涉与威吓（技能）检定获得+1环境加值。若你在该技能上为大师，则使用该技能时的环境加值提高至+2。

Communicating with your brood every day grants you insights into communicating with hiveminds and other beings composed of many connected individuals as well as the ability to speak to similar animals. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals who match the animals that comprise your brood, whether they're in a swarm or not. You can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.QNAVeNKtHA0EUw4X]{Feint}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression}, and Request against swarms and other creatures with multiple conscious minds even though they would normally be immune. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception, Diplomacy, and Intimidation skill checks made to take these actions against swarms and animals matching your brood. If you're a master in the skill, the circumstance bonus increases to +2 using that skill.

Polypsyche Spell.name: 复魂法术 Polypsyche Spell
Polypsyche Spell.description:
你对蜂群的熟悉以及体内蜂群的协助，使你能够编织将它们分散的心智视作一体的魔法效果。若你的下一动作是施放带有心灵（特征）且通常只影响单一生物的法术，你可以改造该法术以改为影响整个蜂群。该法术可以以蜂群或其他具有蜂群心智免疫的生物为目标并对其生效，而不是只影响单一生物。

Your familiarity with swarms and the assistance of the swarm within you allow you to weave magical effects that treat their disparate minds as one. If your next action is to Cast a Spell with the mental trait that normally affects a single creature, you alter the spell to affect an entire swarm instead. That spell can target and affect a swarm or other creature with the swarm mind immunity, instead of affecting a single creature.

Humanoid Shape.name: 类人形态 Humanoid Shape
Humanoid Shape.description:
你改变自身形态，变形为一种特定的小型或中型类人生物形态，以此来伪装你的灵使本质。该形态在体型与表观年代上大致与你的真实形态相同，并具有大致对应的生理特征，例如发色。在此形态下，你不能使用从你的灵使族裔获得的任何徒手攻击，也不能使用任何仅存在于你灵使形态中的其他生理特征。你可以再次使用此动作来恢复为正常外观。

You alter your form, transforming into a specific Small or Medium humanoid form you can use to disguise your psychopomp nature. This form is roughly the same body shape and apparent age as your true form and has roughly analogous physical traits, such as hair color. In this form, you can't use any unarmed attacks you gained from your psychopomp ancestry or use any other physical features only present in your psychopomp form. You can revert to your normal appearance by using this action again.

True Flight.name: 真实飞行 True Flight
True Flight.description:
你的双翼已恢复全部力量与活动能力，使你能够像行走一样迅捷地飞行，并开启了你在专注于飞行时所抛下的那些更细微事物的潜力，让你可以将注意力重新放回其上。若更高，你可以将从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.3RMQBWppdUH9nhp0]{Awaken Purgatory's Wings} 获得的飞行速度提高至等同于你的陆地速度。此外，你获得一个额外的1级引魂者族裔专长和一个额外的5级引魂者族裔专长。

Your wings have regained full strength and mobility, allowing you to fly as quickly as you can walk and opening up your potential to focus on the smaller things you abandoned while focused on your flight. You can increase your fly Speed from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.3RMQBWppdUH9nhp0]{Awaken Purgatory's Wings} to be equal to your land Speed if it's higher. Additionally, you gain a bonus 1st-level psychopomp ancestry feat and a bonus 5th-level psychopomp ancestry feat.

Riddle of the Firmament.name: 苍穹之谜 Riddle of the Firmament
Riddle of the Firmament.description:
你的飞行之力超越其他斯芬克斯，使你充满潜能与苍穹的秘密。若你的陆地速度更高，你可以将你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fHlFJy0resaYW9UU]{Winged Sphinx} 获得的飞行速度提高至与你的陆地速度相同。此外，你获得一个额外的1级与5级斯芬克斯族裔专长。

Your power of flight surpasses that of other sphinxes, filling you with potential and the secrets of the firmament. You can increase your fly Speed from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fHlFJy0resaYW9UU]{Winged Sphinx} to be equal to your land Speed if it's higher. Additionally, you gain a bonus 1st-level and 5th-level sphinx ancestry feat.

Last Second Repair.name: 最后一秒修理 Last Second Repair
Last Second Repair.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你受到伤害。

你对来袭的伤害作出反应，本能地修复自己。你在承受触发的伤害之前使用一次紧急修理；这次使用不计入紧急修理的正常频率，并且你不会回复生命值，而是获得等同于紧急修理通常会回复的生命值数量的临时生命值。这些临时生命值最多持续 1 分钟。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You take damage.

You react to incoming damage by reflexively repairing yourself. You use Emergency Repair just before taking the triggering damage; this use doesn't count against Emergency Repair's normal frequency, and instead of recovering Hit Points, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to the amount of Hit Points Emergency Repair would normally recover. These temporary Hit Points last up to 1 minute.

Empower Beetles.name: 甲虫强化 Empower Beetles
Empower Beetles.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你以三种强力效果之一强化你的甲虫，这些效果类似于阎魔罗阇自身的墓甲虫所具备的能力。若你的下一个动作是使用你的 Beetle Breath 专长，你可以将其锥形的体型增大到30至60尺之间的任意数值。此外，选择以下一种甲虫类型，并将其效果应用于 Beetle Breath：

蜣螂：你的食粪甲虫携带的恶臭与疾病预示着病痛与恶心。在豁免失败时，生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}；在大失败时，他们获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}。

食肉甲虫：你的甲虫阴险地钻入敌人的皮肤，并持续造成挥砍伤害，直到它们被驱除或饱食。区域内的生物还会受到 @Damage[(floor((@actor.level -2)/4)d8)[persistent,slashing]]（如常受到基础反射豁免影响）。在第10等级以及此后每4个等级，持续挥砍伤害增加1d8，至第18等级时最大为4d8。

歌利亚甲虫：你的甲虫比寻常更大也更强力。区域内的生物受到的伤害等于你每个等级1d6，而非你等级的一半；在第20等级时最大为20d6（@Damage[(@actor.level)d6[slashing]]）。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You empower your beetles with one of three powerful effects akin to those possessed by a yamaraj's very own grave beetles. If your next action is to use your Beetle Breath feat, you can increase the size of its cone to any amount between 30 and 60 feet. Additionally, choose one of the following types of beetle and apply that effect to the Beetle Breath:

Dung Beetle: The stench and illness carried by your coprophagous beetles herald sickness and nausea. On a failed saving throw, a creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, and on a critical failure, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Flesh-Eating Beetle: Your beetles burrow insidiously into the foes' skin and continue to deal slashing damage until they're expelled or sated. Creatures in the area also take @Damage[(floor((@actor.level -2)/4)d8)[persistent,slashing]] (which is affected as normal by the basic Reflex save). At 10th level and every 4 levels thereafter, the persistent slashing damage increases by 1d8, to a maximum of 4d8 at 18th level.

Goliath Beetle: Your beetles are bigger and much more powerful than normal. Creatures in the area take damage equal to 1d6 for every level you have, rather than half your level, to a maximum of 20d6 at 20th level (@Damage[(@actor.level)d6[slashing]]).

Reflexive Mind.name: 反射思维 Reflexive Mind
Reflexive Mind.description:
由于你并行的心智处理过程，只要你处于再定中心状态，你总是准备好使用你的一个超心智反应动作（）来保护自己。在你每个回合开始并在你恢复你的动作时，你获得1个额外的反应动作（），该反应动作（）只能用于你从超心智变体获得的任意反应动作（）。你仍然无法使用那些反应动作（），除非你已针对相应的性相处于再定中心状态。

Thanks to your parallel mental processes, as long as you're recentered, you're always ready to use one of your overmind reactions to defend yourself. At the start of each of your turns when you regain your actions, you gain an additional reaction that can be used only for any of the reactions you gained from the overmind archetype. You still can't use those reactions unless you're Recentered to the corresponding aspect.

Thoughtsense and Thoughtsensibility.name: 思维感知与思维感知性 Thoughtsense and Thoughtsensibility
Thoughtsense and Thoughtsensibility.description:
你获得了一种思想感知，在施加精神效果时尤为敏锐。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.8FZAF5vlQY3zHKiK]{Sense Thoughts} 脑噬族裔专长作为一个加值专长，即使你不满足等级先决条件。当你处于再定心态时，你从 Sense Thoughts 获得的思想感知射程从30尺增加到60尺，并且你无需进行纯骰检定，即可用精神效果以你用思想感知侦测到的隐藏生物为目标。

You've gained a thoughtsense that is particularly sensitive when it comes to applying mental effects. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.8FZAF5vlQY3zHKiK]{Sense Thoughts} cerebrophage ancestry feat as a bonus feat, even if you don't meet the level prerequisite. While you are recentered, the range of your thoughtsense from Sense Thoughts increases from 30 feet to 60 feet, and you don't need to attempt a flat check to target hidden creatures you detect with your thoughtsense with mental effects.

Apex Predator.name: 顶级掠食者 Apex Predator
Apex Predator.description:
频率 每小时一次

你的赋礼以无可比拟的方式强化你。你使用改变形态进入你的混合形态，并获得数项强大的恩惠。你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值，你的速度获得+10英尺状态加值，你的强韧与反射豁免获得+2状态加值。此外，你会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，且你只能将额外动作用于疾走或以你的混合形态的徒手攻击进行打击。所有这些效果持续1分钟，或直到你不再处于混合形态为止，以先发生者为准。

特殊 在满月的月光下，你可以每10分钟使用一次顶级掠食者，而非每小时一次。

Frequency once per hour

Your gift empowers you like no other. You use Change Shape to enter your hybrid form, and you gain several powerful boons. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level, a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed, and a +2 status bonus to your Fortitude and Reflex saving throws. In addition, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}, and you can only use the extra action to Stride or Strike with your hybrid form's unarmed attack. All these effects last for 1 minute or until you are no longer in your hybrid form, whichever comes first.

Special Under the light of a full moon, you can use Apex Predator once per 10 minutes instead of once per hour.

Drink Lightning.name: 饮用闪电 Drink Lightning
Drink Lightning.description:
触发 你将因敌人或环境效果而受到电击伤害。

当世界或你的敌人以闪电之力向你猛击时，你如同强大的阎魔罗阇一般违逆命运，抗拒伤害，并可能以电能强化你的能力。你获得对触发的电击伤害的抗力，数值等于5加上你的等级。

特殊 若你拥有甲虫吐息或收割之镰，并在你下个回合结束前使用其中任一能力，你可以使甲虫或镰刀带电，并造成2d6点额外电击伤害。照常，此额外伤害在豁免成功时减半，在大成功或大失败中的失败时加倍。一旦你将该额外电击伤害加入这两个专长之一，你会消耗掉这股电能，且不能再次使用，除非你再次饮用闪电；即使你在下个回合结束前设法同时使用了两个专长也是如此。

Trigger You would take electricity damage from a foe or an environmental effect.

When the world or your foes lash out at you with the power of lightning, you defy that fate like a mighty yamaraj, resisting the damage and potentially empowering your abilities with electricity. You gain resistance against electricity for the triggering damage equal to 5 plus your level.

Special If you have Beetle Breath or Reaping Scythe and use either ability before the end of your next turn, you can electrify the beetles or the scythe and deal 2d6 additional electricity damage. As normal, this additional damage is halved on a successful save and doubled on a critical failure. Once you add the additional electricity damage to either of these feats, you spend the electricity and can't use it again unless you Drink Lightning again, even if you manage to use both feats before the end of your next turn.

False Moon.name: 伪月 False Moon
False Moon.description:
频率 每周一次

你呼唤满月的力量，暂时为自己创造一个虚假的满月。在接下来的1分钟内，你可以将你拥有的任何基于“特殊”栏中满月频率的兽化生物族裔专长，改为使用其满月频率，而非其正常频率。例如，只要你在过去1分钟内没有使用过，你就可以再次使用 Lunar Rend，而不是必须距离上次使用已过10分钟。然而，虚假之月会以不寻常的方式牵引你的本能，并使你的心智与身躯承受压力。在虚假之月期间，你的银过敏所带来的弱点会从你等级的一半提高到你的等级（若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.B9uMuAsKbkHXQNC9]{Inured to Silver} 专长，则改为从你的等级恢复为你等级的一半）。

Frequency once per week

You call upon the power of the full moon, temporarily creating a false full moon, only for yourself. For the next minute, you can use any werecreature ancestry feat you possess based on its full moon frequency from the special line instead of its normal frequency. For instance, you could use Lunar Rend again as long as you hadn't used it in the last minute, instead of the last 10 minutes. However, the false moon pulls on your instincts in unusual ways and strains your mind and body. During the false moon, the weakness from your silver allergy increases from half your level to your level (or returns to half your level if you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.B9uMuAsKbkHXQNC9]{Inured to Silver} feat).

Additional Amnesty.name: 额外大赦 Additional Amnesty
Additional Amnesty.description:
你可以比正常的堕落天使更频繁地呼唤信使的庇护。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.3R4QjNiyAdV0FAiU]{天使的赦免}，而不是每天一次，并且每天一次你可以即使不满足需求也能使用它。

You can call upon a messenger's protection more often than normal for a fallen angel. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.3R4QjNiyAdV0FAiU]{Angel's Amnesty} once per hour, instead of once per day, and once per day you can use it even when you don't meet the requirements.

Always be Scheming.name: 永远要有谋划 Always be Scheming
Always be Scheming.description:
你的每个动作与每次交谈都在不知不觉间把你推向下一个阴谋。即使你并未有意识地将注意力放在其上。你的潜意识也在幕后筹划。你永久处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{迅捷（状态）}，并且只能将额外动作用于 [[/act create-a-diversion]]、[[/act feint]]、[[/act palm-an-object]]、[[/act sneak]] 或 [[/act steal]]。

特殊 若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.0GF2j54roPFIDmXf]{Bon Mot} 技能专长，你可以将“永远在谋划”提供的迅捷状态的额外动作用于施展 Bon Mot 技能专长，除此之外仍可用于以上列出的其他选项。

Your every action and conversation is subtly moving you toward your next scheme. Even when you aren't consciously focusing your attention on it. Your subconscious mind is scheming in the background. You are permanently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} and can use the extra action only to [[/act create-a-diversion]], [[/act feint]], [[/act palm-an-object]], [[/act sneak]], or [[/act steal]].

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.0GF2j54roPFIDmXf]{Bon Mot} skill feat, you can use the extra action from the quickened condition from Always be Scheming to use the Bon Mot skill feat, in addition to the other possible options listed above.

Gird Spirit.name: 束缚灵魂 Gird Spirit
Gird Spirit.description:
频率 每日一次

你振作精神，恢复你的身体与心智。你获得等于你等级两倍的临时生命值，持续 1 轮。

Frequency once per day

You gird your spirit, refreshing your body and mind. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to twice your level that last for 1 round.

Ready for Battle.name: 准备战斗 Ready for Battle
Ready for Battle.description:
触发 你掷骰先攻。

需求 你处于你的人形形态

当战斗开始时，你迅速变形为更具野性的形态，准备投入战斗。你使用改变形态变为你的混合形态。

Trigger You roll initiative.

Requirements You are in your humanoid form

When the fighting starts, you quickly shift into a more bestial form, ready for battle. You use Change Shape to transform into your hybrid form.

Illusion of Guile.name: 狡诈幻象 Illusion of Guile
Illusion of Guile.description:
当你将自己重新归中至狡黠时，你可以召唤令人困惑的幻象与幻灵来分散敌人的注意力。当你重新归中至狡黠时，你可以使用微小幻象进行[[/act create-a-diversion]]，其获得专注（特征）而非听觉、语言或操作（特征）；并且你的敌人不会因反复尝试用这些幻象进行制造佯动而获得+4环境加值。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.yQipgc3Ka8CMtZHa]{狡黠幻灵}反应动作（）。

When you Recenter yourself to guile, you can call forth confounding illusions and phantasms to distract your foes. While Recentered to guile, you can [[/act create-a-diversion]] using minor illusions, which adds the concentrate trait instead of the auditory, linguistic, or manipulate traits, and your foes don't gain a +4 circumstance bonus against repeated attempts to Create a Diversion using these illusions. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.yQipgc3Ka8CMtZHa]{Guileful Phantasm} reaction.

Instinctive Recenter.name: 本能回正 Instinctive Recenter
Instinctive Recenter.description:
触发 你掷骰先攻。

一旦危机发生，你会本能地将自己重新聚焦于你的一个认知性相。你 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.ViLvoke1fpTVKbuh]{重新聚焦}。

Trigger You roll initiative.

As soon as a crisis occurs, you instinctively recenter yourself to one of your cognitive aspects. You @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.ViLvoke1fpTVKbuh]{Recenter}.

Fusion Lore.name: 融合学识 Fusion Lore
Fusion Lore.description:
你理解自己以及其他融合体在物理与形而上层面的本质，并且当需要达成团体共识时，你学会了如何同时用胡萝卜与大棒来与人相处并达成目的。你获得外交与威吓的受训（熟练度）等级。如果你将自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训（熟练度）。你在融合学识中获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长。

You understand your own physical and metaphysical nature and that of fellow fusions, and you've learned how to get along and get your way using both the carrot and the stick when a group consensus is necessary. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Diplomacy and Intimidation. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat in Fusion Lore.

Blighted Mind.name: 枯萎心智 Blighted Mind
Blighted Mind.description:
从你有记忆起，你就一直在与自己的诅咒与饥渴抗争，努力勉强维持一种由你自己定义的生存方式。与那种挣扎相比，其他精神创伤往往只会从你身上滑过。你获得等同于你等级一半的精神抗力（最低 1）。

For as long as you can remember, you’ve always struggled against your curse and your hunger, trying to eke out an existence defined on your own terms. Compared to that struggle, other mental trauma tends to just slide off. You gain mental resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1).

Encase Flesh.name: 包裹血肉 Encase Flesh
Encase Flesh.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你因你知晓的一次攻击而受到物理伤害。

你本能地用一层薄薄的岩石包裹你的血肉。使触发的伤害减少等于你等级两倍的数值。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You take physical damage from an attack you were aware of.

You instinctively encase your flesh in a thin layer of rock. Reduce the triggering damage by an amount equal to twice your level.

Lunar Growth.name: 月之成长 Lunar Growth
Lunar Growth.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

需求 你不处于你的混合形态。

当你进入混合形态时，你可以引导月亮的力量，使你在短时间内变为超大体型。你使用变形进入你的混合形态，但你的混合形态为超大体型，而非其正常体型，并在1分钟内获得4环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}的效果，但你拥有10尺触及而非15尺触及。若你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HTAM3McVYUjKibGx]{Bestial Reach}专长，则你在超大体型形态下的触及改为15尺。

特殊 在满月的月光下，频率不再是每10分钟一次；而是当你使用月之增长后，你在[[/r 1d4 #minutes]]{1d4 minutes}内无法再次使用它。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements You aren't in your hybrid form.

You can channel the power of the moon when entering your hybrid form to become Huge for a brief time. You Change Shape to enter your hybrid form, but your hybrid form is Huge, instead of its normal size, with the effects of a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} for 1 minute, except that you have 10 feet of reach instead of 15 feet of reach. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HTAM3McVYUjKibGx]{Bestial Reach} feat, your reach in your Huge form is 15 feet instead.

Special Under the light of the full moon, instead of a frequency of once per 10 minutes, after using Lunar Growth, you can't use it again for [[/r 1d4 #minutes]]{1d4 minutes}.

Discarnate.name: 离体 Discarnate
Discarnate.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 一名生物在该生物的回合中以近战打击命中你

你的育群解体，撕裂你的身体，并带着骨头和皮肤的碎块逃离以躲避即将到来的攻击。你获得对触发攻击的所有物理伤害的抗力20。在触发生物的回合期间，你的虫群占据你原本的空间，并保有对所有物理伤害的抗力20。在触发生物的回合结束时，你的虫群重新聚合，你的身体在15英尺内一个未被占据的空间中重塑。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger a creature hits you with a melee Strike during that creature's turn

Your brood discorporates, shredding your body and fleeing with chunks of bone and skin to escape the incoming attack. You gain resistance 20 to all physical damage against the triggering attack. During the triggering creature's turn, your swarm takes up your original space and retains resistance 20 to all physical damage. At the end of the triggering creature's turn, your swarm coalesces and your body reforms in an unoccupied space within 15 feet.

Gargoyle Lore.name: 石像鬼学识 Gargoyle Lore
Gargoyle Lore.description:
你以与你的祖先相同的方式保持警戒——运用恐惧、隐秘与潜行的惶惶不安。你获得威吓与隐匿的受训（熟练度）。若你本会自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训（熟练度）。

你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 专长，用于石像鬼学识。

You maintain your vigil in the same manner as your ancestors before you—using fear, subtlety, and creeping dread. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Intimidation and Stealth. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Gargoyle Lore.

Speaker to the Dead.name: 亡者通灵者 Speaker to the Dead
Speaker to the Dead.description:
为了代表炼狱推进你的调查，常常不仅需要审问活人，也需要审问死者。因此，当你在他们灵魂残响尚未逃散之前与新近死去者交谈时，他们会聆听并在回合中回应。你花费10分钟触碰并对一具死亡时间至多1周的尸体进行说话，通常会根据你的传承与性情而用格外安抚或阴森的语气说话。这具有与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.FM3SmEW8N1FCRjqt]法术类似的效果，但你无法对死亡超过一周的尸体使用，并且由于你与死者打交道的密集经验，你在从尸体的话语中查明真相的检定与DC上获得+2环境加值。由于“与亡者说话”与talking corpse是同一种效果，如果在过去一周内有人已经对该尸体使用过talking corpse（在这种情况下你已经失去了唯一的机会），你就无法对该生物使用“与亡者说话”；同样地，如果你使用了“与亡者说话”，则在接下来1周内任何人都无法对该尸体使用talking corpse。

In order to pursue your investigations on behalf of Purgatory, it's often necessary to interrogate not just the living, but the dead as well. So when you speak to the recently dead before the lingering echoes of their spirit flee, they listen and respond in turn. You spend 10 minutes touching and speaking to a corpse that has been dead for at most 1 week, typically speaking either especially soothingly or ominously depending on your heritage and disposition. This has effects similar to the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.FM3SmEW8N1FCRjqt] spell, except you can't use it on a corpse that's been dead for more than a week, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your checks and DCs to ascertain the truth from the corpse's words due to your intensive experience dealing with the dead. Because Speaker to the Dead and talking corpse are the same effect, you can't use Speaker to the Dead on a creature if someone has already used talking corpse on the corpse in the past week (in which case you've lost your only chance), and similarly if you use Speaker to the Dead, no one can use talking corpse on the corpse for 1 week.

Natural Spark.name: 自然火花 Natural Spark
Natural Spark.description:
如同许多巨人一样，你与自然世界的一种元素有着与生俱来的联系——噼啪作响的闪电、呼啸的狂风、肆虐的烈焰，等等。你根据自己的传承，从原初法术列表中获得下列戏法之一。你可以随意将该戏法作为原初先天法术施放。戏法的强化法术等级等于你等级的一半（向上取整）。

云巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dDiOnjcsBFbAvP6t]{狂风爆破}

火巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6DfLZBl8wKIV03Iq]

霜巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gYjPm7YwGtEa1oxh]{寒冰射线}

丘陵巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D7ZEhTNIDWDLC2J4]{毒素喷吐}

石巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zA0jNIBRgLsyTpbm]{飞散碎石}

风暴巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kBhaPuzLUSwS6vVf]{电弧}

多才传承： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AUctDF2fqPZN2w4W]{印记}

Like many giants, you have an innate connection with an element of the natural world—the crackling lightning, the gusting wind, the raging inferno, and more. You gain one of the following cantrips from the primal spell list, based on your heritage. You can cast this cantrip as a primal innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell level equal to half your level rounded up.

Cloud Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.dDiOnjcsBFbAvP6t]{Gale Blast}

Fire Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6DfLZBl8wKIV03Iq]

Frost Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gYjPm7YwGtEa1oxh]{Ray of Frost}

Hill Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D7ZEhTNIDWDLC2J4]{Puff of Poison}

Stone Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zA0jNIBRgLsyTpbm]{Scatter Scree}

Storm Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kBhaPuzLUSwS6vVf]{Electric Arc}

Versatile Heritage: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.AUctDF2fqPZN2w4W]{Sigil}

Necropolitan Sphinx.name: 死灵城邦斯芬克斯 Necropolitan Sphinx
Necropolitan Sphinx.description:
侦测亡者不安灵体的能力，对于生活在古代文明陵墓与死城之中的斯芬克斯而言格外有用，而你已经发展出了这种能力。即使你未在进行搜索，你也可以尝试一次检定来寻找那些通常需要你进行搜索才能发现的祟灵。你仍需满足发现该祟灵的任何其他需求。

特殊 如果你是 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.TrLeBbNQnrgKSSB2]{犬首斯芬克斯}，你在用于察觉祟灵的检定上获得+1环境加值。

The ability to detect the restless spirits of the dead is an exceptionally useful one for a sphinx living among the tombs and necropolises of ancient civilizations, and it's one you've developed. Even if you aren't Searching, you can attempt a check to find haunts that normally require you to be Searching. You still need to meet any other requirements to find the haunt.

Special If you are a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.TrLeBbNQnrgKSSB2]{Cynosphinx}, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your checks to notice haunts.

Psychopomp's Mercy.name: 灵魂引渡者的怜悯 Psychopomp's Mercy
Psychopomp's Mercy.description:
你可以运用炼狱的力量来治愈那些其时代尚未来临的人，或将不死生物送回其应在之处。无论哪一种，都是一种仁慈。你可以每天一次以神圣天生法术施放2环@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]。在10级时，你的治疗法术的环阶提升至3，并在此后每两级再提升1环阶一次，在你达到20级时最高提升至8环阶。

You can use the power of Purgatory to heal those whose time has not yet come or to send the undead to their proper place. Either way, it is a mercy. You can cast 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs] once per day as a divine innate spell. At 10th level, your heal spell's rank increases to 3, and it increases by 1 again every two levels thereafter, to a maximum of 8 when you are 20th level.

Hidden Fate.name: 隐藏的命运 Hidden Fate
Hidden Fate.description:
考虑到你为成为断离者所牺牲的一切，如果仅仅因为凡人的预言就暴露了你，那将是一场悲剧。因此，作为所有断离者灵魂引渡者中最强大的代理人之一，你的断离本身之魔法会将你隐藏起来，避开窥探性的魔法，并强化你的心智，使其免受任何读取或影响它的事物。你对抗精神效果的所有豁免获得+4状态加值。此外，你隐藏的命运会尝试以10的反制等级反制任何侦测、揭示与探知效果，其反制调整值等于你的 @Check[class|options:counteract]{职业DC – 10} 或你的 @Check[spell|options:counteract]{法术DC – 10} 中较高者。若成功，预言效果仍会正常运作，但它不会侦测到任何关于你或你持有物品的信息。例如，与其让法术完全失败，“侦测魔法”仍会侦测到区域内任何其他魔法，但不会侦测到你或你随身物品上的任何魔法。

Given how much you sacrificed to become Severed, it would be a travesty if a mere mortal divination gave you away. Thus, as one of the most powerful agents among all Severed psychopomps, the very magic of your Severing itself hides you away from prying magic and strengthens your mind against all that could read or influence it. You gain a +4 status bonus to all saving throws against mental effects. Additionally, your hidden fate attempts to counteract any detection, revelation, and scrying effects with a counteract level of 10 and a counteract modifier equal to the higher of your @Check[class|options:counteract]{class DC – 10} or your @Check[spell|options:counteract]{spell DC – 10}. On a success, the divination effect functions normally except that it detects nothing about you or your possessions. For instance, instead of the spell failing entirely, detect magic would still detect any other magic in the area, but not any magic on you or your belongings.

Swarmblood Lore.name: 虫群血脉学识 Swarmblood Lore
Swarmblood Lore.description:
自从你被寄生以来，你与虫群的联系帮助你对自己的状态以及其他拥有多个意识的生物的行为有了更深的理解。你在自然和威吓中获得受训（熟练度）等级。若你本将自动在这些技能之一中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一个技能中成为受训。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识}技能专长，适用于虫群学识（技能）。

Since your infestation, your connection to your brood has helped you to gain a deeper understanding of your condition and the behaviors of other creatures with multiple consciousnesses. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Nature and Intimidation. If you would automatically become trained in one of these skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat in Swarm Lore.

Empty Body.name: 空明之躯 Empty Body
Empty Body.description:
频率 每分钟一次

触发 敌人对你的打击为大成功或大失败。

你的育群从你体内涌出，以逃离突如其来的危险。触发的攻击仅造成其在命中时会造成的数值（通常为全额伤害而非双倍伤害）。任何其他由大成功或大失败导致的效果仍会发生。当你毫无准备时，你的虫群逃逸所带来的冲击会使你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}，且在你花费一个交互动作将育群拉回体内之前，你不能使用带有虫群血脉特征的动作。

Frequency once per minute

Trigger An enemy's Strike against you is a critical hit.

Your brood surges out of your body to escape sudden danger. The triggering attack deals only the amount it would deal on a hit (typically full damage instead of double damage). Any other effects caused by a critical hit still occur. The shock of your swarm escaping when you were unprepared leaves you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, and you can't use actions with the swarmblood trait until you spend an Interact action to draw your brood back into your body.

Bay at the Moon.name: 月湾 Bay at the Moon
Bay at the Moon.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你发出一声令人胆寒的长嚎或哭喊，让你的敌人知道他们是你的猎物。每个在你周围 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30尺} 内且能听见你的敌人都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你职业DC和法术DC中较高者。之后，该敌人对你的“月下长嚎”免疫24小时。

大成功或大失败 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

失败 该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。

大成功或大失败 该敌人获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 3}，并在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃窜}。

特殊 在满月的月光下，你可以每分钟使用一次“月下长嚎”，而非每10分钟一次。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You let out a blood-curdling howl or cry that lets your enemies know they are your prey. Each enemy within @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} that can hear you must attempt a @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] saving throw against the higher of your class DC and your spell DC. Afterward, the enemy is immune to your Bay at the Moon for 24 hours.

Critical Success The enemy is unaffected.

Success The enemy is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The enemy is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The enemy is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3} and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} for 1 round.

Special Under the light of a full moon, you can use Bay at the Moon once per minute instead of once per 10 minutes.

Curse of Vanishing Rage.name: 消失狂怒诅咒 Curse of Vanishing Rage
Curse of Vanishing Rage.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 一名生物对你造成伤害。

你诅咒那胆敢伤害你的敌人，使你以及其余可能的受害者从其视野中逐渐淡去。该效果由目标对抗你更高的职业DC与法术DC的 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] 豁免决定。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标不受影响。

成功 直到目标回合结束前，目标无法用其精确感官看见你或以其他方式观察到你；若你当前正被其观察到，你对其变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐藏}。

失败 同成功；此外，在1分钟内，每当目标对你造成伤害时，直到其回合结束前，目标无法用其精确感官观察到你。

大成功或大失败：失败 同成功；此外，持续时间为无限，在每轮中目标第一次对一名生物造成伤害时，直到其回合结束前，目标无法用其精确感官观察到该名生物。若目标同时对数名生物造成伤害，则其无法观察到的生物在这些生物中随机决定。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger A creature damages you.

You curse the foe who dared to harm you, making you, and potentially their other victims, fade from their sight. The effect is determined by the target's @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target can't see or otherwise observe you with their precise senses until the end of their turn, and if you're currently observed by them, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} to them.

Failure As success, and also, for 1 minute, every time the target damages you, they can't observe you with their precise senses until the end of their turn.

Critical Failure As success, and for an unlimited duration, the first time each round that the target damages a creature, the target can't observe that creature with their precise senses until the end of their turn. If the target damages several creatures at once, the creature they can't observe is chosen randomly among those creatures.

Frostblood.name: 霜血 Frostblood
Frostblood.description:
如同霜巨人一般，为了胜利你能抖落哪怕最刺骨的寒意。你获得等同于你等级一半的寒冷抗力（最低1），并且你将环境寒冷效果视为比实际低1个严酷等级（难以置信的严寒变为极端严寒，极端严寒变为严酷严寒，依此类推）。你可以从下方列出的额外专长中选择巨人专长。

额外专长

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Y4edypYf61lQPWLZ]{Ambush Training}

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.eyyN9SMas3XAvkYk]{Cloud Cover}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fmNeQEJQLkNWwKXA]{Get Big!}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.r9ghJ7i8R7haw1fL]{Living Rampart}

13级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HmVS2Gdfy5vhyiIg]{Extra Big}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PC7DRFV8zaIYm3Wb]{Fearless}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.cFdPF0BbG7CnbafJ]{Swallow Whole}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jYWd1CIMo8FiU7p1]{Throw Ally}

17级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TQDR2Zcr1nStO3eN]{Eternal}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z9Gc9rRb0DPuSi51]{Giant's Stampede}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.R95FPWh5dLuV0x18]{Ground Pound}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9XjaTkjd2F6WjlGd]{Magic of the Ancients}

Like a frost giant, you shrug off even the bitterest chill in pursuit of victory. You gain cold resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1), and you treat environmental cold effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible cold becomes extreme, extreme cold becomes severe, and so on). You can take giant feats from the Additional Feats listed below.

Additional Feats

1st

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Y4edypYf61lQPWLZ]{Ambush Training}
