  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HmVS2Gdfy5vhyiIg]{Extra Big}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PC7DRFV8zaIYm3Wb]{Fearless}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.cFdPF0BbG7CnbafJ]{Swallow Whole}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jYWd1CIMo8FiU7p1]{Throw Ally}

17th

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TQDR2Zcr1nStO3eN]{Eternal}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z9Gc9rRb0DPuSi51]{Giant's Stampede}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.R95FPWh5dLuV0x18]{Ground Pound}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9XjaTkjd2F6WjlGd]{Magic of the Ancients}

Parallel Ponder.name: 并行沉思 Parallel Ponder
Parallel Ponder.description:
你运用你强大的大脑处理大量并行思考的能力，从而同时进行五项分析。你立即使用至多五个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo] 动作。若你拥有任何通常会在你回忆知识时触发的特殊能力或自由动作（），你不能在这些动作中使用它们。

You use your powerful brain's ability to process numerous thoughts in parallel in order to think through five analyses at the same time. You instantly use up to five @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo] actions. If you have any special abilities or free actions that would normally be triggered when you Recall Knowledge, you can't use them for these actions.

Eternal Wings.name: 永恒之翼 Eternal Wings
Eternal Wings.description:
你可以随时长出并使用你的可伸缩翅膀，而不再只限于每天短时间飞行。你获得等同于你的陆地速度的飞行速度，并可无限期持续。你可以使用一个单动作（具有专注与操作（特征）），将翅膀收回体内或再次长出。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.vPiVQcrftt8Msrqa]{Winged Eye} 时，你的飞行速度在持续时间内获得+20尺状态加值。

You can grow and use your retractable wings at all times, rather than only being able to fly for a short while each day. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed that lasts indefinitely. You can use a single action, which has the concentrate and manipulate traits, to withdraw your wings into your body or grow them again. When you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.vPiVQcrftt8Msrqa]{Winged Eye}, you gain a +20-foot status bonus to your fly Speed for the duration.

Blessed Blood.name: 受祝之血 Blessed Blood
Blessed Blood.description:
你也许已堕落，但你的血液仍带有天堂的气息——其作用方式类似于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.z9T4c1hXwOotsMCp]{圣水}，令许多怪物大为不快。每当邪魔、不死生物，或具有对善弱点的生物饮用你的血，或用颚、獠牙或类似攻击对你造成穿刺或挥砍伤害时，该生物受到 @Damage[1d6[good]]{1d6 善良}伤害。你使用自己的血作为原料之一来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制造} 圣水 时，进行制造检定获得+4环境加值。

You may have fallen, but your blood still has the waft of Heaven about it—functioning similarly to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.z9T4c1hXwOotsMCp]{Holy Water}, to many a monster's dismay. Whenever a fiend, undead, or creature with a weakness to good drinks your blood or deals piercing or slashing damage to you with jaws, fangs, or a similar attack, that creature takes @Damage[1d6[good]]{1d6 Good} damage. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to Crafting checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft} holy water using your own blood as one of the ingredients.

Sphinx Lore.name: 斯芬克斯学识 Sphinx Lore
Sphinx Lore.description:
你在你的狮群根源中耳濡目染长大，并精通谜语构筑的技艺。你在神秘学和宗教中获得受训（熟练度）。如果你会自动在这些技能之一中变为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一个技能中变为受训。你还获得适用于斯芬克斯学识的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 专长。

You grew up steeped in the traditions of your pride, and are skilled in the arts of riddle-craft. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Occultism and Religion. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Sphinx Lore.

Sense Thoughts.name: 感知思想 Sense Thoughts
Sense Thoughts.description:
你可以根据附近生物的思维感知其大致位置，从而无需依赖物理感官也能追踪它们。你获得不精确的思维感知，射程为30尺。与思维感知的常规规则相同，你的思维感知无法侦测无心智生物、物体或任何其他不具备思维的东西。

You can sense a nearby creature's rough location based on their thoughts, allowing you to keep track of them without a need for physical senses. You gain imprecise thoughtsense with a range of 30 feet. As normal for thoughtsense, your thoughtsense doesn't detect mindless creatures, objects, or anything else that doesn't possess any thoughts.

Aura of Righteousness.name: 正义灵光 Aura of Righteousness
Aura of Righteousness.description:
频率 每日一次

你曾是天军的将领，在你的军势面前，没有任何力量能够屹立——无论凡人还是恶魔。你将你的武器或拳头举向苍穹，你周身缠绕着光之灵光，千万种语言的圣洁诗句环绕着你的身形旋转。持续1分钟，你与20尺内的所有盟友在对抗恶魔与不死生物时，其攻击掷骰、伤害掷骰、豁免与AC获得+2状态加值。灵光内的区域对恶魔与不死生物而言为困难地形。

Frequency once per day

You were a general of the heavenly host, and against your army no force could stand—not mortal nor fiend. You raise your weapon or fist to the heavens, and you are wreathed in an aura of light, holy verses in a thousand languages spinning around your form. For 1 minute, you and all allies within 20 feet gain a +2 status bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, saving throws, and AC against fiends and undead. The area in the aura is difficult terrain to fiends and undead.

Spiritspeaker.name: 灵语者 Spiritspeaker
Spiritspeaker.description:
你拥有与灵交谈的先天能力，以便为它们提供救助、慰藉与指引。你对灵与怨灵进行的交涉检定，以及用于解除怨灵的技能检定，获得+1环境加值。此外，每当你在社交场合遇到灵或怨灵时，你可以立即尝试一次交涉检定以对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}，而无需交谈1分钟。你在该检定上承受–5减值。若你失败，你可以进行1分钟的交谈，并在该时间结束时尝试一次新的检定，而不是接受失败或大成功或大失败结果。最后，当你解除或击败怨灵但未能将其永久安息时，你可以针对该怨灵的最高解除DC尝试一次交涉检定。成功时，你会得知一条关于如何让该怨灵永久安息的线索；大成功或大失败时，你会得知一个更清晰或更具体的提示。

You have an innate ability to speak to spirits in order to provide them succor, comfort, and guidance. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Diplomacy checks you make against spirits and haunts, as well as skill checks to disable a haunt. In addition, whenever you meet a spirit or haunt in a social situation, you can immediately attempt a Diplomacy check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on that creature rather than needing to converse for 1 minute. You take a –5 penalty to the check. If you fail, you can engage in 1 minute of conversation and attempt a new check at the end of that time rather than accepting the failure or critical failure result. Finally, when you disable or defeat a haunt but don't put it to rest permanently, you can attempt a Diplomacy check against the haunt's highest disable DC. On a success, you learn a clue about how to put the haunt to rest permanently, and on a critical success, you learn a clearer or more specific hint.

Arboreal Magic.name: 树栖魔法 Arboreal Magic
Arboreal Magic.description:
你与原初魔法之间拥有深厚的联结，使你能够以魔法向敌人发射黏稠的树液。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uZK2BYzPnxUBnDjr]戏法，作为原初的天生法术。你可以随意施放它，并且如常，这个戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。

You possess a deep connection to primal magic, allowing you to magically fire sticky sap at your foes. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uZK2BYzPnxUBnDjr] cantrip as a primal innate spell. You can cast it at will, and as normal, the cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Read Minds.name: 读心术 Read Minds
Read Minds.description:
你可以运用你的心灵能力阅读他人的思维，并发现他们的表层想法。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC] 作为一个异能天生法术施放一次。

You can use your psychic powers to read the minds of others and discover their surface thoughts. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KHnhPHL4x1AQHfbC] once per day as an occult innate spell.

Beast Runner.name: 兽之奔行者 Beast Runner
Beast Runner.description:
通过锻炼你的耐力，你可以更频繁地进入你的兽性战斗形态。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.rH0mZbzgs5BW69nW]{Beast Walker} 的使用频率从每日一次改为每小时一次。在满月期间，你可以将 Beast Walker 的使用频率从每小时一次改为每 10 分钟一次。

By practicing your endurance, you can take your animalistic battle form more often. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.rH0mZbzgs5BW69nW]{Beast Walker} once per hour instead of once per day. During a full moon, you can use Beast Walker once every 10 minutes instead of once per hour.

Fully Fabricated.name: 完全伪造的 Fully Fabricated
Fully Fabricated.description:
你已完成一次神化，得以摆脱血肉之躯的大多数烦忧。除了不需要进食外，你也不需要饮水。你只需进行4小时的不活动便能感到休息充足，不过你仍必须每天花费1小时进行准备，以恢复每天仅能使用有限次数的资源，例如法术位。你对抗流血、死亡效果、疾病、毒素，以及会导致 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} 状态的效果之豁免，获得+2环境加值。当你对抗疾病或毒素的豁免掷骰取得成功时，你改为获得大成功或大失败中的大成功。

You have completed an apotheosis to shake off most concerns of those of flesh and blood. In addition to not needing to eat, you don't need to drink. You need only 4 hours of inactivity to feel well-rested, though you must still spend 1 hour of preparation each day to regain resources usable only a limited number of times per day, such as spell slots. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against bleed, death effects, diseases, poisons, and effects that would cause the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} conditions. When you roll a successful saving throw against a disease or poison, you get a critical success instead.

Don Illusions.name: 幻术宗师 Don Illusions
Don Illusions.description:
你已学会用魔法遮蔽自己的身份，使你能更好地在凡人之中不引人注目地混迹。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{illusory disguise} 法术作为神圣天生法术施放两次。你只能以自己为此法术的目标。

You've learned to magically obscure your identity, enabling you to better pass unnoticed among mortals. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{illusory disguise} spell twice per day as a divine innate spell. You can only target yourself with this spell.

See Beyond the Pale.name: 看见彼岸之外 See Beyond the Pale
See Beyond the Pale.description:
你明白万物皆相连，并且现实远非凡人所能理解。这使你能够预知未来并与死者交谈。你每天各一次以神圣先天法术施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.pkcOby5prOausy1k] 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.FM3SmEW8N1FCRjqt]。

You understand that everything is connected and that there's more to reality than what mortals can comprehend. This enables you to divine the future and speak to the dead. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.pkcOby5prOausy1k] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.FM3SmEW8N1FCRjqt] once per day each as divine innate spells.

Knockdown Strike.name: 击倒打击 Knockdown Strike
Knockdown Strike.description:
你将全部力量灌注于一次攻击之中，为此耗尽你的能量储备。对一个生物进行一次打击。成功时，你额外造成一颗伤害骰的伤害，且目标必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC，否则被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。此行为在计算你的多重攻击减值时视为两次攻击。

You put your entire might behind an attack, using up your reserves of energy to do so. Strike a creature. On a success, you deal an additional die of damage and the target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class] saving throw against your class DC or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. This counts as two attacks for your multiple attack penalty.

Gusting Redirection.name: 阵风改向 Gusting Redirection
Gusting Redirection.description:
触发 一名生物以近战打击对你进行攻击并大失败。

你挥动手掌，向触发的生物发射一阵强劲的疾风，将其直接向后推5尺；若其为小型或更小，则推10尺。

Trigger A creature critically fails a melee Strike against you.

With a wave of your hand, you launch a powerful gust of wind at the triggering creature, pushing them directly back 5 feet, or 10 feet if they're Small or smaller.

Diabolic Criticals.name: 恶魔般的大成功或大失败 Diabolic Criticals
Diabolic Criticals.description:
你的大成功命中总是恰到好处，足以造成持续的痛苦。以徒手攻击或非触及近战武器造成大成功命中时，你造成1d4持续性伤害；伤害类型取决于你的传承：厄里倪厄斯为火焰、格鲁贡为寒冷、奥西鲁斯为毒素，其他传承则为流血。

特殊 如果你是厄里倪厄斯，此专长造成的持续性火焰伤害可与来自@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming}符文的持续性火焰伤害累加。

Your critical hits are placed in just the right way to cause ongoing suffering. On a critical hit with an unarmed attack or a non-reach melee weapon, you deal 1d4 persistent damage with the damage type depending on your heritage: fire for erinys, cold for gelugon, poison for osyluth, and bleed for other heritages.

Special If you're an erinys, the persistent fire damage from this feat is cumulative with the persistent fire damage from a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming} rune.

Fusion Confusion.name: 融合困惑 Fusion Confusion
Fusion Confusion.description:
频率 每小时一次

你让周围的敌人暴露于你的融合中多重心智的交融之下，使其变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}。选择至多四个60尺内的敌人。敌人是否会陷入困惑，取决于其进行的 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] 豁免（对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者）的结果。

大成功 该敌人不受影响。

成功 该敌人语无伦次，并且陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

失败 该敌人困惑1分钟。它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免以结束困惑。

大失败 该敌人困惑1分钟，且无法通过豁免提前结束。

Frequency once per hour

You expose foes around you to the melding of multiple minds within your fusion, causing them to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}. Choose up to four foes within 60 feet. The foes might become confused, depending on their @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] saves against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The foe is unaffected.

Success The foe babbles incoherently and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The foe is confused for 1 minute. It can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confusion.

Critical Failure The foe is confused for 1 minute, with no save to end early.

Magic of the Ancients.name: 古代的魔法 Magic of the Ancients
Magic of the Ancients.description:
你已拥抱血脉中远古的魔法，获得施展强大魔法的许可。魔法在你血管中流淌，大多数巨人都会敬畏地看待你。你根据自己的传承获得以下法术。除非另有说明，你可以每天一次以指定环阶将该法术作为天生原始法术施放。

云巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Gn5deIoobHpd3SiR]{Flame Vortex}（6环）。你每天可以施放该法术两次。该涡旋不造成火焰伤害，而是由切割之风造成挥砍伤害。

火巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XS7Wyh5YC0NWeWyB]{Fiery Body}（7环）

霜巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3puDanGfpEt6jK5k]{Cone of Cold}（7环）

丘陵巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.e9UJoVYUd5kJWUpi]{Summon Giant}（7环）

石巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2BV2yYPfVJ5zirZt]（6环）。你每天可以施放该法术两次，而非一次。

风暴巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TDNlDWbYb58Y55Da]{Chain Lightning}（7环）

多才传承： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.e9UJoVYUd5kJWUpi]{Summon Giant}（7环）

You've embraced the ancient magic of your bloodline, gaining access to powerful magic. Magic flows through your veins and most giants regard you with awe. You gain the following spell, based on your heritage. You can cast this spell once per day as an innate primal spell at the specified rank, unless stated otherwise.

Cloud Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Gn5deIoobHpd3SiR]{Flame Vortex} (6th). You can cast the spell twice per day. Instead of fire damage, the vortex deals slashing damage from cutting winds.

Fire Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XS7Wyh5YC0NWeWyB]{Fiery Body} (7th)

Frost Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3puDanGfpEt6jK5k]{Cone of Cold} (7th)

Hill Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.e9UJoVYUd5kJWUpi]{Summon Giant} (7th)

Stone Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2BV2yYPfVJ5zirZt] (6th). You can cast this spell twice per day, rather than once.

Storm Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TDNlDWbYb58Y55Da]{Chain Lightning} (7th)

Versatile Heritage: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.e9UJoVYUd5kJWUpi]{Summon Giant} (7th)

Memory of Heaven.name: 天国之忆 Memory of Heaven
Memory of Heaven.description:
你也许已经无法再飞行，但天空仍未完全成为敌对的领域。只要你穿着或持握你的羽毛斗篷，你在坠落时不会受到任何伤害，不论你坠落的距离多远；并且你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.HJYQlmGTdtyGWr6a]{Powerful Leap} 技能专长作为额外专长，即使你不满足先决条件。

You may not be able to fly anymore, but the sky is still not yet an entirely hostile domain. Provided you are wearing or holding your cloak of feathers, you take no damage from falling, regardless of the distance you fall, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.HJYQlmGTdtyGWr6a]{Powerful Leap} skill feat as a bonus feat, even if you don't meet the prerequisites.

Boundless Reach.name: 无尽触及 Boundless Reach
Boundless Reach.description:
你锋利的爪子能够切开现实，使你可以从你能看见且你对其具有效果线的60尺内任意一点发起一次爪子打击。用该点来确定你此次打击的触及，以及该生物是否对该攻击具有掩蔽。由于现实的撕裂与残留的维度魔法，以这种方式作为目标的生物可以在你下个回合结束前，对你用于该次爪子打击的起始点进行反击，尽管你通过裂隙影响你的一切尝试而言都处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}。其他生物无法通过裂隙攻击你或以其他方式影响你；只有你攻击的那个生物才有机会反击。

特殊 如果目标因你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{诡计把戏} 反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则它对来自无尽触及的爪子打击的AC也承受相同的环境减值。

Your sharp claws can slice through reality, allowing you to make a claw Strike originating from any point within 60 feet that you can see and to which you have line of effect. Use this point to determine your reach for the Strike as well as whether the creature has cover against the attack. Because of the tears in reality and lingering dimensional magic, a creature you target in this way can retaliate against the origin point you used for the claw Strike until the end of your next turn, though you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from any attempts to affect you through the rift. Other creatures can't attack or otherwise affect you through the rift; only the creature you attacked has a chance to retaliate.

Special If the target is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their AC against the claw Strike from Boundless Reach.

Stone's Patience.name: 石之耐心 Stone's Patience
Stone's Patience.description:
作为一只斯芬克斯，某种神祇造就的心理怪癖意味着你很少感到无聊。这在冒险中以及日常生活里都相当有用。你可以自愿在一次察觉检定或技能检定上花费正常两倍的时间，以获得该次检定的+2环境加值。你在这些检定中也不会将自然1视为比你掷出的结果低一级的成功度；只有当你的结果比DC低10点时，你才会得到大成功或大失败中的大失败。例如，如果你花费2个动作来进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}（通常只需要1个动作），你就可以获得这些好处。你可以在探索中通过花费正常两倍的时间进行探索来获得这些好处，或在休整模式中通过花费两倍的休整模式时间来获得这些好处。

如果在某种情况下，你的工作延误会直接对你的成功起到反作用（例如与一名缺乏耐心的生物进行紧张的谈判），GM可能会判定你因花费更多时间而无法获得好处。

As a sphinx, some quirk of divinely-wrought psychology means that you rarely get bored. This can be quite useful on adventures, as well as in your daily life. You can voluntarily spend twice as much time as normal on a Perception check or skill check to gain a +2 circumstance bonus to that check. You also don't treat a natural 1 as one degree of success worse than you rolled on these checks; you get a critical failure only if your result is 10 lower than the DC. For example, you could get these benefits if you spent 2 actions to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, which normally takes 1 action. You can get these benefits during exploration by taking twice as long exploring as normal, or in downtime by spending twice as much downtime.

The GM might determine a situation doesn't grant you a benefit for taking your time if a delay in your work would be directly counterproductive to your success, such as a tense negotiation with an impatient creature.

Venomous Lamia.name: 剧毒蛇女 Venomous Lamia
Venomous Lamia.description:
就像你下半身所形似的巨蛇一样，你的獠牙能够分泌一种强力的蛇毒，你从诅咒深处汲取而来。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.IPpDYvdTgWGceONV]{Envenom Bite} 动作。

Much like the serpent your lower body resembles, your fangs can exude a powerful serpent venom you draw from deep within your curse. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.IPpDYvdTgWGceONV]{Envenom Bite} action.

Evil Eye Lore.name: 邪眼学识 Evil Eye Lore
Evil Eye Lore.description:
你深入研究了自己关于邪眼族裔神秘起源的个人理论，以及各类相关主题。你获得神秘学与社会的受训（熟练度）。如果你会自动在这些技能中的一项成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）。你还获得用于邪眼传说的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长。

You've deeply researched your own personal theories into the enigmatic origins of the evil eye ancestry, as well as all sorts of related topics. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Occultism and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Evil Eye Lore.

Explosive Fulmination.name: 爆炸性爆燃 Explosive Fulmination
Explosive Fulmination.description:
你的炼狱轰击蕴藏着源自你不断成长能力的爆炸性力量。你的炼狱轰击所造成的伤害从d6提升为d8。此外，你的炼狱轰击的区域加倍，变为@Template[type:line|distance:60]或@Template[type:cone|distance:30]。

Your Purgatorial Fulmination is possessed with an explosive power from your burgeoning abilities. The damage dealt by your Purgatorial Fulmination increases from d6s to d8s. In addition, the area of your Purgatorial Fulmination doubles, becoming either a @Template[type:line|distance:60] or a @Template[type:cone|distance:30].

Animal Conversationalist.name: 动物交谈家 Animal Conversationalist
Animal Conversationalist.description:
你有一种不可思议的本事来理解动物，因此你甚至可以与它们交谈。你可以向动物提问、从它们那里获得回答，并对动物使用交涉（技能）。在大多数情况下，野生动物会给你时间陈述你的理由。你对动物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 时获得+1环境加值。

You have an uncanny knack for understanding animals, and as a result, you can even hold conversations with them. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals. In most cases, wild animals will give you time to make your case. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on animals.

Awaken Tree.name: 觉醒树木 Awaken Tree
Awaken Tree.description:
如同一位树木的摄政者，你能够将一棵树唤醒为一名次级树木族来协助你。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.wdmUH6hdat7jpEWt]{Beastmaster Dedication}，即使你通常在从你当前的变体中再选择更多专长之前不能再选取另一个奉献专长也是如此。当你这样做时，你获得树木幼苗伙伴的许可，并且你必须选择一名树木幼苗作为你的伙伴。

Like an arboreal regent, you can awaken a tree into a lesser arboreal to aid you. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.wdmUH6hdat7jpEWt]{Beastmaster Dedication}, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype. When you do, you gain access to the arboreal sapling companion and you must choose an arboreal sapling as your companion.

Sunder Objects.name: 摧毁物体 Sunder Objects
Sunder Objects.description:
你能轻易破坏物体和结构。你的打击无视物体或结构的硬度至多 5 点，也无视诸如活化物体等生物的硬度。

You can easily break objects and structures. Your Strikes ignore up to 5 of an object or structure's Hardness, as well as the Hardness of creatures such as animated objects.

Cerebral Secrets.name: 脑髓秘闻 Cerebral Secrets
Cerebral Secrets.description:
你的灵能变得更强，提高了你能从大脑中取回并施放的法术威力。你每天各能施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.szIyEsvihc5e1w8n] 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tlSE7Ly8vi1Dgddv] 法术，作为异能天生的隐秘法术。当你吞噬一颗大脑并使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.KquxP7RAMa2FG6LJ]{大脑魔法} 替换一个法术时，你可以选择将 安抚 替换为另一个1环法术，或将 爆笑发作 替换为另一个2环法术，并且当你吃下更多大脑时，你可以继续更换这些法术。你仍然每颗大脑只能更换一个法术，而且更换为一个新法术并不会让你每天能施放的法术次数多于正常。例如，如果你施放了 安抚，然后吃下一颗大脑并将其更换为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]，你仍需要等到第二天才能施放 幻象伪装。

Your psychic abilities have grown stronger, increasing the power of the spells you can retrieve from brains and cast. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.szIyEsvihc5e1w8n] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tlSE7Ly8vi1Dgddv] spells each once per day as occult innate spells. When you devour a brain and switch out a spell using @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.KquxP7RAMa2FG6LJ]{Cerebral Magic}, you can choose to swap out soothe for another 1st-rank spell or laughing fit for another 2nd-rank spell, and you can continue switching the spells as you eat more brains. You can still only switch one spell per brain, and switching to a new spell doesn't allow you to cast more spells each day than normal. For example, if you cast soothe and then ate a brain and switched it to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo], you would still need to wait until the next day to cast illusory disguise.

Reaping Scythe.name: 收割长镰 Reaping Scythe
Reaping Scythe.description:
频率 每小时一次

你从自身唤出并发射一片旋转的魔法镰刀刃，形成一个 @Template[type:line|distance:60]，斩切其路径上的所有生物。区域内的生物承受 @Damage[((floor(@actor.level/2)-1)d10)[slashing]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免。在大成功或大失败中的大失败时，在如常将伤害加倍后，这把致命镰刀会额外造成 @Damage[(floor((@actor.level -2)/4)d10)[slashing]|options:area-damage] 伤害。主要的挥砍伤害在第12等级以及此后每2个等级提高1d10，至第20等级时最高为9d10。大成功或大失败中的大成功时的额外挥砍伤害在第14等级提高1d10，并在第18等级再提高1d10，至第18等级时最高为4d10。

Frequency once per hour

You call forth and launch a whirling magical scythe blade out from yourself in a @Template[type:line|distance:60], slicing through all creatures in its path. Creatures in the area take @Damage[((floor(@actor.level/2)-1)d10)[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] saving throw. On a critical failure, after doubling damage as normal, the deadly scythe deals an additional @Damage[(floor((@actor.level -2)/4)d10)[slashing]|options:area-damage] damage. The main slashing damage increases by 1d10 at 12th level and every 2 levels thereafter, to a maximum of 9d10 at 20th level. The additional slashing damage on a critical hit increases by 1d10 at 14th level and then by another 1d10 at 18th level, to a maximum of 4d10 at 18th level.

Steelskin.name: 钢肤 Steelskin
Steelskin.description:
你一生都穿着护甲，早已习惯了它带来的种种挑战。如今，它就像第二层皮肤一样，如呼吸般本能。忽略你所穿任何护甲对你速度的减值。此外，你将你所穿的所有护甲都视为具有舒适特征。

You've worn armor your whole life and have long grown accustomed to the challenges it presents. Now, it's like a second skin, as instinctive as breathing. Ignore the reduction to your Speed from any armor you wear. In addition, you treat all armor you wear as if it had the comfort trait.

False Felling.name: 虚假伐倒 False Felling
False Felling.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你被降至0生命值，且你的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]数值为2或更低。

你引导一位不受束缚的树木灵体之时代魔法，你的树干裂开，轰然倒下砸向你的敌人，随后倒转时代使自己依旧站立。你选择的一条@Template[type:line|distance:20]内的所有生物受到@Damage[6d8[bludgeoning]]伤害，进行一次@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic]豁免，对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者。你避免被击倒至@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}，并保持在1生命值，但你的wounded数值增加1。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You're reduced to 0 Hit Points, and your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2] value is 2 or less.

Channeling the time magic of an unbound arboreal, your trunk splits, crashing down on your foes before rewinding time to remain standing. All creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:20] of your choice take @Damage[6d8[bludgeoning]] damage, with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You avoid being knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} and remain at 1 Hit Point, but your wounded value increases by 1.

Inured to Silver.name: 习惯白银 Inured to Silver
Inured to Silver.description:
通过严格的训练或纯粹的意志力，你现在可以承受银的接触。你失去了因银过敏而获得的对银的弱点，并且可以承受佩戴银长达 5 分钟，而不是 1 分钟。

Through rigorous training or sheer force of will, you can now withstand the touch of silver. You lose the weakness to silver from your silver allergy and can withstand wearing silver for up to 5 minutes instead of 1 minute.

Accursed Caress.name: 受诅咒的爱抚 Accursed Caress
Accursed Caress.description:
你可以将自己诅咒及其效果的一小部分传播给他人——至少在一段时间内如此，迫使他们也要应对那折磨你每个清醒时刻的冲动与饥渴。你接触一个位于你触及范围内的目标，该目标必须进行一次对抗你职业或法术DC（取更高者）的 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免。若其失败，则其获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{笨拙 1} 状态；若为大失败，则改为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{笨拙 2} 状态。若其豁免成功，则不受影响。该状态的数值每24小时降低1。你不再满足。

You can spread a bit of your curse and its effects to others—for a time, at least, forcing them to deal with the urges and the hunger that plague your every waking moment. You touch a target within reach, and that target must succeed at a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against your class or spell DC, whichever is higher. If they fail, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} on a critical failure. They’re unaffected on a successful saving throw. This condition value decreases by 1 every 24 hours. You are no longer satisfied.

Change Shape (Devil).name: 变形（魔鬼） Change Shape (Devil)
Change Shape (Devil).description:
如果你是凡缚者，你可能会渴望你原来的形态，但无论如何，如果你看起来不是个明显的魔鬼，你就更容易施展你的阴谋。你可以采取一个人形伪装，与自己的魔鬼形态共享一些明显的共同特征，使得认识你其中一种形态的人也能认出另一种形态，但除此之外看起来就像一个凡人类人生物。你的人形形态是一个特定形态，来自你成长之地常见且普遍的中型类人族裔（通常是人类）。该形态鲜明且独一无二，而你每次都会变成同一个形态。使用改变形态视为为欺骗的冒充用途制造伪装，但仅用于采用你的替代形态。你可以无限期维持你的替代形态，并且你可以再次使用该动作，变回你真实的魔鬼形态。

If you're mortalbound, you might have yearned for your old form, but either way, it's easier to pull off your schemes if you aren't obviously a devil. You can take a humanoid guise that shares some obvious features in common with your devil form, such that those who know you in one form can recognize you in the other but otherwise look like a mortal humanoid. Your humanoid form is a specific form from a common Medium humanoid ancestry prevalent where you grew up (typically human). This form is distinctive and unique, and you change into the same form each time. Using Change Shape counts as creating a disguise for the Impersonate use of Deception, though only to adopt your alternate form. You can remain in your alternate form indefinitely, and you can shift back to your true devil form by using this action again.

Living Cipher.name: 活体密码 Living Cipher
Living Cipher.description:
你是一个谜中之谜又包裹着谜团的谜语，一个活生生的密码，即使借助魔法也很难被任何人完全理解。当一个法术或魔法效果试图读取你的思想、侦测你是否在说谎、强迫你说真话，或侦测关于你的信息（例如你的阵营或族裔）时，针对该效果进行一次反制检定，使用你的一半等级（向上取整）作为你的反制等级，并使用你的职业DC – 10或你的法术DC – 10中较高者作为你的 @Check[class-spell|options:counteract]{反制调整值}。若成功，该效果不会揭示任何关于你的信息，你也不会被强迫说真话；不过如果该效果有多个目标或影响一个区域，它仍会如常对其他人生效。

You are a riddle wrapped in an enigma wrapped in a mystery, a living cipher that is difficult for anyone to fully understand, even with magic. When a spell or magical effect attempts to read your mind, detect whether you are lying, force you to tell the truth, or detect information about you (such as your alignment or ancestry), roll a counteract check against the effect, using half your level rounded up as your counteract level and the higher of your class DC – 10 or your spell DC – 10 as your @Check[class-spell|options:counteract]{counteract modifier}. On a success, the effect reveals nothing about you and you aren't forced to tell the truth, though the effect works as normal on others if it has several targets or affects an area.

Stormblood.name: 风暴之血 Stormblood
Stormblood.description:
如同风暴巨人一般，当你身处狂暴翻涌、海天交汇的风暴之中时最为自在。你获得10尺游泳速度，并获得两栖（特征）。作为具有两栖（特征）的生物，你既能在水中呼吸，也能在空气中呼吸。你可以从下方“额外专长”列表中选择巨人专长。

额外专长

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.i3RpDsOCKni77ei0]{Absorb Lightning}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dIIJfzzqjYToDpQi]{Big Bully}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YhB0AHBrTJfAR8N6]{Brute Force}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.aguwFAq83B9PWDyd]{Giant Lore}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ckIS3dwpIlxvj0XV]{Hurl Anything}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.WVx6e1Y1r5bmtboF]{Living Wall}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.6sjzEbaZcQChx4kC]{Natural Spark}

5级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.2nMbjKqA1muhYikx]{Aquadynamic}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.qv3ud4Lb44FbQjh4]{Destructive Strikes}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.SV7wAwnedn3aDOYx]{Fee-Fi-Fo-Fum}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jEO0FZLWcHiafglv]{Follow Through}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jywAzScdNmm2Bw6s]{Lunging Strike}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Ry3IUpPWcU0ezHb6]{Magic Spark}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PPyn2hBcMTDYFuRm]{Sighted}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HVwKhYgfv8sH2a3x]{Wind Up Throw}

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.RF3DdsDbNwosGrvi]{Catch Projectile}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.eyyN9SMas3XAvkYk]{Cloud Cover}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z9Gc9rRb0DPuSi51]{Giant's Stampede}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.R95FPWh5dLuV0x18]{Ground Pound}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9XjaTkjd2F6WjlGd]{Magic of the Ancients}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.uOqwxJhmASxF6AtI]{One with the Storm}

Like a storm giant, you are most at home in the tempestuous churn where the waters meet the sky. You have a swim Speed of 10 feet and gain the amphibious trait. As a creature with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air. You can take giant feats from the Additional Feats listed below.

Additional Feats

1st
