  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.uOqwxJhmASxF6AtI]{One with the Storm}

Haunt's Cries.name: 祟灵的哭嚎 Haunt's Cries
Haunt's Cries.description:
作为一名灵魂引渡者，你能听见闹鬼现象与孤独迷失的灵魂在哭喊，寻求从折磨中解脱，并完成他们未竟之事。即使你在探索模式中没有进行搜索，GM 也会为你掷一次秘密检定，以便你注意到那些通常需要你进行搜索才能发现的闹鬼现象。只要你在该技能上至少受训，你就能解除那些需求某项技能大师熟练度的闹鬼现象。如果你在该技能上具有大师熟练度，你便可以改为解除那些需求传奇熟练度等级的闹鬼现象。若你解除了一处闹鬼现象但未将其彻底消除，出于你作为灵魂引渡者的联系，你会获得一次异象或几句晦涩的话语，提供关于其未竟之事或其他需求的线索，使你能一劳永逸地让该闹鬼现象的灵魂得以安息。这会与任何你可能通过在“灵语者”族裔专长的交涉检定中成功而获得的关于该闹鬼现象的线索累积。

As a psychopomp, you can hear when haunts and lonely lost spirits cry out, seeking release from their torment and the completion of their unfinished business. Even when you aren't Searching while in exploration mode, the GM rolls a secret check for you to notice haunts that usually require you to be Searching. You can disable haunts that require master proficiency in a skill as long as you're at least trained in the skill. If you have master proficiency in the skill, you can disable haunts that require a proficiency rank of legendary instead. If you disable a haunt but don't fully remove it, due to your connection as a psychopomp, you receive a vision or a few cryptic words that provide a clue to the unfinished business or other requirements that would allow you to set the haunt's spirit to rest once and for all. This is cumulative to any clue you might gain about the haunt from succeeding at the Diplomacy check for the Spiritspeaker ancestry feat.

Shifting Swarm.name: 移位虫群 Shifting Swarm
Shifting Swarm.description:
你已学会操纵你皮肤之下的巢群成员，使其能够显现为血肉并以不同构型在你全身汇聚，令你的外表发生剧烈变化，并协助你的类人生物伪装。你不需要伪装工具组即可进行冒充，并且能在1分钟内变为任何与你体型相同的类人生物形态。你可以以单动作褪去伪装并让你的身体回到其自然形态，此动作具有群血特征。当你使用变形巢群时，你的冒充动作获得原初与变形特征，并且在将自己伪装成不同类人生物族裔的生物时，你不会因环境而受到减值。

You have learned to manipulate the members of the brood beneath your skin capable of appearing as flesh to come together over your body in different configurations, changing your appearance drastically and assisting your humanoid disguises. You don't need a disguise kit to Impersonate and can assume any humanoid form of your size in 1 minute. You can shed your disguise and return to your body to its natural shape with a single action, which has the swarmblood trait. When you use shifting swarm, your Impersonate action gains the primal and transmutation traits, and you don't take circumstance penalties for disguising yourself as a creature of a different humanoid ancestry.

Aura of Vitality.name: 活力灵光 Aura of Vitality
Aura of Vitality.description:
频率 每天一次

作为一名莫瓦尼克天使侍者，你可以保护自己与他人免受正面与负面效果的危险。你的生命灵光为一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]，持续1分钟。你和灵光中的盟友获得对所有豁免的+1状态加值，获得等于你等级的正面与负面伤害抗力，并且不受位面的正面与负面特征的效果影响。灵光中等级低于你的动物不会攻击你或你在灵光中的盟友，除非它们被控制或以其他方式被迫攻击，或除非你或你的盟友先发动攻击。

Frequency once per day

As a movanic deva, you can protect yourself and others from dangers of positive and negative effects. Your aura of vitality is a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] and lasts for 1 minute. You and allies in your aura gain a +1 status bonus to all saving throws, resistance equal to your level to positive and negative damage, and are unharmed by the effects of a plane's positive and negative traits. Animals in the aura lower than your level don't attack you or your allies in the aura unless they are controlled or otherwise forced to attack, or unless you or your allies attack first.

Disintegrating Finale.name: 解体终曲 Disintegrating Finale
Disintegrating Finale.description:
频率 每日一次

你将五种奎因特里特的力量合而为一，施展出强力的分解招式，通常表现为由炽烈光芒形成的巨大超规格长剑或类似形态。此终结技会对@Template[type:emanation|distance:120]内的所有敌人带来彻底且无与伦比的毁灭，同时奇迹般地不伤及你的盟友。只要你的融合为“分解终结技”花费相应的动作，你便会明显开始为攻击充能；该攻击会在本回合中你融合体最后一名成员行动的回合爆发，向外炸裂成旋转的分解与毁灭之刃。区域内的生物受到@Damage[50d12[force]|options:area-damage]伤害；其结果取决于它们进行的强韧或反射豁免（取较低者），对抗你融合成员中最高的职业DC或法术DC。被分解终结技降至0生命值的生物（包括任何持续力场伤害）会被轰成细粉，但其道具仍会保留，除非你也希望将其一并分解。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物几乎完全避开并硬扛住你的分解终结技，但仍受到@Damage[50[force]|options:area-damage]伤害。

成功 该生物抵抗或闪避了终结技的部分效果，但仍受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受终结技的全部力量，受到全额伤害，并继续崩解，受到@Damage[5d12[persistent,force]|options:area-damage]伤害。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物被你的终结技分解得极其严重，即使它幸存也无法全力战斗。它受到全额伤害，外加额外@Damage[100[force]|options:area-damage]伤害，以及@Damage[10d12[persistent,force]|options:area-damage]伤害。此外，只要该生物仍承受持续力场伤害，它就会处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}状态。

Frequency once per day

Using all five of your quintrites' power combined, you unleash a powerful disintegration move, which often takes the form as a massively oversized sword formed of blazing light or the like. This finale brings utter and unparalleled devastation to all foes within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:120] while leaving your allies miraculously unharmed. As soon as your fusion spends the actions for Disintegrating Finale, you visibly begin charging the attack, which explodes outward in a swirling blade of disintegration and doom on the turn of the last member of your fusion to act in that turn. Creatures in the area take @Damage[50d12[force]|options:area-damage] damage, with a result depending on their Fortitude or Reflex save (whichever is lower) against the highest class DC or spell DC among the members of the fusion. Creatures brought to 0 Hit Points by Disintegrating Finale, including any persistent force damage, are blasted to fine powder, though their gear remains unless you wish to disintegrate that as well.

Critical Success The creature is able to mostly avoid and shrug off your Disintegrating Finale, though it still takes @Damage[50[force]|options:area-damage] damage.

Success The creature resists or dodges some of the finale's effect but still takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes the finale's full force and takes full damage and continues crumbling, taking @Damage[5d12[persistent,force]|options:area-damage] damage.

Critical Failure The creature is disintegrated so badly by your finale that even if it survives it can't fight at full force. It takes full damage, plus an additional @Damage[100[force]|options:area-damage] damage, as well as @Damage[10d12[persistent,force]|options:area-damage] damage. Additionally, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for as long as they have the persistent force damage.

Celestial Strikes.name: 天界打击 Celestial Strikes
Celestial Strikes.description:
你的每一次接触仍然携带天界的威能，而你所持的任何剑在对抗邪恶势力时都如燃烧的烙印般有效。你的武器与徒手打击造成额外1点善良伤害。

Your very touch still carries with it the might of Heaven, and any sword you bear is as good as a burning brand against the forces of the unholy. Your weapon and unarmed Strikes deal 1 additional good damage.

Defensive Barbs.name: 防御倒刺 Defensive Barbs
Defensive Barbs.description:
你在战斗的激烈环境中变得更擅长操纵你的尖刺和倒刺。你可以每10分钟使用一次你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.1UeQ1xT5fxEHw2dm]{Flare Barbs} 反应动作（），而非每天一次。

You've become more adept at manipulating your spines and barbs in the heat of combat. You can use your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.1UeQ1xT5fxEHw2dm]{Flare Barbs} reaction once per 10 minutes, rather than once per day.

Countless Clauses.name: 无数条款 Countless Clauses
Countless Clauses.description:
你的契约包含大量条款、附带条件与分段。你可以每分钟一次使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.s3GVNmymtZEU6VhX]{Undersign Embedded Clause}，而非每小时一次。你只能用它来恢复某个特定生物的生命值（包括你自己的）每10分钟一次。

Your contracts contain numerous clauses, provisos, and subsections. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.s3GVNmymtZEU6VhX]{Undersign Embedded Clause} once per minute instead of once per hour. You can only use it to recover a given creature's Hit Points (including your own) once per 10 minutes.

Catlike Tread.name: 猫般步伐 Catlike Tread
Catlike Tread.description:
丛林中的大型猫科动物以其体型而言，能惊人地善于隐匿身形。作为狩猎者拉弥亚，你可以在需要时唤起它们的隐匿技能，融入黑暗之中。你先进行一次 Step，然后进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}。你仍然需要如常满足 Hide 或 Sneak 的需求。

The great cats of the jungle are able to vanish shockingly well for beasts of their size. As a hunter lamia, you can call upon their skill at stealth to meld with the darkness if you so choose. You Step, then @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}. You still need to meet the requirements to Hide or Sneak, as normal.

Berserk Failsafes.name: 狂暴保险机制 Berserk Failsafes
Berserk Failsafes.description:
你的身体可以显著更频繁地维持狂暴状态而不会崩溃。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.pcKVK2MYC9bCveyg]{Berserk}，而不是每天一次。

Your body can sustain a berserk state significantly more often without falling apart. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.pcKVK2MYC9bCveyg]{Berserk} once per hour, instead of once per day.

Eternal Fractal.name: 永恒分形 Eternal Fractal
Eternal Fractal.description:
你可以毫不费力地使用你的分形之翼而不会使你的虫群精疲力竭，使你能够随心所欲地飞行，无论何时想飞、想飞多久都行。你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。使用该飞行速度进行的飞行动作获得虫群血脉特征，因为这需要释放你的虫群才能做到；并且如果你在以这种方式飞行时使用一个交互动作把你的虫群收回，你会移除你的翅膀并坠落。

You can seamlessly use your fractal wings without exhausting your brood, allowing you to fly at will whenever you want and for as long as you need. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed. Using the Fly action with this fly Speed gains the swarmblood trait, as it requires releasing your brood to do so, and if you use an Interact action to draw your brood back while flying in this way, you remove your wings and you fall.

Accursed Growth.name: 诅咒生长 Accursed Growth
Accursed Growth.description:
需求 你已满足。

你呼唤诅咒的力量来激发你的身体，使其在短时间内成长，尽管你新的更大身体部分由受诅咒的魔法构成，并散发出不祥的紫黑色光芒。你的体型变为大型（体型）。你的装备也随之变大，但如果被移除或掉落，则会恢复到自然尺寸。你的触及从5尺增加到10尺。这次变形持续1分钟。你可以用一个带有专注（特征）的单动作提前结束这次变形。

特殊 如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.f4qPVuCPP3y5Inyt]{Monstrous Size}专长，改为使用“诅咒增长”会使你的体型变为超大型（体型），并使你的触及从10尺增加到15尺。

Requirements You are satisfied.

You call upon the power of your curse to spur your body to grow for a short time, though your new larger body is partially formed of accursed magic and glows with an ominous purple-black light. You grow to size Large. Your equipment grows with you, but it returns to natural size if removed or dropped. Your reach increases from 5 feet to 10 feet. This transformation lasts for 1 minute. You can end this transformation early as a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.f4qPVuCPP3y5Inyt]{Monstrous Size} feat, using Accursed Growth instead makes you grow to Huge size and increases your reach from 10 feet to 15 feet.

Consume the Self.name: 吞噬自我 Consume the Self
Consume the Self.description:
频率 每日一次

你吞噬自己的虫群以让自己活下去。你将一部分子嗣吸收进体内，并窃取它们的生命力来治疗你的伤势，恢复 @Damage[((@actor.level)d8)[healing]]{你每有1等级就恢复1d8点生命值}。失去这可观的一部分子嗣会使你陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}，且以这种方式疲乏时，你不能进行虫群血脉动作。

Frequency once per day

You cannibalize your swarm to keep yourself alive. You absorb a portion of your brood into your body and steal their vitality to heal your injuries, regaining @Damage[((@actor.level)d8)[healing]]{1d8 Hit Points per level you have}. Losing this significant portion of your brood leaves you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}, and you can't take swarmblood actions while fatigued in this way.

Watching Swarm.name: 观察蜂群 Watching Swarm
Watching Swarm.description:
你育群中的生物从你的身体里爬出并爬过你的皮肤，环顾四周。你获得全向视觉，直到你下个回合开始。这使你可以向所有方向看见，并防止你被夹击。

The creatures of your brood crawl out of your body and across your skin, looking in all directions. You gain all-around vision until the start of your next turn. This lets you see in all directions and prevents you from being flanked.

Constructed Eyes.name: 构造义眼 Constructed Eyes
Constructed Eyes.description:
与你所见过的其他类人生物的眼睛不同，你的眼睛被塑造得能够在黑暗中看见。你获得黑暗视觉。

Unlike other humanoids' eyes, yours have been crafted to be able to see in the dark. You gain darkvision.

Natural Strikes.name: 天生打击 Natural Strikes
Natural Strikes.description:
尽管被削弱，你的身体仍是一件危险的武器。你根据你的传承获得一种徒手攻击。如果你是 calaca、catrina 或 vanth，你获得爪子徒手攻击；如果你是 morrigna，你获得蛛网裹缚徒手攻击；如果你是 nosoi，你获得喙徒手攻击；如果你是 olethros，你获得宿命之指徒手攻击；如果你是 shoki，你获得角徒手攻击。如果你是其他传承，你通常获得爪子徒手攻击，但 GM 可以自行裁定你获得不同的徒手攻击。所有这些攻击都属于斗殴武器组，并具有所列的伤害与特征。

喙 1d4 穿刺（致命 d6，灵巧，徒手）

爪子 1d4 挥砍（灵活，灵巧，徒手）

宿命之指 1d4 虚无（灵巧，徒手，多用性 活力）

角 1d6 钝击（灵巧，推撞，徒手）

蛛网裹缚 1d6 钝击（灵巧，擒抱，徒手）

Despite being weakened, your body remains a dangerous weapon. You gain an unarmed attack depending on your heritage. If you're a calaca, catrina, or vanth, you gain a claw unarmed attack; if you're a morrigna, you gain a web wrappings unarmed attack; if you're a nosoi, you gain a beak unarmed attack; if you’re an olethros, you gain a fated finger unarmed attack; if you're a shoki, you gain a horn unarmed attack. If you're some other heritage, you usually gain a claw unarmed attack, but you might gain a different unarmed attack at your GM's discretion. All these attacks are in the brawling weapon group and have the listed damage and traits.

Beak 1d4 piercing (deadly d6, finesse, unarmed)

Claw 1d4 slashing (agile, finesse, unarmed)

Fated Finger 1d4 void (finesse, unarmed, versatile vitality)

Horn 1d6 bludgeoning (finesse, shove, unarmed)

Web Wrappings 1d6 bludgeoning (finesse, grapple, unarmed)

Exploit Loopholes.name: 利用漏洞 Exploit Loopholes
Exploit Loopholes.description:
每个用于收集信息的法术都有漏洞，而你确切知道如何利用它们为自己谋利，避开那些讨厌的吐真与读心法术——否则它们会破坏你完美的计划。当一个法术或魔法效果试图读取你的思想、侦测你是否在说谎、强迫你说出真相，或侦测关于你的信息（例如你的阵营或族裔）时，针对该效果掷骰一次反制检定：使用你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制等级，并使用你的职业DC – 10与你的法术DC – 10中较高者作为你的反制调整值。若成功，该效果不会揭示任何关于你的信息，且你不会被强迫说出真相；不过如果该效果有多个目标或影响一个区域，则它对其他人的作用仍如常。

Every information-gathering spell has a loophole, and you know exactly how to exploit them to your own benefit, evading those pesky truth-telling and mind-reading spells that would otherwise foil your perfect scheme. When a spell or magical effect attempts to read your mind, detect whether you are lying, force you to tell the truth, or detect information about you (such as your alignment or ancestry), roll a counteract check against the effect, using half your level rounded up as your counteract level and the higher of your class DC – 10 or your spell DC – 10 as your counteract modifier. On a success, the effect reveals nothing about you and you aren't forced to tell the truth, though the effect works as normal on others if it has several targets or affects an area.

Impaling Barb.name: 穿刺倒钩 Impaling Barb
Impaling Barb.description:
你用倒钩刺穿一名敌人，然后迅速后撤，使其难以移动开。进行一次倒钩打击，然后移动至多你速度的一半，且不会触发基于移动的反应动作（）。如果你的打击命中一名邻接某个表面的生物，你会根据其对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者的 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] 豁免，将其钉在该表面上。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 你将该生物部分钉在邻接的表面上。其从该次打击承受额外1d8点穿刺伤害，且其进行的第一个移动动作会将所有方格都视为困难地形，因为它在移动中挣扎着移除倒钩。若其自身或另一名生物在移动前使用一次交互动作移除倒钩，它便可正常移动。

失败 你将该生物松散地钉在邻接的表面上。其从该次打击承受额外2d8点穿刺伤害，且其会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身} 状态，直到其自身或另一名生物使用一次交互动作移除倒钩。

大失败 你将该生物完全刺穿并钉在邻接的表面上。其从该次打击承受额外4d8点穿刺伤害，且其会处于定身状态，直到其以对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者的方式挣脱。能够触及它的其他生物也可以尝试挣脱以移除倒钩。

特殊 如果目标正因你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{诡计伎俩} 反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则其在对抗“刺穿倒钩”的倒钩打击的AC以及其对倒钩效果的反射豁免上，也承受相同的环境减值。

You impale a foe with your barb and then quickly back away, making it difficult for them to move away. Make a barb Strike, then move up to half your Speed without triggering reactions based on movement. If your Strike hits a creature adjacent to a surface, you impale them to that surface based on their @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success You partially pin the creature to the adjacent surface. They take 1d8 additional piercing damage from the Strike and the first move action they take treats all squares as difficult terrain, as they struggle to remove the barb during their movement. If they or another creature use an Interact action to remove the barb before moving, they can move normally.

Failure You loosely pin the creature to the adjacent surface. They take 2d8 additional piercing damage from the Strike, and they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until they or another creature use an Interact action to remove the barb.

Critical Failure You completely impale the creature to the adjacent surface. They take 4d8 additional piercing damage from the Strike, and they're immobilized until they Escape against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. Other creatures who can reach them can also make the attempt to Escape to remove the barb.

Special If the target is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their AC against the barb Strike from Impaling Barb and their Reflex save against the barb's effects.

Sustaining Strength.name: 维持力量 Sustaining Strength
Sustaining Strength.description:
使你活动的魔法会顺畅地流经你的形体。即使你的生命值升至高于你最大生命值的一半，你也可以继续维持你的狂暴状态；并且当你的狂暴状态结束时，你不会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱}。

The magic that animates you flows readily through your form. You can continue maintaining your Berserk state even if your Hit Points rise above half your maximum Hit Points, and when your Berserk state ends, you aren't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}.

Diabolic Wounds.name: 恶魔伤口 Diabolic Wounds
Diabolic Wounds.description:
你造成的伤口尤其难以治疗。每当你使用通过 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.SAFAgN1pmtVBMRjx]{Diabolic Strikes} 获得的徒手攻击造成伤害，或使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TPiOXZ2NQSs8sUOq]{Diabolic Weapon Familiarity}（若你拥有 Diabolic Weapon Familiarity）下列出的武器造成伤害时，该伤口就会变为恶魔化伤口。若该攻击对目标造成持续伤害，则从该次持续伤害中恢复的纯骰检定 DC 从 15 提高至 17（在特别有效的协助下为 12）。对具有恶魔化伤口的生物执行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} 的 DC 提高 5。无论该攻击是否造成持续伤害，每天第一次，具有恶魔化伤口的生物接受能恢复生命值的魔法治疗时，恢复的生命值减少等同于你的等级。若具有恶魔化伤口的生物被治疗至满生命值，则其不再具有恶魔化伤口，且这些效果终止。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.Xj6hSFUSSOnMpkyc]{效果：恶魔化伤口}

The wounds you inflict are particularly difficult to heal. Whenever you deal damage with an unarmed attack you gained through @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.SAFAgN1pmtVBMRjx]{Diabolic Strikes} or with a weapon listed under @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TPiOXZ2NQSs8sUOq]{Diabolic Weapon Familiarity} (if you have Diabolic Weapon Familiarity), that wound becomes diabolic. If the attack deals persistent damage to the target, the DC of flat checks to recover from that instance of persistent damage is increased from 15 to 17 (12 with particularly effective assistance). The DC to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on a creature with a diabolic wound is increased by 5. Whether or not the attack deals persistent damage, the first time each day that a creature with a diabolic wound receives magical healing that restores Hit Points, the Hit Points restored are reduced by your level. If a creature with a diabolic wound is healed to full Hit Points, they no longer have a diabolic wound, and these effects cease.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.Xj6hSFUSSOnMpkyc]{Effect: Diabolic Wounds}

Beyond the Grave.name: 超越坟墓 Beyond the Grave
Beyond the Grave.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

需求 你的融合中的另一名成员已死亡，且你的融合中没有任何成员正在对该已死亡的成员使用 Beyond the Grave。

你将自身生命力的一小部分注入你倒下同伴的身体部件中；如果你是一只九头蛇，你甚至可以令其重新长出缺失的头颅，但你的努力只能产出其完整力量的影子。傀儡拥有原体的攻击调整值、AC、豁免调整值、察觉与技能调整值，但它仅有70生命值，并且缺少原体的特殊能力，包括免疫、抗力与弱点。

傀儡获得仆从（特征），并且它只能疾走、打击，以及贡献其动作以允许你使用组合行动（否则当有一名成员死亡时你无法使用）。傀儡的打击造成该倒下成员的正常伤害，但不会施加额外效果，因为它没有特殊能力。该效果会在傀儡的生命值降至0、倒下成员复活，或1分钟后自动结束，以先发生者为准。

当你命令仆从时，傀儡会尽其所能攻击你的敌人；否则它不采取任何动作。正因如此，你必须投入一个动作来命令仆从，才能让傀儡协助进行组合行动。

傀儡并不稳定，因此在它采取其动作（或将其贡献给组合行动）后的每个回合，它会失去4d6生命值。它不是活体生物，并且它永远无法以任何方式恢复其失去的生命值。如果你没有命令傀儡，它在该回合不会失去任何生命值。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements Another member of your fusion is dead, and no member of your fusion is using Beyond the Grave on that dead member of your fusion.

You instill a fragment of your own life force into your fallen comrade's parts, even going so far as to regrow their missing head if you're a hydra, though your efforts only produce a shadow of their full power. The puppet has the original's attack modifier, AC, saving throw modifiers, Perception, and skill modifiers, but it has only 70 Hit Points and lacks the original's special abilities, including immunities, resistances, and weaknesses.

The puppet gains the minion trait, and it can only Stride, Strike, and contribute its actions to allow you to use combined activities (which you otherwise can't use when one member is dead). The puppet's Strikes deal the fallen member's normal damage but don't apply added effects, since it doesn't have special abilities. The effect automatically ends if the puppet's Hit Points drop to 0, if the fallen member comes back to life, or after 1 minute, whichever comes first.

The puppet attacks your enemies to the best of its abilities when you Command a Minion and takes no actions otherwise. Because of this, you must commit an action to Command a Minion in order to have the puppet help with combined activities.

The puppet is unstable, so each turn after it takes its actions (or contributes them to a combined activity), it loses 4d6 Hit Points. It's not a living creature, and it can never regain its lost Hit Points in any way. If you don't Command the puppet, it doesn't lose any Hit Points that turn.

Keen Scent.name: 敏锐嗅觉 Keen Scent
Keen Scent.description:
你的头部长着一个嗅觉格外敏锐的鼻子，使你能够凭借气味从远处察觉生物和其他独特的气味。你获得一种特殊感官：不精确嗅觉，射程30尺。这意味着你可以用嗅觉来确定生物的确切位置。若你处于生物的下风处，GM通常将射程加倍；若你处于生物的上风处，GM通常将射程减半。此外，当你试图定位处于你嗅觉射程内的未被侦测生物时，你的察觉检定获得+2环境加值。

Your head has a nose with an especially keen scent, allowing you to notice creatures and other distinctive scents from a distance by their smell. You gain a special sense: imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet. This means you can use your sense of smell to determine the exact location of a creature. The GM will usually double the range if you're downwind from the creature or halve the range if you're upwind. In addition, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks whenever you're trying to locate an undetected creature that is within the range of your scent.

Panopticon.name: 圆形监狱 Panopticon
Panopticon.description:
同一星球上的任何生物都无法躲开你永无止境的监视；即使是你的盟友，也可能再也找不到真正私密的时刻——一个他们确信不会被你无情注视打扰的时刻。你可以每小时以异能天生法术施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r784cIz17eWujtQj]{探知}。当你这么做时，那不可见的传感器看起来像是一个微缩版的你。

No creature on the same planet is safe from your never-ending surveillance; even your allies might never again find a truly private moment, one that they can be sure is free of your relentless observation. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r784cIz17eWujtQj]{Scrying} once per hour as an occult innate spell. When you do, the invisible sensor looks like a miniature version of you.

Frequent Menace.name: 频繁威胁 Frequent Menace
Frequent Menace.description:
你可以每小时使用一次@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ey4rGyUOOmNUYL9Z]{骇人灵光}，而不是每天一次。

You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ey4rGyUOOmNUYL9Z]{Terrifying Aura} once per hour, rather than once per day.

Fractal Wings.name: 分形之翼 Fractal Wings
Fractal Wings.description:
你的子嗣从你体内涌出并紧密地互相扣合在一起，形成巨大的翅膀，能够带你飞得比他们各自独立拍打所能带来的更远距离。你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.opEiZFzzWbKqn250]{Fluttering Heart} 获得的飞行速度提升至 25 尺。

Your brood flows out of you and interlocks themselves together tightly, forming huge wings capable of carrying you aloft for a greater distance than their independent flapping could. The fly Speed you gain from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.opEiZFzzWbKqn250]{Fluttering Heart} increases to 25 feet.

Gifted Interrogator.name: 天赋审讯者 Gifted Interrogator
Gifted Interrogator.description:
你曾代表地狱担任谈判者或审讯者，度过了无数年代，因此你掌握了一些手段让工作更顺利。你每天一次可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aewxsale5xWEPKLk] 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY] 作为3环神圣先天法术施放，在施放该法术时决定当天选择哪一个。

Having spent untold ages acting as a negotiator or interrogator on Hell's behalf, you developed a few tricks to make your work go smoother. You can cast either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aewxsale5xWEPKLk] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY] as a 3rd-rank divine innate spell once per day, choosing which one each day when casting the spell.

Purge Psyche.name: 净化心灵 Purge Psyche
Purge Psyche.description:
频率 每小时一次

你将灵能能量冲刷过你的心智，以清除负面想法与恶意的精神状态。选择一个使你获得恐惧或呆滞（状态）的效果，尝试反制它；使用你较高者——@Check[occult|options:counteract,action:purge-psyche]{秘法法术DC – 10}或你的@Check[will|options:counteract]豁免调整值——作为反制调整值，并以你等级的一半（向上取整）作为反制等级。就该次反制检定而言，你不承受来自恐惧或呆滞（状态）的状态减值。若你未能反制该效果，但若其反制等级低1或2级你本可反制，你改为将该效果压制至你下一回合结束。该效果被压制期间，其持续时间不流逝。你无法反制或压制作为苦难一部分的状态或你自身的自然状态，因为它们只会再次出现。

Frequency once per hour

You flush psychic energies through your mind to purge negative thoughts and malicious mental conditions. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice that gives you the frightened or stupefied condition using the higher of your @Check[occult|options:counteract,action:purge-psyche]{occult spell DC – 10} or your @Check[will|options:counteract] save modifier as the counteract modifier and half your level (rounded up) as the counteract level. For the purpose of the counteract check, you don't take the status penalty from the frightened or stupefied condition. If you don't counteract the effect, but you would have counteracted it if its counteract level were 1 or 2 lower, you instead suppress the effect until the end of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed. You can't counteract or suppress conditions that are part of an affliction or your own natural state, as they simply reemerge.

The Second Riddle.name: 第二个谜题 The Second Riddle
The Second Riddle.description:
斯芬克斯的谜语钻入你的脑海，要求你无论如何都必须作答。你每天可以以神圣天生法术施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.pBevG6bSQOiyflev]{Befuddle} 两次，但你的该法术版本获得听觉与语言（特征）特征。

A sphinx's riddle worms its way into your mind, demanding an answer, no matter what. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.pBevG6bSQOiyflev]{Befuddle} twice per day as a divine innate spell, save that your version of the spell gains the auditory and linguistic traits.

Call on Golem Antimagic.name: 召唤魔像反魔法 Call on Golem Antimagic
Call on Golem Antimagic.description:
触发 一个生物即将用一个法术或魔法效果对你进行一次攻击掷骰，或你即将对一个法术或魔法效果进行一次豁免。使用具有魔法（特征）的武器或徒手攻击进行的打击，或其他涉及魔法物体但不会创造魔法效果的动作，不会触发此反应动作（）。

创造你的魔法可以干扰其他魔法，使你受益。你对触发的魔法效果以及直到你下个回合前由触发生物造成的所有其他魔法效果的豁免与AC获得+1环境加值。

Trigger A creature is about to attempt an attack roll against you with a spell or magical effect, or you are about to attempt a saving throw against a spell or magical effect. A Strike using a weapon or unarmed attack that has the magical trait or other action that involves a magical object but doesn't create a magical effect doesn't trigger this reaction.

The magic that created you can interfere with other magic to your benefit. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your saving throws and AC against the triggering magical effect and all other magical effects from the triggering creature until your next turn.

Phantasmal Barrage.name: 幻象齐射 Phantasmal Barrage
Phantasmal Barrage.description:
需求 你处于对狡计再定心状态

你在短时间内召唤出无穷无尽的幻象弹幕，分散敌人对你与所有盟友的注意力。你使用轻微幻象，为你与30尺内任意数量的盟友进行一次[[/act create-a-diversion variant=trick options=phantasmal-barrage]]{制造佯动}；该行动改为获得专注（特征），而非听觉、语言或操作（特征）特征，并且你的敌人不会因反复尝试用这些幻象来制造佯动而对抗获得+4环境加值。若你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.6RrVKzC24jySwiwT]{狡计幻象}专长，你的本次尝试获得+2环境加值。直到你下个回合结束，你可以因这些扰乱性的幻象而使用欺瞒来[[/act hide]]与[[/act sneak]]；即使你并未处于对狡计再定心状态，你仍会从对狡计再定心状态获得对这些检定的同等状态加值；并且你不需要掩蔽或隐蔽也能以此方式躲藏或潜行。当你如此行动时，会有明显的视觉幻象阻碍你敌人的感官，因此显然那里有什么东西或某个人。故而，你无法保持不被注意。你消耗你的再定心状态。

Requirements You are Recentered to guile

You call forth an endless barrage of illusions for a short time, distracting your foes from you and all your allies. You [[/act create-a-diversion variant=trick options=phantasmal-barrage]]{Create a Diversion} for you and any number of allies within 30 feet using minor illusions, which adds the concentrate trait instead of the auditory, linguistic, or manipulate traits, and your foes don't gain a +4 circumstance bonus against repeated attempts to Create a Diversion using these illusions. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your attempt if you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.6RrVKzC24jySwiwT]{Illusion of Guile} feat. Until the end of your next turn, you can use Deception to [[/act hide]] and [[/act sneak]] due to distracting illusions, you receive the same status bonus to these checks from being Recentered to guile even if you aren't, and you don't need cover or concealment to Hide or Sneak in this way. When you do, there are obviously visual illusions obstructing your foes' senses, so it's clear there's something or someone there. Thus, you can't remain unnoticed. You expend your Recentered state.

Abundant Curses.name: 丰沛诅咒 Abundant Curses
Abundant Curses.description:
你可以通过紧绷你的眼睛来更快地将敌人置于你的诅咒之下。你可以每分钟使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.24rlPHS1LqsbDzq1]{邪眼诅咒}，而不是每小时一次。

You can strain your eye in order to place your foes under your curse more quickly. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.24rlPHS1LqsbDzq1]{Curse of the Evil Eye} once per minute, instead of once per hour.

Curseproof.name: 诅咒免疫 Curseproof
Curseproof.description:
你的兽化人天性，无论你将其视为赋礼还是诅咒，都不会在你体内为其他诅咒留下空间。你获得对抗诅咒的豁免检定+1环境加值，并且如果你在对抗诅咒的豁免检定中掷骰获得成功，你改为获得大成功或大失败。

Your werecreature nature, whether you see it as a gift or a curse, leaves no room within you for other curses. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against curses, and if you roll a success on a saving throw against a curse, you get a critical success instead.

Elemental Strike.name: 元素打击 Elemental Strike
Elemental Strike.description:
你将元素能量灌注进你的突刺打击。你可以每分钟使用一次突刺打击，而不是每 10 分钟一次。此外，你会基于你的传承获得以下好处之一。

云巨人：你的突刺打击从咆哮的狂风中额外造成 1d6 钝击伤害，且那些受到钝击伤害的生物会被推开 5 英尺。

火巨人：你的突刺打击额外造成 1d6 火焰伤害以及 1d6 持续火焰伤害。

霜巨人：你的突刺打击额外造成 1d6 寒冷伤害，且那些受到寒冷伤害的生物在 1 轮内其速度承受 –15 英尺的状态减值。

风暴巨人：你的突刺打击额外造成 1d6 电击伤害，且那些受到电击伤害的生物在 1 轮内会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。

You imbue your Lunging Strike with elemental energy. You can use Lunging Strike once per minute instead of once per 10 minutes. Additionally, you gain one of the following benefits based on your heritage.

Cloud Giant: Your Lunging Strike deals an additional 1d6 bludgeoning damage from roaring winds, and those who take bludgeoning damage are pushed back 5 feet.

Fire Giant: Your Lunging Strike deals an additional 1d6 fire damage and 1d6 persistent fire damage.

Frost Giant: Your Lunging Strike deals an additional 1d6 cold damage and those who take cold damage take a –15-foot status penalty to their Speeds for 1 round.

Storm Giant: Your Lunging Strike deals 1d6 additional electricity damage and those who take electricity damage are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] for 1 round.

Tremorsense Roots.name: 震颤感知根须 Tremorsense Roots
Tremorsense Roots.description:
你的根须对附近地面中的任何震动都很敏感，使你能够察觉在同一表面上的生物。你获得以30尺为范围的震颤感知，作为一种模糊感官。

Your roots are sensitive to any vibrations in the ground nearby, allowing you to notice creatures on the same surface. You gain tremorsense as an imprecise sense out to a distance of 30 feet.

Diabolic Lore.name: 魔鬼学识 Diabolic Lore
Diabolic Lore.description:
由于你在地狱的服役中辛勤劳作多年，你对邪魔与凡人领域的行事之道了如指掌。你在宗教和社会中获得受训（熟练度）。如果你会自动在这些技能之一中成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）。

你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长，适用于魔鬼传闻。

Thanks to your long years spent toiling in Hell's service, you're well-versed in the ways of the fiendish and mortal realms. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Religion and Society. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Devil Lore.

Flight of the Sphinx.name: 斯芬克斯之翼 Flight of the Sphinx
Flight of the Sphinx.description:
频率 每轮一次

严格来说，像斯芬克斯这样的生物不该能够飞行——身体的形状完全不对，骨头太重，翅膀虽然很大，却远远不够强壮。但一点魔法就能消除所有这些顾虑。你飞行。若你通常没有飞行速度，你在这次移动中获得15英尺的飞行速度。若你在此次移动结束时不在坚实地面上，你会坠落。

特殊 多亏了你的魔法，你的翅膀足够强壮，即使你没有飞行速度，你也可以尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qm7xptMSozAinnPS]{制止坠落}。

Frequency once per round

Strictly speaking, a creature like a sphinx shouldn't be able to fly—the shape of the body is all wrong, the bones are too heavy, the wings, though large, are not nearly massive enough. But a little magic removes all of these concerns. You Fly. If you don't normally have a fly Speed, you gain a fly Speed of 15 feet for this movement. If you aren't on solid ground at the end of this movement, you fall.

Special Thanks to your magic, your wings are strong enough to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qm7xptMSozAinnPS]{Arrest a Fall} even though you don't have a fly Speed.

Copper Halo.name: 铜色光环 Copper Halo
Copper Halo.description:
一圈光环环绕在你的额头周围——也许是经典的圆形光环，或方形，或光之角，甚至是带刺的轮环。你的光环散发光亮，其效果如同一发神圣的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{光亮} 戏法。戏法会被升阶至等同于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术等级。你可以用一个单动作压制或重新建立光环，该动作具有专注（特征）。

An aura of light surrounds your brow—perhaps the classic circular ring of light, or a square, or horns of light, or even a thorned wheel. Your halo sheds light with the effects of a divine @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WBmvzNDfpwka3qT4]{Light} cantrip. A cantrip is heightened to a spell level equal to half your level rounded up. You can suppress or reestablish the halo as a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Greater Riddle Ward.name: 高等谜护结界 Greater Riddle Ward
Greater Riddle Ward.description:
你的谜语守卫远比大多数斯芬克斯更为强大，而且你能更频繁地设置它们。你通过 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.WIxpg5wUJkgL63oM]{Riddle Ward} 获得的守卫刻文会被升阶至第7等级，而非第4等级。除你先前的选项外，你还能将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6]{Charm}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PHVHBbdHeQRfjLmE]{Spirit Blast} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BilnTGuXrof9Dt9D]{Synaptic Pulse} 注入其中，并且任何被注入的法术都会被升阶至第6等级。最后，在你当天已使用过一次该能力后，你可以在同一天再次使用来自 Riddle Ward 的守卫刻文先天法术，以改变该日刻文的法术或目标，或在刻文已被触发时将其替换。你不能用此调整或替换你在之前日子创造的刻文；它们会被锁定，直到你再消耗一次 Riddle Ward 的每日使用次数来替换它们。

Your riddle wards are far more powerful than most sphinxes, and you can set them more often. Your glyph of warding from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.WIxpg5wUJkgL63oM]{Riddle Ward} is heightened to 7th level instead of 4th. You can imbue it with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6]{Charm}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.PHVHBbdHeQRfjLmE]{Spirit Blast}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BilnTGuXrof9Dt9D]{Synaptic Pulse} in addition to your earlier choices, and any imbued spell is heightened to 6th level. Lastly, you can use your glyph of warding innate spell from Riddle Ward again on the same day you already used it in order to change the spell or target from that day's glyph or to replace it if it's already been triggered. You can't use this to adjust or replace glyphs you created on previous days; they're locked in until you expend another daily use of Riddle Ward to replace them.

Frequent Encasement.name: 频繁包覆 Frequent Encasement
Frequent Encasement.description:
你比其他石像鬼更频繁地以岩石包裹自身。你可以每10分钟使用一次“包覆血肉”，而非每日一次。

You can surround yourself in rock more often than other gargoyles. You can Encase Flesh once per 10 minutes, rather than once per day.

Leopard's Pounce.name: 豹之猛扑 Leopard's Pounce
Leopard's Pounce.description:
你的猫科身体拥有一些如豹般扭转的优雅。你可以以2行动来进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap}，使你垂直Leap的距离加倍；或以3行动来进行Leap，使你垂直Leap的距离变为三倍。你不会因为跳跃方向与你的Stride不同而在@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jumps}中自动失败。

Your feline body has some of the twisting grace of the leopard. You can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} as a 2-action activity to double the distance you can Leap vertically, or Leap as a 3-action activity to triple the distance you can Leap vertically. You don't automatically fail @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jumps} for jumping in a different direction than your Stride.

Unfallen (Remaster).name: 不坠者（重制版） Unfallen (Remaster)
Unfallen (Remaster).description:
频率 每日一次

坠落从你身上夺走了许多，但仍有一缕天堂的火花残存。在最危急的时刻，你会想起自己曾经是什么——至少持续片刻。每位天使的回忆瞬间各不相同，但通常伴随着炫目的强光与天使号角之声。你周围10尺内的每个生物都会在1轮内受到 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}，除非它们成功通过一次对抗你职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）的 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免。

若你为中型或更小体型，你变为大型，且你的触及增加5尺（若你不知何故起始为超小型，则增加10尺）。你必须有足够空间扩张，否则该效果失效。你还获得以下增益：

  • 40点临时生命值。
  • 与你的速度相等的飞行速度。
  • 对抗魔法的豁免获得+1状态加值。
  • 黑暗视觉。
  • 你的拳头攻击造成2d8伤害。
  • 你的武器与徒手打击获得圣洁（特征）。

你未坠落的形态外观大致与你坠落前相似，你将以该形态持续1分钟。处于未坠落形态时，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{生命之息}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.hVU9msO9yGkxKZ3J]{神圣天谴} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYD0XZ4t3tQq6shc]{狂热信念} 作为6环神圣先天法术施放；每次使用此专长时，每个法术各可施放一次。

当你从未坠落形态中显现出来时，你变为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{枯竭 3}。

特殊 你获得圣洁（特征）与对不洁的弱点10。此效果即使在你不处于未坠落形态时也适用。

Frequency once per day

The fall took much from you, but some spark of Heaven lingers. In times of dire need, you remember what you once were—for a few moments, at least. Each angel's moment of recollection is different, but typically includes blinding light and the sound of angelic trumpets. Every creature within 10 feet of you is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round unless they succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

If you were Medium or smaller, you become Large and your reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if you somehow started out Tiny). You must have space to expand into, or the effect is lost. You also gain the following benefits:

  • 40 temporary Hit Points.
  • A fly Speed equal to your Speed.
  • A +1 status bonus to saves against magic.
  • Darkvision.
  • Your fist attacks deal 2d8 damage.
  • Your weapon and unarmed Strikes gain the holy trait.

Your unfallen form looks roughly like you did before the fall, and you remain in that form for 1 minute. While in your unfallen form, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.hVU9msO9yGkxKZ3J]{Divine Wrath}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYD0XZ4t3tQq6shc]{Zealous Conviction}, as 6th-rank divine innate spells, once each per use of this feat.

When you emerge from your unfallen form, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}.

Special You gain the holy trait and weakness 10 to unholy. This effect applies even when you're not in your unfallen form.

Purgatory Rekindled.name: 炼狱重燃 Purgatory Rekindled
Purgatory Rekindled.description:
频率 每周两次

你与炼狱之间久已断绝的联系已部分重新点燃，使你能够在凡人界与炼狱之间旅行。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ] 作为一项神圣先天法术。你每周可以施放它两次。此能力只能用于在物质位面与炼狱之间来回旅行。由于你与炼狱的联系，你的身体可以作为该法术的法术焦点，因此你不需要音叉。

Frequency twice per week

Your long-severed connection to Purgatory has become partially rekindled, enabling you to travel between the mortal realm and Purgatory. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ] as a divine innate spell. You can cast it twice per week. This can be used only to travel back and forth between the Material Plane and Purgatory. Due to your connection to Purgatory, your body can act as the spell focus, and you don't require a tuning fork.

Splinter.name: 碎片 Splinter
Splinter.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你因相邻敌人的一次大成功或大失败命中而受到物理伤害。你身体的材料碎裂并迸出尖刺，伤害攻击你的人。造成触发伤害的生物受到 @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d10[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] 豁免，对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者。该伤害在第7等级时增加1d10，此后每2个等级再增加1d10。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You take physical damage from a critical hit by an adjacent enemy. The material of your body shatters and splinters, damaging the one who attacked you. The creature that dealt the triggering damage takes @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d10[piercing]] damage with a @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. This damage increases by 1d10 at 7th level and every 2 levels after that.

Bestial Reach.name: 野兽触及 Bestial Reach
Bestial Reach.description:
你的混合形态如此庞大，拥有惊人的触及。只要你处于大型且为混合形态，你的触及提升至10尺。

Your hybrid form is so big, it boasts an incredible reach. Your reach increases to 10 feet as long as you are Large and in your hybrid form.

Wind Up Throw.name: 上紧投掷 Wind Up Throw
Wind Up Throw.description:
需求 你正持有一把投掷型临时武器。

你蓄力后用尽全力将手中的物体掷出。使用所需的武器进行一次远程打击。你在攻击掷骰上获得+1物品加值。若该打击本应造成更少的武器伤害骰，则该打击改为造成两个武器伤害骰。此打击后，该临时武器破裂；若该物品是神器、诅咒物品或其他难以破坏或摧毁的物品，则其受到等同于所造成伤害的伤害。

在第9等级时，该物品加值提高至+2；在第13等级时，若该打击本应造成更少的武器伤害骰，则该打击改为造成三个武器伤害骰，而非两个；在第17等级时，该物品加值提高至+3。

Requirements You're holding a thrown improvised weapon.

You wind up and then hurl the object in your hand with all your might. Make a ranged Strike with the required weapon. You gain a +1 item bonus to the attack roll. The Strike deals two weapon damage dice if it would have dealt fewer. After this Strike, the improvised weapon breaks, or takes damage equal to the damage dealt if the item is an artifact, cursed item, or other item that's difficult to break or destroy.

At 9th level, the item bonus increases to +2, at 13th level, the Strike deals three weapon damage dice if it would have dealt fewer, instead of two, and at 17th level, the item bonus increases to +3.

All For One.name: 一人为众 All For One
All For One.description:
你和你的融合中的其他成员如同一体发动攻击，协同穿透敌人的防御。你的融合中的每名成员都对同一个目标进行打击。在应用抗力、弱点等效果之前，将所有成功打击的伤害合并，然后只结算一次。若你的融合中的任意成员使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} 反应动作（）来协助融合中另一名成员的攻击掷骰，则被协助的成员在其伤害掷骰上获得等同于其攻击掷骰所获得环境加值的环境加值。

你融合中在本轮尚未行动的成员也会增加他们的多重攻击减值，尽管他们的下一个回合尚未开始。这同样适用于在同一回合中未来再次使用“同心协力”（或其他联合攻击，如 X-Strike），也适用于他们在自己回合中进行的任何单独攻击。

特殊你的融合在该轮中只能于先攻顺序中最先行动的那名融合成员的回合内，执行“同心协力”的打击。

You and the other members of your fusion attack as one, working together to pierce your foes' defenses. Each member of your fusion Strikes the same target. Combine the damage of all successful Strikes before applying resistances, weaknesses, and the like only once. If any of the members of your fusion use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} reaction to assist the attack rolls of another member of your fusion, the assisted member gains a circumstance bonus to their damage roll equal to the circumstance bonus to their attack roll.

Members of your fusion who haven't acted yet this round increase their multiple attack penalty, even though their next turn hasn't started yet. This applies to future uses of All For One (or another combined attack like X-Strike) on the same turn, as well as to any individual attacks they make on their own turn.

Special Your fusion can only perform All For One's Strikes during the turn of the member of the fusion acting first in initiative that round.

Last-Minute Rescue.name: 最后一刻的救援 Last-Minute Rescue
Last-Minute Rescue.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 30尺内的一名盟友获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying 1} 状态。

你迫切地想要拯救你的朋友，将他们迅速带离危险之地。选择一个你30尺内且与濒死盟友相邻的未被占据的空间。你进行一次跳跃，落在盟友相邻处，随后使用交互将盟友抱起，再次跳跃，落在所选空间相邻处；这些跳跃不需要遵循跳跃的典型距离规则。你将盟友放在所选空间中。

Frequency once every 10 minutes

Trigger An ally within 30 feet gains the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying 1} condition.

Desperate to save your friend, you whisk them out of harm's way. Select an unoccupied space within 30 feet of you and adjacent to your dying ally. You Leap, landing adjacent to your ally, then Interact to pick up your ally, then Leap again, landing adjacent to the selected space; these Leaps don't need to follow the typical distance rules for a Leap. You place your ally down in the selected space.

Riddle of the Sky.name: 天空之谜 Riddle of the Sky
Riddle of the Sky.description:
你已经解开了天空之谜，使你更容易在短时间内飞行。你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Gjs1qOYZNA4NdZHS]{斯芬克斯之飞行} 获得的飞行速度提高至25尺。

You've solved the riddle of the sky, making it easier to fly in short bursts. The fly Speed you gain from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Gjs1qOYZNA4NdZHS]{Flight of the Sphinx} increases to 25 feet.

Lion's Majesty.name: 狮王威仪 Lion's Majesty
Lion's Majesty.description:
斯芬克斯的成长既自然又不自然——成年斯芬克斯有狮子的体型，但在紧要关头也能缩小到更像豹子的比例。你持续获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 的效果。你可以用一个动作解除或恢复这些效果，该动作具有专注（特征）特征。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.OZMk7bzeFxbUfHNj]{效果：狮之威仪}

The growth of a sphinx is both natural and unnatural—an adult sphinx is the size of a lion, yet in a pinch can shrink to a more leopard-like proportion. You constantly gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}. You can dismiss or resume these effects as an action, which has the concentrate trait.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.OZMk7bzeFxbUfHNj]{Effect: Lion's Majesty}

Extra Big.name: 特大 Extra Big
Extra Big.description:
变大还不够——你还想一直保持巨大！你可以每小时使用一次“变大！”，而不是每天一次。

It's not enough to get big—you want to stay big! You can use Get Big! once per hour, rather than once per day.

Spring's Blossoming.name: 春之绽放 Spring's Blossoming
Spring's Blossoming.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你呼唤春日新芽的力量，抖落治疗花瓣。你和所有盟友在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]范围内恢复@Damage[5d8[healing]]生命值，且15尺内所有不死生物受到@Damage[5d8[vitality]]伤害，并进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic]豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。治疗与伤害在春季期间都提升至6d8（@Damage[6d8[healing]]生命值，@Damage[6d8[vitality]]）。

特殊 每当季节从春季变为夏季时，你若愿意，可以选择立刻将春之绽放专长重训为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.uJy0gRUso5h7MSrz]{夏之纠缠}。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You call upon the power of spring's new budding to shed healing petals. You and all allies in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] recover @Damage[5d8[healing]] Hit Points, and all undead creatures within 15 feet take @Damage[5d8[vitality]] damage, with a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. The healing and damage both increase to 6d8 during the spring (@Damage[6d8[healing]] Hit Points, @Damage[6d8[vitality]]).

Special Whenever the season changes from spring to summer, you can choose to instantly retrain the Spring's Blossoming feat to @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.uJy0gRUso5h7MSrz]{Summer's Tangle} if you prefer.

Diabolic Magic.name: 恶魔魔法 Diabolic Magic
Diabolic Magic.description:
尽管你已从地狱的束缚与桎梏中解脱，你的心中仍携带着一丝地狱的碎片。从神圣法术列表中选择一个常见的神圣戏法（或另一个你拥有许可的神圣戏法）。你可以随意将该戏法作为神圣先天法术施放。戏法会被升阶至等于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术环阶。

Despite being freed from the confines and strictures of Hell, you carry a shred of Hell within your heart. Choose one common divine cantrip (or another divine cantrip to which you have access) from the divine spell list. You can cast this cantrip as a divine innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.

Angelic Lore.name: 天使学识 Angelic Lore
Angelic Lore.description:
你或许在堕落中忘却了许多，但仍有许多记忆留存。你获得交涉与宗教的受训（熟练度）等级。若你会自动在其中一项技能中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}专长，其适用于天使学识。

You may have forgotten much in the fall, but there's still much that you remember. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Diplomacy and Religion. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Angel Lore.

Lamia Spell Expertise.name: 拉弥亚法术精通 Lamia Spell Expertise
Lamia Spell Expertise.description:
你的魔法是你与生俱来的权利，如同任何诅咒也曾是一样。在你的每日准备期间，选择 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]，或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KSAEhNfZyXMO7Z7V]{流亡者的诅咒}。在那一天，你可以将此法术作为一个5环的异能先天法术施放一次。你在秘术法术DC与秘术法术攻击掷骰上成为专家（若你尚未如此）。

Your magic is your birthright, as much as any curse ever was. During your daily preparations, choose @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GaRQlC9Yw1BGKHfN], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.KSAEhNfZyXMO7Z7V]{Outcast's Curse}. You can Cast this Spell as a 5th-rank occult innate spell once that day. You become an expert in occult spell DCs and occult spell attack rolls, if you weren’t already.

Devour Knowledge.name: 吞噬知识 Devour Knowledge
Devour Knowledge.description:
你可以运用你吞食其脑的生物的专长来解决困扰你的难题。每10分钟一次，当你食用一颗来自一名小型或更大、具智能的生物的新鲜大脑时，你可以尝试进行一次用于 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Recall Knowledge]{回忆知识} 的单次技能检定；若你所吃大脑的生物的技能调整值高于你的，则改用该生物的技能调整值来替代你自己的。

You can use the expertise of the creatures whose brains you devour to solve a conundrum bedeviling you. Once per 10 minutes, when you eat a fresh brain from a Small or larger sapient creature, you can attempt a single skill check to @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Recall Knowledge]{Recall Knowledge}, using the skill modifier of the creature whose brain you ate instead of your own if it's higher.

Autumn's Abscission.name: 秋之脱落 Autumn's Abscission
Autumn's Abscission.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你呼唤秋末凋零之力，释放出一阵由各种颜色的锋利如刀的叶片组成的旋风。所有位于@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]内的敌人受到@Damage[10d6[slashing]]伤害；若当前季节为秋季，则改为受到@Damage[12d6[slashing]]伤害，并以你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者为基准进行一次@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic]豁免。

特殊 每当季节从秋季变为冬季时，若你愿意，你可以选择立刻将秋末凋零专长重训为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fEoll6yx0SJsFX6g]{冬之枯萎}。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You call upon the power of autumn's fall to release a flurry of razor-sharp leaves of every color. All foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] take @Damage[10d6[slashing]] damage, or @Damage[12d6[slashing]] damage if it's currently autumn, with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Special Whenever the season changes from autumn to winter, you can choose to instantly retrain the Autumn's Abscission feat to @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fEoll6yx0SJsFX6g]{Winter's Withering} if you prefer.

Curse Breaker.name: 破咒者 Curse Breaker
Curse Breaker.description:
频率 每日一次

不应再有人像你和你的族人一样受苦，尤其不应因他们未曾犯下的罪行而受苦。花费十分钟进行准备，然后对你所接触的一名生物或一个物体上影响其的一个诅咒进行反制检定。你的反制等级为你等级的一半（向上取整），你的反制调整值为你的奥秘学调整值、你的宗教调整值或你的法术DC – 10，取其中最高者。若你成功，则诅咒被解除。若该诅咒来源于一件受诅咒的物品或其他外部来源，则成功表示目标生物可以将该受诅咒的物品摆脱，但不会移除物品上的诅咒。

Frequency once per day

No one should suffer as you and your kin have suffered, especially not for a crime they haven’t committed. Take ten minutes to prepare, and then roll a counteract check against one curse affecting a creature or object you’re touching. Your counteract level is half your level rounded up, and your counteract modifier is your Occultism modifier, your Religion modifier, or your spell DC – 10, whichever is highest. If you succeed, the curse is broken. If the curse comes from a cursed item or other external source, a success indicates that the target creature can rid itself of the cursed item, but it doesn’t remove the curse from the item.

Tail Sweep.name: 尾部横扫 Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description:
你将尾巴在身后横扫，在一个小锥形范围内绊倒你的敌人。尝试运动检定，对 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] 内的每个敌人各进行一次 [[/act trip]]。在结算完你尾巴横扫的所有绊摔尝试之前，这些绊摔尝试不会增加你的多重攻击减值。

特殊 如果目标因你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{阴谋诡计} 反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，那么他们在对抗尾巴横扫的绊摔尝试的反射DC上也承受相同的环境减值。

You sweep your tail behind you and trip your foes in a small cone. Attempt Athletics checks to [[/act trip]] each foe in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15]. Don't increase your multiple attack penalty from these Trip attempts until resolving all the Trip attempts from your Tail Sweep.

Special If the target is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their Reflex DC against the Trip attempt from Tail Sweep.

Raise a Barricade.name: 升起路障 Raise a Barricade
Raise a Barricade.description:
需求 你的融合中的一名成员正持用盾牌

你与融合中的所有成员协作，以便举起盾牌并保护所有人免受伤害。你进行“举盾”，并将盾牌给予 AC 的环境加值授予你的融合中的每一名成员。

特殊 你仅能在你的回合中，在你正持用盾牌时执行“升起路障”。

Requirements a member of your fusion is wielding a shield

You work together with all the members of your fusion in order to raise a shield and protect everyone from harm. You Raise a Shield and grant the circumstance bonus to AC from the shield to every member of your fusion.

Special You can only perform Raise a Barricade on your turn if you are wielding a shield.

Grotesque.name: 怪诞 Grotesque
Grotesque.description:
你在摆出怪诞且可怖的面部表情方面异常天赋异禀。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} 作为加值专长，即使你未满足“受训于威吓”的先决条件。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.e7cb1MJFoBhdKbGu]{Jump Scare} 反应动作（）。

You're exceptionally talented at adopting grotesque and fearsome facial expressions. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} as a bonus feat, even if you don't meet the prerequisite of being trained in Intimidation. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.e7cb1MJFoBhdKbGu]{Jump Scare} reaction.

Silver Halo.name: 银色光环 Silver Halo
Silver Halo.description:
你可以短暂显现一道由明亮的珍珠色光芒构成的光环——可以是平静、令人安心的光芒来驱散阴影，也可以是刺目、灼烧般的强光来凸显每一处缺陷。每日一次，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{Bane} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless} 作为1环神圣先天法术施放。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.GmzGIP7gp2EmvfeK]{Copper Halo} 专长，你可以每日一次施放bane与bless各一次，并且每当你维持该法术时，bless或bane的效果半径会额外增加5尺。

You can briefly manifest a halo of luminous, pearly light—either a calm, comforting light to chase away the shadows, or a stark, burning glare that highlights every flaw. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{Bane} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless} as a 1st-rank divine innate spell.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.GmzGIP7gp2EmvfeK]{Copper Halo} feat, you can cast both bane and bless once per day, and the radius of the bless or bane effect increases by an additional 5 feet each time you Sustain the spell.

Wrappings Lash.name: 裹布鞭击 Wrappings Lash
Wrappings Lash.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 位于你蛛网裹布触及范围内的一名生物使用一个动作进行打击或尝试进行一次技能检定。

你用蛛网裹布对触发生物尝试进行一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}。除本次擒抱尝试的通常效果之外，若成功，该生物对触发的动作承受–1环境减值（若大成功或大失败则为–2）。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.u4IoA8pTZPGs6YIO]{效果：裹布鞭击}

Frequency once per hour

Trigger A creature within reach of your web wrappings uses an action to Strike or attempt a skill check.

You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} the triggering creature with your web wrappings. In addition to the usual effects of this Grapple attempt, the creature takes a –1 circumstance penalty to the triggering action on a success (–2 on a critical success).

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.u4IoA8pTZPGs6YIO]{Effect: Wrappings Lash}

Improved Spirit Touch.name: 强化灵魂接触 Improved Spirit Touch
Improved Spirit Touch.description:
你的武器和徒手攻击造成额外 1 点伤害。此伤害对活体生物为虚空伤害，对不死生物为活力伤害。既非活体亦非不死的生物，例如构装体，不会受到此额外伤害。

Your weapon and unarmed attacks deal 1 additional damage. The damage is void damage against living creatures and vitality damage against undead creatures. Creatures that are neither living nor undead, such as constructs, are unharmed by this additional damage.

Mediator.name: 调停者 Mediator
Mediator.description:
你作为族群或氏族的调停者与使者，已学会如何在其他文化中相处。你在以下技能中选择其一并成为受训：交涉或社交。此外，你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{多语}技能专长。若你将自动在这些技能之一中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训。

特殊 若你是@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.nJDAz2G2HwLHXdie]{换巢石像鬼}，你可以改为选择同时在交涉与社交两项技能中成为受训（如此则你不会获得多语技能专长）。

You serve as a mediator and emissary for your clutch or clan and have learned how to get along among other cultures. You become trained in one of the following skills of your choice: Diplomacy or Society. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} skill feat. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

Special If you're a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.nJDAz2G2HwLHXdie]{Clutchswapped Gargoyle}, you can instead choose to become trained in both Diplomacy and Society (in which case you don't gain the Multilingual skill feat).

Abeyance Rift.name: 停滞裂隙 Abeyance Rift
Abeyance Rift.description:
你拥有一丝树栖档案将其积累的知识在你死亡或濒临死亡时释放脉冲的能力回响。每当你被降至0生命值并获得濒死（状态），以及每当你死亡时，一道精神冲击波会从你的身体中爆发，对30尺内的生物造成 @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.level,18),6,ternary(gte(@actor.level,15),5,ternary(gte(@actor.level,12),4,3))))d10[mental]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免，对抗你职业DC与法术DC中较高者。豁免失败者还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。如果你在未先获得濒死（状态）的情况下立刻死亡，例如因死亡效果而死，则精神冲击波改为造成 @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.level,18),12,ternary(gte(@actor.level,15),10,ternary(gte(@actor.level,12),8,6))))d10[mental]] 伤害。于第12、第15以及第18等级时，伤害增加1d10（若立刻死亡则为2d10），在第18等级时最高为6d10伤害（立刻死亡则为12d10）。

You possess an echo of an arboreal archive's ability to send forth a pulse of your amassed knowledge when you die or are close to death. Whenever you are reduced to 0 Hit Points and gain the dying condition, and whenever you die, a mental shock wave explodes out from your body and deals @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.level,18),6,ternary(gte(@actor.level,15),5,ternary(gte(@actor.level,12),4,3))))d10[mental]] damage to creatures within 30 feet with a @Check[will|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. Those who fail also fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If you die instantly without first gaining the dying condition, such as from a death effect, the mental shock wave deals @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.level,18),12,ternary(gte(@actor.level,15),10,ternary(gte(@actor.level,12),8,6))))d10[mental]] damage instead. At 12th, 15th, and 18th levels, the damage increases by 1d10 (or 2d10 if you die instantly), to a maximum of 6d10 damage (12d10 for an instant death) at 18th level.

Magical Bastion.name: 魔法堡垒 Magical Bastion
Magical Bastion.description:
通过你不懈努力地守护你的被监护者，你学会了驾驭元素能量来创造防御屏障。你每天可以施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Stone Wall}，作为原初先天法术。在17级时，你可以将其作为第7环原初先天法术施放。

Through your tireless efforts to defend your ward, you've learned to harness elemental energies to create defensive barriers. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kOa055FIrO9Smnya]{Wall of Stone} once per day as a primal innate spell. At 17th level, you can cast it as a 7th-rank primal innate spell.

Curse Condemned.name: 诅咒·谴罪 Curse Condemned
Curse Condemned.description:
频率 每天一次

需求 你的上一个动作是一次对生物成功的近战打击

你松动目标灵魂与其身体之间的连接，诅咒他们。该生物必须尝试一次对抗你较高的职业DC或法术DC的 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响，并在24小时内暂时免疫“诅咒定罪”。

成功 目标感到一阵短暂的末日战栗，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态） 1}，持续1轮。

失败 目标暂时被诅咒。1小时内，目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态） 2}。在持续时间内，每当目标获得濒死（状态）时，呆滞（状态）的数值增加1，至多为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞（状态） 4}。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但诅咒的效果为永久。照常，诅咒仍可被能移除诅咒的效果移除。

Frequency once per day

Requirements your last action was a successful melee Strike against a creature

You loosen the connection between the target's soul and their body, cursing them. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The target is unaffected and is temporarily immune to Curse Condemned for 24 hours.

Success The target feels a momentary shudder of doom and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target becomes temporarily cursed. For 1 hour, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}. Each time during the duration that the target gains the dying condition, the stupefied condition value increases by 1, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}.

Critical Failure As failure, but the effect of the curse is permanent. As normal, the curse can still be removed by effects that remove curses.

Hillblood.name: 丘血裔 Hillblood
Hillblood.description:
如同山丘巨人一般，你知道如何充分利用自己辛苦挣来的休息。每小时一次，你可以用一个10分钟的行动小睡片刻，这会给予你等同于你等级的临时生命值，持续10分钟。你可以从下方列出的额外专长中选择巨人专长。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.AhaNMLFXYYmuibkW]{效果：山丘血脉}

额外专长

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YhB0AHBrTJfAR8N6]{蛮力}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.aguwFAq83B9PWDyd]{巨人学识}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ckIS3dwpIlxvj0XV]{万物皆可投掷}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.WVx6e1Y1r5bmtboF]{活体壁垒}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.SV7wAwnedn3aDOYx]{费—菲—佛—芳！}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jEO0FZLWcHiafglv]{乘胜追击}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HVwKhYgfv8sH2a3x]{蓄势投掷}

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.RF3DdsDbNwosGrvi]{接住投射物}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fmNeQEJQLkNWwKXA]{变大！}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.r9ghJ7i8R7haw1fL]{活体壁垒}

13级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HmVS2Gdfy5vhyiIg]{更大体型}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PC7DRFV8zaIYm3Wb]{无畏}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.cFdPF0BbG7CnbafJ]{整吞}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jYWd1CIMo8FiU7p1]{投掷盟友}

17级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TQDR2Zcr1nStO3eN]{永恒}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z9Gc9rRb0DPuSi51]{巨人的奔袭}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.R95FPWh5dLuV0x18]{捶地猛击}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9XjaTkjd2F6WjlGd]{远古魔法}

Like a hill giant, you know just how to make the most of your hard-earned rest. Once per hour, you can take a quick power nap as a 10-minute activity, which gives you temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last for 10 minutes. You can take giant feats from the Additional Feats listed below.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.AhaNMLFXYYmuibkW]{Effect: Hillblood}

Additional Feats

1st

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dIIJfzzqjYToDpQi]{Big Bully}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ckIS3dwpIlxvj0XV]{Hurl Anything}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.WVx6e1Y1r5bmtboF]{Living Wall}

Ageless.name: 不老 Ageless
Ageless.description:
你在凡人世界的逗留已是相当漫长，而在你的时代里，你做过许多事情。在你的每日准备期间，你可以回想你在苍穹之下度过的时代，以在你选择的一项技能中获得受训（熟练度）熟练度等级。此熟练度持续到你再次准备为止。由于此熟练度是暂时的，你不能将其用作技能提升或像专长那样的永久角色选项的先决条件。

Your sojourn to the mortal realms has been an extended one, and in your day, you have done a great many things. During your daily preparations, you can reflect upon your time beneath the heavens to gain the trained proficiency rank in one skill of your choice. This proficiency lasts until you prepare again. Since this proficiency is temporary, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a skill increase or a permanent character option like a feat.

Fateful Arrow.name: 宿命之箭 Fateful Arrow
Fateful Arrow.description:
需求 你上一个动作是用你的丝弓进行的一次成功打击。

在用你的丝弓命中后，你将命运之线系在你的目标身上，使其更容易受到你的法术与引魂使的能力影响。若你上一个动作是命中，则你命中的生物在对抗你的法术、你或他人使用的引魂使族裔或来世代理人变体的能力，以及其他以生物（而非玩家角色）构建的引魂使之法术与能力时，其豁免承受–1状态减值。若你上一个动作为大成功或大失败的命中，或若该生物已因先前使用过命定之箭而带有减值，则其改为承受–2状态减值而非–1状态减值。不论哪种情况，该状态减值持续1天。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.R6uABHCswM6kvgfh]{效果: 命定之箭}

Requirements Your previous action was a successful Strike with your silkbow.

After hitting with your silkbow, you tie the strands of fate to your target, weakening them against your spells and the abilities of psychopomps. If your previous action was a hit, the creature you hit takes a –1 status penalty on saving throws against your spells, abilities you or others use from the psychopomp ancestry or the agent of the afterlife archetype, and the spells and abilities of other psychopomps built as creatures rather than player characters. If your previous action was a critical hit, or if the creature already had a penalty from a prior use of Fateful Arrow, they take a –2 status penalty instead of a –1 status penalty. Either way, the status penalty lasts for 1 day.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.R6uABHCswM6kvgfh]{Effect: Fateful Arrow}

Accursed Eye Beam.name: 诅咒眼射线 Accursed Eye Beam
Accursed Eye Beam.description:
你会诅咒暴露在你眼射线最强大攻击下的敌人。当你以眼射线造成大成功时，你可以选择对目标施加以下三种诅咒之一；每当你以眼射线对敌人造成大成功时，你都可以选择不同的诅咒。这既是大成功或大失败专精效果，也是诅咒、死灵和秘法效果。

笨拙诅咒目标变得动作不协调且笨手笨脚，他们在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

愚蠢诅咒目标的愚蠢冲动被放大、判断力受损，类似醉酒，他们在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}。

弱点诅咒目标的肌肉变得虚弱，拒绝以全部潜能运作，他们在1轮内获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}。

You curse foes exposed to your eye beams' most powerful attacks. On a critical hit with your eye beam, you can choose to apply one of the following three curses of your choice on the target; you can choose a different curse each time you critically hit a foe with your eye beam. This is a critical specialization effect, as well as a curse, necromancy, and occult effect.

Curse of Bungling The target becomes graceless and bumbling, and they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round.

Curse of Foolishness The target's foolish impulses are amplified and their judgment is impaired, akin to being drunk, and they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Curse of Weakness The target's muscles weaken, refusing to operate at their full potential, and they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

Mental Aegis.name: 精神庇护 Mental Aegis
Mental Aegis.description:
你守护自己的心智，抵御所有可能的侵入性精神干涉，以及任何可能向他人揭示你相关信息的魔法。你对抗精神效果的豁免获得+4状态加值。你的精神圣盾也会尝试反制任何侦测、揭示与探知效果，使用你的一半等级（向上取整）作为反制等级，并使用你的@Check[will|options:counteract]意志豁免调整值或你的@Check[occult|options:counteract]{神秘法术DC – 10}两者中较高者作为反制调整值。若反制尝试成功，你所反制的效果仍正常运作，但无法侦测到任何关于你及你所携带物品的信息。例如，侦测魔法仍会侦测到区域内其他魔法，但不会侦测到你身上的任何魔法。

You defend your mind from all possible intrusive mental incursions and from any magic that can potentially reveal information about you to others. You gain a +4 status bonus to saves against mental effects. Your mental aegis also attempts to counteract any detection, revelation, and scrying effects using half your level (rounded up) as the counteract level and the higher of your @Check[will|options:counteract] save modifier or your @Check[occult|options:counteract]{occult spell DC – 10} as your counteract modifier. On a successful counteract attempt, the effect you counteracted functions normally except that it detects nothing about you and your possessions. For instance, detect magic would still detect other magic in the area, but not any magic on you.

Empathetic Dissonance.name: 共情失调 Empathetic Dissonance
Empathetic Dissonance.description:
当你将自己重新归心于共情时，你可以引导敌人自身的共情，从而削弱他们杀戮的决心。处于重新归心于共情期间，你的敌人对你进行的打击在其伤害掷骰上会受到状态减值，数值取决于你在交涉中的熟练度等级：若你在交涉中为受训或专家，则伤害获得–2状态减值；若你在交涉中为大师，则伤害获得–4状态减值；若你在交涉中为传奇，则伤害获得–6状态减值。这是一个情绪、惑控、心灵与奥术效果。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.sq9JkBNvPEMIdKxh]{共情之痛}反应动作（）。

When you Recenter yourself to empathy, you can tap into your foes' own empathy in order to weaken their resolve to kill. While Recentered to empathy, your enemies' Strikes take a status penalty to their damage rolls against you depending on your proficiency rank in Diplomacy: a –2 status penalty to damage if you're trained or an expert in Diplomacy, a –4 status penalty to damage if you're a master in Diplomacy, or a –6 status penalty to damage if you're legendary in Diplomacy. This is an emotion, enchantment, mental, and occult effect. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.sq9JkBNvPEMIdKxh]{Pang of Empathy} reaction.

Psychic Will.name: 灵能师 意志 Psychic Will
Psychic Will.description:
尽管你从事的职业通常侧重于你福祉的其他性相，你的心灵防御却显著强于你职业中的其他人。你获得用于你的意志豁免的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.i4yRvVwvXbGZDsD1]{Canny Acumen} 专长。

While you've pursued an occupation that normally focuses on other aspects of your well-being, your psychic defenses are significantly stronger than others of your class. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.i4yRvVwvXbGZDsD1]{Canny Acumen} feat for your Will saving throws.

Unstoppable March.name: 势不可挡的行军 Unstoppable March
Unstoppable March.description:
频率 每小时一次

尽管你不像完全体的构装魔像那样庞大，你仍有决心将全部能量倾注于不可阻挡的行军，无论挡在你路上的是谁，你都能到达想去的地方。你疾行至多等同于你的速度。在这次移动期间的任意时点，你可以穿过一个生物的空间，在进入其空间之前尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}该生物以将其从路上推开。与通常的推撞一样，你将该生物推离你，但如果你希望继续行军，你必须选择将该生物推向能为你清出通路的方向。若成功，只要你将该生物推开，你就可以继续你的疾行；但若失败（或无处可将该生物推开），你必须结束你的移动。若你在运动中为专家，你可以在疾行期间穿过至多两个不同生物的空间。若你在运动中为大师，你可以在疾行期间穿过至多三个不同生物的空间。若你在运动中为传奇，且你在推撞尝试中成功，则你会大成功。

Frequency once per hour

Though you aren't as massive as a fully construct golem, you have the determination to pour all your energy into an unstoppable march, getting you where you want to go, regardless of those who stand in your way. You Stride up to your Speed. At any point during this movement, you can move through a single creature's space, attempting to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} that creature out of the way before entering its space. As normal for a Shove, you push the creature away from you, but if you wish to continue your march, you must choose to push the creature away in a direction that clears a path for you. On a success, as long as you push the creature out of the way, you can continue your Stride, but on a failure (or if there's nowhere to push the creature), you must end your movement. If you are expert in Athletics, you can move through up to two different creature's spaces during your Stride. If you are master in Athletics, you can move through up to three different creature's spaces during your Stride. If you are legendary in Athletics and you succeed at the Shove attempt, you critically succeed.

On the Hunt.name: 狩猎中 On the Hunt
On the Hunt.description:
当你下定决心追踪猎物时，很难有人能阻止你。你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} 时可以以你的全 速度 移动。如果你的生存具有大师 熟练度，你在追踪期间无需每小时都进行一次新的生存 检定。如果你的生存具有传奇 熟练度，且拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.w3EVe2aSGfHjK31n]{Primal Scent} 专长，你在追踪期间还可以进行另一项 探索 行动。

When you set your mind to tracking down your prey, it is difficult to stop you. You can move at your full Speed while you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track}. If you have master proficiency in Survival, you don't need to attempt a new Survival check every hour while Tracking. If you have legendary proficiency in Survival and the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.w3EVe2aSGfHjK31n]{Primal Scent} feat, you can use another exploration activity while Tracking.

Mental Bulwark.name: 心智壁垒 Mental Bulwark
Mental Bulwark.description:
你的人造心智沉着冷静，甚至能够充当缓冲，保护你免受精神攻击。你在对抗精神效果的豁免上获得+1环境加值，并获得等于你等级一半的精神伤害抗力。

Your manufactured mind is so unflappable that it's able to act as a buffer to protect you from mental attacks. You gain +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against mental effects and resistance to mental damage equal to half your level.

Chaotic Curse.name: 混沌诅咒 Chaotic Curse
Chaotic Curse.description:
频率 每小时一次

你聚焦你那不祥的凝视，使一种难以预料、受诅咒的病痛降临于你的敌人。选择60尺内的一个敌人。他们陷入诅咒，其效果取决于他们对你较高的职业DC或法术DC所进行的@Check[will|against:class-spell]豁免，以及在表1上掷一次d20。在大成功时，敌人不受影响。有些结果会为“混沌诅咒”追加额外特征，列于括号中。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-rolltables.RollTable.bMqG4QJzZB6qL1bc]{混沌诅咒}

d20结果
1笨拙诅咒 成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，持续1轮。失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}，持续1分钟；大失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 3}，持续1分钟。
2虚弱诅咒 成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}，持续1轮。失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 2}，持续1分钟；大失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 3}，持续1分钟。
3愚行诅咒 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:mental]（精神）成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续1轮。失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2}，持续1分钟；大失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 3}，持续1分钟。
4恐惧诅咒 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:emotion,fear,mental]（情绪、恐惧、精神）成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 3}；大失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 4}。
5蛊惑诅咒 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:emotion,incapacitation,mental]（情绪、失能、精神）成功豁免时，由于被友谊之情分心，敌人在1轮内对你进行攻击掷骰时承受–1状态减值@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.Pys9csuzG2ietGxJ]{效果：蛊惑诅咒}。失败时，他们在1小时内变为友善；大失败时，他们在1小时内变为乐于助人。
6迟滞诅咒 成功豁免时，敌人获得缓慢（状态）1，持续1轮。失败时，他们获得缓慢（状态）1，持续1分钟；大失败时，他们获得缓慢（状态）2，持续1轮，且随后获得缓慢（状态）1，持续10分钟。
7麻痹诅咒 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:incapacitation]（失能）成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢（状态） 1}，持续1轮。失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}，持续1轮；大失败时，他们麻痹2轮。
8失血诅咒 成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失（状态） 1}，但该流失（状态）在2轮后结束。失败时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失（状态） 2}；大失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失（状态） 3}。
9石化诅咒 成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢（状态） 1}，持续1轮。失败时，他们获得缓慢（状态）1，并且必须在其每个回合结束时尝试一次强韧豁免；此持续豁免具有失能（特征）（@Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell|traits:incapacitation]）。在强韧豁免失败时，缓慢（状态）提高1（若为大失败则提高2）。强韧豁免成功会使缓慢（状态）降低1。当某个生物由于此诅咒带来的缓慢（状态）而无法行动时，该生物会永久地、以非魔法方式变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{石化}。若该生物被石化或缓慢（状态）被移除，则法术结束。大失败时，效果同失败，但他们起始为缓慢（状态）2。
10垂死微光诅咒 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:incapacitation]（失能）成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1，持续1轮。失败时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}，持续1分钟；大失败时，敌人目盲1天。
11狂乱诅咒 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:emotion,mental]（情绪、精神）成功豁免时，敌人语无伦次地胡言乱语，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。失败时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑}，持续1分钟，但其可以在每个回合结束时尝试一次新的豁免以结束困惑。大失败时，目标困惑1分钟，且无法通过豁免提前结束。
12昏沉诅咒 成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}，持续1轮。失败时，他们疲乏1分钟；大失败时，他们疲乏直到他们休息。
13

疏忽诅咒 成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]，持续1轮。失败时，敌人处于措手不及1分钟，且在1轮内不能使用反应动作（）；大失败时，他们措手不及并且在1分钟内不能使用反应动作（）

14生根诅咒 成功豁免时，敌人的各项速度在1轮内或直到其逃脱前承受–15尺环境减值@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.rX8JaFDxhVFD75Q8]{效果：生根诅咒}。失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身}，持续2轮或直到其逃脱。大失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}，持续1轮，并定身1分钟；若其逃脱，则两个效果都会提前结束。
15疾病诅咒 成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}；大失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}。
16震击诅咒 成功豁免时，敌人获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}；大失败时，他们获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 4}。
17和平主义诅咒 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:emotion,incapacitation,mental]（情绪、失能、精神）成功豁免时，由于逐渐蔓延的平和感，敌人在1轮内其攻击掷骰承受–1状态减值@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.MUrOdACIE2kYrt7e]{效果：和平主义诅咒}。失败时，这些平和感更加强烈：任何本会影响敌人的情绪效果都会被压制，且他们不能使用敌对动作，持续2轮或直到该敌人受到敌意影响为止。大失败时，效果同失败，但持续1分钟，且敌意不会使效果提前结束。
18死亡诅咒 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:death]（死亡）成功豁免时，敌人每当你拥有1等级便受到2点虚空伤害（@Damage[(@actor.level*2)[void]]）。失败时，他们每当你拥有1等级便受到5点虚空伤害（@Damage[(@actor.level*5)[void]]）；大失败时，他们每当你拥有1等级便受到10点虚空伤害（@Damage[(@actor.level*10)[void]].
19从1到18中选择一个结果。
20掷两次骰，将任何掷出20的结果重掷。

Frequency once per hour

You focus your baleful gaze, causing an unpredictable, accursed ailment to beset your foe. Choose a foe within 60 feet. They become cursed, with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, and a d20 roll on table 1. On a critical success, the foe is unaffected. Some results add additional traits to Chaotic Curse, listed in parentheses.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-rolltables.RollTable.bMqG4QJzZB6qL1bc]{Chaotic Curse}

d20Results
1Curse of Clumsiness On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} for 1 minute.
