2Curse of Weakness On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} for 1 minute.
3Curse of Folly @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:mental] (mental) On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} for 1 minute.
4Curse of Terror @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:emotion,fear,mental] (emotion, fear, mental) On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}.
5Curse of Beguiling @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:emotion,incapacitation,mental] (emotion, incapacitation, mental) On a successful save, the foe takes a –1 status penalty to attack rolls against you for 1 round as they're distracted by feelings of friendship @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.Pys9csuzG2ietGxJ]{Effect: Curse of Beguiling}. On a failure, they become friendly for 1 hour, and on a critical failure, they become helpful for 1 hour.
6Curse of Lethargy On a successful save, the foe is slowed 1 for 1 round. On a failure, they're slowed 1 for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're slowed 2 for 1 round and slowed 1 for 10 minutes.
7Curse of Paralysis @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:incapacitation] (incapacitation) On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they're paralyzed for 2 rounds.
8Curse of Exsanguination On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, but the drained condition ends after 2 rounds. On a failure, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}.
9Curse of Petrification On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're slowed 1 and must attempt a Fortitude save at the end of each of their turns; this ongoing save has the incapacitation trait (@Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell|traits:incapacitation]). On a failed Fortitude save, the slowed condition increases by 1 (or 2 on a critical failure). A successful Fortitude save reduces the slowed condition by 1. When a creature is unable to act due to the slowed condition from this curse, the creature is permanently non-magically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified}. The spell ends if the creature is petrified or the slowed condition is removed. On a critical failure, the effect is as failure, but they're initially slowed 2.
10Curse of Dying Light @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:incapacitation] (incapacitation) On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} 1 for 1 round. On a failure, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, the foe is blinded for 1 day.
11Curse of Frenzy @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:emotion,mental] (emotion, mental) On a successful save, the foe babbles incoherently and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}. On a failure, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute, but it can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confusion. On a critical failure, the target is confused for 1 minute, with no save to end early.
12Curse of Torpor On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 1 round. On a failure, they're fatigued for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're fatigued until they rest.
13

Curse of Inattention On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] for 1 round. On a failure, the foe is off-guard for 1 minute and can't take reactions for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they're off-guard and can't take reactions for 1 minute

14Curse of Rooting On a successful save, the foe takes a –15-foot circumstance penalty to their Speeds for 1 round or until they Escape @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.rX8JaFDxhVFD75Q8]{Effect: Curse of Rooting}. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 2 rounds or until they Escape. On a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} for 1 round and immobilized for 1 minute; both effects end early if they Escape.
15Curse of Illness On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3}.
16Curse of Shock On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4}.
17Curse of Pacifism @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:emotion,incapacitation,mental] (emotion, incapacitation, mental) On a successful save, the foe takes a –1 status penalty to attack rolls due to encroaching feelings of peace for 1 round @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.MUrOdACIE2kYrt7e]{Effect: Curse of Pacifism}. On a failure, these peaceful feelings are even stronger: any emotion effects that would affect the foe are suppressed and they can't use hostile actions, either for 2 rounds or until the foe is subject to hostility. On a critical failure, the effect is the same as failure, but it lasts for 1 minute, and hostility doesn't end the effect early.
18Curse of Death @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:death] (death) On a successful save, the foe takes 2 void damage for each level you have (@Damage[(@actor.level*2)[void]]). On a failure, they take 5 void damage for each level you have (@Damage[(@actor.level*5)[void]]), and on a critical failure, they take 10 void damage for each level you have (@Damage[(@actor.level*10)[void]].
19Choose one result from 1 to 18.
20Roll twice, rerolling any results of 20.

Cerebral Magic.name: 脑部魔法 Cerebral Magic
Cerebral Magic.description:
当你吃下一名有感知的生物的大脑时，你可以获得其基础魔法。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vLzFcIaSXs7YTIqJ] 戏法，作为一种通灵先天戏法。你可以随意施放它，并且如常，该戏法被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。每当你吃下一名小型或更大体型、且拥有戏法的有感知生物的新鲜大脑时，你可以选择将你从「大脑魔法」获得的当前戏法，或你从「心灵魔法」族裔能力获得的任意戏法之一，替换为该生物所拥有的一项戏法，无论该戏法是否在通灵法术列表上。即使该生物拥有多于一个法术，你每个大脑也只能替换一个法术。你将该戏法作为通灵先天法术施放，即使它通常属于不同的法术列表。

When you eat the brain of a sapient creature, you can obtain their basic magic. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vLzFcIaSXs7YTIqJ] cantrip as an occult innate cantrip. You can cast it at will, and as normal, the cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up. Whenever you eat a fresh brain from a Small or larger sapient creature with a cantrip, you can choose to swap out either the current cantrip you gained from Cerebral Magic or any cantrip you gained from the psychic magic ancestry ability for a cantrip the creature had, whether or not it's on the occult spell list. You can only swap out one spell per brain, even if the creature had more than one spell. You cast the cantrip as an occult innate spell, even if it's normally on a different spell list.

Deep Sight.name: 深度视域 Deep Sight
Deep Sight.description:
你的视觉能力得到了提升，使你能在微弱光线下更轻松地看清周围。你获得昏暗视觉；如果你已经拥有昏暗视觉，则改为获得黑暗视觉。

Your visual abilities have improved, allowing you to see more easily without much light. You gain low-light vision, and if you already had low-light vision, you gain darkvision instead.

Celestial Magic.name: 天界魔法 Celestial Magic
Celestial Magic.description:
你已恢复了一部分天界的魔法，重新获得了来自天堂的失落力量。你获得的法术取决于你的传承。

星界提婆：你曾担任信使与使节，而你并未忘记一切。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yhz9fF69uwRhnHix]{Animal Messenger}（但出现的不是动物，而是一位 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.ZzMJ7Y4qxapAVvlF]{Cassisian} 天使前来效劳）以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY] 各作为神圣先天法术每天施放一次。

合唱：你曾在天堂不可见的唱诗班中度过永恒，而你仍记得一些小把戏。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzLkNU3AAqOSKFPR] 各作为神圣先天法术每天施放一次。

一元提婆：你曾守望灵魂的轮回，没有任何死亡之事能令你畏惧。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.xRgU9rrhmGAgG4Rc] 以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EfFMLVbmkBWmzoLF]（仅移除 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}）各作为神圣先天法术每天施放一次。

莫瓦尼克提婆：你能平息盟友的恐惧，并隐匿行踪。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EfFMLVbmkBWmzoLF]（仅移除 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}）和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} 各作为神圣先天法术每天施放一次。

行星天使：曾经，你是天堂的战士。也许你仍能如此。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mrDi3v933gsmnw25]{Telekinetic Maneuver} 作为神圣先天法术每天施放两次。

You have restored some of your celestial magic, regaining your lost power from Heaven. The spells you gain depend on your heritage.

Astral Deva: You served as messenger and emissary, and you have not forgotten everything. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yhz9fF69uwRhnHix]{Animal Messenger} (though instead of an animal, a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-bestiary.Actor.ZzMJ7Y4qxapAVvlF]{Cassisian} angel appears to serve) and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.vTQvfYu2llKQedmY] each once per day as divine innate spells.

Choral: You spent an eternity in the unseen choirs of Heaven, and you remember a few tricks still. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzLkNU3AAqOSKFPR] each once per day as divine innate spells.

Monadic Deva: You have stood watch over the cycle of souls, and nothing of death can frighten you. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.xRgU9rrhmGAgG4Rc] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EfFMLVbmkBWmzoLF] (Remove @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} only) each once per day as divine innate spells.

Movanic Deva: You can calm your allies' fear and go unseen. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EfFMLVbmkBWmzoLF] (Remove @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} only) and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility} each once per day as divine innate spells.

Planetar: Once, you were a warrior of Heaven. Perhaps you still can be. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mrDi3v933gsmnw25]{Telekinetic Maneuver} twice per day as a divine innate spell.

Gargoyle Glide.name: 石像鬼滑翔 Gargoyle Glide
Gargoyle Glide.description:
你缓缓滑翔向地面，向下5英尺，并在空中向前最多25英尺。只要你在每轮至少花费1个动作滑翔且尚未到达地面，你在回合结束时仍会停留在空中。

特殊 若你拥有坚翼传承，你可以向前滑翔最多30英尺，而非最多25英尺。

You glide slowly toward the ground, 5 feet down and up to 25 feet forward through the air. As long as you spend at least 1 action gliding each round and haven't yet reached the ground, you remain in the air at the end of your turn.

Special You can glide up to 30 feet forward, instead of up to 25 feet forward, if you have the firmwing heritage.

Favored Stratagem.name: 偏好策略 Favored Stratagem
Favored Stratagem.description:
你有偏好的攻击方式，并且训练自己使用它们的频率远超从前所能做到的程度。你可以将你拥有的每个先决专长（@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.JMSrFSm0fUncY5w4]{Curse Condemned}、@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jlwduWJSI0kNE4nE]{Calming Presence}、@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.SVCcbumkEGAUqGJ0]{Haunting Melody}以及@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.bZi9KqZFuQvqjWrV]{Ominous Aura}）改为每小时可使用一次，而非每天一次。

You have preferred methods of attack and have trained to use them far more often than you were once capable. You can use each of the prerequisite feats you have (@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.JMSrFSm0fUncY5w4]{Curse Condemned}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jlwduWJSI0kNE4nE]{Calming Presence}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.SVCcbumkEGAUqGJ0]{Haunting Melody}, and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.bZi9KqZFuQvqjWrV]{Ominous Aura}) once per hour instead of once per day.

Kiss of Death.name: 死亡之吻 Kiss of Death
Kiss of Death.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 你抓住或束缚了一名生物 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}，或与一名 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} 生物相邻。

你给该生物一个热烈的吻，迫使其尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，其DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。若失败，目标受到等于1d6加上你的魅力或感知调整值（取较高者）的伤害。造成的伤害为 @Damage[((ternary(gte(@actor.level,17),3,ternary(gte(@actor.level,13),2,1))+max(@actor.abilities.cha.mod,@actor.abilities.wis.mod))d6)[void]]{void}（若目标为活物）或 @Damage[((ternary(gte(@actor.level,17),3,ternary(gte(@actor.level,13),2,1))+max(@actor.abilities.cha.mod,@actor.abilities.wis.mod))d6)[vitality]]{vitality}（若目标为不死生物）。

在第13等级以及之后的第17等级时，伤害各额外增加1d6，在第17等级时最高为3d6。

Frequency once per round

Requirements You have a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, or are adjacent to an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} creature.

You give the creature a passionate kiss, forcing them to attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save with a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, the target is dealt damage equal to 1d6 plus your Charisma or Wisdom modifier (whichever is higher). The damage dealt is @Damage[((ternary(gte(@actor.level,17),3,ternary(gte(@actor.level,13),2,1))+max(@actor.abilities.cha.mod,@actor.abilities.wis.mod))d6)[void]]{void} (if the target is living) or @Damage[((ternary(gte(@actor.level,17),3,ternary(gte(@actor.level,13),2,1))+max(@actor.abilities.cha.mod,@actor.abilities.wis.mod))d6)[vitality]]{vitality} (if the target is undead).

At 13th level and then at 17th level, the damage increases by an additional 1d6, to a maximum of 3d6 at 17th level.

Ancient Wood.name: 远古木材 Ancient Wood
Ancient Wood.description:
在你数百年的生命中，你积累了各种各样的知识、智慧与技能。在你的每日准备期间，你可以回顾你的人生经历，使你在自己选择的一项技能上获得受训（熟练度）熟练度等级。该熟练度持续到你再次准备为止。由于该熟练度是暂时的，你不能将其用作技能提升或如专长之类的永久角色选项的先决条件。

In your centuries of life, you've accumulated all sorts of knowledge, wisdom, and skills. During your daily preparations, you can reflect upon your life experiences to gain the trained proficiency rank in one skill of your choice. This proficiency lasts until you prepare again. Since this proficiency is temporary, you can't use it as a prerequisite for a skill increase or a permanent character option like a feat.

Impart Curse.name: 灌输诅咒 Impart Curse
Impart Curse.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你处于你的混合形态。

以一次垂涎欲滴的攻击，你可以暂时用你天然赋礼中最糟糕的性相诅咒一个敌人。用你混合形态的徒手攻击对一个非兽化人形生物的活体目标进行打击。此次攻击额外造成一颗武器伤害骰的伤害，且目标必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者。这次攻击在你的多重攻击减值中计为两次攻击。

大成功或大失败：成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标迅速抵抗住诅咒，但在你下个回合开始之前陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 1}。

失败 目标暂时呈现出你自身混合形态的一些特征。它不适应这些变化，并在最长1分钟内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 2}。在它每个回合结束时，目标可以再尝试一次强韧豁免以将该状态的数值降低1。一旦笨拙（状态）的数值降低至0，该状态结束。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙（状态） 3}，并且在其因“传递诅咒”而具有笨拙（状态）期间，每轮第一次因银制武器的伤害而暴露时，对银具有弱点5。此外，该诅咒的持续时间为无限，而非1分钟，并且在诅咒仍然存在时，目标无法将来自该诅咒的笨拙（状态）数值降低至1以下。该诅咒可以被移除诅咒或类似的魔法解除。

特殊 在满月的月光下，你可以每10分钟使用一次传递诅咒，而非每小时一次。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You are in your hybrid form.

With a slavering attack, you can temporarily curse a foe with the worst aspects of your natural gift. Strike a living target other than a werecreature with your hybrid form's unarmed attack. This attack deals an extra weapon damage die of damage, and the target must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or your spell DC. This counts as two attacks for your multiple attack penalty.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target quickly fights off the curse, but is rendered @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the beginning of your next turn.

Failure The target temporarily takes on some features of your own hybrid form. It's unused to the changes and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for up to 1 minute. At the end of each of its turns, the target can attempt another Fortitude save to reduce the value of the condition by 1. Once the clumsy condition's value reduces to 0, the condition ends.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} and has weakness 5 to silver the first time each round it's exposed to damage from a silver weapon for as long as it has the clumsy condition from Impart Curse. Additionally, the curse has an unlimited duration, rather than 1 minute, and the target can't reduce its clumsy condition value from the curse below 1 while the curse remains. The curse can be lifted by remove curse or similar magic.

Special Under the light of a full moon, you can use Impart Curse once per 10 minutes instead of once per hour.

Fusion Flutter.name: 融合扑翼 Fusion Flutter
Fusion Flutter.description:
你的融合具有一对翅膀，你可以用它们在空中扑腾一段time。你飞行。若你通常没有飞行速度，你在此次移动中获得15英尺的飞行速度。若你在此次移动结束时不在坚实地面上，你会坠落。

特殊 你的融合的翅膀足够强壮，即使你没有飞行速度，也可以尝试@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qm7xptMSozAinnPS]{制止坠落}。

Your fusion has a set of wings that you can use to flutter in the air for a time. You Fly. If you don't normally have a fly Speed, you gain a fly Speed of 15 feet for this movement. If you aren't on solid ground at the end of this movement, you fall.

Special Your fusion's wings are strong enough to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qm7xptMSozAinnPS]{Arrest a Fall} even though you don't have a fly Speed.

Ill Tidings.name: 凶兆 Ill Tidings
Ill Tidings.description:
你可以向敌人降下黑暗的凶兆。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6ZIKB0151LUR19Rw]{Ill Omen} 作为一个异能天生法术施放一次。

You can bring forth dark omens upon your foes. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6ZIKB0151LUR19Rw]{Ill Omen} once per day as an occult innate spell.

Blend Heritage.name: 混血传承 Blend Heritage
Blend Heritage.description:
树生族作为一种族裔，其成员在不同传承之间有着极为广泛的多样性，而树生族往往会随时间成长，并与传承相融合或改变传承。尽管你已被连根拔起，你也同样如此。你获得一个你当前不具备的树生族传承，作为你原本传承之外的额外传承。若你的新传承会将你的体型改变为更小的体型，你的体型保持不变；若其会将你的体型改变为更大的体型，你可以选择保留原本体型，或成长以符合新传承。若两个传承还会造成其他冲突，由GM决定是否允许这种组合以及其结果为何。

Arboreals as an ancestry have a wide diversity among members of different heritages, and arboreals often grow and either blend or change heritages over time. Though you're uprooted, the same is true of you. You gain an arboreal heritage that you don't currently possess, in addition to your original heritage. If your new heritage would change your size to a smaller size, your size remains the same, and if it would change your size to a larger size, you can choose to either keep your original size or grow to match the new heritage. If the two heritages cause any other conflicts, the GM determines whether to allow the combination and what the result will be.

Lifesense.name: 生命感知 Lifesense
Lifesense.description:
你可以感知生者与死者的生命力。你获得生命感知作为一种模糊感官，射程为20尺。这使你能够感知活体生物内的生命力及其驱动力——令不死生物活动的反生命之力，但你无法区分两者。

You can sense the life force of both the living and the dead. You gain lifesense as an imprecise sense with a range of 20 feet. This allows you to sense the life force within living creatures and its counterforce that animates the undead, though you can't distinguish between the two.

Together as One.name: 同心如一 Together as One
Together as One.description:
频率 每天一次

你的育群重新构型为一只与其外貌相符的单一动物，获得一项5环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XI6Lzd2B5pernkPd] 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.NzXpEzcZAjuDTZjK] 法术的效果，具体取决于哪项法术最适合组成你育群的生物类型。

Frequency once per day

Your brood reconfigures into the shape of a single animal that matches its appearance, with the effects of a 5th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp], @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XI6Lzd2B5pernkPd], or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.NzXpEzcZAjuDTZjK] spell, whichever spell is most suited to the types of creatures that comprise your brood.

Purgatory's Reprieve.name: 炼狱的缓赦 Purgatory's Reprieve
Purgatory's Reprieve.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 60尺内一名活着的生物被降至0生命值，并且会由于其濒死值而死亡。

你向炼狱呼喊，请求为这灵魂暂缓一刻，辩称他们的时代尚未来临。触发的生物不会死亡（其濒死值改为比通常会杀死他们的数值低1，通常为濒死3），并且你为其恢复 @Damage[(5d4+10)[治疗]] 生命值。该生命值在16级时提高至 @Damage[(6d4+12)[治疗]]，在18级时提高至 @Damage[(7d4+14)[治疗]]，在20级时提高至 @Damage[(8d4+16)[治疗]]。随后，触发的生物在1天内对“炼狱的暂缓”暂时免疫；炼狱不会在这么短的时间内再次对同一生物批准这样的请求。若触发的效果是死亡效果，或是如解离术这类会立刻杀死且不留下遗骸、但又不是死亡效果的效果，“炼狱的暂缓”不会将触发的生物从死亡中拯救出来。同样地，若GM或触发生物的玩家（若其不是GM）判定该生物的时代已至、死亡才是其真正的命运，则“炼狱的暂缓”没有效果；在这种情况下，你不会消耗你的 反应动作（），并且仍可在此回合采取一个不同的 反应动作（）。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger A living creature within 60 feet is reduced to 0 Hit Points and would die due to its dying value.

You call out to Purgatory and request a reprieve for this soul, arguing that their time has not yet come. The triggering creature doesn't die (their dying value instead becomes 1 less than would normally kill them, typically dying 3), and you restore @Damage[(5d4+10)[healing]] Hit Points to them. The Hit Points increase to @Damage[(6d4+12)[healing]] at 16th level, @Damage[(7d4+14)[healing]] at 18th level, and @Damage[(8d4+16)[healing]] at 20th level. The triggering creature then becomes temporarily immune to Purgatory's Reprieve for 1 day; Purgatory won't grant such a request again for the same creature so soon. If the triggering effect is a death effect or an effect like disintegrate that kills instantly and leaves no remains without being a death effect, Purgatory's Reprieve doesn't save the triggering creature from death. Similarly, if either the GM or the player of the triggering creature (if that isn't the GM) determines that the creature's time has come and the death was their true fate, Purgatory's Reprieve has no effect; in that case, you don't spend your reaction and can still take a different reaction this turn.

Endless.name: 无尽 Endless
Endless.description:
频率 每天一次

凡人领域充满惊喜。你也是如此。你回顾自己的人生经历，改变你通过 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.JqjZDGbwuXOepEq6]{Ageless} 和 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TQDR2Zcr1nStO3eN]{Eternal} 所选择的技能。

Frequency once per day

The mortal realm is full of surprises. So are you. You reflect on your life experiences, changing the skills you selected with @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.JqjZDGbwuXOepEq6]{Ageless} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TQDR2Zcr1nStO3eN]{Eternal}.

Golem's Reach.name: 魔像的触及 Golem's Reach
Golem's Reach.description:
你已调整你的构装体身躯，使其延伸得更远并输出更多力量，即使这可能会让你的平衡有些失调。你的触及从5尺增加到10尺。你获得+2近战伤害的状态加值，但你会变得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙1}。

You've tweaked your construct body to extend further and output more power, even if it might throw off your balance a little. Your reach increases from 5 feet to 10 feet. You gain a +2 status bonus to melee damage, but you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Lamia Lore.name: 拉米娅学识 Lamia Lore
Lamia Lore.description:
拉弥亚或许没有大量的文学、历史以及其他文化遗物收藏，但她们确实会特意传承某些技能与传统——如何在荒原中生存，以及如何用你全部的灵魂憎恨神祇。你获得宗教与生存技能的受训（熟练度）等级。如果你会自动在这些技能之一上变为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能上变为受训。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}技能专长，获得拉弥亚学识（技能）。

Lamias may not have a large collection of literature, history, and other cultural artifacts, but they do make a point of passing on certain skills and traditions—how to survive in the wastes and how to hate the gods with all of your soul. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Religion and Survival. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat in Lamia Lore.

Devil's Telepathy.name: 魔鬼的心灵感应 Devil's Telepathy
Devil's Telepathy.description:
你已恢复心灵感应交流的能力。你获得射程为30尺的心灵感应。这使你能够在所列射程内与任何生物进行心灵交流，只要你们共享一种语言。这不会让你获得对他们思想的任何特殊许可，并且传递的信息不会比正常言语更多。

在第17等级时，心灵感应的射程增加至100尺。

You've regained your ability to communicate telepathically. You gain telepathy with a range of 30 feet. This allows you to communicate mentally with any creatures within the listed range, as long as you share a language. This doesn't give you any special access to their thoughts, and communicates no more information than normal speech would.

At 17th level, the range of telepathy increases to 100 feet.

Oculus Strike.name: 眼魔打击 Oculus Strike
Oculus Strike.description:
频率 每日一次

你在空间与时代的四个次元中，以及超越其外的另外两个次元里，深深凝视你的敌人，观测其移动的每一种可能性相，并在脑海中将其可能的决策点逐一演绎为视觉残影。凭借你所见的一切，你确保你的下一次攻击将是尽可能最完美的版本。在你的回合结束前你下一次进行攻击掷骰时，将该次攻击掷骰掷两次并使用较好的结果。该攻击无视对攻击掷骰的环境减值，以及因目标处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W] 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC] 而需要进行的任何纯骰检定。

Frequency once per day

You gaze deeply at your foe in the four dimensions of space and time, as well as two other dimensions beyond those, viewing every possible aspect of their movements and playing their possible decision points through your mind as visual ephemera. With all that you see, you ensure that your next attack will be the best version possible. The next time you make an attack roll before the end of your turn, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll and any flat check required due to the target being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W] or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC].

Quicken Mind.name: 疾速心智 Quicken Mind
Quicken Mind.description:
频率 每天一次

你加快大脑处理其所遭遇的一切的速度：记忆、感官信息与运动功能，使你能更迅速地行动。持续 1 分钟，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}，并且你可以使用这额外动作来进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{察觉动机}、跨步、迈步、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}，或 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Recall Knowledge]{回忆知识}。

特殊 若你是 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.h63ohJUrT8rRQtwZ]，你也可以用因加速而获得的额外动作来游泳。若你拥有超心智变体，你也可以用因加速而获得的额外动作来再聚焦。

Frequency once per day

You speed up the rate that your brain processes everything it encounters: memories, sensory information, and motor functions, allowing you to act more quickly. For 1 minute, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened},and you can use the additional action to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive}, Step, Stride, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, or @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Recall Knowledge]{Recall Knowledge}.

Special If you're an @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.h63ohJUrT8rRQtwZ], you can also use the additional action from being quickened to Swim. If you have the overmind archetype, you can also use the additional action from being quickened to Recenter.

Phrenic Evolution.name: 膈神经进化 Phrenic Evolution
Phrenic Evolution.description:
当你最初将一只脑鹦鹉螺与另一名有感知的生物融合而成为噬脑体时，你的转变并未完成。现在，你的灵能能量增强，使你到达下一个阶段。除你原本的传承外，你获得一个你目前尚不拥有的噬脑体传承。若这使你同时拥有水栖（特征）噬脑体与兽性噬脑体传承，你的陆地速度为25英尺；若这两个传承导致任何其他冲突，则由GM决定是否允许该组合以及结果为何。

When you first merged a brain nautilus and another sapient creature to become a cerebrophage, your transformation wasn't complete. Now, your psychic energies have increased, causing you to reach the next stage. You gain a cerebrophage heritage that you don't currently possess, in addition to your original heritage. If this causes you to possess both the aquatic cerebrophage and bestial cerebrophage heritages, your land Speed is 25 feet; if the two heritages cause any other conflicts, the GM determines whether to allow the combination and what the result will be.

The Third Riddle.name: 第三个谜题 The Third Riddle
The Third Riddle.description:
斯芬克斯的谜语就像一座没有出口的迷宫，而它们的第三个谜语往往最为阴险。你从这则传说中汲取教训并将其化为己用。你每小时可以施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion}，作为4环神圣天生法术，但你的该版本法术获得听觉与语言（特征）特征。

A sphinx's riddle is like a labyrinth with no way out, and their third riddle is often the most devious. You've learned from this legend and made it your own. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion} once per hour as a 4th-rank divine innate spell, except that your version of the spell gains the auditory and linguistic traits.

Cognitive Backlash.name: 认知反噬 Cognitive Backlash
Cognitive Backlash.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 一个生物对你使用接触你心智的心灵效果；这包括心灵法术与魔法能力，但不包括来自互动的心灵效果，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]（由GM决定哪些心灵效果适用）。

你的心智充满了为粗心者准备的陷阱，而那些试图攻破你意志堡垒的人将自担风险。触发的生物受到 @Damage[((ceil(@actor.level/2)+1)d8)[mental]] 伤害，其效果取决于其对抗你职业DC与法术DC中较高者的意志豁免结果。到11级时，并在此后每2级，伤害增加1d8，至19级时最多为11d8。

大成功或大失败：大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，但除此之外不受妨碍。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑（状态） 1}；由于这可能导致其在自己回合中陷入震慑（状态），如果它在其回合中仍有剩余动作，则在结算触发的效果后，立即应用震慑（状态）的效果，这些效果通常在生物的回合开始、其获得动作时生效。

大成功或大失败：大失败 同失败，且你不受触发效果影响（尽管该效果仍会发生，并可能影响其他生物）。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger A creature uses a mental effect on you that contacts your mind; this includes mental spells and magical abilities but not mental effects from interacting, like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF] (the GM determines which mental effects apply).

Your mind is full of traps for the unwary, and those who seek to breach your fortress of will do so at their own risk. The triggering creature takes @Damage[((ceil(@actor.level/2)+1)d8)[mental]] damage with effects depending on their Will save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. At 11th level, and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d8, to a maximum of 11d8 at 19th level.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage but is otherwise unhindered.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}; since this might cause them to become stunned on their own turn, if they still have actions left on their turn, after resolving the triggering effect, immediately apply the stunned condition's effects that normally apply at the start of a creature's turn when it gains actions.

Critical Failure As failure, and you are unaffected by the triggering effect (though the effect still occurs and might affect other creatures).

Low-Light Vision.name: 微光视觉 Low-Light Vision
Low-Light Vision.description:
你获得昏暗视觉。

You gain low-light vision.

Pierce Untruths.name: 洞穿虚妄 Pierce Untruths
Pierce Untruths.description:
只要你能看见，你就能聚焦你的双眼，以穿透任何可能的幻觉、变形以及其他形式的虚假之物。你获得一个6环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki] 法术的效果，但你在进行反制检定时使用你的察觉调整值，因为你的视觉敏锐度就是如此强烈。

You can focus your eye in order to pierce through every possible sort of illusion, transformation, and other form of untruth, as long as you can see it. You gain the effects of a 6th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki] spell, except that you use your Perception modifier for the counteract check, as your visual acuity is just that intense.

Practiced Corpse Hunter.name: 娴熟的尸体猎手 Practiced Corpse Hunter
Practiced Corpse Hunter.description:
你用无数岁月与自己憎恨的宿敌：不死生物战斗。你用武器和徒手攻击对抗不死生物时的伤害获得+1环境加值；对那些可以通过攻击来造成伤害的怨灵也同样适用。若你的攻击将造成超过1个武器骰的伤害，则该加值等于武器伤害骰的数量。

你也获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{附加学识}专长，用于“不死生物学识”。

You've spent lifetimes combating your hated nemesis: undead. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to damage with weapons and unarmed attacks against undead creatures, as well as haunts that can be damaged by attacking them. If your attack would deal more than one weapon die of damage, the bonus is equal to the number of weapon damage dice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Undead Lore.

Contract Mastery.name: 契约精通 Contract Mastery
Contract Mastery.description:
你知道如何起草契约，使违反条款者虚弱，并加入嵌入条款来强化契约的签署者……但主要是你自己。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.MzOrUc8piQ0K9ZJW]{Draft Contract} 和 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.s3GVNmymtZEU6VhX]{Undersign Embedded Clause} 动作。

You know how to draft contracts that weaken those who break the terms and include embedded clauses to strengthen the contract's signatory… but mostly yourself. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.MzOrUc8piQ0K9ZJW]{Draft Contract} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.s3GVNmymtZEU6VhX]{Undersign Embedded Clause} actions.

Confessor's Aura.name: 告解者的灵光 Confessor's Aura
Confessor's Aura.description:
频率 每日一次

忏悔者天使更常与神圣真理相关，但在紧急情况下，它们也能诉诸神圣之火。你在自身周围创造一个忏悔者的灵光，持续10分钟。它具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aewxsale5xWEPKLk]法术的效果，但它不是爆发，而是以从你身上散发出的20尺灵光形式存在。此外，如果灵光中的生物选择诚实地表达他们自身矛盾的感受，灵光会让他们更容易将这些感受用语言表达出来。

Frequency once per day

Confessor angels are more associated with divine truth, but they also can, in a pinch, turn to divine fire. You create a confessor's aura around you, which lasts for 10 minutes. It has the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aewxsale5xWEPKLk] spell, except it takes the form of a 20-foot aura emanating from you rather than a burst. Additionally, if creatures in the aura choose to honestly express their own conflicted feelings, the aura makes it easier for them to put words to those feelings.

Labyrinth of Forking Thoughts.name: 分岔思绪迷宫 Labyrinth of Forking Thoughts
Labyrinth of Forking Thoughts.description:
当你将自身重心重新集中于理性时，你用分叉思绪的迷宫包裹心智，以曲折的精神路径守护自身免受情感影响。在将重心重新集中于理性期间，你对抗情感效果的豁免获得+1状态加值，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.wczCjgR7X4FfeFq4]反应动作（）。

When you Recenter yourself to reason, you surround your mind with a labyrinth of forking thoughts, guarding yourself against your emotion with twisting mental pathways. While Recentered to reason, you gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against emotion effects, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.wczCjgR7X4FfeFq4] reaction.

Deeper Well.name: 更深的井 Deeper Well
Deeper Well.description:
你可以更频繁地汲取你的智慧之泉，并获得更强的效果。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.zdXGZFFaVPuUcUtP]{Draw Upon the Well}，而非每天一次；并且当你这么做时，你获得的是+2状态加值，而非+1状态加值。

You can draw upon your well of wisdom more often, and with greater effect. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.zdXGZFFaVPuUcUtP]{Draw Upon the Well} once per hour instead of once per day, and when you do, you gain a +2 status bonus instead of a +1 status bonus.

Eye of the Unseen.name: 无形之眼 Eye of the Unseen
Eye of the Unseen.description:
你眼睛的神秘特性使你甚至能够看见通常处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} 状态的事物。你可以看见隐形的生物和物体，尽管并不完全清晰。它们在你看来是半透明的形状，并且对你而言仅仅是 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。

Your eye's mystic properties allow you to see even that which is normally @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}. You can see invisible creatures and objects, though not completely. They appear to you as translucent shapes, and they are merely @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to you instead.

Rejuvenating Swarm.name: 回春虫群 Rejuvenating Swarm
Rejuvenating Swarm.description:
频率 每日一次

你的子嗣群涌上你身体表面，使你从一切伤害中复原，在1分钟内持续治疗你。你在持续时间内获得再生15，其会在你每个回合开始时为你恢复15生命值。当你拥有再生时，你不会因伤害而死亡，且你的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死（状态）}不会增加到会杀死你的数值（这通常会阻止你超过濒死3）；不过，如果你的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded}数值变为4或更高，你将保持@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}直到你的创伤被治疗。你无法使用带有swarmblood特征的动作，直到你花费一个交互动作将子嗣群收回体内；如果你这么做，再生会立刻结束。如果你受到区域或溅射伤害，这会扰乱你虫群治疗你的能力，你的再生会停用，直到你下个回合结束之后才会重新生效。每当你从该再生中恢复生命值时，你的虫群会重构一个受损或被毁的器官（尽管在大多数情况下，你并没有器官，因为虫群已取代它们）。在该效果的持续时间内，你还可以通过花费一个交互动作将断肢按在其被切断的区域上来重新接回被切下的身体部位，使虫群爬过两者间的缺口并恢复连接。

Frequency once per day

Your brood pours out onto the surface of your body and rejuvenates you from all harm, continually healing you for 1 minute. You gain regeneration 15 for the duration, which restores 15 Hit Points to you at the start of each of your turns. While you have regeneration, you can't die from damage and your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition can't increase to a value that would kill you (this typically stops you from going beyond dying 3), though if your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} value becomes 4 or higher, you stay @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until your wounds are treated. You can't use actions with the swarmblood trait until you spend an Interact action to draw your brood back into your body, and if you do, the regeneration ends immediately. If you take area or splash damage, this disrupts your swarm's ability to heal you, and your regeneration deactivates until after the end of your next turn. Each time you regain Hit Points from this regeneration, your swarm reconstitutes one damaged or ruined organ (though in most cases, you don't have organs as the swarm replaced them). During the effect's duration, you can also reattach severed body parts by spending an Interact action to hold the body part to the area from which it was severed, causing the swarm to crawl over the gap between and restore the connection.

Return to the Heavens.name: 重返苍穹 Return to the Heavens
Return to the Heavens.description:
你可能无法触及真正的天界，但天空也算是一个朴素的替代。你可以将斗篷变形为翅膀，想维持多久就维持多久，获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度，且会无限期持续。你可以使用一个单动作（具有专注与操作（特征）），将翅膀收回为斗篷，或再次将其显现为翅膀。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.k75bzwEIe7UgvFZI]{On Heavenly Wings} 时，你在持续时间内获得飞行速度+20英尺的状态加值。

You may not have access to the true heavens, but the skies make for a modest substitute. You can transform your cloak into wings for as long as you wish, gaining a fly Speed equal to your land Speed that lasts indefinitely. You can use a single action, which has the concentrate and manipulate traits, to withdraw your wings into a cloak or manifest them as wings again. When you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.k75bzwEIe7UgvFZI]{On Heavenly Wings}, you gain a +20-foot status bonus to your fly Speed for the duration.

Warden of Erebus.name: 厄瑞玻斯的守望者 Warden of Erebus
Warden of Erebus.description:
如同一只受缚的哈马图拉，你可以在容器上放置守护符文，以防他人获取你守卫的宝藏。每天一次，你可以施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o0l57UfBm9ScEUMW]，并将其升阶至等同于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术等级。你同一时间只能拥有一道来自厄瑞玻斯的守望者的符文，但除此之外，它会持续存在直到被触发。厄瑞玻斯的守望者的符文不计入你从任何其他来源获得的主动符文数量上限。

特殊 若某个生物因你的“诡计伎俩”反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则它在对抗你来自厄瑞玻斯的守望者的符文陷阱所触发的效果进行豁免时，也承受相同的环境减值。

Like a Hellbound hamatula, you can place warding glyphs on containers to prevent others from acquiring the treasures you guard. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o0l57UfBm9ScEUMW], heightened to a spell level equal to half your level rounded up. You can only have one rune from Warden of Erebus at a time, but it otherwise lasts until triggered. The rune from Warden of Erebus doesn't count against your limit for active runes from any other sources.

Special If a creature is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your Scheming Trick reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their saving throw against the effect triggered by your rune trap from Warden of Erebus.

Fearless.name: 无畏 Fearless
Fearless.description:
你对自己的优越性坚信不疑，以勇气与决心面对每一项挑战。当你在对抗恐惧效果的豁免上掷骰获得成功时，改为获得大成功或大失败中的大成功。若你将要获得惊惧（状态），则将你将要获得的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 状态值减少1。这不会与其他特性（如勇敢）带来的效果叠加。

You're utterly confident in your superiority and face every challenge with bravery and determination. When you roll a success on a saving throw against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead. If you would gain the frightened condition, reduce the value of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} condition you would gain by 1. This isn't cumulative with effects from other features like bravery.

Eyes of God.name: 神之眼 Eyes of God
Eyes of God.description:
对于神圣使者那锐利的凝视而言，黑暗毫无阻碍。你获得黑暗视觉。

Darkness is no impediment for the piercing gaze of a divine messenger. You gain darkvision.

Fiendish Eyes.name: 恶魔之眼 Fiendish Eyes
Fiendish Eyes.description:
你的视觉得到改善。你获得更强的黑暗视觉，使你能够看穿会阻挡普通黑暗视觉的魔法黑暗（例如4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{Darkness} 法术），且其中的物体和生物不会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态。

Your vision has improved. You gain greater darkvision, enabling you to see through magical darkness (such as a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{Darkness} spell) that would block normal darkvision, without objects and creatures within it being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Sighted.name: 视力正常 Sighted
Sighted.description:
你一生都在恶劣的环境中挣扎求生，你的双眼已适应于看穿恶劣天气，否则这些天气会遮蔽你的视线。基于你的传承，你可以看穿一种特定的环境效果，并且你会无视由该环境效果施加的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽（状态）} 状态。

云巨人：云

火巨人：烟

霜巨人：雪

风暴巨人：雨

You've endured harsh environments your whole life, and your eyes have adapted to see through inclement weather that would otherwise obscure your vision. You can see through a specific environmental effect, based on your heritage, and you ignore the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition imposed by that environmental effect.

Cloud Giant: clouds

Fire Giant: smoke

Frost Giant: snow

Storm Giant: rain

Memory Maelstrom.name: 记忆漩涡 Memory Maelstrom
Memory Maelstrom.description:
频率 每日一次

你用自己漫长一生中吸收的信息洪流压倒你的敌人。40尺内的敌人受到 @Damage[5d6[mental]] 伤害，并可能陷入震慑，取决于他们进行的 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 豁免，其对抗你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

大成功 该生物不受记忆漩涡影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 1}。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 2}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 3}。

Frequency once per day

You overwhelm your foes with a surge of information you've absorbed over your long life. Enemies within 40 feet take @Damage[5d6[mental]] damage and might become stunned, depending on their @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected by the memory maelstrom.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}.

Watchful Sphinx.name: 警觉的斯芬克斯 Watchful Sphinx
Watchful Sphinx.description:
完全有可能悄悄接近一只斯芬克斯。只是格外困难。你每天可以施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HXhWYJviWalN5tQ2]{Clairaudience}，作为3环神圣先天法术。到第13等级时，你可以改为施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance}，作为4环神圣先天法术；你在施放时选择当天要施放哪一个先天法术。

如果你将来自“警觉斯芬克斯”的先天法术施放在一个永久、不可移动的斯芬克斯石质表现物上（通常是一座大型雕塑或浮雕，但以石质背景呈现的壁画或马赛克也符合条件，而手持的小雕像则不符合），则不会计入你每日的使用次数。在这种情况下，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} 的探知传感器会出现在斯芬克斯描绘的前额中央。

It's possible to sneak up on a sphinx. Just exceptionally difficult. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HXhWYJviWalN5tQ2]{Clairaudience} once per day as a 3rd-rank divine innate spell. At 13th level, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance} as a 4th-rank divine innate spell instead; you choose when casting which innate spell to cast each day.

If you cast your innate spell from Watchful Sphinx on a permanent immobile stone representation of a sphinx (usually a large sculpture or relief, but a mural or mosaic on a stone background would qualify, but a handheld statuette would not), it doesn't count against your daily use. In that case, the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} scrying sensor appears in the center of the sphinx depiction's forehead.

Wellspring of Wrath.name: 怒火之源 Wellspring of Wrath
Wellspring of Wrath.description:
当你重新定心于愤怒时，你以愤怒的泉涌环绕自身，这股强大的灵能杀意会伤害仍留在你附近的敌人。处于重新定心于愤怒期间，每当一名敌人在你的相邻格结束其回合时，他们会根据你在威吓的熟练度等级受到精神伤害：若你受训于威吓，则受到@Damage[2[mental]]伤害；若你为威吓专家，则受到@Damage[4[mental]]伤害；若你为威吓大师，则受到@Damage[6[mental]]伤害；若你为威吓传奇，则受到@Damage[8[mental]]伤害。这是一个情绪、惑控、精神与秘法效果。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.fdvAaMw97p9lU3LX]{Wrath's Retribution}反应动作（）。

When you Recenter yourself to anger, you surround yourself in a wellspring of wrath, a psychic killing intent so powerful that it damages foes who remain nearby. While Recentered to anger, whenever a foe ends their turn adjacent to you, they take mental damage depending on your proficiency rank in Intimidation: @Damage[2[mental]] damage if you're trained in Intimidation, @Damage[4[mental]] damage if you're an expert in Intimidation, @Damage[6[mental]] damage if you're a master in Intimidation, or @Damage[8[mental]] damage if you're legendary in Intimidation. This is an emotion, enchantment, mental, and occult effect. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.fdvAaMw97p9lU3LX]{Wrath's Retribution} reaction.

Fusion Leader.name: 融合领袖 Fusion Leader
Fusion Leader.description:
在一生的共同生活中，你们要么一起成功，要么一起失败，因此你尤其擅长带领你融合的其他成员并跟随他们的引导。这在你们其中一人试图避免被注意时尤其有用，因为你总会不由自主地把其他人也带上。在探索期间，当你在带领且你融合的成员正在 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{跟随专家} 时，若你在适用的技能上为专家，则你给予你融合成员的环境加值为+3而非+2；若你为大师，则给予+4环境加值。你也会在对检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{协助} 你融合的其他成员时获得+4环境加值。

After a lifetime spent together, where you either succeed or fail together, you're especially good at leading other members of your fusion and following their lead. This can be especially handy when one of you is trying to avoid notice, since you can't help but bring the others along. While exploring, when you are leading and members of your fusion are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Following the Expert}, you grant a +3 circumstance bonus instead of +2 to members of your fusion if you're an expert in the applicable skill, and a +4 circumstance bonus if you're a master. You also gain a +4 circumstance bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} other members of your fusion.

Mortuary Sphinx.name: 停尸房斯芬克斯 Mortuary Sphinx
Mortuary Sphinx.description:
许多斯芬克斯守卫着古代国王或法老的坟墓，而在这些情况下，能够斥责亡者是一项很有用的技能。你以武器与徒手攻击进行的打击对抗无实体生物时变为魔法。若它们已经是魔法，或若你是@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.TrLeBbNQnrgKSSB2]{Cynosphinx}，它们改为获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{幽灵接触}属性符文的效果。

Many sphinxes guard the tombs of ancient kings or pharaohs, and being able to chastise the dead is a useful skill in those situations. Your weapon and unarmed attack Strikes against incorporeal creatures become magical. If they are already magical, or if you are a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.TrLeBbNQnrgKSSB2]{Cynosphinx}, they instead gain the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property rune.

Impenetrable Flesh.name: 坚不可摧之躯 Impenetrable Flesh
Impenetrable Flesh.description:
你的血肉变得坚硬，如钢铁般强韧。你获得10点对物理伤害的抗力。该抗力会被银制武器绕过。

Your flesh has hardened, becoming tough as steel. You gain resistance 10 to physical damage. This resistance is bypassed by silver weapons.

Fusion Magic Adept.name: 融合魔法专家 Fusion Magic Adept
Fusion Magic Adept.description:
你与融合中其他成员的魔法联系增强，使你能将他们更多的法术当作自己的法术来使用。选择一个由你的融合的另一名成员已知的1环法术，以及一个由你的融合的另一名成员已知的2环或更低环法术（它们不需要来自同一法术列表，也不需要由你的融合的同一名成员所掌握）。你每天可以将各自所选的法术以先天法术的形式施放一次，其根源与被你借用这些法术的那名融合成员相同。

Your magical connection to the other members of your fusion grows, allowing you to use more of their spells as your own. Select one 1st-rank spell and one 2nd-rank or lower spell known by another member of your fusion (they don't need to be from the same spell list or known by the same member of your fusion). You can cast each of your chosen spells once per day as innate spells of the same tradition as the member of your fusion from whom you borrowed them.

Forge Fate.name: 锻造命运 Forge Fate
Forge Fate.description:
频率 每小时一次

你属于神誓者——诞生于吉兆之下、拥有尤为强大神力的巨人。当你下定决心去做某事时，没有任何东西能阻挡你。若你在本回合的下一项动作需要进行攻击掷骰或技能检定，你对该检定掷骰两次并取较佳结果。若你在该攻击掷骰或技能检定上将会大失败，则改为失败。

Frequency once per hour

You number among the godsworn—giants born under an auspicious sign that have particularly strong deific powers. When you set your mind to something, nothing can stand in your way. If your next action this turn requires an attack roll or skill check, you roll that check twice and use the better result. If you would critically fail on the attack roll or skill check, you get a failure instead.

Harden Wings.name: 硬化之翼 Harden Wings
Harden Wings.description:
你翅膀上皮革般的血肉硬化，变得更坚韧、更有弹性。你翅膀的硬度变为等同于你的等级，它们的BT增加到你等级的两倍，它们的HP增加到你等级的四倍。

The leathery flesh of your wings hardens, becoming tougher and more resilient. Your wings' Hardness becomes equal to your level, their BT increases to twice your level, and their HP increases to four times your level.

Tessellated Shield.name: 镶嵌盾牌 Tessellated Shield
Tessellated Shield.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你将要因一次物理攻击而受到伤害

你体内的子嗣离开你的身体并紧密编织成一片镶嵌状结构，在你与袭来的攻击之间形成一道屏障。你获得等于你等级两倍的抗力，适用于你将从该触发攻击中受到的所有物理伤害。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger you would take damage from a physical attack

Members of your brood leave your body and weave themselves together in a tight tessellation, creating a barrier between you and the oncoming attack. You gain resistance equal to twice your level to all physical damage you would take from the triggering attack.

Giant Eye.name: 巨人之眼 Giant Eye
Giant Eye.description:
大多数邪眼会按需长出柄状物和其他附肢，以便完成它们选择的任何任务，但另一方面，你……只是生长，而现在你比其他任何个体都梦寐以求的更大。你变为大型，持续获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 的效果。

Most evil eyes grow stalks and other appendages as needed to allow them to accomplish whatever tasks they choose, but on the other hand, you… just grow, and now you're much bigger than any of the others could dream to be. You become Large, gaining the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} constantly.

Grasping Hold.name: 攫握擒抱 Grasping Hold
Grasping Hold.description:
你的虫群在你身上爬行并覆盖你的四肢，紧紧抓住表面，使你能够轻松移动和攀爬。你获得15尺的攀爬速度。

Your swarm crawls across your body and covers your limbs, grasping tightly onto surfaces to allow you to move and climb with ease. You gain a climb Speed of 15 feet.

Live On.name: 继续活着 Live On
Live On.description:
你召唤古老的魔像魔法来保持自身健康并屹立不倒。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2Vkd1IxylPceUAAF] 施放一次，作为神圣先天法术，但你只能以自身为目标。

You call on ancient golem magic to keep yourself healthy and upright. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2Vkd1IxylPceUAAF] once per day as a divine innate spell, but you can target only yourself.

Twist Minds.name: 扭曲心智 Twist Minds
Twist Minds.description:
你可以运用对心智过程的操控来扭曲数个生物的心智，或将其全部集中在一个生物身上以获得更强的效果，不过这么做时，你自己的心智会承受些许反噬。每天一次，你可以选择施放8环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs] 或8环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]，作为异能天生法术。之后，你将处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}直到你下个回合结束。你在每天施放时选择要施放这两个法术中的哪一个。

You can use your control over mental processes to twist the minds of several creatures, or focus it all on one creature for a greater effect, though when you do, your own mind takes a bit of backlash. Once per day, you can cast your choice of 8th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs] or 8th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY] as an occult innate spell. Afterward you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn. You choose which of the two spells to cast each day at the time of casting.

Ground Pound.name: 大地重击 Ground Pound
Ground Pound.description:
频率 每天一次

当你用脚猛踩或用手臂重击地面时，你可以在你周围的区域制造剧烈的震颤，宛如一场自然灾害！这产生一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.x7SPrsRxGb2Vy2nu] 法术的效果，其区域为以你为中心的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:60]（而非在500尺内的一个 @Template[type:burst|distance:60]），并且用于地震的裂隙与塌陷之 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] DC 采用你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

Frequency once per day

When you crash your foot or pound your arm into the ground, you can create violent tremors in the area around you, akin to a natural disaster! This has the effects of an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.x7SPrsRxGb2Vy2nu] spell in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] around you (instead of a @Template[type:burst|distance:60] within 500 feet) using the higher of your class DC or spell DC for the @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] DC of the earthquake's fissures and collapses.

Catch Projectile.name: 接住投射物 Catch Projectile
Catch Projectile.description:
需求 你必须有一只空手，但你可以将你正持有的任何物品作为此反应动作（）的一部分放开，以满足此需求。

触发 你成为一次投掷打击的目标，或有一件物体将要坠落到你身上。

你试图在空中直接抓住来袭的投射物，而不是让它击中你。你针对触发的攻击获得 +2 环境加值的 AC，或针对坠落物体的任何防御获得 +2 环境加值。若该攻击未命中，或你成功防御了坠落物体，你便抓住该武器或物体，不受伤害，并且现在正持有该武器或物体。你可以用此专长来偏斜异常巨大的远程投射物（例如巨石或弩炮弩矢），不过若该物体过大，你在抓住它之后可能无法继续握持住它。

Requirements You must have a free hand, but you can Release anything you're holding as part of this reaction to meet this requirement.

Trigger You are the target of a thrown Strike or an object would fall on you.

You attempt to seize an incoming projectile right out of the air, rather than allow it to hit you. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your AC against the triggering attack or to any defense against a falling object. If the attack misses or you successfully defend against the falling object, you catch the weapon or object, take no damage, and are now holding the weapon or object. You can use this feat to deflect unusually massive ranged projectiles (such as boulders or ballista bolts), though if the object is too large, you might not be able to hold onto it after you catch it.

From Hell's Heart I Stab at Thee.name: 自地狱之心我刺向汝 From Hell's Heart I Stab at Thee
From Hell's Heart I Stab at Thee.description:
触发 一个位于你触及内的生物以近战打击对你造成重击。

当所有其他诡计都失败，而你的生命之血洒落地面时，你会利用敌人命中之际短暂出现的破绽，送上一记复仇的反击。对触发的敌人进行一次近战打击。

特殊 如果你在本回合早些时候已对触发的敌人使用了 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick}，而他们仍然对你造成重击，你可以以自由动作（）对其使用“From Hell's Heart I Stab at Thee”；即便你戏耍的敌人在同一轮内对你造成多次重击，你也只能以这种方式每轮以自由动作（）进行一次报复。此外，如果他们正因你的 Scheming Trick 反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则该生物在对抗此报复性打击的 AC 上也承受相同的环境减值。

Trigger A creature within your reach critically hits you with a melee Strike.

When all other schemes fail and your lifeblood spills onto the ground, you use the momentary opening when your foe strikes true to deliver a vengeful counterattack. Make a melee Strike against the triggering enemy.

Special If you used @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} on the triggering foe already this turn and they critically hit you regardless, you can use From Hell's Heart I Stab at Thee on them as a free action; even if the foe you tricked critically hits you multiple times in the same round, you can only retaliate as a free action in this way once per round. Additionally, if they are taking a circumstance penalty to their attack rolls from your Scheming Trick reaction, the creature takes the same circumstance penalty to their AC against the retaliatory Strike.

Purgatorial Pounce.name: 炼狱猛扑 Purgatorial Pounce
Purgatorial Pounce.description:
需求 你未穿戴护甲或穿戴轻型护甲

你向前冲锋，以如同来自炼狱的扑击食尸兽般迅捷而出其不意地攻击你的敌人，甚至可能在对手察觉你之前就已出手。你以至多等同于你速度的距离进行疾走，并在移动结束时进行一次打击。如果你在开始你的炼狱扑击时对一名生物处于隐藏状态，你在打击结算之前仍对其保持隐藏状态。

Requirements You are unarmored or wearing light armor

You rush forward to attack your foe as quickly and unexpectedly as a pouncing esobok from Purgatory, potentially lashing out before your opponent can even notice you. You Stride up to your Speed and make a Strike at the end of your movement. If you began your Purgatorial Pounce hidden from a creature, you remain hidden from it until after the Strike.

Hunger for Secrets.name: 秘闻渴求 Hunger for Secrets
Hunger for Secrets.description:
需求 自从你上个回合开始以来，你已成功对一个目标使用过喂食动作。

血液知晓一切。它在其中携带着知识、信息、力量，以及更多别的东西。选择一个目标所知晓的技能（目标受训的技能；或者对于未列出其受训技能的生物，选择一个其调整值大于或等于其等级的技能）。如果你在该技能上已经是专家或更高，你不能选择该技能。你在所选技能上成为受训。该训练持续到你感到满足为止，或直到你下一次使用喂食为止，以先发生者为准。若该生物在所选技能上具有至少+20的调整值，当你使用该技能时，你会通过与该生物的知识以及你自身的洞见协同获得一个环境加值。若其调整值介于+20到+29之间，该环境加值为+1；若其调整值为+30或更高，该环境加值为+2。一旦你对某个生物使用过《饥渴求密》，除非该生物提高了其在所选技能上的熟练度调整值（通常通过升级），否则你不能再对同一生物使用它来再次获得同一个技能。

该能力对特殊或非标准技能不起作用。你可以用《饥渴求密》汲取某人的运动或商业学识，但不能汲取其吟游诗人学识或博学大师学识。

Requirements You have successfully used the Feed action on a target since the beginning of your last turn.

The blood knows. It carries knowledge inside of it, information, power, and a few more things besides. Select one skill that the target knows (a skill in which the target is trained, or for a creature that doesn’t list their trained skills, a skill in which the target’s modifier is greater than or equal to their level). You can’t choose a skill if you’re an expert or higher in that skill already. You become trained in the chosen skill. The training lasts for as long as you’re satisfied, or until the next time you use Feed, whichever comes first. If the creature had at least a +20 modifier on the chosen skill, you gain a circumstance bonus when using that skill by working together with the creature’s knowledge and your own insights. This circumstance bonus is +1 if their modifier is between +20 and +29 and +2 if their modifier is +30 or higher. Once you’ve used Hunger for Secrets on a creature, you can’t use it on the same creature to gain the same skill again unless that creature increases their proficiency modifier in the chosen skill (typically by leveling up).

This ability does not work on special or non-standard skills. You can drain someone’s Athletics or Mercantile Lore with Hunger for Secrets, but not their Bardic Lore or Loremaster Lore.

Speech of the Heavens.name: 诸天之言 Speech of the Heavens
Speech of the Heavens.description:
你已恢复天使真言的全部能力，甚至更进一步。你获得作为神圣天生法术的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K] 的恒定效果；若该效果因某种原因被移除，你可以通过一个两动作行动重新获得该效果，该行动具有专注（特征）。当你使用你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z5Sk7DWk6A74dF3d]{Truespeech} 专长来施放tongues时，你也会获得该专长的其他益处，超出tongues法术本身的效果。

You've regained the full capabilities of angelic truespeech and more. You gain the constant effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K] as a divine innate spell, and if it's somehow removed, you can regain the effects as a two-action activity, which has the concentrate trait. When you use your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z5Sk7DWk6A74dF3d]{Truespeech} feat to cast tongues, you also gain the other benefits of that feat, above and beyond the tongues spell.

Dream Drinker.name: 梦饮者 Dream Drinker
Dream Drinker.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 一名处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{被束缚}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}状态的生物，或自愿的生物在你的触及范围内，且你在过去1小时内没有对不同的生物使用过梦饮者

有时，你需要从一个目标那里获知某个特定信息。有几种方式可以做到这一点，其中之一就是直接手段。你将獠牙刺入该生物体内，啜饮它的血液，或咬下几口它的血肉。若受害者处于被擒抱状态，则你必须进行一次@Check[type:athletics|defense:fortitude]检定，对抗受害者的强韧DC；若受害者处于其他任一状态，则该检定自动成功。若你成功，则该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}状态，持续1分钟，并且必须尝试一次@Check[type:will|against:class-spell]豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）。一旦你对某个生物使用梦饮者，你在1小时内不能对任何其他生物使用它，但在该小时内你最多可以对同一生物总共使用梦饮者13次。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 你可以向目标提出一个问题，并尝试从它的血液中揭示答案。目标可以尝试一次@Check[type:deception|against:class-spell]检定，对抗你的DC；若目标成功，则你不会得知答案；若大成功，则目标会给出一个你相信为真实的虚假答案。一旦你向目标问过某个特定问题，再次询问会产生相同结果。

大失败 同失败，并且目标在针对你的问题进行欺骗检定时承受–4环境减值。

Frequency once per round

Requirements A @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, or willing creature is within your reach, and you haven’t used Dream Drinker on a different creature in the past hour

Occasionally, you need to learn something specific from a target. There are a few ways of doing this, and one of them is the direct approach. You sink your fangs into the creature and drink its blood or take a few bites of its flesh. This requires an @Check[type:athletics|defense:fortitude] check against the victim’s Fortitude DC if the victim is grabbed and automatically succeeds for any of the other conditions. If you succeed, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 minute, and must attempt a @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] save against your class or spell DC, whichever is higher. Once you use Dream Drinker on a creature, you can’t use it on any other creatures for 1 hour, but you can use Dream Drinker up to 13 times total against the same creature within that hour.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure You can ask the target a question and attempt to uncover the answer from its blood. The target can attempt a @Check[type:deception|against:class-spell] check against your DC; if the target succeeds, you don’t learn the answer, and on a critical success, the target gives you a false answer that you believe is truthful Once you’ve asked the target a given question, asking it again produces the same result.

Critical Failure As failure, and the target takes a –4 circumstance penalty to Deception checks against your questions.

Cheetah's Speed.name: 猎豹的速度 Cheetah's Speed
Cheetah's Speed.description:
你的猫科身躯拥有一些猎豹般的修长速度。你的速度增加 5 英尺。

Your feline body has some of the lanky speed of the cheetah. Your Speed increases by 5 feet.

Language Acquisition.name: 语言习得 Language Acquisition
Language Acquisition.description:
你大脑中的语言中枢异常强大，你不仅能快速掌握语言，甚至还能从你吃下的大脑中获得许可以学习它们。你学会三种新语言，从你有许可的常见语言与非普通语言中选择，也可以选择你吃过其大脑的生物的语言。这些语言与其他语言采用相同的形式（手语或口语）。当你选择 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{多语者} 专长时，你学会三种新语言而不是两种，并获得许可以学习你吃过其大脑的生物的语言。

The language center in your brain is unusually powerful, and you not only pick up languages quickly, but you can even gain access to learn them from the brains you eat. You learn three new languages, chosen from common languages and uncommon languages to which you have access, as well as languages of creatures whose brains you have eaten. These languages take the same form (signed or spoken) as your other languages. When you select the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.P9HCz0uR6xPHuw72]{Multilingual} feat, you learn three new languages instead of two and gain access to the languages of creatures whose brains you have eaten.

Monstrous Strikes.name: 怪物般的打击 Monstrous Strikes
Monstrous Strikes.description:
你已将身体锻炼成一件强大的武器。你获得下列一种徒手攻击。无论你获得哪一种徒手攻击，它都属于拳斗武器组，并具有所列的伤害与特征。

爪 1d4 挥砍（灵巧，娴熟，徒手，多用：穿刺）

角 1d6 穿刺（娴熟，徒手，多用：钝击）

颚 1d6 穿刺（背刺者，娴熟，徒手）

尾 1d6 钝击（娴熟，绊摔，徒手）

翼 1d4 钝击（灵巧，娴熟，推撞，徒手）

特殊 你可以多次选取此专长，每次选择一个你可用的不同徒手攻击。若你是攀爬肢石像鬼，你不能选择翼徒手攻击。若你是换巢石像鬼，你不能选择角、尾或翼徒手攻击；且若你选择爪或颚徒手攻击，它们是可伸缩的，但仍可能被极其熟练的观察者注意到（你仍然在用于隐藏它们的欺瞒检定上获得 +4 环境加值）。若你是鞭击尾石像鬼且你选择获得尾徒手攻击，你的尾获得推撞特征。

You've honed your body into a formidable weapon. You gain one of the following unarmed attacks. Whichever unarmed attack you gain, it's in the brawling weapon group and has the listed damage and traits.

Claw 1d4 slashing (agile, finesse, unarmed, versatile piercing)

Horn 1d6 piercing (finesse, unarmed, versatile bludgeoning)

Jaws 1d6 piercing (backstabber, finesse, unarmed)

Tail 1d6 bludgeoning (finesse, trip, unarmed)

Wing 1d4 bludgeoning (agile, finesse, shove, unarmed)

Special You can take this feat multiple times, selecting a different unarmed attack available to you each time. If you're a clamberlimb gargoyle, you can't choose a wing unarmed attack. If you're a clutchswapped gargoyle, you can't choose a horn, tail, or wing unarmed attack, and if you choose a claw or jaws unarmed attack, they're retractable but possible for extremely skilled observers to notice (you still gain a +4 circumstance bonus to your Deception checks to hide them). If you're a lashingtail gargoyle and you choose to gain a tail unarmed attack, your tail gains the shove trait.

Magic Spark.name: 魔法火花 Magic Spark
Magic Spark.description:
无论是由于辛勤工作还是运气，你已在血脉中点燃了魔法的火花。你根据你的传承获得以下法术之一。你每天可以将此法术作为原初先天法术施放两次。

云巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{Gust of Wind}

火巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aIHY2DArKFweIrpf]{Command}

霜巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8]{Grease}（但油脂是一层冰）

丘陵巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.xqmHD8JIjak15lRk]

石巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yAiSNmz39qXOIlco]{Mud Pit}

风暴巨人： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WzLKjSw6hsBhuklC]{Create Water}

多才传承： @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm}

Whether due to hard work or luck, you've kindled the spark of magic in your blood. You gain one of the following spells, based on your heritage. You can cast this spell twice per day as a primal innate spell.

Cloud Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.g8QqHpv2CWDwmIm1]{Gust of Wind}

Fire Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aIHY2DArKFweIrpf]{Command}

Frost Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Wu0xFpewMKRK3HG8]{Grease} (but the grease is a sheet of ice)

Hill Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.xqmHD8JIjak15lRk]

Stone Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yAiSNmz39qXOIlco]{Mud Pit}

Storm Giant: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WzLKjSw6hsBhuklC]{Create Water}

Versatile Heritage: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm}

Diabolic Strikes.name: 恶魔打击 Diabolic Strikes
Diabolic Strikes.description:
你保留了一些邪魔般的特征，并训练自己将其作为危险的武器来运用。你根据你的传承获得一种徒手攻击。若你是 barbazu，你可以选择胡须、爪或蹄的徒手攻击；若你是 cornugon，你可以选择爪或尾的徒手攻击；若你是 deimavigga，你可以选择爪的徒手攻击；若你是 gelugon，你可以选择尾的徒手攻击；若你是 hamatula，你可以选择倒刺或爪的徒手攻击；若你是 osyluth，你可以选择爪、颚或尾的徒手攻击；若你是 phistophilus，你可以选择角的徒手攻击。它们都属于斗殴武器组，并具有所列的伤害与特征。

倒刺 1d4 穿刺（灵巧，娴熟，擒抱，徒手）

胡须 1d4 穿刺（致命 d8，娴熟，横扫，徒手）

爪 1d4 挥砍（灵巧，娴熟，徒手，多用 穿刺）

蹄 1d6 钝击（娴熟，推撞，徒手）

角 1d6 穿刺（娴熟，徒手，多用 钝击）

颚 1d6 穿刺（娴熟，擒抱，徒手）

尾 1d4 钝击（灵巧，娴熟，徒手）

特殊 若你的传承列出了多种类型的徒手攻击（如 barbazu、cornugon、hamatula 或 osyluth），你可以多次选择此专长，以从你的传承中再获得另一种徒手攻击。

You retain some fiendish features, which you’ve trained to wield as a dangerous weapon. You gain an unarmed attack depending on your heritage. If you’re a barbazu, you can choose a beard, claw, or hoof unarmed attack; if you’re a cornugon, you can choose a claw or tail unarmed attack; if you’re a deimavigga, you can choose a claw unarmed attack; if you’re a gelugon, you can choose a tail unarmed attack; if you’re a hamatula, you can choose a barb or claw unarmed attack; if you’re an osyluth, you can choose a claw, jaws, or tail unarmed attack; if you’re a phistophilus, you can choose a horn unarmed attack. All are in the brawling weapon group and have the listed damage and traits.

Barb 1d4 piercing (agile, finesse, grapple, unarmed)

Beard 1d4 piercing (deadly d8, finesse, sweep, unarmed)

Claw 1d4 slashing (agile, finesse, unarmed, versatile piercing)

Hoof 1d6 bludgeoning (finesse, shove, unarmed)

Horn 1d6 piercing (finesse, unarmed, versatile bludgeoning)

Jaws 1d6 piercing (finesse, grapple, unarmed)

Tail 1d4 bludgeoning (agile, finesse, unarmed)

Special If your heritage has multiple listed types of unarmed attacks (such as barbazu, cornugon, hamatula, or osyluth), you can take this feat multiple times to gain another unarmed attack from your heritage.

Accursed Blasphemy.name: 受诅亵渎 Accursed Blasphemy
Accursed Blasphemy.description:
你说出一种如此卑劣、如此亵渎的真相，听到的人会流出血泪。每日一次，你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Yk3t4ekEiFIoEz9c]{Power Word Blind} 作为7环先天秘法法术施放。若目标为神圣施法者或以其他方式侍奉某位神祇（例如使者），则你改为对该生物将power word blind作为8环先天秘法法术施放。即使你不知道目标的宗教身份，该法术也会自动被升阶至8环。若你为20级且你已满足，你还可以进一步升阶power world blind（对非神圣目标升至8环，或对神圣目标升至9环）。如果你选择这么做，你将不再满足。

You speak a truth so vile, so unholy, that those who hear it weep tears of blood. Once per day, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Yk3t4ekEiFIoEz9c]{Power Word Blind} as a 7th-rank innate occult spell. If the target is a divine spellcaster or otherwise the servant of a god (such as a herald), you instead cast power word blind as an 8th-rank innate occult spell on that creature. Even if you don’t know the target’s religious status, the spell is automatically heightened to 8th rank. If you’re 20th level and you’re satisfied, you can heighten the power world blind further (to 8th rank against a non-divine target or 9th-rank against a divine target). If you choose to do so, you’re no longer satisfied.

Reaper's Vengeance.name: 收割者的复仇 Reaper's Vengeance
Reaper's Vengeance.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 一个生物对你造成伤害。

你对触发生物的胆大妄为感到冒犯，于是将其标记为死敌。持续1分钟：若该生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}状态，你为以其为目标所需的纯骰检定DC从5降至3；若该生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{躲藏}状态，你为以其为目标所需的纯骰检定DC从11降至7。此外，在持续时间内，你将目标因掩蔽对抗你所获得的环境加值降低为：较小掩蔽从1改为0；标准掩蔽从2改为1；较大掩蔽从4改为3。最后，在持续时间内，你进行检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索}该目标时获得+1环境加值。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger A creature deals damage to you.

Offended at the triggering creature's audacity, you mark them for death. For 1 minute, you reduce the flat check DC you need to target the creature if it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from 5 to 3 and the flat check DC to target the creature if it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} from 11 to 7. In addition, for the duration, you reduce the circumstance bonus the target gains against you from cover to 0 instead of 1 for lesser cover, 1 instead of 2 for standard cover, and 3 instead of 4 for greater cover. Finally, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} the target for the duration.

Connected Eyes.name: 连结之眼 Connected Eyes
Connected Eyes.description:
你可以在盟友身上放置眼睛，将你们的视野连接成一个集体。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XQSPJHOf3TyfqvgS]{Web of Eyes} 作为一个异能天生法术施放一次。

You can place eyes on your allies, connecting your vision together into a collective. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XQSPJHOf3TyfqvgS]{Web of Eyes} once per day as an occult innate spell.

Fee-Fi-Fo-Fum.name: 费-菲-佛-芬 Fee-Fi-Fo-Fum
Fee-Fi-Fo-Fum.description:
你拥有令人印象深刻的嗅觉，并以自己嗅出入侵者和美味食物的本事为傲——有时两者还是同一个！你获得不精确嗅觉，射程为30英尺。若你位于该生物的下风处，GM可以将射程加倍；若你位于上风处，GM可以将射程减半，由其酌情决定。

You have an impressive sense of smell, and you pride yourself on your ability to sniff out trespassers and tasty food—sometimes one and the same! You gain imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet. The GM might double the range if you're downwind from the creature or halve the range if you're upwind, at their discretion.

Haunting Melody.name: 萦回旋律 Haunting Melody
Haunting Melody.description:
频率 每天一次

你可以用低吟一首萦绕心头的歌谣来迷住生者与不死者。持续1分钟，或直到你选择停止，你的萦绕旋律以@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]环绕你。于灵光中开始其回合的敌人必须尝试一次@Check[will|against:class-spell]豁免，对抗你较高者：职业DC或法术DC，并根据以下结果结算。之后，它们获得持续1分钟的暂时免疫。因你的萦绕旋律而@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{迷魂（状态）}的生物不会因为针对其自身或其盟友的敌对动作而失去其迷魂（状态）。尽管这是一个心灵（特征）效果，此能力仍会影响无心智的不死生物（对抗无心智的不死生物时，它失去心灵（特征））。送魂者对此能力免疫。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受旋律影响。

成功 该生物被你迷魂（状态）1轮。

失败 该生物被你迷魂（状态）2轮。

大成功或大失败 该生物被你迷魂（状态）1分钟，并且在其下个回合中，它必须将其每个动作都用于尽可能迅速地向你移动，同时避开明显的危险；若它变为与你相邻，或原本就与你相邻，则它停在原地，并在该回合剩余的任何动作中保持不动且不进行任何行动。

Frequency once per day

You can croon a haunting song to entrance both the living and the undead. For 1 minute, or until you choose to stop, your haunting melody surrounds you in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]. Enemies who start their turn in the aura must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC with the following results. Afterwards, they are temporarily immune for 1 minute. Creatures @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by your haunting melody don't lose their fascinated condition due to hostile actions against themself or their allies. Despite being a mental effect, this ability affects mindless undead (against mindless undead, it loses the mental trait). Psychopomps are immune to this ability.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected by the melody.

Success The creature is fascinated by you for 1 round.

Failure The creature is fascinated by you for 2 rounds.

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated by you for 1 minute, and on its next turn, it must spend each of its actions to move closer to you as expediently as possible, while avoiding obvious dangers, and if it becomes adjacent to you, or was already adjacent, it stays still and doesn't act for any remaining actions that turn.

Shifting Pounce.name: 移位扑击 Shifting Pounce
Shifting Pounce.description:
需求 你处于类人生物形态。

你在跳跃的过程中变形，让你的猎物措手不及。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} 水平跳跃。你在空中时将形态变换为你的混合形态。若你在这次移动结束时位于某个目标的触及范围内，你可以用你的混合形态的一种徒手攻击对该目标进行打击。该目标在这次打击中视为处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}。

Requirements You are in your humanoid form.

You transform in the middle of a jump, catching your prey off-guard. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} horizontally. You Change Shape into your hybrid form while in the air. If you end this movement within reach of a target, you can Strike that target with one of your hybrid form's unarmed attacks. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against this Strike.

Manufactured Anatomy.name: 人造解剖结构 Manufactured Anatomy
Manufactured Anatomy.description:
你的身体不会像其他活体生物那样屈服于相同的病痛。你在对抗疾病、毒素，以及会使你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心（状态）}状态的效果时的豁免获得+1环境加值。每天一次，当你通过干呕来降低恶心（状态）状态且强韧豁免失败时，你可以以自由动作（）再次干呕。

Your body doesn't succumb to the same ailments as other living creatures. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against diseases, poisons, and effects that would give you the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition. Once per day when you retch to reduce the sickened condition and fail the Fortitude saving throw, you can retch again as a free action.

Hunter's Eyes.name: 猎人之眼 Hunter's Eyes
Hunter's Eyes.description:
你的双眼如猫般敏锐，如蛇般冷酷无情。你获得黑暗视觉。

Your eyes are as keen as a cat’s and as pitiless as a serpent’s. You gain darkvision.

Scatter!.name: 散开！ Scatter!
Scatter!.description:
在一阵混乱与声响交织的壮观嘈杂中，你的育群离开你的身体，向四面八方逃散。趁着混乱，你可以跨步10尺（而非通常的5尺），然后掷骰一次欺瞒检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{制造分心}。如果你的跨步将你移动到一个你具有掩蔽或隐蔽的位置，你甚至可以在你的回合结束后仍保持@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{匿踪}。在你花费一个交互动作将你的育群重新收回体内之前，你不能使用带有swarmblood特征的动作。

In a spectacular cacophony of chaos and sound, your brood vacates your body and flees in every direction. In the confusion, you can Step 10 feet (instead of the usual 5 feet) and then roll a Deception check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{Create a Diversion}. If your Step moved you to a spot where you have cover or concealment, you can remain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} even after the end of your turn. You can't use actions with the swarmblood trait until you spend an Interact action to draw your brood back into your body.

Diabolic Weapon Familiarity.name: 炼狱武器熟悉度 Diabolic Weapon Familiarity
Diabolic Weapon Familiarity.description:
地狱以暴力与武力实施其暴虐统治，并维系其严苛秩序。你获得所有带有魔鬼（特征）的非普通武器的许可。你对任何带有魔鬼（特征）的武器具有熟悉度，此外还包括 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.vlnzTSsRmWeSkt9O]{Glaive}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.aXuJh4i8HqSu6NYV]{Longspear}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.LJdbVTOZog39EEbi]{Longsword}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.MVAWttmT0QDa7LsV]{Longbow}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.tOhoGvmCMw4JpWcS]{Spear}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zi9ovfoRp2fMhfpO]{Spiked Chain}以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.f1gwoTkf3Nn0v3PN]{Whip}。就熟练度而言，你将其中任何军用武器视为简易武器，并将其中任何高等武器视为军用武器。

在第5等级时，每当你用这些武器之一造成大成功的命中时，你获得其大成功专精效果。

Hell imposes its tyrannical rule and maintains its strict order through violence and strength of arms. You gain access to all uncommon weapons with the devil trait. You have familiarity with any weapons with the devil trait, plus the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.vlnzTSsRmWeSkt9O]{Glaive}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.aXuJh4i8HqSu6NYV]{Longspear}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.LJdbVTOZog39EEbi]{Longsword}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.MVAWttmT0QDa7LsV]{Longbow}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.tOhoGvmCMw4JpWcS]{Spear}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.zi9ovfoRp2fMhfpO]{Spiked Chain}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.f1gwoTkf3Nn0v3PN]{Whip}. For the purposes of proficiency, you treat any of these that are martial weapons as simple weapons and any that are advanced weapons as martial weapons.

At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with one of these weapons, you gain its critical specialization effect.

Eternal.name: 永恒 Eternal
Eternal.description:
你已解锁永恒之戒最深处的秘密，并获得近乎不朽。

你停止衰老。此外，每小时第一次当你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} 值将变为3或更高时，你的濒死值改为保持在2不变。

You've unlocked the deepest secrets of the Ring of the Eternal, and achieved near-immortality.

You cease aging. Additionally, the first time each hour that your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} value would become 3 or above, your dying value remains at 2 instead.

Lamia's Feast.name: 拉弥亚之宴 Lamia's Feast
Lamia's Feast.description:
频率 每天一次
