你享用一场足以匹配最初的拉弥亚女王的盛宴，吞食所有那些愚蠢的敌人和倒霉的旁观者的鲜血与血肉——他们竟敢站在你面前。你对@Template[type:cone|distance:30]内的活体生物造成 @Damage[16d6[void]] 伤害，并以你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者为对抗值进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell|basic:true] 豁免。你获得等同于该法术对单一生物所造成伤害一半的临时生命值；计算这些临时生命值时，使用受到伤害最高的那只生物。1分钟后，你失去任何剩余的临时生命值。若拉弥亚的盛宴对一个活体、有感知的生物造成伤害，你会变得满足。

Frequency once per day

You engage in a feast worthy of the original queen Lamia and devour the blood and flesh of all those foolish foes and hapless bystanders who dare to stand before you. You deal @Damage[16d6[void]] damage to living creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], with a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to half the damage a single creature takes from this spell; calculate these temporary Hit Points using the creature that took the most damage. You lose any remaining temporary Hit Points after 1 minute. If Lamia’s Feast deals damage to a living sapient creature, you become satisfied.

Fusion Magic Impresario.name: 融合 魔法 印象派导演 Fusion Magic Impresario
Fusion Magic Impresario.description:
你与自身融合的其他成员之间的魔法联结强大到足以让你共享复杂得令人惊讶的法术——考虑到你学习它们的方式更是如此。选择一个你融合中的另一名成员已知的3环或更低的法术，以及一个4环或更低的法术（正如同 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PyQ0TUg92xugElRL]{Fusion Magic Adept}，它们不需要来自同一法术列表，也不需要由你融合中的同一名成员所掌握）。你每天可以各施放一次所选法术，作为天生法术，其根源与你借用该法术的那名融合成员的根源相同。

Your magical connection to the other members of your fusion is powerful enough to allow you to share spells of surprising complexity given the way you've learned them. Select one 3rd-rank or lower spell and one 4th-rank or lower spell known by another member of your fusion (just as with @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PyQ0TUg92xugElRL]{Fusion Magic Adept}, they don't need to be from the same spell list or known by the same member of your fusion). You can cast each of your chosen spells once per day as innate spells of the same tradition as the member of your fusion from whom you borrowed them.

Ironclad Insight.name: 铁甲洞察 Ironclad Insight
Ironclad Insight.description:
当你重心回归至洞见时，你以洞见披上一层防护护甲。处于重心回归至洞见时，你获得等于你等级一半的精神伤害抗力，并获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.jdKJgNq90oITPIE2]{洞见之盾}反应动作（）。

When you Recenter yourself to insight, you clothe yourself in a protective armor of insight. While Recentered to insight, you gain resistance equal to half your level to mental damage, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.jdKJgNq90oITPIE2]{Insight Shield} reaction.

Rekindle Purgatory's Wings.name: 重燃炼狱之翼 Rekindle Purgatory's Wings
Rekindle Purgatory's Wings.description:
你重新点燃了更多炼狱之风，让你的翅膀再次升空——这些力量在你被切断时失去了。你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.UrZtzdCsmran7uWl]{Purgatorial Flit} 获得的飞行速度提升至25尺。

You've rekindled more of the winds of Purgatory that held your wings aloft, which you lost when you were Severed. The fly Speed you gain from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.UrZtzdCsmran7uWl]{Purgatorial Flit} increases to 25 feet.

Evil Eye Magic.name: 邪眼 魔法 Evil Eye Magic
Evil Eye Magic.description:
你的眼睛赋予你奇异的魔法力量，对大多数邪眼而言，这些力量通常与诅咒或占卜相关。从秘术法术列表中选择一个常见戏法，或另一个你拥有许可的秘术戏法。你可以随意将该戏法作为秘术天生法术施放。与通常规则相同，该戏法会被升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。

Your eye grants you strange magical powers, which are typically related to curses or divinations for most evil eyes. Choose a common cantrip from the occult spell list, or another occult cantrip to which you have access. You can cast this cantrip as an occult innate spell at will. As normal, the cantrip is heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Lamia Spell Arts.name: 拉弥亚法术技艺 Lamia Spell Arts
Lamia Spell Arts.description:
你血液中的魔法变得更强、更微妙，也更顽强。在你的每日准备期间，选择 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6ZIKB0151LUR19Rw]{Ill Omen}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yV7Ouzaoe7DHLESI]{Ventriloquism}。你可以在当天将其作为一次灵异先天法术施放。

The magic in your blood grows stronger, subtler, and more tenacious. During your daily preparations, choose @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6ZIKB0151LUR19Rw]{Ill Omen}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yV7Ouzaoe7DHLESI]{Ventriloquism}. You can cast this as an occult innate spell once that day.

Second Shaping.name: 第二次塑形 Second Shaping
Second Shaping.description:
你以全新而奇异的方式塑造自身，使你能够将两种邪眼传承的特征合二为一。除你原本的传承外，你获得一个你当前尚未拥有的邪眼传承。若这导致你同时拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.4NKvIBvPNCQrhpAK]{水栖（特征）之眼} 与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.E1YAItSko5W8aZFB]{潜行之眼} 传承，则你的陆地速度为20尺；若这两种传承造成任何其他冲突，由GM决定是否允许该组合以及其结果为何。

You shape yourself in new and unusual ways, allowing you to combine the traits of two evil eye heritages in one. You gain an evil eye heritage that you don't currently possess, in addition to your original heritage. If this causes you to possess both the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.4NKvIBvPNCQrhpAK]{Aquatic Eye} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.E1YAItSko5W8aZFB]{Stalking Eye} heritages, your land Speed is 20 feet; if the two heritages cause any other conflicts, the GM determines whether to allow the combination and what the result will be.

Fortified Soul.name: 坚固灵魂 Fortified Soul
Fortified Soul.description:
即使披覆于粗陋的物质之中，你仍是昔日自己的回响——崇高之歌或神圣之火的生物。你获得等同于你等级一半（最低为1）的抗力，抵抗音波伤害（若你拥有合唱传承）、火焰伤害（若你拥有巴利斯传承）、或虚无伤害（若你拥有单子或莫瓦尼天使传承）。

Even when clothed in gross matter, you remain an echo of what you once were, a creature of sublime song or divine fire. You gain resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) to sonic damage (if you have the choral heritage), fire damage (if you have the balisse heritage), or void damage (if you have the monadic or movanic deva heritage).

Revival Recursion.name: 复苏递归 Revival Recursion
Revival Recursion.description:
频率 每周一次

触发 你死亡

你的身体死亡，但你的子嗣带着你的意识逃离并使你复苏。GM暗中掷骰 [[/br 1d4]]。在你死亡后等同于结果的轮数之后，你的子嗣凝聚，你的身体在你选择的15英尺内一处未被占据的空间中重塑。你的新身体拥有1 HP，且没有已准备的法术或法术位，没有聚能点（或任何由你的职业、专长或族裔给予的可消耗资源）。你在复活后的1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑}状态，并且你在1周内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{衰竭 2}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}状态；在这一周过去之前，这些状态无法以任何方式移除或降低。

Frequency once per week

Trigger you die

Your body dies, but your brood escapes with your consciousness and resuscitates you. The GM secretly rolls [[/br 1d4]]. A number of rounds after your death equal to the result, your brood coalesces and your body reforms in an unoccupied space within 15 feet of your choice. Your new body has 1 HP and no spell prepared or spell slots, no focus points (or any expandable resource granted by your class, feats or ancestry). You are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} for 1 round after reviving, and you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 week; these conditions can't be removed or reduced by any means until the week has passed.

Stone Double.name: 石之替身 Stone Double
Stone Double.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你被一次物理近战攻击命中并受到伤害。

你传送至30英尺内你能看见的一个空的空间，然后若你满足这样做的状态，则立刻 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏}。在你原本的位置，你留下一个自己的石像，精确到由触发攻击对你造成的伤害。该石像具有硬度10和HP 40。若一个生物在你躲藏后没有注意到你，它可能会错误地认为你变成了石像，而不是用一个赝品替换了自己。如果没有被摧毁，石像会在下一次日落时崩解成尘土。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You are hit by a physical melee attack and take damage.

You teleport to an empty space that you can see within 30 feet, then immediately @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} if you meet the conditions to do so. In your place, you leave behind a stone statue of yourself, accurate down to the damage you received from the triggering attack. This stone statue has Hardness 10 and HP 40. A creature who doesn't notice you after you Hide might mistakenly believe that you've transformed into the statue, rather than replaced yourself with a fake. If not destroyed, the statue crumbles to dust at the next sunset.

Living Statue.name: 活体雕像 Living Statue
Living Statue.description:
频率 每日一次

比一只嗜血的斯芬克斯更可怕的，只有一尊嗜血的斯芬克斯石像。你在1分钟内变成一尊风化石像的形态。在你的石化斯芬克斯形态下，你获得AC+2状态加值与对物理伤害的抗力10（精金除外），但你的各项速度也承受–10尺减值。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ZZ06amrqpv204JEd]{精金利爪} 专长，在“活体雕像”的效果持续期间，你的徒手攻击被视为精金。

Frequency once per day

The only thing more terrifying than a sphinx out for your blood is a stone statue of a sphinx out for your blood. For 1 minute, you take on the shape of a statue of weathered stone. While in your stone sphinx form, you gain a +2 status bonus to AC and resistance 10 to physical damage (except adamantine), but you also take a –10-foot penalty to your Speeds.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ZZ06amrqpv204JEd]{Adamantine Claws} feat, your unarmed attacks are treated as adamantine for as long as Living Statue's effect lasts.

Raise Wings.name: 振翅升空 Raise Wings
Raise Wings.description:
你展开双翼并调整姿势，使其为你抵御伤害。你的翅膀会一直保持抬起，直到你下个回合开始。当你的翅膀抬起时，你的AC获得+1环境加值。你可以使用一个交互动作来抓住你的翅膀以支撑它。这会占用你的一只手，该手不再空闲也无法再握持其他任何东西，但稳固的支撑会使AC的环境加值从+1提高到+2。

如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡}反应动作（），你可以将你的翅膀用于该专长，即使它们不是盾牌。你的翅膀具有硬度3、HP 12以及BT 6，但你的翅膀在降至0生命值时不会被摧毁，并且也不是物品。一旦你的翅膀进入破损状态，你就不能将它们用于任何目的（抬起翅膀、翅膀徒手攻击、通过稳翼传承减少坠落伤害，等等）。你受伤的翅膀只能通过恰当的治疗来恢复；每当你通过@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}恢复生命值时，你的翅膀也会恢复等量的生命值。每当你使用一个允许你抬起盾牌的能力时，你可以改为抬起翅膀，并将任何通常要求盾牌的需求改为适用于你的翅膀。由于你的翅膀不是盾牌，其他对盾牌生效或需要盾牌的能力无法与翅膀配合使用。

You unfold your wings and position them to shield yourself from harm. Your wings remain raised until the start of your next turn. While your wings are raised, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC. You can use an Interact action to take hold of your wing to brace it. This uses one of your hands, which is no longer free or able to hold anything else, but the sturdy bracing increases the circumstance bonus to AC from +1 to +2.

If you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction, you can use your wings for that feat, even though they aren't a shield. Your wings have Hardness 3, HP 12, and BT 6, but your wings aren't destroyed when reduced to 0 Hit Points and aren't an item. Once your wings become broken, you can't use them for any purpose (Raise Wings, wing unarmed attacks, reducing falling damage with the firmwing heritage, and so on). Your wounded wings recover only with the proper treatment; whenever you recover Hit Points from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}, your wings also regain an equal number of Hit Points. Whenever you use an ability that allows you to Raise a Shield, you can Raise Wings instead, changing any requirements that normally require a shield to apply to your wings. Since your wings aren't a shield, other abilities that function on shields or require shields don't work with your wings.

Purgatorial Flit.name: 炼狱闪移 Purgatorial Flit
Purgatorial Flit.description:
你已重新获得对翅膀的足够控制，可以在凡世短暂地掠动。你飞行。若你通常没有飞行速度，则你在此次移动中获得15尺的飞行速度。若你在此次移动结束时不在坚实地面上，你会坠落。

特殊 你的翅膀足够强壮，即使你没有飞行速度，也可以尝试 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qm7xptMSozAinnPS]{制止坠落}。

You've regained enough control of your wings to flit briefly in the mortal realm. You Fly. If you don't normally have a fly Speed, you gain a fly Speed of 15 feet for this movement. If you aren't on solid ground at the end of this movement, you fall.

Special Your wings are strong enough to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qm7xptMSozAinnPS]{Arrest a Fall} even though you don't have a fly Speed.

Chimerical Resistance.name: 奇幻抗力 Chimerical Resistance
Chimerical Resistance.description:
你那份融合奇美拉身体对特定能量类型或毒素具备抗力。选择酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或毒素。你获得对所选伤害类型等于你等级一半（最低1）的抗力。

特殊 若你也拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.vNdgMFoppza04gCy]{Chimera Breath} 族裔专长，你必须选择相同的伤害类型。

Your portion of your amalgam chimera body is resistant to a particular energy type or poison. Choose acid, cold, electricity, fire, or poison. You gain resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) to the chosen damage type.

Special If you also have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.vNdgMFoppza04gCy]{Chimera Breath} ancestry feat, you must choose the same damage type.

Language of the Wild.name: 荒野之语 Language of the Wild
Language of the Wild.description:
你现在能够理解各种动物并以同样的方式回应。你可以与所有动物交谈，而不仅仅是与你的动物形态相对应的动物。你在对动物进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 时获得+1环境加值（这通常使用交涉（技能）），而对与你的动物形态相对应种类的动物则提升为+2环境加值。

You now understand all manner of animals and can respond in kind. You can speak to all animals, not just animals that correspond with your animal form. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on animals (which usually uses the Diplomacy skill), increasing to a +2 circumstance bonus on animals of the kind corresponding to your animal form.

Lunar Rend.name: 月之撕裂 Lunar Rend
Lunar Rend.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

需求 你使用爪的徒手攻击以两次连续的打击命中同一个敌人。

你的利爪能高效地撕裂血肉与筋腱。你对你刚命中的敌人造成你混合形态的爪徒手攻击的伤害，而无需进行攻击掷骰。

特殊 在满月的月光下，你可以每分钟使用一次月华撕裂，而不是每10分钟一次。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements You hit the same enemy with two consecutive Strikes with your claw unarmed attack.

Your claws efficiently tear through flesh and sinew. You deal the damage of your hybrid form's claw unarmed attack to the enemy you just hit, without needing an attack roll.

Special Under the light of a full moon, you can use Lunar Rend once per minute instead of once per 10 minutes.

Enciphered Mind.name: 密文心智 Enciphered Mind
Enciphered Mind.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 一名生物对你使用接触你心智的精神效果；这包括精神法术与魔法能力，但不包括像 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF] 这类通过互动产生的精神效果（由GM决定哪些精神效果适用）。

你所收集的禁忌知识、谜题与奥秘，已被刻入你的心智，并以隐秘的心灵谜局与陷阱守护，专为那些贸然试图掠夺你心灵迷宫之人而设。触发生物承受 @Damage[((1+ceil(@actor.level/2))d8)[mental]] 伤害，其效果取决于其针对你职业DC与法术DC中较高者进行的 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免结果。自11级起，此后每2级，伤害增加1d8；在19级时达到最大值11d8。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger A creature uses a mental effect on you that contacts your mind; this includes mental spells and magical abilities but not mental effects from interacting like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF] (the GM determines which mental effects apply).

The forbidden knowledge, riddles, and mysteries you've gathered have been etched into your mind with hidden mental puzzles and traps for the unwary who seek to pillage your mental labyrinth. The triggering creature takes @Damage[((1+ceil(@actor.level/2))d8)[mental]] damage with effects depending on their @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. At 11th level, and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d8, to a maximum of 11d8 at 19th level.

Riddle Lore.name: 谜语学识 Riddle Lore
Riddle Lore.description:
不精通谜语的斯芬克斯可算不上合格。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识}技能专长，用于谜语学识（技能），并获得你选择的另一项学识（技能）。

每天一次，你可以使用你的谜语学识（技能）对任何主题进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}，通过感召与该主题相关的古老谜题与谜语来唤起记忆。

It is a poor sphinx that is not a scholar of riddles. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} skill feat for Riddle Lore and one additional Lore skill of your choice.

Once per day, you can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} on any subject using your Riddle Lore, calling to mind ancient puzzles and riddles relevant to the subject.

Riddle Ward.name: 谜语结界 Riddle Ward
Riddle Ward.description:
斯芬克斯与谜语和石头都有独特的关联，并能将两者结合以造成毁灭性的效果。你每天一次可以以4环神圣先天法术施放glyph of warding，并自动将其灌注为一个3环的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{Fear}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R8bqnYiThB6MYTxD]{Phantom Pain}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o4lRVTwSxnOOn5vl]{Sleep}法术（你不会因此获得施放这些法术的能力）。该符文必须采用刻写的谜语形式，而谜语的答案作为该符文的口令。一个尚不知道该谜语答案的生物（例如你告诉过他们答案，或之前已向他们问过同一个谜语）可以尝试通过一次@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}检定来猜出谜底；该检定对抗你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者，并使用你在创造该符文时所指定的一项非学识（技能）技能。

Sphinxes have a unique association with both riddles and stone, and can combine the two to devastating effect. You can cast glyph of warding once per day as a 4th-rank divine innate spell, automatically imbuing it with a 3rd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4koZzrnMXhhosn0D]{Fear}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R8bqnYiThB6MYTxD]{Phantom Pain}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.o4lRVTwSxnOOn5vl]{Sleep} spell (you don't otherwise gain the ability to cast those spells). The glyph must take the form of an inscribed riddle, and the answer to the riddle functions as a password to the glyph. A creature who doesn't know the answer to the riddle already (such as if you told them the answer or asked them the same riddle before) can attempt to guess the riddle with a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check against the higher of your class DC and spell DC, using a non-Lore skill you set when you create the glyph.

Evil Eye's Ward.name: 邪眼的守护 Evil Eye's Ward
Evil Eye's Ward.description:
频率 每日一次

触发 你60英尺内的一名生物使用了一个幸运（特征）或厄运（特征）效果。

自远古时代以来，邪眼被不同文化的人们用来抵御诅咒的次数，与他们用它去诅咒他人的次数同样多。因此，它获得了扰乱命运经纬、同时偏转幸运与厄运的力量。你扰乱该触发的效果。若触发的效果是厄运（特征）效果，则邪眼的守护获得幸运（特征）；若触发的效果是幸运（特征）效果，则邪眼的守护获得厄运（特征）。该幸运（特征）或厄运（特征）效果适用于与触发效果相同的一次掷骰，因此如常，你不能用邪眼的守护抵消一个幸运（特征）效果后，再对同一次掷骰施加一个厄运（特征）效果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger A creature within 60 feet of you uses a fortune or misfortune effect.

Since ancient times, the evil eye has been used by people across various cultures to ward off curses just as often as they've used it to curse others. As such, it has gained the power to disrupt the weft and weave of fate and deflect fortune and misfortune alike. You disrupt the triggering effect. If the triggering effect is a misfortune effect, Evil Eye's Ward gains the fortune trait, and if it's a fortune effect, Evil Eye's Ward gains the misfortune trait. This fortune or misfortune effect applies to the same roll as the triggering effect, so as normal, you can't negate a fortune effect with Evil Eye's Ward and then apply a misfortune effect to the same roll.

Reaper's Reflexes.name: 收割者的反射 Reaper's Reflexes
Reaper's Reflexes.description:
只要炼狱的敌人露出破绽，你就能本能地将其击倒，即使你已经忙于对其他事情做出反应动作（）也不例外。在你的每个回合开始、当你恢复你的动作时，你获得一个额外的反应动作（），只能用于“收割者的惩戒”。

You can instinctively strike down the enemies of Purgatory whenever they leave you an opening, even if you're already busy reacting to something else. At the start of each of your turns when you regain your actions, you gain an additional reaction that can be used for a Reaper's Retribution.

Barricade Block.name: 路障格挡 Barricade Block
Barricade Block.description:
你不仅可以举起单面盾牌来保护你融合的每一名成员，你也可以为他们格挡。当你和你融合的其他成员 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Im24YxQvioBfOFBo]{升起路障}时，只要你是融合中挥持盾牌的那名成员，你就可以使用你的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡}反应动作（）来为融合中的任意成员格挡，而不只是为你自己。

You can not only raise a single shield to protect every member of your fusion, you can block for them as well. When you and the other members of your fusion @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Im24YxQvioBfOFBo]{Raise a Barricade}, as long as you are the member of the fusion wielding the shield, you can use your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction to block for any member of the fusion, not just for yourself.

Living Wall.name: 活墙 Living Wall
Living Wall.description:
当你不想移动时，你就不会移动——就是这么简单。敌人无论如何猛击、擒抱或推搡你，你依然如墙壁般不可撼动。你对抗试图@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove}你的尝试时，强韧DC获得+2环境加值；对抗试图@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip}你的尝试时，反射DC获得+2环境加值。

When you don't want to move, you don't—simple as that. Your enemies can batter, seize, or push you all they want, you remain as immovable as a wall. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} you and to your Reflex DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} you.

Tireless Frenzy.name: 不知疲倦的狂乱 Tireless Frenzy
Tireless Frenzy.description:
你可以汲取体内原始力量的内在储备。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.o98PQSaMuRXvJIJd]{月之狂乱} 时，在1分钟的持续时间结束后你不再处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏} 状态，并且你可以每小时使用一次月之狂乱（或在满月光照下每10分钟一次）。

You can tap into inner reserves of primal strength. When you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.o98PQSaMuRXvJIJd]{Frenzy of the Moon}, you are no longer @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} after the minute's duration has passed, and you can use Frenzy of the Moon once per hour (or once per 10 minutes under the light of a full moon).

Psychopomp Lore.name: 灵魂引渡者学识 Psychopomp Lore
Psychopomp Lore.description:
你也许已被割离，但你仍在记忆中保留着炼狱的教诲，即便你已适应了凡人领域的生活。你获得威吓和宗教的受训（熟练度）等级。若你将自动在这些技能之一中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训。

你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长，主题为灵使传说。

You may be Severed, but you retain the teachings of Purgatory in your memory, even as you've adapted to life in the mortal realm. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Intimidation and Religion. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Psychopomp Lore.

Ancient Expert.name: 远古专家 Ancient Expert
Ancient Expert.description:
你从很久以前继承的古老技能并不只停留在表面层次。当你选择一个技能以通过古木成为受训时，你也可以选择一个你已经受训的技能，并在该技能上成为专家。这将持续到你的古木结束为止。

当古木与古代专家的效果结束时，你可以重训你的一次技能提升。你通过此次重训获得的技能提升必须使你在你通过古木选择的技能上成为受训，或使你在你通过古代专家选择的技能上成为专家。

Your ancient skills from long ago weren't all just on the surface level. When you choose a skill in which to become trained with Ancient Wood, you can also choose a skill in which you are already trained and become an expert in that skill. This lasts until your Ancient Wood expires.

When the effects of Ancient Wood and Ancient Expert expire, you can retrain one of your skill increases. The skill increase you gain from this retraining must either make you trained in the skill you chose with Ancient Wood or make you an expert in the skill you chose with Ancient Expert.

Cerebral Sagacity.name: 脑智睿达 Cerebral Sagacity
Cerebral Sagacity.description:
你的灵能魔法愈发强大。你可以每天各施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3] 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY] 法术，作为异界先天法术。你可以在食用大脑时以与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.AVeWdfpCMz0hn2x1]{Cerebral Secrets} 的法术相同的方式将它们替换，将 slow 替换为一个3环法术，并将 confusion 替换为一个4环法术。

Your psychic magic becomes ever more powerful. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WsUwpfmhKrKwoIe3] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY] spells each once per day as occult innate spells. You can swap them out when eating brains in the same way as the spells from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.AVeWdfpCMz0hn2x1]{Cerebral Secrets}, swapping slow for a 3rd-rank spell and confusion for a 4th-rank spell.

Sepulchral Eyes.name: 墓穴之眼 Sepulchral Eyes
Sepulchral Eyes.description:
你已重新调谐你的视觉，使其能越过炼狱的暮光，直达坟墓的黑暗。你获得黑暗视觉。

You've reattuned your vision to see beyond the twilight of Purgatory all the way to the darkness of the grave. You gain darkvision.

Agent of the Afterlife Dedication.name: 来世使者专长（奉献） Agent of the Afterlife Dedication
Agent of the Afterlife Dedication.description:
你与炼狱之力的联系变得更为强大，使你免受坟墓诸多危险的侵害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dJWkhCuA7HM1tBOA]{送魂者抗力}族裔专长作为奖励专长；如果你已经拥有该专长，你可以立即将其重训。你的抗力进一步增强。你对负能量伤害的抗力从你等级的一半提升为 2 + 你等级的一半，并且你获得对毒素伤害的抗力，数值等于 2 + 你等级的一半。此外，你对抗死亡效果、疾病与毒素的豁免的环境加值从 +1 提升为 +2，并且如果你在对抗死亡效果、疾病或毒素的豁免上掷骰获得成功，你改为获得大成功或大失败中的大成功。

Your connection to the power of Purgatory has become stronger, protecting you from many of the dangers of the grave. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dJWkhCuA7HM1tBOA]{Psychopomp's Resistance} ancestry feat as a bonus feat, and if you already had that feat, you can immediately retrain it. Your resistances grow even stronger still. Your resistance to negative damage increases from half your level to 2 + half your level and you also gain resistance to poison damage equal to 2 + half your level. Additionally, your circumstance bonus on saving throws against death effects, diseases, and poisons increases from +1 to +2, and if you roll a success on a saving throw against a death effect, disease, or poison, you get a critical success instead.

Become as Stone.name: 化身为石 Become as Stone
Become as Stone.description:
你可以暂时将你的血肉变形为活石。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2BV2yYPfVJ5zirZt] 施放一次，仅能以自己为目标，作为原初先天法术施放。在17级时，你将其作为6环原初先天法术施放。

You can temporarily morph your flesh into living stone. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2BV2yYPfVJ5zirZt] once per day, on yourself only, as a primal innate spell. At 17th level, you cast it as a 6th-rank primal innate spell.

Storm of Jaws.name: 颚之风暴 Storm of Jaws
Storm of Jaws.description:
你的融合体如风暴般向所有附近的敌人猛扑而出；若附近敌人足够多，则每个头部都可能进行多次攻击。你的融合体的每名成员盘起颈部，将其颚部打击的触及额外延长5英尺，然后使用九头蛇传承赋予的颚部徒手攻击尝试两次打击，总计至多八次打击。这些打击每一次都必须以不同的生物为目标，因此只有当触及范围内有八个或更多敌人时，你才能进行最大次数的攻击。

这些攻击会计入融合体所有成员的多重攻击减值，即使其中一些成员在本轮尚未行动；但多重攻击减值直到“颚之风暴”的所有攻击结束后才会提高。在那之后，融合体的所有成员都会提高其多重攻击减值，即使其中一些成员的回合尚未开始。该多重攻击减值适用于同一回合中未来使用另一种组合攻击（如“同心协力”），也适用于他们在自己回合中进行的任何单独攻击。

特殊 你的融合体只能在该轮先攻中最先行动的融合体成员的回合内执行“颚之风暴”的打击。

Your fusion lashes out in a storm at all nearby foes, potentially making multiple attacks with each head if enough foes are nearby. Each member of your fusion coils their neck and extends the reach of their jaws Strikes by 5 additional feet and then attempts two Strikes with the jaws unarmed attack granted by the hydra heritage, up to eight Strikes total. Each of these Strikes must be against a different creature, so you can only make the maximum number of attacks if eight or more foes are within reach.

These attacks count toward the multiple attack penalty for all members of the fusion, even those who haven't acted yet this round, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after all the attacks from Storm of Jaws. At that point, all members of the fusion increase their multiple attack penalty, even those whose turns haven't started yet. This multiple attack penalty applies to future uses of another combined attack like All For One on the same turn, as well as to any individual attacks they make on their own turn.

Special Your fusion can only perform Storm of Jaws's Strikes during the turn of the member of the fusion acting first in initiative that round.

Psychic Wild Talent.name: 灵能野性天赋 Psychic Wild Talent
Psychic Wild Talent.description:
灵能魔法对你而言自然而然，不论你的职业为何。你获得一个2级的多职业奉献专长：如果你不是灵能者，则为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.OW3W2vMARiojda7e]；如果你是灵能者，则为其他施法多职业奉献专长。即使你通常必须先从你当前的变体中再选择更多专长才能再选择另一个奉献专长，你仍会获得此专长，并且你无视该专长的属性值先决条件。

Psychic magic comes to you naturally, regardless of your class. You gain a 2nd-level multiclass dedication feat, either the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.OW3W2vMARiojda7e] if you're not a psychic or a different spellcasting multiclass dedication if you're a psychic. You gain this feat even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype, and you ignore the feat's ability score prerequisites.

Keep an Eye Out.name: 留意四周 Keep an Eye Out
Keep an Eye Out.description:
当你在调查或破译不寻常的符号时，你会仔细留意任何有趣的事物……或者更准确地说，你就是那只“仔细的眼睛”，并让自己保持警惕。无论如何，你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{Decipher Writing} 时获得+2环境加值。此外，每当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{调查（探索行动）} 这一探索行动时，你对相关技能检定获得+1环境加值；当你进行调查（探索行动）时，此对相关技能检定的环境加值在11级时提升为+2。

You keep a careful eye out for anything interesting while you're investigating or deciphering unusual symbols... or perhaps more accurately, you are a careful eye and you keep yourself on the lookout. Either way, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d9gbpiQjChYDYA2L]{Decipher Writing}. Additionally, whenever you use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EwgTZBWsc8qKaViP]{Investigate} exploration activity, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to the associated skill check; this circumstance bonus to associated skill checks while Investigating increases to +2 at 11th level.

Deep Breath.name: 深呼吸 Deep Breath
Deep Breath.description:
你可以深吸一口气来喷吐更强力的吐息，尽管这会让你在之后需要更长时间才能恢复。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.vNdgMFoppza04gCy]{Chimera Breath} 时，你可以选择深吸一口气。如果你这么做，你的 Chimera Breath 造成的 d4 伤害骰数量为正常的两倍，并将区域提高为 60 尺线形（若原本为 30 尺线形）或 30 尺锥形（若原本为 15 尺锥形）。在接下来的 1d4 × 10 分钟内，你无法再次对你的 Chimera Breath 深吸一口气。

You can breathe in deep to deliver a more powerful breath, though it takes you longer to replenish afterwards. When you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.vNdgMFoppza04gCy]{Chimera Breath}, you can choose to take a deep breath. If you do, your Chimera Breath deals twice as many d4s of damage as normal and increases the area to a 60-foot line if it was a 30-foot line or a 30-foot cone if it was a 15-foot cone. You can't take a deep breath on your Chimera Breath again for 1d4 × 10 minutes.

School of Fins.name: 鳍之学派 School of Fins
School of Fins.description:
需求 你在水下

你的子嗣在你周围散开，形成一群鱼鳍来掩护你，使敌人难以发现你。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，直到你下个回合结束，或直到你使用一个交互动作将子嗣收回体内，以先发生者为准。

Requirements You are underwater

Your brood spreads out around you in a school of fins to conceal you from foes. You gain @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{concealment} until the end of your next turn or until you use an Interact action to draw your brood back into your body, whichever comes first.

Ambush Training.name: 伏击训练 Ambush Training
Ambush Training.description:
无论是由于专门的训练、希望不引人注意，还是你偏爱发动战术伏击，你都已擅长融入自然环境。你在自然环境中进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}的隐匿检定时，获得+1环境加值。如果你是石巨人且隐匿为大师，则在岩石区域中该环境加值提升至+2。如果你是霜巨人且隐匿为大师，则在积雪区域中该环境加值提升至+2。

Whether due to specialized training, a desire to pass unnoticed, or your fondness for launching a tactical ambush, you've become adept at blending into natural environments. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} in natural environments. If you're a stone giant and you're a master in Stealth, this circumstance bonus increases to +2 in rocky areas. If you're a frost giant and you're a master in Stealth, this circumstance bonus increases to +2 in snowy areas.

Mortal Guise.name: 凡人伪装 Mortal Guise
Mortal Guise.description:
你获得了能够轻松伪装外貌的能力，可化作各种凡人的伪装形态，从而更好地混迹于凡人之中而不引人注意。你每天可以施放两次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{幻象伪装}，作为1环神圣先天法术，但你只能将该法术施放在自己身上。

You gain the ability to disguise your appearance with ease as various mortal guises to better pass among mortals without drawing attention. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise} twice per day as a 1st-rank divine innate spell, but you can only cast the spell on yourself.

Crushing Grab.name: 粉碎擒抱 Crushing Grab
Crushing Grab.description:
频率 每小时一次

你为自己的一只强力手臂超载充能并抓住一名敌人，将其生命力挤压出来。尝试对一个生物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}；你不能使用武器进行这次尝试，即使该武器具有擒抱特征。成功时，除正常效果外，你对该@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{被擒抱}生物造成等同于@Damage[((ternary(gte(@actor.level,17),4,ternary(gte(@actor.level,13),3,2)))d6 + @actor.system.abilities.str.mod)[bludgeoning]]{2d6加你的力量调整值}的钝击伤害。大成功或大失败时将此伤害翻倍。粉碎擒抱在你的多重攻击减值中计作两次攻击。你在成功时造成的伤害在第13等级提升至3d6，并在第17等级提升至4d6。

Frequency once per hour

You supercharge one of your powerful hands and grab an enemy, squeezing the life from them. Attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} a creature; you can't make this attempt with a weapon, even if it has the grapple trait. On a success, in addition to the normal effects, you deal an amount of bludgeoning damage equal to @Damage[((ternary(gte(@actor.level,17),4,ternary(gte(@actor.level,13),3,2)))d6 + @actor.system.abilities.str.mod)[bludgeoning]]{2d6 plus your Strength modifier} to the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} creature. Double this damage on a critical success. Crushing Grab counts as two attacks for your multiple attack penalty. The amount of damage you deal on a success increases to 3d6 at 13th level and to 4d6 at 17th level.

Heroic Defender.name: 英勇防御者 Heroic Defender
Heroic Defender.description:
你可以用你的翅膀保护你的盟友。当你抬起翅膀时，你可以将对AC的环境加值给予一个相邻且自愿的盟友，而非给予你自己。如果你抬起翅膀来保护一名盟友，而该盟友移动到不再与你相邻的位置，你会自动改为用你抬起的翅膀防御你自己。

当你的翅膀抬起并保护一名相邻盟友时，如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾挡}，那么当一次攻击针对该相邻盟友而非你自己进行时，你可以使用你的盾挡反应动作（）。若你如此做，你的翅膀会阻止该盟友受到伤害，而非阻止你自己受到伤害，并遵循通常规则。

You can use your wings to protect your allies. When you Raise Wings, you can grant the circumstance bonus to AC to an adjacent willing ally, rather than yourself. If you Raised your Wings to protect an ally and that ally moves so they are no longer adjacent to you, you automatically switch to defending yourself with your Raised Wings instead.

While your wings are raised and protecting an adjacent ally, if you have @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block}, you can use your Shield Block reaction when an attack is made against that adjacent ally, not yourself. If you do, your wings prevent that ally from taking damage instead of preventing you from taking damage, following the normal rules.

Impressive Leap.name: 惊人跳跃 Impressive Leap
Impressive Leap.description:
你学会了利用你的翅膀、褶饰或强健的腿部肌肉，在跳跃时推动自己跳得更远。你在运动中成为受训（如果你已经在运动中受训，则改为在另一项技能中成为受训）。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.HJYQlmGTdtyGWr6a]{强力跳跃} 技能专长，即使你不是运动的专家。

You've learned to use your wings, frills, or powerful leg muscles to propel yourself a greater distance when jumping. You become trained in Athletics (or in another skill if you were already trained in Athletics). You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.HJYQlmGTdtyGWr6a]{Powerful Leap} skill feat, even if you aren't an expert in Athletics.

Autonomic Purge.name: 自主神经净化 Autonomic Purge
Autonomic Purge.description:
频率 每天一次

你可以利用储存在自主神经系统中的灵能力量，将那些剥夺你自主性的效果从自身清除，甚至不需要有意识的思考就能做到，这在你的心智受损时尤其有用。即使你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{controlled}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}状态下，你仍然可以使用自主净化（尽管这些状态通常会阻止你按自己意愿行动）。当你这样做时，你会@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.FA5SOqrB2IJFMr3n]{Purge Psyche}，且不计入心灵净化的正常频率；此外，除心灵净化的正常状态列表之外，你还可以选择尝试反制一个使你陷入confused、controlled或fleeing的效果。即使你失败了，这仍会消耗你两个动作，这可能会以一种仍对你有利的方式，限制你在自己的回合中被迫进行的其他非自愿动作的数量。

Frequency once per day

You can purge yourself of effects that take away your agency using the psychic power stored in your autonomic nervous system, without even requiring conscious thought to do so, which is handy when your mind is compromised. You can use Autonomic Purge even when you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{controlled}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing} (even though these conditions would normally prevent you from acting as you choose). When you do, you @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.FA5SOqrB2IJFMr3n]{Purge Psyche}, without counting against Purge Psyche's normal frequency, and you can choose to attempt to counteract an effect that makes you confused, controlled, or fleeing, in addition to the normal list of conditions for Purge Psyche. Even if you fail, this still uses up two of your actions, which could limit the amount of other non voluntary actions you are forced to take on your turn in a way that still benefits you.

Stoked Fury.name: 炽燃狂怒 Stoked Fury
Stoked Fury.description:
你已更擅长在战斗中驾驭你的情绪。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.IlXbpXztU75cB0BF]{Wreathe in Flames}，而非每日一次。

You've better learned to harness your emotions in battle. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.IlXbpXztU75cB0BF]{Wreathe in Flames} once per hour, rather than once per day.

Brute Force.name: 蛮力 Brute Force
Brute Force.description:
你能够施展奇迹般的力量壮举。如果你接下来采取的动作是尝试举起或搬运某个你的力量调整值不足以举起或搬运的物体，例如搬运一辆货车，你可以举起或搬运比正常上限高出至多 10 负载的物体（通常为 20 负载加上你的力量调整值，或在拥有巨人健壮族裔能力时为 22 负载加上你的力量调整值）。这种提高的承载能力持续至多 1 分钟，或持续到你完成这项奇迹般的力量专长所需的时间为止，以先到者为准。

You're capable of miraculous acts of strength. If the next action you take is to attempt to lift or carry something that your Strength modifier isn't high enough to lift or carry, such as carrying a wagon, you can lift or carry something up to 10 Bulk higher than normal (typically 20 Bulk plus your Strength modifier, or 22 Bulk plus your Strength modifier with the giant brawny ancestry ability). This increased capacity lasts for up to 1 minute or the amount of time it takes you to perform the miraculous feat of strength, whichever comes sooner.

Guardian Monolith.name: 守卫巨石碑 Guardian Monolith
Guardian Monolith.description:
斯芬克斯源自石中，亦可归于石中——许多年长的斯芬克斯会以石碑的形态度过数个世纪，在神殿大门上方巍然矗立，沉浸于自己的思绪之中。

你变形为一尊与你等身的自我雕像——这不仅仅是将你的血肉化为石头，而是真正创造出一尊雕刻塑像，并依照你所选择的一种文化的艺术母题进行风格化与装饰。在石之形态下，你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] 状态，且除下述内容外无法行动，但你的硬度等于你的等级，并获得对流血、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}、疾病、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{汲取 1}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}、负能量伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{石化}、毒素、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{反胃 1}，以及 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{受伤 1} 的免疫（若你已经具有这些状态，此效果不会移除它们，但当你是雕像时它们不会对你产生任何效果，其持续时间也不会流逝）。你不会年代增长，也不需要食物、水或睡眠。你可以感知周围环境，并使用纯粹的心灵动作，例如回忆知识；你也可以施放来自斯芬克斯族裔专长的先天法术（无需通常所需的咒语与姿势手势，尽管你的雕像仍然会明显地在施放法术）。你可以通过再次使用该专长使自己变回血肉之躯。

From stone the sphinxes came, and to stone they can return—many elder sphinxes spend centuries as monoliths, lost in their own thoughts as they loom over a temple gate.

You transform into a life-sized statue of yourself—this doesn't simply turn your flesh to stone, but actually creates a carven sculpture, stylized and decorated according to the artistic motifs of a culture of your choice. In stone form, you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] and can't act except as listed below, but you have Hardness equal to your level and gains immunity to bleed, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, disease, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}, negative damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified}, poison, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded 1} (this doesn't remove these conditions if you already have them, but they don't have any effect on you while you're a statue, nor does their duration expire). You don't age or require food, water, or sleep. You can perceive your surroundings and use purely mental actions such as Recall Knowledge, and cast your innate spells from sphinx ancestry feats (eschewing the normal incantations and somatic gestures required, though your statue is still obviously casting the spells). You can turn back to flesh and blood by using this feat again.

Midnight Head.name: 午夜之首 Midnight Head
Midnight Head.description:
你的头部一直都能在你的融合中比其他部分更擅长在黑暗中看清。你获得黑暗视觉。你在黑暗和昏暗光照中能看得和在明亮光照中一样清楚，不过你在黑暗中的视野是黑白的。

Your head has always been able to see in the dark better than the others in your fusion. You gain darkvision. You can see in darkness and dim light just as well as you can see in bright light, though your vision in darkness is in black and white.

Mirror Garb.name: 镜影衣装 Mirror Garb
Mirror Garb.description:
频率 每分钟一次

触发 一名敌人在施放一个以你为目标的法术时，其对你的AC进行的法术攻击掷骰出现大失败；或你针对一名敌人施放、以你为目标的法术掷出大成功。

如同一名olethros，你在衣饰间佩戴镜子，使你能将敌人失败的魔法反射回他们身上。若触发为法术攻击掷骰大失败，则使用你对远程武器的最高熟练度，对施法者进行一次远程攻击。若你能施放法术，你可以改为进行一次法术攻击掷骰。若你成功，则你的对手承受其自身法术在法术攻击掷骰成功时的效果（若你的攻击掷骰为大成功，则改为承受大成功的效果）。若触发为你在对抗一个以你为目标的法术的豁免上掷出大成功，则施法者必须对其自身法术尝试一次豁免，以你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者作为DC。

Frequency once per minute

Trigger A foe casting a spell that targets you critically fails a spell attack roll against your AC, or you roll a critical success against a spell a foe casts targeting you.

Like an olethros, you wear mirrors among your garb, allowing you to reflect your foes' failed magic back at them. If the trigger was a critically failed spell attack roll, make a ranged attack against the attacker using your highest proficiency with a ranged weapon. If you can cast spells, you can choose to make a spell attack roll instead. If you succeed, your opponent takes the effects of a successful spell attack roll for their own spell (or the effects of a critical success if your attack roll was a critical success). If the trigger was critically succeeding at a saving throw against a targeted spell, the caster must attempt a saving throw against their own spell, using the higher of your class DC or spell DC as the DC.

Sphinx's Rake.name: 斯芬克斯的爪击 Sphinx's Rake
Sphinx's Rake.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

斯芬克斯既以其凶猛著称，也以其谜语传说闻名。使用你的爪或你从斯芬克斯之怒获得的无武装攻击的任意组合进行两次打击，目标为同一名位于你爪触及范围内的生物。若两次均命中并造成伤害，将伤害相加，再额外加上等同于来自斯芬克斯族裔所授予之爪的一次爪打击的伤害，然后再结算弱点、抗力等。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Sphinxes are as famous for their ferocity as they are for their riddle lore. Make two Strikes using any combination of your claws or the unarmed attack you gained from Wrath of the Sphinx against the same creature within reach of your claws. If both hit and deal damage, add the damage together and add additional damage equal to one claw Strike from the claw granted by the sphinx ancestry, then apply weakness, resistance, and the like.

Adamantine Claws.name: 精金利爪 Adamantine Claws
Adamantine Claws.description:
你的爪子不再只是象牙，而是呈现出矿物性相，变得比切割黑曜石更锋利、比沉重的花岗岩更坚硬。你从斯芬克斯族裔获得的徒手攻击在你的下个回合结束前被视为精金。

Your claws are not mere ivory but take on a mineral aspect, becoming stronger than slicing obsidian and harder than ponderous granite. Your unarmed attacks gained from the sphinx ancestry are treated as adamantine until the end of your next turn.

Fiendish Flesh.name: 恶魔血肉 Fiendish Flesh
Fiendish Flesh.description:
尽管你的身体不如从前强壮，但你的血肉依旧坚韧。你获得等同于你等级一半的毒素伤害抗力。如果你拥有冰魔鬼传承，你可以选择改为获得等同于你等级一半的寒冷伤害抗力。

特殊 如果你拥有冰魔鬼传承，你可以选择此专长两次，一次选择寒冷伤害，一次选择毒素伤害。

Though your body is weaker than it once was, your flesh remains resilient. You gain resistance equal to half your level to poison damage. If you have the gelugon heritage, you can choose to instead gain resistance equal to half your level to cold damage.

Special If you have the gelugon heritage, you can select this feat twice, selecting cold damage once and poison damage once.

Cloudblood.name: 云血 Cloudblood
Cloudblood.description:
如同云巨人一般，你以优雅与巧技在属于你的空气中穿行，与你那魁梧的身躯形成鲜明反差。尽管你重如巨石，当重力攫住你时，你却轻如羽毛般漂浮。你不会因坠落而受到任何伤害，无论你坠落的距离多远。你可以从下方列出的额外专长中选择巨人专长。

额外专长

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dIIJfzzqjYToDpQi]{大块头恶霸}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YhB0AHBrTJfAR8N6]{蛮力}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.aguwFAq83B9PWDyd]{巨人学识}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9GWQYQQGKWBBrOD7]{劲风偏转}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ckIS3dwpIlxvj0XV]{投掷万物}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.SV7wAwnedn3aDOYx]{费—菲—佛—芬}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jEO0FZLWcHiafglv]{乘势追击}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jywAzScdNmm2Bw6s]{突刺打击}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Ry3IUpPWcU0ezHb6]{魔法火花}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.tcUJzFjjylMBd7zp]{塑形物体}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PPyn2hBcMTDYFuRm]{目明}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HVwKhYgfv8sH2a3x]{蓄力投掷}

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.eyyN9SMas3XAvkYk]{云之掩蔽}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fmNeQEJQLkNWwKXA]{变大吧！}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ig4ydS6ctoHLVdIJ]{漂浮术}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.r9ghJ7i8R7haw1fL]{活体壁垒}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.w8lfbne3GDr8T4Bz]{粉碎践踏}

13级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Fp4B7spJAlqyUoB4]{元素打击}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HmVS2Gdfy5vhyiIg]{更巨大的}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PC7DRFV8zaIYm3Wb]{无畏}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.cFdPF0BbG7CnbafJ]{整吞}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jYWd1CIMo8FiU7p1]{投掷盟友}

17级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.079F8htMSbSRMO72]{空中城堡}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TQDR2Zcr1nStO3eN]{永恒}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z9Gc9rRb0DPuSi51]{巨人之践踏冲锋}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.R95FPWh5dLuV0x18]{地面重击}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9XjaTkjd2F6WjlGd]{上古魔法}

Like a cloud giant, you move with grace and finesse through your air that belies your hefty stature. Though you are as heavy as a boulder, you float like a feather when gravity takes hold. You take no damage from falling, regardless of the distance you fall. You can take giant feats from the Additional Feats listed below.

Additional Feats

1st

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dIIJfzzqjYToDpQi]{Big Bully}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YhB0AHBrTJfAR8N6]{Brute Force}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.aguwFAq83B9PWDyd]{Giant Lore}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9GWQYQQGKWBBrOD7]{Gusting Redirection}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ckIS3dwpIlxvj0XV]{Hurl Anything}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.WVx6e1Y1r5bmtboF]{Living Wall}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.6sjzEbaZcQChx4kC]{Natural Spark}

5th

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.SV7wAwnedn3aDOYx]{Fee-Fi-Fo-Fum}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jEO0FZLWcHiafglv]{Follow Through}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jywAzScdNmm2Bw6s]{Lunging Strike}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Ry3IUpPWcU0ezHb6]{Magic Spark}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.tcUJzFjjylMBd7zp]{Shape Object}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PPyn2hBcMTDYFuRm]{Sighted}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HVwKhYgfv8sH2a3x]{Wind Up Throw}

9th

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.RF3DdsDbNwosGrvi]{Catch Projectile}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.eyyN9SMas3XAvkYk]{Cloud Cover}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fmNeQEJQLkNWwKXA]{Get Big!}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ig4ydS6ctoHLVdIJ]{Levitation}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.r9ghJ7i8R7haw1fL]{Living Rampart}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.w8lfbne3GDr8T4Bz]{Shattering Stomp}

13th

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Fp4B7spJAlqyUoB4]{Elemental Strike}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PC7DRFV8zaIYm3Wb]{Fearless}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.cFdPF0BbG7CnbafJ]{Swallow Whole}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jYWd1CIMo8FiU7p1]{Throw Ally}

17th

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.079F8htMSbSRMO72]{Aerial Castle}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TQDR2Zcr1nStO3eN]{Eternal}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z9Gc9rRb0DPuSi51]{Giant's Stampede}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.R95FPWh5dLuV0x18]{Ground Pound}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9XjaTkjd2F6WjlGd]{Magic of the Ancients}

Sturdy Construction.name: 坚固构造 Sturdy Construction
Sturdy Construction.description:
你如魔像般的躯体能够承受大多数种类的物理惩罚。每当你因一次造成物理伤害且并非精金的攻击而受到重击时，进行一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:17]。若成功，则该次重击变为普通命中。此效果不与加固符文叠加。

特殊 你可以在第13等级将坚固构造专长再选择一次，以将纯骰检定的DC从17降低至 @Check[type:flat|dc:15]；并可在第17等级将该专长选择第三次，以将纯骰检定的DC从15降低至 @Check[type:flat|dc:13]。

Your golemlike body can withstand most kinds of physical punishment. Each time you're critically hit by an attack that deals physical damage and isn't adamantine, attempt a @Check[type:flat|dc:17]. On a success, it becomes a normal hit. This isn't cumulative with the fortification rune.

Special You can take the Sturdy Construction feat a second time as a 13th level feat to reduce the DC of the flat check from 17 to @Check[type:flat|dc:15] and a third time as a 17th level feat to reduce the DC of the flat check from 15 to @Check[type:flat|dc:13].

Face Tentacles.name: 面部触手 Face Tentacles
Face Tentacles.description:
大多数食脑者都有数十条触手，就像鹦鹉螺一样，但你已经学会让它们协同一致地移动，以攻击你的敌人。你获得一个触手徒手攻击，它造成1d6钝击伤害，并具有灵巧和擒抱特征。你的触手徒手攻击属于徒手格斗武器组。

Most cerebrophages have dozens of tentacles, just like a nautilus, but you've learned to move them together in tandem to attack your foes. You gain a tentacles unarmed attack, which deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage and has the finesse and grapple traits. Your tentacles unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Infernal Strike.name: 炼狱打击 Infernal Strike
Infernal Strike.description:
触发 你触及范围内的一名生物使用具有操控特征的动作或移动动作、进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作中离开一个方格。

你将自己的计谋与地狱军旅训练的残余相结合，使你能够利用敌人的破绽。对触发生物进行一次近战打击。若你的攻击为大成功，且触发原因为具有操控特征的动作，则你打断该动作。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值不适用于此次打击。

特殊 若你拥有“计谋之中仍有计谋”专长或其他能使用多个反应动作（）的方法，且触发生物因你的“诡计把戏”反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则其在对抗你的“炼狱打击”时，其AC也承受相同的环境减值。

Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

You combine your schemes with the remnants of Hell's military training, allowing you to take advantage of your foe's openings. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. If your attack is a critical hit and the trigger was a manipulate action, you disrupt that action. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Special If you have the Schemes Within Schemes feat or some other way to use multiple reactions, and the triggering creature is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your Scheming Trick reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their AC against your Infernal Strike.

Can't See the Tree for the Forest.name: 只见森林，不见树木 Can't See the Tree for the Forest
Can't See the Tree for the Forest.description:
与你的体型所给人的印象相比，你要狡猾得多，尤其是当你能在森林中保持静止并冒充一棵树时。你获得潜行的受训（熟练度）熟练度等级。若你本会自动在潜行上成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训（熟练度）。在森林中，你在潜行检定上获得+1环境加值；若你在潜行上为大师，该加值提升为+2。当你保持静止并使用欺瞒来[[/act impersonate options=action:impersonate:tree]]一棵在其他方面看起来与你相同的普通树时，你也获得相同的加值，并且将你的等级加到此类欺瞒检定中，即使你在欺瞒上未受训（熟练度）也如此。冒充你自身的不动树形版本需要你花费1动作，而非10分钟，且不需要你拥有伪装工具包。

You're much sneakier than others would expect from a tree of your size, especially when you can remain still in a forest and impersonate a tree. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Stealth. If you would automatically become trained in Stealth (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. When in a forest, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus on Stealth checks, which increases to +2 if you're a master in Stealth. You gain the same bonus when holding still and using Deception to [[/act impersonate options=action:impersonate:tree]] an ordinary tree that otherwise looks like you, and you add your level to such Deception checks, even if you're untrained in Deception. Impersonating an immobile tree version of yourself takes you 1 action, rather than 10 minutes, and doesn't require you to have a disguise kit.

Inexorable Vines.name: 无情藤蔓 Inexorable Vines
Inexorable Vines.description:
你可以创造强力的蔓生藤蔓来缠住你的敌人。你可以每小时施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.JbAcSLu62TU1OgNF] 作为原始先天法术。

You can create powerful creeper vines to ensnare your foes. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.JbAcSLu62TU1OgNF] once per hour as a primal innate spell.

Telepathy.name: 心灵感应 Telepathy
Telepathy.description:
你可以进行心灵感应交流。你获得心灵感应，射程为30英尺。这允许你在所列射程内与任何生物进行精神交流，只要你们共享一种语言。这不会给予你对他们思想与交流的任何特殊许可，并且所传达的信息不会比正常言语更多。

在第17等级时，心灵感应的射程增加至100英尺。

You can communicate telepathically. You gain telepathy with a range of 30 feet. This allows you to communicate mentally with any creatures within the listed range, as long as you share a language. This doesn't give you any special access to their thoughts and communications, and communicates no more information than normal speech would.

At 17th level, the range of telepathy increases to 100 feet.

Accursed Javelin.name: 诅咒标枪 Accursed Javelin
Accursed Javelin.description:
你几乎像投掷标枪一样将你的诅咒投射到空中，使你能够在射程内将其送达敌人。如果你的下一动作是使用你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.BBoW3Vhh9uKvEVkC]{Accursed Caress}，你可以以60英尺内的一个生物为目标，而不是以你触及范围内的一个生物为目标。

You can project your curse through the air almost like a javelin, allowing you to deliver it to foes at range. If your next action is to use your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.BBoW3Vhh9uKvEVkC]{Accursed Caress}, you can target a creature within 60 feet instead of a creature within your reach.

Pack of One.name: 独行一体 Pack of One
Pack of One.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你处于混合形态。

当你的嗜血必须被满足时，你化作牙齿、利爪或獠牙的狂风。疾行至多两次你的速度（若你拥有相应的移动类型，则可用掘地、攀爬、飞行或游泳替代疾行）。在这次移动期间，每有一名敌人进入你的触及范围内，你便可用你的混合形态徒手攻击对该敌人进行一次打击。无论你在其触及范围内疾行经过多少次，你对每名敌人都只能打击一次。每次打击都计入你的多重攻击减值，但在你完成所有打击之前，你的多重攻击减值不会增加。

特殊 在满月的月光下，你可以每10分钟使用一次Pack of One，而非每小时一次。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You are in your hybrid form.

When your bloodlust must be sated, you become a flurry of teeth, claws, or tusks. Stride up to twice your Speed (you can Burrow, Climb, Fly, or Swim instead of Striding if you have the corresponding movement type). For each foe who comes within your reach during this movement, you can Strike that foe with your hybrid form's unarmed attack. You can Strike each enemy only once, no matter how many times you Stride within reach of them. Each Strike counts toward your multiple attack penalty, but you don't increase your multiple attack penalty until you've made all Strikes.

Special Under the light of a full moon, you can use Pack of One once per 10 minutes instead of once per hour.

Giant Lore.name: 巨人学识 Giant Lore
Giant Lore.description:
你热切地拥抱你族群的传承，包括制作战利品、收集宝藏、展现力量专长，并通过故事与歌谣编织你自己的强大传奇。你在以下三项技能中的任意两项获得受训熟练度：运动、制作、表演。如果你会自动在其中一项技能上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。

你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 通用专长，用于巨人学识。

You eagerly embrace the legacy of your people, including crafting trophies, gathering treasures, performing feats of strength, and weaving your own formidable legend through story and song. You gain the trained proficiency in any two of the following three skills: Athletics, Crafting, and Performance. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice.

You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} general feat for Giant Lore.

Monstrous Sprint.name: 怪物疾奔 Monstrous Sprint
Monstrous Sprint.description:
频率 每分钟一次

需求 你的双手空闲。

你四肢着地，然后全力冲刺，以你的最高速度移动。直线进行三次跨步。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.f0lXq0f4X62PiO9q]{攀爬肢体 石像鬼} 传承，你无需直线移动。

Frequency once per minute

Requirements Your hands are free.

You get down on all your limbs, then take off at a sprint, moving at your top Speed. Stride three times in a straight line.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.f0lXq0f4X62PiO9q]{Clamberlimb Gargoyle} heritage, you don't need to move in a straight line.

Schemes Within Schemes.name: 计中计 Schemes Within Schemes
Schemes Within Schemes.description:
你在计谋之中再编计谋，而当你的敌人看穿一个把戏时，也只是为了落入另一个把戏之中。在你每个回合开始时，你获得一个额外的反应动作（），该反应动作（）只能用于进行由来自恶魔策士变体的专长所授予的反应动作（）（包括由复仇折磨授予的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SSsUC7rZo0CwayPn] 法术）。然而，成功的策士必须让自己的把戏多变：你从此专长获得的额外反应动作（）不得是你自从恢复你的反应动作（）以来已经使用过的反应动作（），并且一旦你花费了该额外反应动作（），在你再次恢复你的反应动作（）之前，你不能再次使用同一个反应动作（）。

例如，如果你已经在本轮用你的正常反应动作（）(或你从其他来源获得的某个反应动作（）)来施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{诡计把戏}，你就不能把此专长的额外反应动作（）用于一次诡计把戏；而一旦你用该额外反应动作（）来施放了诡计把戏，在你下个回合恢复反应动作（）之前，你不能用你的正常反应动作（）或另一个反应动作（）再施放诡计把戏。

You weave schemes within schemes, and when your foes see through one trick, it's only to fall into another. You gain an additional reaction at the start of each of your turns that can be used only to make a reaction granted by a feat from the diabolic schemer archetype (including the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SSsUC7rZo0CwayPn] spell granted by Vengeful Torment). However, a successful schemer must vary up their tricks: the additional reaction you gain from this feat must not be one you've already used since regaining your reactions, and once you spend the additional reaction, you can't use that same reaction again until you regain your reactions.

For example, you can't use the additional reaction from this feat for a @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} if you've already used your normal reaction for this round (or some other reaction you gained from another source) for a Scheming Trick, and once you use the additional reaction for a Scheming Trick, you can't use your normal reaction or another reaction for a Scheming Trick until you regain reactions on your next turn.

Emergency Repair.name: 紧急修理 Emergency Repair
Emergency Repair.description:
频率 每天一次

在紧要关头，你可以迅速修复你的身体。你恢复 @Damage[(3*@actor.level)[healing]]{生命值}，等于你等级的三倍。

Frequency once per day

In a pinch, you can quickly repair your body. You regain @Damage[(3*@actor.level)[healing]]{Hit Points} equal to three times your level.

Accursed Speed.name: 受诅速度 Accursed Speed
Accursed Speed.description:
需求 你处于满足状态。

诅咒让你能像出击的蛇一样迅速移动。你疾走两次。你不再处于满足状态。

Requirements You are satisfied.

The curse lets you move as quickly as a striking snake. You Stride twice. You’re no longer satisfied.

Forked Tongue.name: 分叉之舌 Forked Tongue
Forked Tongue.description:
你擅长用甜言蜜语、巧妙的欺骗与不祥的威胁来左右他人。你在进行欺骗检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{说谎}时获得+1环境加值；在进行交涉检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{请求}时获得+1环境加值；在进行威吓检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{胁迫}时获得+1环境加值。

You're adept at swaying others with pretty words, skillful deceptions, and ominous threats. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Deception checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ewwCglB7XOPLUz72]{Lie}, Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.DCb62iCBrJXy0Ik6]{Request}, and Intimidation checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce}.

Vanishing Trick.name: 消失把戏 Vanishing Trick
Vanishing Trick.description:
频率 每小时一次

有时你必须消失才能成功脱身或展开下一步计谋。而当这种情况发生时，能迅速隐匿行踪就很有价值。你获得一道2环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB] 法术的效果，持续1分钟。与2环隐形法术通常规则相同，若你使用敌对动作，则在你完成该敌对动作后，此效果结束。

特殊 若目标因你的 Scheming Trick 反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则当其在你因 Vanishing Trick 而处于隐形状态时，他们以同样的环境减值进行用于 [[/act seek]] 你的察觉检定，并且其对抗你的 [[/act hide]] 与 [[/act sneak]] 的DC也承受同样的环境减值。

Frequency once per hour

Sometimes you just need to disappear in order to make your getaway or to set up your next scheme. And when that happens, it pays to be able to vanish fast. You gain the effects of a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB] spell for 1 minute. As normal for a 2nd-rank invisibility spell, if you use a hostile action, the effect ends after you complete that hostile action.

Special If the target is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your Scheming Trick reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their Perception checks to [[/act seek]] you and DCs against your [[/act hide]] and [[/act sneak]] while you are invisible from Vanishing Trick.

Curse of Stolen Sight.name: 失窃视界的诅咒 Curse of Stolen Sight
Curse of Stolen Sight.description:
频率 每日一次 你以恶毒的目光注视你的敌人，窃走他们的视力。选择一个30尺内的敌人并尝试窃走他们的视力。效果由目标进行的 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免决定，豁免DC取你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

大成功 目标不受你窃取视力诅咒的影响。

成功 你的诅咒仅从目标身上窃走少许视力。目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 状态持续1轮，且在此期间你获得其任何特殊的视觉感官（例如高等黑暗视觉或看穿雾或雪的能力，但不包括如思维感知等非视觉感官）。

失败 你的诅咒完全窃走目标的视力。如同成功，但目标改为获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲} 状态持续1分钟，而非目眩1轮。

大失败 你的诅咒长时间窃走目标的视力。如同成功，但目标改为目盲1小时，而非目眩1轮。

Frequency once per day You gaze balefully at your foe and steal away their sight. Choose a foe within 30 feet and attempt to steal their sight. The effect is determined by the target's @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The target is unaffected by your curse of stolen sight.

Success Your curse steals only a bit of the target's sight away from them. The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round, and you gain any of their special visual senses (such as greater darkvision or the ability to see through fog or snow, but not nonvisual senses like thoughtsense) during that time.

Failure Your curse steals the target's sight entirely. As success, but the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute instead of dazzled for 1 round.

Critical Failure Your curse steals the target's sight for a long time. As success, but the target is blinded for 1 hour instead of dazzled for 1 round.

Tactical Reposition.name: 战术重新定位 Tactical Reposition
Tactical Reposition.description:
你已重新获得瞬间在战场上瞬移的能力，并运用这股力量来确保你在敌人面前取得战术优势。你每天可以施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8] 两次，作为神圣先天法术。

You’ve regained your ability to teleport across the battlefield in the blink of an eye and wield this power to secure a tactical advantage over your enemies. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8] twice per day as a divine innate spell.

Infectious Fever.name: 传染性发热 Infectious Fever
Infectious Fever.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你在一次胡须打击中成功。

你将胡须的尖叉深深刺入你的敌人，使其感染一种名为炼狱热的危险疾病。该生物必须尝试进行一次 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

大成功或大失败成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标在1轮内处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 1}。

失败 目标感染炼狱热，处于阶段1。

大成功或大失败失败 目标感染炼狱热，处于阶段2。

炼狱热（疾病）

等级 5

在该疾病被治愈之前，目标无法从炼狱热导致的力竭状态中恢复。

阶段 1 力竭 1（1天）

阶段 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 2}（1天）

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You succeed at a beard Strike.

You drive the prongs of your beard deep into your enemy, infecting them with a dangerous disease known as Avernal Fever. The creature must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or your spell DC.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is afflicted with Avernal fever at stage 1.

Critical Failure The target is afflicted with Avernal fever at stage 2.

Avernal Fever (disease)

Level 5

The target can't recover from the enfeebled condition from Avernal Fever until the disease is cured.

Stage 1 enfeebled 1 (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 day)

Ominous Aura.name: 不祥灵光 Ominous Aura
Ominous Aura.description:
频率 每日一次

你以凶狠的目光怒视你的敌人，让他们为自己的性命感到恐惧。持续1分钟，靠近到你20尺内的生物必须尝试一次@Check[will|against:class-spell]意志豁免，对抗等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者的DC。无论豁免结果如何，它们都会对你的“不祥灵光”获得1分钟的暂时免疫。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

失败 该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。

大失败 该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 4}。

Frequency once per day

You glower menacingly at your enemies, making them fear for their lives. For 1 minute, creatures that approach within 20 feet of you must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, they are temporarily immune to your Ominous Aura for 1 minute.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}.

Pentad Protection.name: 五重护卫 Pentad Protection
Pentad Protection.description:
通过全力运转你的并行心智处理并进行广泛训练，你已分化出去，从全部五种性相中学习了防御技巧。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.6RrVKzC24jySwiwT]{Illusion of Guile} 专长、@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.K6FieL5yfhwf8CTq]{Empathetic Dissonance} 专长、@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PfbV9UIyBtMnU6Oz]{Wellspring of Wrath} 专长，以及在 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jQ3QOOz4YlOsD29g]{Overmind Dedication} 中未获得的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TZnjvtFYwsv5YMPa]{Ironclad Insight} 与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.O92xuko846wVwvZo]{Labyrinth of Forking Thought} 专长中的那一个。若你已拥有上述四个专长中的任意一个，你可以立即对其进行重训。

By running your parallel mental processing in full gear and training extensively, you've branched out to learn defensive techniques from all five aspects. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.6RrVKzC24jySwiwT]{Illusion of Guile} feat, the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.K6FieL5yfhwf8CTq]{Empathetic Dissonance} feat, the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PfbV9UIyBtMnU6Oz]{Wellspring of Wrath} feat, and whichever of the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TZnjvtFYwsv5YMPa]{Ironclad Insight} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.O92xuko846wVwvZo]{Labyrinth of Forking Thought} feats you didn't gain from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jQ3QOOz4YlOsD29g]{Overmind Dedication}. If you already have any of those four feats, you can immediately retrain them.

Whispers of Discord.name: 纷争低语 Whispers of Discord
Whispers of Discord.description:
触发 60尺内的一个生物成为一项将恢复生命值或提供状态加值的法术的目标（当该触发条件满足时你会自动识别，不过这并不会告诉你即将到来的效果会恢复生命值、提供状态加值，或两者兼有）。

如同一个地狱缚誓的deimavigga，你知道如何在恰到好处的时机，用只有你的目标能听见的方式低语令人不安的谎言，以动摇其对其施法者盟友的信任，从而扰乱魔法。其效果取决于对抗你职业DC或法术DC中较高者的@Check[will|against:class-spell]意志豁免。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物识破你的谎言，获得该法术预期的益处，并对同样的把戏有所警觉。其在24小时内暂时免疫「不和低语」。

成功 该生物摆脱你的谎言，但仍心存疑虑。其获得该法术预期的益处，但不会对「不和低语」获得暂时免疫。

失败 偏执与疑虑在其心灵与灵魂间蔓延，使法术无法影响目标。持续1轮，目标拒绝来自施法者的援助，不愿接受来自施法者的任何效果，且不视为施法者的盟友。

大成功或大失败：失败 同失败，但偏执与疑虑更深地扎根于该生物的心灵与灵魂，且该效果的持续时间改为1分钟而非1轮。

特殊 若你拥有「计中计」专长或其他能使用多个反应动作（）的方法，且触发生物正因你的「诡谋把戏」反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则其对抗你「不和低语」的意志豁免也承受相同的环境减值。

Trigger A creature within 60 feet is targeted by a spell that would restore Hit Points or provide a status bonus (you automatically recognize when this trigger is met, though that doesn't tell you whether the upcoming effect will restore Hit Points, provide a status bonus, or both).

Like a Hellbound deimavigga, you know how to whisper disturbing lies, audible only to your target, in order to shake their faith in their allied spellcaster at just the right moment to disrupt the magic. The effect depends on their @Check[will|against:class-spell] saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The creature disbelieves your lies, receives the intended benefit of the spell, and becomes wise to the same tricks. They become temporarily immune to Whispers of Discord for 24 hours.

Success The creature shakes off your lies but doubts yet remain. They receive the intended benefit of the spell, but they don't become temporarily immune to Whispers of Discord.

Failure The spell fails to affect the target as paranoia and doubt spread across their heart and soul. For 1 round, the target refuses aid from the caster, isn't willing to accept any effect from the caster, and doesn't count as the caster's ally.

Critical Failure As failure, but the paranoia and doubt dig deep into the creature's heart and soul and the duration of the effect lasts for 1 minute instead of 1 round.

Special If you have the Schemes Within Schemes feat or some other way to use multiple reactions, and the triggering creature is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your Scheming Trick reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their Will save against your Whispers of Discord.

Environmental Stride.name: 环境迈步 Environmental Stride
Environmental Stride.description:
你已经适应了周遭环境，你的旅行不再会因其中的简单障碍而受阻。如果你是霜巨人，你可以无视由冰雪造成的困难地形与不稳地面。此外，你无需进行特技检定来避免在湿滑的冰面上坠落。如果你是石巨人，你可以无视由石头与泥土（例如瓦砾、碎石或泥浆）造成的困难地形与不稳地面。此外，当你使用特技技能在泥土或石头上进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance} 时，你不会处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。

You've adapted to your surroundings and your travel is no longer hindered by simple obstacles within it. If you're a frost giant, you can ignore difficult terrain and uneven ground caused by ice and snow. In addition, you don't need to attempt Acrobatics checks to keep from falling on slippery ice. If you're a stone giant, you can ignore difficult terrain and uneven ground caused by stone and earth (such as rubble, gravel, or mud). In addition, you're not @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] when you use the Acrobatics skill to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance} on earth or stone.

Antimagic Reversal.name: 反魔法逆转 Antimagic Reversal
Antimagic Reversal.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你使用了魔像反魔法，但你仍然受到触发效果影响，且触发效果以你为目标（而非将你纳入某个区域或类似的情况）。

当你最初的反魔法不足以阻止一个魔法效果时，你可以尝试将其反转到施法者身上。你尝试反制触发效果，使用你的法术DC – 10 或你的职业DC – 10 中较高者作为你的反制调整值（@Check[class-spell|options:counteract]{Counteract}），并以你等级的一半（向上取整）作为你的反制阶位。若该效果将被反制，则它改为反射回施法者，由施法者成为该效果的目标，而非你。若有其他目标，则这不会改变该效果对其他目标的结果。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You used Golem Antimagic but were still affected by the triggering effect, and the triggering effect targeted you (rather than including you in an area or the like).

When your initial antimagic isn't sufficient to stop a magical effect, you can try to reverse it on the spellcaster. You attempt to counteract the triggering effect, using the higher of your spell DC – 10 or your class DC – 10 as your counteract modifier (@Check[class-spell|options:counteract]{Counteract}) and half your level rounded up as your counteract rank. If the effect would be counteracted, it instead is reflected back on the caster, who becomes a target of the effect instead of you. This doesn't change the result of the effect for other targets, if any.

Stoneblood.name: 石血 Stoneblood
Stoneblood.description:
如同石巨人一般，你耐心地将身体与周围的岩石调谐，并凭直觉适应你的环境。你获得昏暗视觉。若你已拥有昏暗视觉，则改为获得黑暗视觉。你可以从下方“额外专长”列表中选择巨人专长。

额外专长

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Y4edypYf61lQPWLZ]{Ambush Training}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dIIJfzzqjYToDpQi]{Big Bully}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YhB0AHBrTJfAR8N6]{Brute Force}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.aguwFAq83B9PWDyd]{Giant Lore}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ckIS3dwpIlxvj0XV]{Hurl Anything}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.WVx6e1Y1r5bmtboF]{Living Wall}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.brh8Zga4pGG8ggFk]{Environmental Stride}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.SV7wAwnedn3aDOYx]{Fee-Fi-Fo-Fum}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jEO0FZLWcHiafglv]{Follow Through}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jywAzScdNmm2Bw6s]{Lunging Strike}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Ry3IUpPWcU0ezHb6]{Magic Spark}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.tcUJzFjjylMBd7zp]{Shape Object}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HVwKhYgfv8sH2a3x]{Wind Up Throw}

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.RF3DdsDbNwosGrvi]{Catch Projectile}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fmNeQEJQLkNWwKXA]{Get Big!}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.r9ghJ7i8R7haw1fL]{Living Rampart}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.w8lfbne3GDr8T4Bz]{Shattering Stomp}

13级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HmVS2Gdfy5vhyiIg]{Extra Big}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PC7DRFV8zaIYm3Wb]{Fearless}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.cFdPF0BbG7CnbafJ]{Swallow Whole}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jYWd1CIMo8FiU7p1]{Throw Ally}

17级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TQDR2Zcr1nStO3eN]{Eternal}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z9Gc9rRb0DPuSi51]{Giant's Stampede}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.R95FPWh5dLuV0x18]{Ground Pound}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9XjaTkjd2F6WjlGd]{Magic of the Ancients}

Like a stone giant, you patiently attune your body to the stones around you and instinctively adapt to your environment. You gain low-light vision. If you have low-light vision, you gain darkvision instead. You can take giant feats from the Additional Feats listed below.

Additional Feats

1st

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Y4edypYf61lQPWLZ]{Ambush Training}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dIIJfzzqjYToDpQi]{Big Bully}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YhB0AHBrTJfAR8N6]{Brute Force}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.aguwFAq83B9PWDyd]{Giant Lore}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ckIS3dwpIlxvj0XV]{Hurl Anything}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.WVx6e1Y1r5bmtboF]{Living Wall}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.6sjzEbaZcQChx4kC]{Natural Spark}

5th

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.brh8Zga4pGG8ggFk]{Environmental Stride}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.SV7wAwnedn3aDOYx]{Fee-Fi-Fo-Fum}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jywAzScdNmm2Bw6s]{Lunging Strike}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Ry3IUpPWcU0ezHb6]{Magic Spark}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.tcUJzFjjylMBd7zp]{Shape Object}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HVwKhYgfv8sH2a3x]{Wind Up Throw}

9th

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.RF3DdsDbNwosGrvi]{Catch Projectile}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fmNeQEJQLkNWwKXA]{Get Big!}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.r9ghJ7i8R7haw1fL]{Living Rampart}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.w8lfbne3GDr8T4Bz]{Shattering Stomp}

13th

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HmVS2Gdfy5vhyiIg]{Extra Big}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PC7DRFV8zaIYm3Wb]{Fearless}

17th

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z9Gc9rRb0DPuSi51]{Giant's Stampede}
