Lamia Spell Familiarity.name: 拉弥亚法术熟稔 Lamia Spell Familiarity
Lamia Spell Familiarity.description:
你的血液中有一道诅咒。若能正确引导，它偶尔也能派上用场。在你的每日准备期间，选择 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4]{Daze}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.atlgGNI1E1Ox3O3a]{Ghost Sound} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D7ZEhTNIDWDLC2J4]{Puff of Poison}。直到你的下一次每日准备之前，你可以随意将该戏法作为异界先天法术施放。戏法会被升阶至等于你等级的一半（向上取整）的法术等级。

There is a curse in your blood. Properly channeled, it can occasionally be useful. During your daily preparations, choose @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4gBIw4IDrSfFHik4]{Daze}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.atlgGNI1E1Ox3O3a]{Ghost Sound}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D7ZEhTNIDWDLC2J4]{Puff of Poison}. Until your next daily preparations, you can cast this cantrip as an occult innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell level equal to half your level rounded up.

Hellfire Explosion.name: 地狱火爆炸 Hellfire Explosion
Hellfire Explosion.description:
频率 每小时一次

当你引诱敌人靠近并欺骗他们包围你时，你可以用一次地狱火的爆炸将他们驱逐。@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]内的敌人承受 @Damage[((@actor.level -4)d6)[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。如果敌人具有对邪恶伤害的弱点，则该弱点适用于地狱火爆炸造成的伤害。在11级以及之后的每个等级，地狱火爆炸的伤害增加1d6，至20级时最高为16d6。

特殊 如果目标因你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} 反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，那么他们在对抗地狱火爆炸的豁免上也承受相同的环境减值。

Frequency once per hour

When you lure your foes in close and trick them into surrounding you, you can expunge them with an explosion of hellfire. Foes within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] take @Damage[((@actor.level -4)d6)[fire]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. If the foe has a weakness to evil damage, the weakness applies to the damage from Hellfire Explosion. At 11th level and every level thereafter, the damage from Hellfire Explosion increases by 1d6, to a maximum of 16d6 at 20th level.

Special If the target is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their saving throw against Hellfire Explosion.

Tactician's Command.name: 战术家的命令 Tactician's Command
Tactician's Command.description:
频率 每小时一次

你在战斗最激烈之时指挥你的盟友，使他们在战术上优于你的敌人。选择至多四名在60尺内、能够察觉并理解你指令的盟友。它们可以立即使用它们的反应动作（）进行挪步。若你花费两个动作，则它们可以改为花费它们的反应动作（）进行疾走（或掘地、攀爬、飞行或游泳，若你的盟友拥有相应的速度）。

Frequency once per hour

You command your allies in the heat of battle, giving them a tactical advantage over your foes. Choose up to four of your allies within 60 feet that can perceive and understand your command. They can immediately use their reaction to Step. If you spend two actions, they can instead spend their reaction to Stride (or Burrow, Climb, Fly, or Swim, if your ally has the corresponding Speed).

Swallow Whole.name: 整吞 Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你正使一个体型至少比你小两级的生物处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{受擒}

你抓住该生物并把它塞进嘴里，然后将其整只吞下，把它困在你那宽广的胃中。尝试一次@Check[type:athletics|defense:reflex]检定，对抗被擒生物的反射DC。若你成功，你吞下该生物。你不再需要用手来抓住该生物，并且你不能攻击你已经吞下的生物。你的胃的破裂值等于你等级的两倍。

被吞下的生物在你体内处于受擒状态，并且在被吞下后的第一轮结束后必须屏住呼吸，否则有窒息的风险。若它成功逃脱你的受擒状态，它会从你的口中出来。被吞下的生物可以攻击你，但只能使用徒手攻击或负载为轻或更低的武器；你在应对这些攻击时处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。如果你从一次攻击或法术中受到的穿刺或挥砍伤害等于或超过你的破裂值，被吞下的生物会从你的胃中切开逃出并离开你的空间。你也可以以单动作将被吞下的生物吐到你选择的相邻方格中。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements you have a creature at least two sizes smaller than you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}

You seize the creature and pop them into your mouth, then swallow them whole, trapping them inside your expansive stomach. Attempt an @Check[type:athletics|defense:reflex] check against the grabbed creature's Reflex DC. If you succeed, you swallow the creature. You are no longer using your hands to grab the creature, and you can't attack a creature you've swallowed. Your stomach has a Rupture value equal to twice your level.

A swallowed creature is grabbed inside your body and has to hold its breath after the first round of being swallowed or risk suffocation. If it Escapes your grabbed condition, it exits through your mouth. A swallowed creature can attack you, but only with unarmed attacks or with weapons of light Bulk or less; you're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] against these attacks. If you take piercing or slashing damage equaling or exceeding your Rupture value from a single attack or spell, the swallowed creature cuts itself free from your stomach and exits your space. You can also spit out the swallowed creature into an adjacent square of your choice as a single action.

Numbing Chill.name: 麻木寒意 Numbing Chill
Numbing Chill.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你以一次近战打击对一名生物造成大成功或大失败。

你激活潜藏的力量，用超自然的寒意包裹你的敌人。目标必须尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免，其DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 直到你的回合结束，目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

失败 直到你下个回合开始，目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2}。

大成功或大失败 目标获得笨拙 2，持续 [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 轮}。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You critically hit a creature with a melee Strike.

You activate your latent powers, encasing your foe in a supernatural chill. The target must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] save, with a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the end of your turn.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} until the beginning of your next turn.

Critical Failure The target is clumsy 2 for [[/r 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Vigorous Regrowth.name: 强健再生 Vigorous Regrowth
Vigorous Regrowth.description:
频率 每日一次

与你融合中的其他成员协同作战时，你将再生开到极限，从任何伤势中再度生长。持续1分钟，你的融合中的每名成员获得等同于其等级的再生，可被火焰与强酸克服。这意味着在你每个回合开始时，你恢复等同于你等级的生命值，并且如果你处于0生命值，你会让被斩断的头部再度生长。与九头蛇的常规情况相同，如果你的受伤值变为4或更高，你会保持@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷}直到你的伤势被处理。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.hujSZJXJ1x3MAvX1]{效果: 强健再生}

Frequency once per day

Working together with the other members of your fusion, you turn your regeneration on overdrive to regrow from any injury. For 1 minute, every member of your fusion gains regeneration equal to their level, overcome by fire and acid. This means you recover Hit Points equal to your level at the start of each of your turns and regrow your severed head if you're at 0 Hit Points. As normal for a hydra, if your wounded value becomes 4 or higher, you stay @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} until your wounds are treated.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.hujSZJXJ1x3MAvX1]{Effect: Vigorous Regrowth}

Stone Ally.name: 石之盟友 Stone Ally
Stone Ally.description:
你与一只具备动物般习性的元素石质怪诞体成为朋友，它会与你建立魔法性的联结。你获得一只魔宠，但它具有土与元素（特征）特征，而非动物（特征）。其生物类型由你决定，但它的一项能力必须为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.0Xrkk46IM43iI1Fv]{Darkvision}。

You've befriended an animalistic grotesque of elemental stone, who becomes magically bonded to you. You gain a familiar, except it has the earth and elemental traits rather than the animal trait. The type of creature is up to you, but one of its abilities must be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.familiar-abilities.Item.0Xrkk46IM43iI1Fv]{Darkvision}.

Riddle of Darkness.name: 黑暗之谜 Riddle of Darkness
Riddle of Darkness.description:
你已经解开了黑暗之谜，使你能够在夜间看得一清二楚。你获得黑暗视觉。

You have solved the riddle of darkness, allowing you to see perfectly well at night. You gain darkvision.

Share Vigor.name: 分担活力 Share Vigor
Share Vigor.description:
你和你的融合的其他成员共享同一个身体，并借助这份共享的生命力来分担你们的伤势。你的融合的每位成员选择给予或接受生命值。选择给予生命值的成员各自失去他们所选择数量的生命值，至多为他们每个等级4点生命值。随后，选择接受生命值的成员将被赠予的生命值尽可能平均地分配给他们。如果融合的所有成员都选择给予或都选择接受，则分享活力没有效果。

You and the other members of your fusion share a body, and you call upon the shared life force to share your wounds. Each member of your fusion chooses whether to give or receive Hit Points. Those who choose to give Hit Points each lose a number of Hit Points they choose, up to 4 Hit Points for each level they have. Those who choose to receive Hit Points then divide the gifted Hit Points as evenly as possible among them. If all members of the fusion choose to give or receive, Share Vigor has no effect.

One of Those Faces....name: 那些面孔之一…… One of Those Faces...
One of Those Faces....description:
你比大多数人更明白外表可能具有欺骗性。只要改变你的姿势、步态与举止，你就能变成另一个人，并消失在人群之中。你可以每小时以天生原初法术施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2qGqa33E4GPUCbMV]{Humanoid Form}。

You understand more than most that appearances can be deceiving. With a shift in your posture, gait, and mannerisms you can become a whole new person and disappear into a crowd. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2qGqa33E4GPUCbMV]{Humanoid Form} once per hour as a primal innate spell.

Hurl Anything.name: 投掷万物 Hurl Anything
Hurl Anything.description:
尽管岩石和巨石一直都是最爱的选择，但在你那肉乎乎的大手里，任何东西都能变成危险的投射物。你在使用投掷即兴武器进行攻击掷骰时，不承受通常的–2减值。此外，每当你获得一项职业特性，使你在任何武器上的熟练度达到专家或更高时，你也会在投掷即兴武器上获得同等的熟练度。作为一个【交互】动作，在大多数情况下，你可以在地上找到可抓取之物当作投掷即兴武器，例如一块石头或一块硬化的土块。在极少数情况下，GM可能会判定该区域过于贫瘠或毫无特征，以至于不存在任何投掷即兴武器。

Though rocks and boulders are an all-time favorite, in your meaty hands anything can become a dangerous projectile. You don't take the normal –2 penalty to attack rolls with thrown improvised weapons. Additionally, whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency with any weapon, you also gain that proficiency with thrown improvised weapons. As an Interact action, in most situations, you can find something on the ground to grab as a thrown improvised weapon, such as a rock or hardened chunk of soil. On rare occasions, the GM might determine the area is so bare or featureless that no thrown improvised weapon exists.

Insinuating Touch.name: 暗示性接触 Insinuating Touch
Insinuating Touch.description:
你可以将自己的心智调谐至你所接触的另一名生物的心智。你获得接触心灵感应，使你能够在与你所接触的任何生物之间，以无声且纯粹的心灵方式进行交流，只要你们共享一种语言。

You can attune your mind to that of another creature you're touching. You gain touch telepathy, allowing you to communicate silently and purely mentally with any creature you're touching, as long as you share a language.

Expanded Golem Antimagic.name: 扩展傀儡反魔法 Expanded Golem Antimagic
Expanded Golem Antimagic.description:
你的魔像反魔法始终保护着你。你在任何时候对抗所有魔法效果时，都获得来自“呼唤魔像反魔法”的+1环境加值到你的豁免和AC，而无需使用你的反应动作（）。如果你使用“呼唤魔像反魔法”，环境加值仅针对触发的效果提高至+2（不适用于触发生物所造成的后续效果）。

Your golem antimagic protects you at all times. You gain the +1 circumstance bonus to your saving throws and AC against magical effects from Call on Golem Antimagic at all times against all magical effects, without needing to use your reaction. If you use Call on Golem Antimagic, the circumstance bonus increases to +2 against the triggering effect only (not against further effects from the triggering creature).

Branching Out.name: 向外拓展 Branching Out
Branching Out.description:
随着时代推移以及你的种种经历，你已显著成长——要么整体变得更大，要么谨慎修剪自己，只在你希望之处生长，以提升你的战斗潜力。若你的体型小于Large，你可以选择成长为体型Large；若你已经是Large（例如你是arboreal archive），你可以选择成长为体型Huge。无论你是否如此，你的触及增加至10尺，你获得+2近战伤害状态加值，并且你成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}。

Over time and through your experiences, you've grown substantially, either growing larger overall or pruning yourself carefully to grow only where you wish in order to increase your combat potential. If you're smaller than Large, you can choose to grow to size Large, and if you're already Large (such as if you're an arboreal archive), you can choose to grow to size Huge. Whether you do so or not, your reach increases to 10 feet, you gain a +2 status bonus to melee damage, and you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}.

Big Bully.name: 大恶霸 Big Bully
Big Bully.description:
你令人胆寒，并且非常乐于确保每个人都知道这一点。你获得威吓的受训（熟练度）。如果你本会自动在威吓上成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训（熟练度）。你在对至少比你小一级体型的生物进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{胁迫}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫志}时，威吓检定获得+1环境加值。你还获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{威吓怒视}技能专长。

You're utterly terrifying, and you take great enjoyment from ensuring everyone knows it. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Intimidation. If you would automatically become trained in Intimidation (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Intimidation checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} creatures who are at least one size smaller than you. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xQMz6eDgX75WX2ce]{Intimidating Glare} skill feat.

X-Strike.name: X-打击 X-Strike
X-Strike.description:
你和你的融合搭档绕到一个敌人身侧，从两侧以X形一齐发起攻击，使敌人猝不及防，其效果如同你们进行了一次夹击机动一样。你的融合的两名成员对同一目标进行打击；只要你们本可以夹击该目标，那么该目标在面对两次打击时都处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}状态（例如，若其具有deny advantage或all-around vision，则其可能不会处于off-guard）。

你的融合中在本轮尚未行动的那名成员会提高其多重攻击减值，即便其下一回合尚未开始。这会影响在同一回合内未来对X-打击（或其他联合攻击，如All For One）的使用，也会影响其在自己回合中单独进行的任何攻击。

特殊 你的融合只能在该轮先攻顺序中较早行动的那名融合成员的回合内进行X-打击的打击。

You and your partner in the fusion reach around a foe and attack as one from both sides in the shape of an X, catching the foe off guard as well as a flanking maneuver could. Both members of your fusion Strike the same target, who is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} to both Strikes as long as you could flank them (for instance, if they have deny advantage or all-around vision, they might not be off-guard).

The member of your fusion who hasn't acted yet this round increases their multiple attack penalty, even though their next turn hasn't started yet. This applies to future uses of X-Strike (or another combined attack like All For One) on the same turn, as well as to any individual attacks they make on their own turn.

Special Your fusion can only perform X-Strike's Strikes during the turn of the member of the fusion acting first in initiative that round.

Psychopomp's Resistance.name: 魂引者的抗力 Psychopomp's Resistance
Psychopomp's Resistance.description:
尽管与你从炼狱获得的庇护隔绝，你的身体仍保留一些基本的抗力，帮助你在物质界的危害中存活。你获得等同于你等级一半的虚空抗力（最低 1）。此外，你对抗死亡效果、疾病和毒素的豁免获得 +1 环境加值。

Despite being cut off from Purgatory's protections, your body retains some basic resistances that help you survive the hazards of the material realm. You gain void resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1). In addition, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against death effects, diseases, and poisons.

Leach Moisture.name: 汲取水分 Leach Moisture
Leach Moisture.description:
频率 每天一次

你静止不动并专注于50尺内的一个单一敌人，将目标体内的水分抽离并吸入自身，这股力量与你与树木收割者共享的能力相通。你对目标造成 @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.level,18),9,ternary(gte(@actor.level,15),8,ternary(gte(@actor.level,12),7,6))))d6[void]] 伤害，目标需以你职业DC与法术DC中较高者为基准进行一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免。你获得等同于目标承受的负能量伤害一半的临时生命值（在应用抗力等效果之后）。1分钟后，你失去任何剩余的临时生命值。在第12、第15与第18等级时，伤害各增加1d6，至第20等级时最高为9d6虚体伤害。

Frequency once per day

You grow still and focus intently on a single foe within 50 feet, draining moisture from the target's body and into yourself with a power shared with arboreal reapers. You deal @Damage[(ternary(gte(@actor.level,18),9,ternary(gte(@actor.level,15),8,ternary(gte(@actor.level,12),7,6))))d6[void]] damage to the target with a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to half the negative damage the target takes (after applying resistances and the like). You lose any remaining temporary Hit Points after 1 minute. At 12th, 15th, and 18th levels, the damage increases by 1d6, to a maximum of 9d6 void damage at 20th level.

Ire's Blade.name: 艾瑞之刃 Ire's Blade
Ire's Blade.description:
需求 你以愤怒为再定心

你将怒火导入你的攻击中，以你暴怒的力量提高你的伤害。直到你下个回合结束，你的所有打击每拥有一个武器伤害骰，便额外造成 1d6 点精神伤害。此外，在该效果持续期间，你所有施放至少需要两个动作且使用法术攻击掷骰来造成伤害的戏法，每法术等级额外造成 1 点精神伤害；此项不适用于来自心灵术士职业的增幅戏法或其他非标准戏法。

Requirements You are Recentered to anger

You channel your ire into your attacks, increasing your damage with the power of your outrage. Until the end of your next turn, all your Strikes deal 1d6 additional mental damage for each weapon damage die they have. Additionally, while the effect lasts, all your cantrips that take at least two actions to cast and use spell attack rolls to deal damage deal 1 additional mental damage per spell level; this doesn't apply to amped cantrips from the psychic class or other nonstandard cantrips.

Let's Not be too Hasty....name: 先别太急…… Let's Not be too Hasty...
Let's Not be too Hasty....description:
如同大多数树栖族一般，你行动缓慢、有条不紊且谨慎。你看不出为何要像那些寿命更短的族裔那样匆忙行事，因此只要给予时间，你就能产出高质量的成果。你可以自愿在一次察觉检定或技能检定上花费正常两倍的时间。若你这么做，你在该检定上获得+2环境加值，并且在自然1时不会自动降低你的成功等级（只有当你的结果比DC低10点时，你才会获得大成功或大失败中的大失败）。例如，如果你花费2个动作来进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜寻}（该动作通常只需1个动作），你就能获得这些好处。你也可以在探索期间通过花费正常两倍的时间进行探索来获得这些好处，或在休整模式中通过花费两倍的休整模式时间来获得这些好处。

GM可能会判定某种情况不会给予你好处，如果延误会直接对你的成功适得其反，例如与一位没有耐心的生物进行紧张的谈判。

Like most arboreals, you work slowly, methodically, and carefully. You see no reason to rush things like shorter-lived ancestries do, and as a result, you produce quality efforts, given time. You can voluntarily spend twice as much time as normal on a Perception check or skill check. If you do, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to the check and don't automatically reduce your degree of success on a natural 1 (you get a critical failure only if your result is 10 lower than the DC). For example, you could get these benefits if you spent 2 actions to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, which normally takes 1 action. You can get these benefits during exploration by taking twice as long exploring as normal, or in downtime by spending twice as much downtime.

The GM might determine a situation doesn't grant you a benefit if a delay would be directly counterproductive to your success, such as a tense negotiation with an impatient creature.

Ride the Winds.name: 御风而行 Ride the Winds
Ride the Winds.description:
频率 每天一次

你是一名逐空者——一种能够真正飞行的石像鬼。你展开翅膀或长出魔法翅膀，获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度，持续10分钟。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.bU6VWElKi0vJ0kWE]{坚翼石像鬼} 传承或 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.LA0NdcTlrymQLIFa]{石像鬼滑翔} 专长，则你通过 Ride the Winds 获得飞行速度+10尺的状态加值。

Frequency once per day

You're a skychaser—a gargoyle capable of true flight. You unfold your wings or sprout magical wings, gaining a fly Speed equal to your land Speed for 10 minutes.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.bU6VWElKi0vJ0kWE]{Firmwing Gargoyle} heritage or the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.LA0NdcTlrymQLIFa]{Gargoyle Glide} feat, you gain a +10-foot status bonus to your fly Speed with Ride the Winds.

Wrath of the Sphinx.name: 斯芬克斯之怒 Wrath of the Sphinx
Wrath of the Sphinx.description:
你已磨练出一种与你的传承相对应的徒手攻击，以便更好地对付入侵者。你获得的徒手攻击取决于你的传承：

Anthrosphinx：据说暴怒的拟人斯芬克斯的凝视能灼烧灵魂。这不是比喻。你获得一道能量光束的远程徒手攻击，造成1d4火焰伤害。该能量光束的射程增量为20英尺。在大成功时，目标受到等同于武器伤害骰数量的持续火焰伤害。这是一种大成功专精效果。

Criosphinx：狮身羊首斯芬克斯盘曲的犄角绝非装饰。你获得一次顶撞的徒手攻击，造成1d6钝击伤害。你的犄角属于斗殴组，并具有推撞和徒手特征。

Cynosphinx：狮身犬首斯芬克斯的笑容并非用来交朋友，而作为同类的你，明白该如何正确使用它。你获得一次颚咬的徒手攻击，造成1d6穿刺伤害。你的颚咬属于斗殴组，并具有多用（挥砍）和徒手特征。

Hieracosphinx：狮身鹰首斯芬克斯的剃刀般尖喙在角度恰当时能造成致命打击，而你已学会了完美的角度。你获得一次喙击的徒手攻击，造成1d4挥砍伤害。你的喙击属于斗殴组，并具有致命d8、擒抱和徒手特征。

You've honed an unarmed attack specific to your heritage t0 better deal with intruders. The unarmed attack you gain depends on your heritage:

Anthrosphinx: The gaze of a furious anthrosphinx is said to scorch the soul. This is not a metaphor. You gain an energy beam ranged unarmed attack that deals 1d4 fire damage. The energy beam has a range increment of 20 feet. On a critical hit, the target takes persistent fire damage equal to the number of weapon damage dice. This is a critical specialization effect.

Criosphinx: The curled horns of a criosphinx are hardly decorative. You gain a gore unarmed attack that deals 1d6 bludgeoning damage. Your horns are in the brawling group and have the shove and unarmed traits.

Cynosphinx: The smile of a cynosphinx wasn't designed to make friends, and as a cynosphinx yourself, you understand the proper way to use them. You gain a jaws unarmed attack that deals 1d6 piercing damage. Your jaws are in the brawling group and have the versatile (slashing) and unarmed traits.

Hieracosphinx: The razor-sharp beak of a hieracosphinx can deliver fatal blows when the angle is right, and you've learned the perfect angle. You gain a beak unarmed attack that deals 1d4 slashing damage. Your beak is in the brawling group and has the fatal d8, grapple, and unarmed traits.

Reaper's Retribution.name: 收割者的惩戒 Reaper's Retribution
Reaper's Retribution.description:
触发 你触及范围内的一名生物使用一个操控动作或移动动作、进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作期间离开一个方格。

你如收割者之镰般猛然挥击，携带坟墓的终末之力，尤其针对炼狱之敌。对触发生物进行一次近战打击。若你的攻击为大成功，且触发生物为不死生物、sahkil，或由GM判定为炼狱的真正敌人，你会扰乱该触发动作。此打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值不适用于此打击。

Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

You lash out like the reaper's scythe, bringing with you the finality of the grave, especially to enemies of Purgatory. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. If your attack is a critical hit and the triggering creature was an undead, a sahkil, or otherwise a true enemy of Purgatory as determined by the GM, you disrupt the triggering action. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Parallel Paragon.name: 平行典范 Parallel Paragon
Parallel Paragon.description:
你并行的思维流使你能够以难以置信的速度思考。你永久处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}状态，并且只能用额外的动作来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]或@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.ViLvoke1fpTVKbuh]{重新集中}。

Your parallel thoughtstreams allow you to think incredibly quickly. You are permanently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} and can use the extra action only to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo] or @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.ViLvoke1fpTVKbuh]{Recenter}.

Terrifying Aura.name: 骇人灵光 Terrifying Aura
Terrifying Aura.description:
频率 每日一次

你释放你的全部潜能，利用你不祥的存在感恐吓你周围的人。持续1分钟，任何接近你20尺以内的生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗一个等同于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者的DC。无论豁免结果如何，他们都会在1分钟内暂时免疫你的恐怖灵光。邪魔免疫你的恐怖灵光。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。

大失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 4}。

Frequency once per day

You unleash your full potential, leveraging your ominous presence to terrify those around you. For 1 minute, creatures that approach within 20 feet of you must attempt a @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] save against a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, they are temporarily immune to your Terrifying Aura for 1 minute. Fiends are immune to your Terrifying Aura.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}.

Cloud Cover.name: 云层掩蔽 Cloud Cover
Cloud Cover.description:
你已经学会了用魔法操控战场，在无可乘之机时创造优势。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm] 作为原始传承的先天法术每天施放两次。如果你是火焰巨人，薄雾改为烟雾。如果你是霜巨人，薄雾改为坠落的雪。如果你是丘陵巨人，薄雾改为由一次有毒（但无害）的打嗝形成的刺鼻云团。

You've learned to magically manipulate the battlefield, creating advantages when there are none available to seize. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm] twice per day as a primal innate spell. If you're a fire giant, the mist is instead smoke. If you're a frost giant, the mist is instead falling snow. If you're a hill giant, the mist is instead a pungent cloud formed from a noxious (but harmless) belch.

Monstrous Size.name: 怪物体型 Monstrous Size
Monstrous Size.description:
大多数拉弥亚说到底与其动物形态相比都有点娇小。而你不是。你的下半身是成年狮子或某条巨蟒那般庞大的身躯，上半身也大于人类体型。你持续获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 的效果。

Most lamias are, at the end of the day, a bit pint-sized compared to their animal forms. You’re not. You have the lower body of a full-grown lion or some vast anaconda, and your upper body is larger than human size. You constantly gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}.

Extra Eyes.name: 额外之眼 Extra Eyes
Extra Eyes.description:
你的身体各处，或你的一些柄状突起末端，长出了各式各样的微小眼睛，使你能同时在多个区域中独立搜索。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索（基础动作）} 时，你可以在两个区域中寻找生物，而非一个。若需要精确，你可以在视觉线内选择两个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 或 @Template[type:burst|distance:15]，而非一个。

You've grown a variety of tiny eyes over your body, or at the ends of some of your stalks, allowing you to independently seek through several areas at once. When you use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{seek} basic action, you can look for creatures in two areas instead of one. If precision is necessary, you can select two @Template[type:cone|distance:30]s or @Template[type:burst|distance:15]s within line of sight instead of one.

Project Oculus.name: 奥库勒斯计划 Project Oculus
Project Oculus.description:
只要足够专注，你就能将你眼睛的幽灵般复制体从身体中投射出去，让你能在远处视物。你每小时可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance} 作为奥术先天法术施放一次，并且每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Ek5XI0aEdZhBgm21] 作为奥术先天法术施放一次。当你这么做时，那些隐形感测器看起来像你本人的微型版本。

With enough concentration, you can project a spectral duplicate of your eye from your body, allowing you to see at a distance. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance} once per hour as an occult innate spell and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Ek5XI0aEdZhBgm21] once per day as an occult innate spell. When you do, the invisible sensors look like miniature versions of you.

Perpetual Flames.name: 永燃烈焰 Perpetual Flames
Perpetual Flames.description:
你学会了点燃你怒火的火焰，让这团火燃烧得更久、更炽烈。你可以每10分钟使用一次@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.IlXbpXztU75cB0BF]{Wreathe in Flames}（如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YZK4ePLoqAc3cypb]{Stoked Fury}，则改为每1分钟一次）。此外，每当你用被Wreathe in Flames包覆的武器造成大成功或大失败时，你会额外造成1d10持续火焰伤害。

特殊 此专长造成的持续火焰伤害可与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming}符文以及@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9H8JHSasmnDDZNO8]{Diabolic Criticals}专长造成的持续火焰伤害累加。

You've learned to kindle the flames of your fury, to make the fire last longer and burn brighter. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.IlXbpXztU75cB0BF]{Wreathe in Flames} once per 10 minutes (or once per minute if you have @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YZK4ePLoqAc3cypb]{Stoked Fury}). In addition, whenever you critically hit with a weapon Wreathed in Flames, you deal an additional 1d10 persistent fire damage.

Special The persistent fire damage from this feat is cumulative with the persistent fire damage from a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.XszNvxnymWYRaoTp]{Flaming} rune and the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9H8JHSasmnDDZNO8]{Diabolic Criticals} feat.

Winter's Withering.name: 冬之凋零 Winter's Withering
Winter's Withering.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你唤起冬季枯萎的寒意之力，使你附近的敌人衰弱。在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]内的所有敌人受到@Damage[6d6[cold]]伤害；若当前为冬季，则受到@Damage[8d6[cold]]伤害，并以你职业DC或法术DC中较高者为对抗进行一次@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic]豁免。豁免失败的生物在1轮内获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{迟缓 1}，而大失败者则迟缓 1，持续1分钟。

特殊 每当季节从冬季变为春季时，若你愿意，你可以选择立刻将“冬季枯萎”专长重训为@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HuIDeXx2d26xYVng]{春之绽放}。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You call upon the power of winter's withering chill to enervate foes in your vicinity. All foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15] take @Damage[6d6[cold]] damage, or @Damage[8d6[cold]] damage if it's currently winter, with a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. Creatures who fail the save are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round, and those who critically fail are slowed 1 for 1 minute.

Special Whenever the season changes from winter to spring, you can choose to instantly retrain the Winter's Withering feat to @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HuIDeXx2d26xYVng]{Spring's Blossoming} if you prefer.

Winged Sphinx.name: 有翼斯芬克斯 Winged Sphinx
Winged Sphinx.description:
魔法在你的血管中流淌，使你成为空气与岩石的生物。你始终拥有25尺的飞行速度。

The magic flows through your veins, rendering you a creature of air and stone. You have a fly Speed of 25 feet at all times.

Get Big!.name: 变大！ Get Big!
Get Big!.description:
频率 每日一次

你迅速增大体型，暂时变得更大、更强、也更具威慑力。你的体型增长至超大型。你的装备也会随之变大，但若被移除或丢弃，则会恢复为自然体型。你的触及从5尺增加至10尺，并且你的近战打击的伤害掷骰获得+2状态加值，同时你的威吓检定获得+2状态加值。此变形持续5分钟。你可以以一个带有专注（特征）的单动作提前结束此变形。

特殊 若你拥有真正的巨人专长，改为使用Get Big!会使你的体型增长至巨型（体型），并将你的触及从10尺增加至15尺。

Frequency once per day

You rapidly grow in size, becoming temporarily bigger, stronger, and more intimidating. You grow to size Huge. Your equipment grows with you, but it returns to natural size if removed or dropped. Your reach increases from 5 feet to 10 feet, and you gain a +2 status bonus to damage rolls with melee Strikes and a +2 status bonus to Intimidation checks. This transformation lasts for 5 minutes. You can end this transformation early as a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Special If you have the Truly Giant feat, using Get Big! Instead makes you grow to Gargantuan size and increases your reach from 10 feet to 15 feet.

Look Every Way.name: 眼观六路 Look Every Way
Look Every Way.description:
你可以毫不费力地变换位置，以对抗较弱的敌人并覆盖所有方向。你在上一次使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.sZPXfpTOuyP81EzV]{Look Both Ways} 时所选择的融合成员，在任何时候都不会被等级等于或低于你的生物夹击，即使 Look Both Ways 的效果结束后也是如此。你可以使用 Look Both Ways 来更换你正在保护的成员，并防止被更强大的生物夹击。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.JiZLm8cbpGXqX6uA]{效果: Look Every Way}

You can effortlessly shift to cover all directions against weaker foes. The member of the fusion you chose the last time you used @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.sZPXfpTOuyP81EzV]{Look Both Ways} can't be flanked by creatures of your level or lower at all times, even after the effect of Look Both Ways ends. You can use Look Both Ways to change the member you're protecting and to protect from flanking from more powerful creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.JiZLm8cbpGXqX6uA]{Effect: Look Every Way}

Extreme Polarity.name: 极端极性 Extreme Polarity
Extreme Polarity.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 你用你的 Fundamental Polarity 专长的抗力抵御来自魔法效果的伤害。

保护你免受某种类型伤害的魔法变得更为极端，使你偶尔能从该类型的能量或魔法中恢复。在你用抗力降低触发的伤害后，你还会恢复等同于你等级数量的 @Damage[@actor.level[healing]]{生命值}；这可能导致你恢复的生命值多于你受到的伤害。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger You resist damage with your Fundamental Polarity feat from a magical effect.

The magic that protects you against a certain type of damage becomes more extreme, allowing you to occasionally recover from energy or magic of that type. After reducing the triggering damage with your resistance, you also regain a number of @Damage[@actor.level[healing]]{Hit Points} equal to your level; this could cause you to recover more Hit Points than the damage you took.

Fireblood.name: 火血 Fireblood
Fireblood.description:
如同火焰巨人一般，你拥抱咆哮烈焰的能量与灵感。你获得等同于你等级一半的火焰抗力（最低为1），并且你将环境热量效果视为比其实际程度低一级（骇人高温变为极端高温，极端高温变为严酷高温，依此类推）。你可以从下方列出的额外专长中选择巨人专长。

额外专长

1级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dIIJfzzqjYToDpQi]{Big Bully}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YhB0AHBrTJfAR8N6]{Brute Force}

9级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.r9ghJ7i8R7haw1fL]{Living Rampart}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.w8lfbne3GDr8T4Bz]{Shattering Stomp}

13级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Fp4B7spJAlqyUoB4]{Elemental Strike}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.HmVS2Gdfy5vhyiIg]{Extra Big}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.PC7DRFV8zaIYm3Wb]{Fearless}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.cFdPF0BbG7CnbafJ]{Swallow Whole}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.jYWd1CIMo8FiU7p1]{Throw Ally}

17级

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TQDR2Zcr1nStO3eN]{Eternal}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.z9Gc9rRb0DPuSi51]{Giant's Stampede}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.R95FPWh5dLuV0x18]{Ground Pound}
  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.9XjaTkjd2F6WjlGd]{Magic of the Ancients}

Like a fire giant, you embrace the energy and inspiration of roaring flames. You gain fire resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1), and you treat environmental heat effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible heat becomes extreme, extreme heat becomes severe, and so on). You can take giant feats from the Additional Feats listed below.

Additional Feats

1st

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dIIJfzzqjYToDpQi]{Big Bully}

9th

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.fmNeQEJQLkNWwKXA]{Get Big!}

  • @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.w8lfbne3GDr8T4Bz]{Shattering Stomp}

13th

Graceful Speed.name: 优雅速度 Graceful Speed
Graceful Speed.description:
你可以利用你蛇形的身躯攀爬表面，就像你在坚实地面上移动一样迅速。你从蛇形优雅获得的攀爬速度提升至等同于你的陆地速度。此外，如果你的陆地速度快于20尺，你因作为拉弥娅族母而获得的游泳速度提升至等同于你的陆地速度。

You can use your serpentine body to climb up surfaces just as quickly as you move on solid ground. You climb Speed from Serpentine Grace increases to become equal to your land Speed. Additionally, the swim Speed you gained from being a lamia matriarch increases to become equal to your land Speed if your land Speed is faster than 20 feet.

Shield Thoughts.name: 盾之思绪 Shield Thoughts
Shield Thoughts.description:
你运用你的噬脑者力量庇护心智并阻挡精神效果。你对抗精神效果的豁免获得+1环境加值。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.w2fGFkzRtxwHnn5q]{Mental Shield}反应动作（）。

You shield your mind and block mental effects using your cerebrophage powers. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against mental effects. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.w2fGFkzRtxwHnn5q]{Mental Shield} reaction.

Reaching Stretch.name: 延伸触及 Reaching Stretch
Reaching Stretch.description:
由于你的体型，你可以挥舞某些武器来攻击远处的敌人。当你持用一把需要双手的近战武器、该武器不具有触及特征，且其伤害骰至少为1d6时，你可以通过使用一个交互动作，将握持方式在延伸的双手握持与常规握持之间切换。这种延伸的双手握持使该武器获得触及特征，但由于需要伸展，它比典型的握持方式更不稳定且威力更弱，使该武器的伤害骰降低一个等级。

Because of your size, you can wield certain weapons to attack distant enemies. When you wield a melee weapon that requires two hands, doesn't have the reach trait, and has a damage die of at least 1d6, you can switch your grip to and from an extended two-handed grip by using an Interact action. This extended two-handed grip grants the weapon the reach trait, but due to stretching out, it's less stable and powerful than a typical grip, reducing the weapon's damage die by one step.

Shoving Tusk.name: 推撞獠牙 Shoving Tusk
Shoving Tusk.description:
频率 每分钟一次

需求 你上一个动作是用你的獠牙徒手攻击命中一个敌人。

你甩动头部，将敌人掀得连连后退并摔倒在地。尝试对你刚刚攻击的那个生物进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}。你不需要至少空出一只手，并且在这次运动检定上获得+2环境加值（但如常，你的多重攻击减值仍然适用）。如果你大成功，在你推开它之后，目标也会被击倒并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

特殊 在满月的月光下，不再是每分钟一次的频率；在使用獠牙推撞后，你在[[/r 1d4 #Recharge Shoving Tusk]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用它。

Frequency once per minute

Requirements Your last action was to hit an enemy with your tusk unarmed attack.

With a toss of your head, you send foes reeling away and onto the ground. Attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} the creature whom you just attacked. You don't need at least one hand free and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus on this Athletics check (though as normal, your multiple attack penalty applies). If you critically succeed, the target is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} after you push it.

Special Under the light of a full moon, instead of a frequency of once per minute, after using Shoving Tusk, you can't use it again for [[/r 1d4 #Recharge Shoving Tusk]]{1d4 rounds}.

Moonlight Gift.name: 月光赋礼 Moonlight Gift
Moonlight Gift.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你处于你的混合形态。

你将你的赋礼中最好的部分分享给你的盟友。持续 1 分钟，所有位于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} 内的盟友都可以选择变形为一种看起来类似于你混合形态的形态，并获得你的混合形态所赋予的徒手攻击。若他们这么做，他们的武器会融入其身体，但原本会应用于这些徒手攻击的该武器的基础符文与属性符文会改为对徒手攻击生效（例如，炽焰会生效，但变换，或需要钝击伤害或远程攻击的符文则不会）。持有多于一把武器的盟友在接受变形时选择应用哪把武器的符文。接受变形的盟友会付出代价，因为他们获得等同于你等级一半的银弱点。你与接受你赋礼的盟友在赋礼持续期间，使用混合形态徒手攻击进行攻击与伤害掷骰时也获得 +1 状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.ZQMUk67F49VZALQ8]{效果: 月光赋礼}

特殊 在满月的月光下，你可以每 10 分钟使用一次月光赋礼，而非每小时一次。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You are in your hybrid form.

You share the best parts of your gift with your allies. For 1 minute, all allies within @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} can choose to transform into a form that looks similar to your hybrid form and gain the unarmed attacks granted by your hybrid form. If they do, their weapons meld into their body, but the weapon's fundamental and property runes that would apply to these unarmed attacks function for the unarmed attacks instead (for example, flaming would apply but shifting or a rune requiring bludgeoning damage or a ranged attack would not). An ally holding more than one weapon chooses which weapon's runes to apply when accepting the transformation. Allies who accept the transformation pay a price, as they gain weakness equal to half your level to silver. You and allies who accept your gift also gain a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls with the hybrid form unarmed attacks while the gift lasts.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.ZQMUk67F49VZALQ8]{Effect: Moonlight Gift}

Special Under the light of a full moon, you can use Moonlight Gift once per 10 minutes instead of once per hour.

Dynamic Leach.name: 动态吸取 Dynamic Leach
Dynamic Leach.description:
你从他者身上汲取水分的能力已突飞猛进。你的汲取水分伤害提高至 @Damage[12d6[void]] 伤害（不再是造成 @Damage[8d6[void]] 伤害，或在18级时造成 @Damage[9d6[void]] 伤害），并且你可以每小时使用一次汲取水分，而非每日一次。此外，每日一次，你可以将你的汲取水分的伤害提高至14d6，并对一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内所有活着的生物造成伤害，而非单一目标；若你选择如此，你获得的临时生命值等于单个生物从此法术中受到的伤害的一半；计算这些临时生命值时，以受到伤害最高的那只生物为准。

Your ability to leach the moisture from others has grown in leaps and bounds. Your Leach Moisture increases to @Damage[12d6[void]] damage (instead of dealing @Damage[8d6[void]] damage, or @Damage[9d6[void]] damage at 18th level), and you can use Leach Moisture once per hour, instead of once per day. Additionally, once per day, you can increase your leach moisture's damage to 14d6 and damage all living creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], instead of a single target; if you choose to do so, the temporary Hit Points you gain are equal to half the damage a single creature takes from this spell; calculate these temporary Hit Points using the creature that took the most damage.

Fusion Flight.name: 融合飞行 Fusion Flight
Fusion Flight.description:
你的融合可以无限期维持飞行。你始终拥有25英尺的飞行速度。

Your fusion can maintain flight indefinitely. You have a fly Speed of 25 feet at all times.

Stone Magic.name: 石质魔法 Stone Magic
Stone Magic.description:
你与大地和岩石之间有着魔法连接。你可以随意将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zA0jNIBRgLsyTpbm]{Scatter Scree} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uMADQaASgYNsSDDM]{Tremor Signs} 戏法作为原初先天法术施放。戏法会被强化到等于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术等级。

You have a magical connection to earth and stone. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.zA0jNIBRgLsyTpbm]{Scatter Scree} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.uMADQaASgYNsSDDM]{Tremor Signs} cantrips as primal innate spells at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell level equal to half your level rounded up.

Resurgent Host.name: 复苏宿主 Resurgent Host
Resurgent Host.description:
你已设法让你的子嗣比往常更多地模仿你过去的内在构造（尽管归根结底它仍只是一团相互连接的生物并呈现为血肉与器官），而你也已与自己的根源重新建立联系。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry}通用专长，所选族裔为你在成为虫群血裔之前曾经的族裔；你还从该族裔获得一个1级族裔专长。

You've managed to get your brood to mimic more of your old internals than usual (though ultimately it's still just a mass of creatures connecting together and appearing as flesh and organs), and you've gotten in touch with your roots. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} general feat for the ancestry you once were before becoming a swarmblood, and you also gain one 1st-level ancestry feat from that ancestry.

Idols of Stone.name: 石之偶像 Idols of Stone
Idols of Stone.description:
石头知道要服从它们的主人。你可以每天两次将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.McnPlLFvKtQVXNcG]{Shape Stone} 作为神圣先天法术施放。此外，当你使用 shape stone 时，你可以选择创造一个石制神像——一件你自己的雕塑或浮雕，并根据其所处环境适当地装饰或风化。你同时最多只能维持四个神像处于活动状态。此后创造新的神像会使最早的那个崩解成尘，而将神像从其所在位置移动也会使其崩解。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Pa4MN9t3UMOeE0s8]{Watchful Sphinx} 专长，该神像会表现为一尊斯芬克斯，使你能够使用来自 Watchful Sphinx 的你的千里耳与千里眼先天法术而不消耗其每日使用次数，并且只要你位于同一位面内，你就可以在无限射程内如此做。

如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YqmRD7LMS7a7NVNX]{Guardian Monolith} 专长，那么只要你位于同一位面内，每小时一次，你可以专注 1 分钟将你的意识转移到任意一尊神像中；随后你会在那尊雕像中处于来自 Guardian Monolith 的你的石形态，而你的身体处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} 且脆弱。当你退出石形态时，你的意识会返回到你原本的身体。

The stones know to obey their master. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.McnPlLFvKtQVXNcG]{Shape Stone} twice per day as a divine innate spell. In addition, when you use shape stone you can choose to create a stone idol—a sculpture or relief of yourself, decorated or weathered as appropriate for its surroundings. You can have no more than four idols active at a time. Creating a new idol afterwards causes the oldest to crumble into dust, and moving an idol from its location causes it to crumble as well.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Pa4MN9t3UMOeE0s8]{Watchful Sphinx} feat, this idol is a representation of a sphinx, allowing you to use your clairaudience and clairvoyance innate spells from Watchful Sphinx without expending their daily uses, and you can do so from an unlimited range, so long as you're on the same plane of existence.

If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.YqmRD7LMS7a7NVNX]{Guardian Monolith} feat, then so long as you are on the same plane of existence, once per hour, you can concentrate for 1 minute to transfer your consciousness to any idol; you are then in your stone form from Guardian Monolith in that statue, and your body is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} and vulnerable. When you exit your stone form, your consciousness returns to your original body.

Infernal Wings.name: 炼狱之翼 Infernal Wings
Infernal Wings.description:
你已按自己的意愿恢复了地狱之翼的力量，并且可以不受限制地飞行。你始终拥有25英尺的飞行速度。

You’ve restored the power of your infernal wings on your own terms and you can fly without limits. You have a fly Speed of 25 feet at all times.

Reaper's Bleed.name: 收割者之流血 Reaper's Bleed
Reaper's Bleed.description:
你的木质身躯长有锋利如剃刀的荆棘，会导致流血。你的拳头（以及来自 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.1rHVTcNC9AweQ4GB]{Arboreal Strikes} 专长的枝条徒手攻击）获得多用：穿刺特征，并且当你使用其造成穿刺伤害时，在一次大成功时你会额外造成 1d4 持续流血伤害。

Your wooden body has razor-sharp thorns that cause bleeding. Your fist (as well as your branch unarmed attack from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.1rHVTcNC9AweQ4GB]{Arboreal Strikes} feat) gains the versatile piercing trait, and when you use it to deal piercing damage, you deal an additional 1d4 persistent bleed damage on a critical hit.

Survey Signatories.name: 调查签署者 Survey Signatories
Survey Signatories.description:
你在所有契约的细则中暗藏了一条巧妙条款，使你能在任何想要的时候以魔法监视签署者。你可以随意将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r784cIz17eWujtQj]{Scrying} 作为神圣先天法术施放。以这种方式施放探知时，你只能以一名当前受你起草的某份契约条款约束的生物为目标。若某个目标在对抗你以这种方式施放的探知时，其豁免掷骰出了大成功或大失败中的大成功，则该目标改为获得成功。

You've hidden a clever clause surreptitiously in the fine print of all your contracts that enables you to magically survey your signatories whenever you so desire. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r784cIz17eWujtQj]{Scrying} as a divine innate spell at will. When casting scrying this way you can only target a creature who is currently under the terms of a contract you drafted. If a target rolls a critical success on their saving throw against your scrying cast in this way, the target gets a success instead.

Eye Beams.name: 眼部射线 Eye Beams
Eye Beams.description:
你学会了从眼中发射能量光束，其能量类型会因你自身独特的邪眼本质而异。你获得一种眼光束徒手攻击，其造成1d4点你所选择的酸蚀、寒冷、电击或火焰伤害，射程增量为20尺。你的眼光束徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

特殊 如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.uvj9kkPSKkQIQHL3]{Burning Eye}传承，则你现有的眼光束不采用通常的效果，而是将其伤害提升至1d6，获得20尺射程增量，并获得你所选择的多用酸蚀、多用寒冷或多用电击特征。

You’ve learned how to fire energy beams from your eyes, with the energy type varying depending on your own unique evil eye nature. You gain an eye beam unarmed attack, which deals 1d4 damage of your choice of acid, cold, electricity, or fire, with a range increment of 20 feet. Your eye beam unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.uvj9kkPSKkQIQHL3]{Burning Eye} heritage, instead of the normal effects, your existing eye beam increases its damage to 1d6, gains a range increment of 20 feet, and gains your choice of versatile acid, versatile cold, or versatile electricity trait.

Magical Vigil.name: 魔法守望 Magical Vigil
Magical Vigil.description:
你非常认真地履行守望职责，并学会了一些魔法技巧来更好地保护你的守护对象。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8xRzLhwGL7Dgy3EZ]{Sanctuary} 作为1环原始先天法术施放。你每天可以各施放一次这些原始先天法术。

You take your vigil very seriously and have learned a few magical tricks to better protect your ward. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4WAib3GichxLjp5p]{Alarm} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8xRzLhwGL7Dgy3EZ]{Sanctuary} as 1st-rank primal innate spells. You can cast each of these primal innate spells once per day.

Wings of the Afterlife.name: 来世之翼 Wings of the Afterlife
Wings of the Afterlife.description:
你立刻一次性恢复飞行能力，马上回到完全的力量。你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.3RMQBWppdUH9nhp0]{Awaken Purgatory's Wings}、@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.UrZtzdCsmran7uWl]{Purgatorial Flit}、@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TkrRnKFFDCMsY6Wb]{Rekindle Purgatory's Wings} 或 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.4LzlovgVxPIv1OJN]{True Flight} 专长，你立刻将它们全部重训为不同的族裔专长。如果你拥有 True Flight 专长，你必须选择将 Purgatorial Flit 和 Rekindle Purgatory's Wings 通过这次免费的重训，重训为与你从 True Flight 作为奖励专长获得的同样两个 1级与 5级专长，不过你之后仍可以正常选择重训它们。

You regain your flight all at once, immediately returning to full strength. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed.

Special If you had the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.3RMQBWppdUH9nhp0]{Awaken Purgatory's Wings}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.UrZtzdCsmran7uWl]{Purgatorial Flit}, @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TkrRnKFFDCMsY6Wb]{Rekindle Purgatory's Wings}, or @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.4LzlovgVxPIv1OJN]{True Flight} feats, you immediately retrain all of them into different ancestry feats. If you had the True Flight feat, you must choose to retrain Purgatorial Flit and Rekindle Purgatory's Wings into the same two 1st and 5th level feats you gained as bonus feats from True Flight with this free retraining, though you can choose to retrain them normally later.

Golden Halo.name: 金色光环 Golden Halo
Golden Halo.description:
频率 每小时一次

你的光环如火焰般向外炽烈燃起，其光芒令人敬畏，无法否认。你同时施放 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{Bane} 与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless}，每个都作为1环神圣天生法术。只要两个法术都保持生效，你就可以用同一个动作同时维持它们。这不会消耗你由银色光环授予的 bane 与 bless 的使用次数。

Frequency once per hour

Your halo blazes outwards like a flame, a light too awe-inspiring to deny. You cast both @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.7ZinJNzxq0XF0oMx]{Bane} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{Bless} at the same time, each as a 1st-rank divine innate spell. As long as both spells remain active, you can Sustain them both with the same action. This doesn't expend your uses of bane and bless granted by Silver Halo.

The Final Riddle.name: 最终谜题 The Final Riddle
The Final Riddle.description:
未能解开斯芬克斯的终极谜题会使生物的心智沿着分叉的路径一路坠落，扭曲并混淆，直到再也无法辨识任何事物，其决策变得完全不理性。你每天可以施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind}，在施放时选择当日要施放的法术，作为8环神圣先天法术，但你的该法术版本获得听觉与语言（特征）特征。

To fail the ultimate riddle of the sphinx sends a creature's mind down branching paths, twisting and confusing it until nothing is recognizable any longer and its decisions become completely irrational. You can cast either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.LiGbewa9pO0yjbsY]{Confusion} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8kJbiBEjMWG4VUjs]{Warp Mind} once per day, chosen each day at the time of casting, as an 8th-rank divine innate spell, except that your version of the spell gains the auditory and linguistic traits.

Serpentine Grace.name: 蛇形优雅 Serpentine Grace
Serpentine Grace.description:
你的蛇形身体并不算特别迅捷，但确实有个优势：几乎可以去任何地方。获得10尺攀爬速度。

Your serpentine body isn’t enormously swift, but it does have the advantage of being able to go quite nearly anywhere. Gain climb Speed of 10 feet.

Absorb Lightning.name: 吸收闪电 Absorb Lightning
Absorb Lightning.description:
触发 你将要受到电击伤害。

你将电能吸收进自身体内，使你的血肉带电。直到你下个回合结束，你获得等于1加上你等级的一半的电击伤害抗力。在这段时间内，你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.vtJOsFvpJmZxwMPs]{Throw Lightning} 动作。

Trigger You would take electricity damage.

You absorb the electricity into your own body, electrifying your flesh. You gain resistance to electricity damage equal to 1 plus half your level until the end of your next turn. During that time, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.vtJOsFvpJmZxwMPs]{Throw Lightning} action.

Harmonizing Aura.name: 调和灵光 Harmonizing Aura
Harmonizing Aura.description:
频率 每日一次

作为合唱天使，你会产生一道嗡鸣的灵光，与音波与听觉效果相协调。你的协调灵光是一个 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]，持续1分钟。你与区域内的盟友在针对造成音波伤害的效果进行伤害掷骰时获得+3状态加值，并在对抗音波与听觉效果时的AC与所有豁免上获得+1状态加值。区域内的敌人在进行音波伤害掷骰时承受–3状态减值，并在对抗音波与听觉效果时的AC与所有豁免上承受–1状态减值。

Frequency once per day

As a choral angel, you produce a humming aura that harmonizes with sonic and auditory effects. Your harmonizing aura is a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] and lasts for 1 minute. You and allies in the area gain a +3 status bonus to damage rolls for effects dealing sonic damage and a +1 status bonus to AC and all saves against sonic and auditory effects. Enemies in the area take a –3 status penalty to sonic damage rolls and a –1 status penalty to AC and all saves against sonic and auditory effects.

Winged Cloak.name: 翼披风 Winged Cloak
Winged Cloak.description:
你对自己的翅膀有极佳的控制力，能够恰到好处地将其折叠在身周，制造出皮革斗篷的假象。你在进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}一个不是石像鬼的你自己的版本时，欺瞒检定与DC获得+2环境加值。该加值仅在你处于昏暗光照、黑暗、薄雾或其他类似遮蔽视线的区域时适用。

此外，你折叠的翅膀能帮助你更容易藏匿物体，使你进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qVNVSmsgpKFGk9hV]{藏匿物体}的隐匿检定获得+2环境加值。

You have excellent control of your wings, and can fold them around you, just so, creating the illusion of a leather cloak. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Deception checks and DCs to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} a version of yourself who isn't a gargoyle. This bonus only applies when you are in an area of dim light, darkness, mist, or another similar area that obscures vision.

Additionally, your folded wings help you hide objects more easily, granting you a +2 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.qVNVSmsgpKFGk9hV]{Conceal an Object}.

Ancestral Blending.name: 祖源混融 Ancestral Blending
Ancestral Blending.description:
你在他人之中度过了太久的时光，假装自己是他们中的一员，以至于你理解了他们的行事方式。你获得与你的人形形态相匹配的族裔的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{收养族裔} 通用专长，并且你还从该族裔获得一个1级族裔专长。

You have spent so long among others, pretending to be one of them, that you understand their ways. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} general feat for the ancestry that matches your humanoid form, and you also gain one 1st-level ancestry feat from that ancestry.

Rock Thrower.name: 掷岩者 Rock Thrower
Rock Thrower.description:
你可以投掷石头、巨石，或森林里你手边找到的任何东西来摧毁你的敌人。你不会在用投掷的临时武器进行攻击掷骰时承受通常的–2减值。此外，每当你获得一项职业特性，使你对任何武器获得专家或更高的熟练度时，你也会对投掷的临时武器获得该熟练度。作为一个交互动作，在大多数情况下，你可以在地上找到某样东西抓起来当作投掷的临时武器，例如石头或硬化的土块。在少数情况下，GM可能会判定该区域过于贫瘠或毫无特征，以至于不存在可用的投掷临时武器。

You can throw rocks, boulders, or anything else you find on hand in the forest to demolish your foes. You don't take the normal –2 penalty to attack rolls with thrown improvised weapons. Additionally, whenever you gain a class feature that grants you expert or greater proficiency with any weapon, you also gain that proficiency with thrown improvised weapons. As an Interact action, in most situations, you can find something on the ground to grab as a thrown improvised weapon, such as a rock or hardened chunk of soil. On rare occasions, the GM might determine the area is so bare or featureless that no thrown improvised weapon exists.

Road to Redemption.name: 赎罪之路 Road to Redemption
Road to Redemption.description:
你已经努力抹去你过去的邪恶行径，并在你的灵魂中推翻对它们的清算。你失去你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-features.Item.4I9HrLTTjsaHsLE1]{Damned} 能力获得的对善良伤害的弱点，尽管无论你的阵营如何，你仍会受到善良伤害。

You've worked hard to erase the evil deeds of your past and overturn their accounting within your soul. You lose your weakness to good damage from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-features.Item.4I9HrLTTjsaHsLE1]{Damned} ability, though you still take good damage regardless of your alignment.

Beetle Breath.name: 甲虫吐息 Beetle Breath
Beetle Breath.description:
如同强大的阎摩罗阇一般，你可以呼出一阵墓甲虫的爆风，形成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30]。区域内的生物每拥有你2个等级便受到1d6点挥砍伤害（向上取整，@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d6)[slashing]|options:area-damage]），最高在19级时为10d6，并可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免。你在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge your Beetle Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用你的甲虫吐息。

Much like a mighty yamaraj, you can breathe a blast of grave beetles in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]. Creatures in the area take 1d6 slashing damage for every two levels you have (rounded up, @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d6)[slashing]|options:area-damage]) to a maximum of 10d6 at 19th level, with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] saving throw. You can't use your Beetle Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge your Beetle Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Levitation.name: 漂浮 Levitation
Levitation.description:
你反抗一切试图束缚你的力量——包括重力。你每天可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fI20AVwOzJMHXRdo]{Levitate} 作为原初先天法术施放两次，但你必须以自己为目标。

You rebel against all forces attempting to constrain you—including gravity. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.fI20AVwOzJMHXRdo]{Levitate} twice per day as a primal innate spell, except that you must target yourself.

Hydrodynamic Hydra (Trait).name: 流体力学九头蛇（特征） Hydrodynamic Hydra (Trait)
Hydrodynamic Hydra (Trait).description:
你融合体中的一名成员已获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.tRzUQ89zfu02g3ZA]{Hydrodynamic Hydra} 专长。你获得两栖（特征）。

A member of your fusion has taken the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.tRzUQ89zfu02g3ZA]{Hydrodynamic Hydra} feat. You gain the Amphibious trait.

Devour Skill.name: 吞噬技能 Devour Skill
Devour Skill.description:
你可以从你吞噬其大脑的生物那里获得技能。除去你从程序记忆族裔能力获得的技能之外，你额外获得一个你选择的已受训技能。此外，每当你吃下一颗来自小型或更大型的有感知生物的新鲜大脑时，你可以选择将“吞噬技能”或程序记忆提供的已受训技能之一，替换为该生物拥有的技能之一。如果你是专家或更高，则你不能替换该技能。每颗大脑你只能替换一个技能。

You can gain the skills from the creatures whose brains you devour. You gain an additional trained skill of your choice, beyond the skill from your procedural memories ancestry ability. Additionally, whenever you eat a fresh brain from a Small or larger sapient creature, you can choose to swap out either the trained skill from Devour Skill or procedural memories with one of the skills the creature possessed. If you're an expert or better, you can't swap out the skill. You can only swap out one skill per brain.

Spiritual Warden.name: 灵魂守望者 Spiritual Warden
Spiritual Warden.description:
频率 每日一次

作为一名独行天使，你可以守护你的灵魂以及附近盟友的灵魂。你的灵性守卫灵光为一个持续1分钟的 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20]。你以及处于你灵光中的盟友在对抗死亡效果以及以其灵魂为目标或操控其灵魂的效果的豁免检定上获得+2状态加值，并获得等同于你等级的抗力，以抵御来自此类效果的伤害。

Frequency once per day

As a monadic deva, you can safeguard your soul and those of your nearby allies. Your spiritual warden aura is a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] that lasts for 1 minute. You and allies in your aura gain a +2 status bonus to saving throws against death effects and effects that target or manipulate their souls and gain resistance equal to your level to damage from such effects.

Unleash Hell.name: 释放地狱 Unleash Hell
Unleash Hell.description:
频率 每天一次

你可以在地狱烈焰与硫磺的爆发中释放全部的魔鬼之力，使地面在下方裂开形成一个地狱之口，向空中喷吐出地狱火与熔岩的巨大柱状喷流，形成一个垂直圆柱体，范围为 @Template[type:burst|distance:5]{5尺半径，最高80尺}，对区域内的生物造成 @Damage[14d6[fire]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗你更高的职业DC与法术DC。熔岩会迅速冷却并将区域内的生物封在岩石中。被岩石包裹的生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}，其速度承受 –10尺状态减值；如果它正在飞行，则会立即下降20尺（但不会因此坠落受到伤害），并且在被包裹且飞行时，将所有方格视为困难地形。被岩石包裹的生物必须以对抗“释放地狱”的DC进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱}以结束该效果。否则，该生物将一直被包裹，直到其累计受到总计50点伤害，从而挣脱这地狱岩石。

此外，区域内的生物以及距离地狱火喷流5尺内的生物会因强烈高温自动受到 @Damage[3d6[fire]] 伤害；该伤害没有豁免，且独立于直接暴露于地狱熔岩时的豁免。

此能力造成的所有火焰伤害都是注入神圣能量的地狱火，因此区域内的生物仅适用其通常火焰抗力的一半。对火焰免疫的生物不会获得通常的免疫收益，而是将其豁免结果视为提高一级成功（仅用于决定其受到多少伤害，而非是否被包裹），并且不会因强烈高温受到3d6火焰伤害。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害并被包裹。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害并被包裹。

Frequency once per day

You can unleash all your diabolic power in a blast of hellfire and brimstone, causing the ground to open up in a hell mouth below, spewing a plume of hellfire and lava high into the air in a vertical cylinder with a @Template[type:burst|distance:5]{5-foot radius and up to 80 feet tall}, dealing @Damage[14d6[fire]] damage to creatures in the area, with a @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and your spell DC. The lava rapidly cools and encases creatures in the area. A creature encased in rock is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds, and if they are flying they immediately descend 20 feet (but take no damage from this fall) and treat all squares as difficult terrain while encased and flying.. A creature encased in rock must @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against Unleash Hell's DC to end the effect. Otherwise, the creature remains encased until it takes a total of 50 damage, freeing it from the infernal rock.

Additionally, creatures in the area and those within 5 feet of the hellfire plume automatically take @Damage[3d6[fire]] damage from the intense heat; this damage has no saving throw and is independent of the saving throw from direct exposure to the hellfire lava.

All fire damage dealt by this ability is hellfire infused with divine energy, so creatures in the area apply only half their usual fire resistance. Creatures that are immune to fire, instead of gaining the usual benefit of immunity, treat the results of their saving throws as one degree of success better for the purpose of determining how much damage they take (but not whether they're encased) and don't take the 3d6 fire damage from the intense heat.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is encased.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is encased.

Vicious Grab.name: 恶毒擒抱 Vicious Grab
Vicious Grab.description:
频率 每小时一次

需求 你处于混合形态。

你抓住猎物，并用你危险的天生武器将其撕咬蹂躏。尝试一次运动检定以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}一个目标，然后用你的混合形态的徒手攻击对其进行一次打击。在你尝试这次打击之前，你的多重攻击减值不会增加。若你成功擒抱该目标，你的打击在伤害上获得环境加值，数值等于武器伤害骰数量的两倍。

特殊 在满月的月光下，你可以每10分钟使用一次凶残擒抓，而非每小时一次。

Frequency once per hour

Requirements You are in your hybrid form.

You grab your prey and maul them with your dangerous natural weapons. Attempt an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} a target and then make a Strike against it with your hybrid form's unarmed attack. Your multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after you attempt the Strike. If you successfully Grapple the target, your Strike gains a circumstance bonus to damage equal to twice the number of weapon damage dice.

Special Under the light of a full moon, you can use Vicious Grab once per 10 minutes instead of once per hour.

Follow Through.name: 贯彻到底 Follow Through
Follow Through.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

需求 你的上一动作是一次对敌人的成功近战打击。

你乘势追击，以强力挥击将对手击飞。你尝试对同一生物进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}。此次推撞尝试使用与触发的打击相同的多重攻击减值。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements Your last action was a successful melee Strike against an enemy.

You follow through on your powerful swing, sending your foe flying. You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} the same creature. This Shove attempt uses the same multiple attack penalty as the triggering Strike.

Pentad Power.name: 五重力量 Pentad Power
Pentad Power.description:
你对心灵攻击形态的持续并行研究，使你得以从所有五种性相中学习进攻技巧。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.FSp7cvVo6KrGYmAk]{Phantasmal Barrage} 专长、@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ne1PdopyXUh9LPfx]{Twist Reason} 专长、@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.2ucsyvUntIehFGkr]{Connect Hearts} 专长，以及在 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.sufhPmRxZkVeg0u0]{Intuit Flaw} 与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dhWLI318WnUNbEKj]{Ire's Blade} 专长之中，你未用来满足 Pentad Power 先决条件的那一个。若你已拥有上述四个专长中的任何一个，你可以立即将其重训。

Your continued parallel study into mental attacks forms has allowed you to learn offensive techniques from all five aspects. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.FSp7cvVo6KrGYmAk]{Phantasmal Barrage} feat, the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ne1PdopyXUh9LPfx]{Twist Reason} feat, the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.2ucsyvUntIehFGkr]{Connect Hearts} feat, and whichever of the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.sufhPmRxZkVeg0u0]{Intuit Flaw} and @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dhWLI318WnUNbEKj]{Ire's Blade} feats you didn't use to meet the Prerequisites for Pentad Power. If you already have any of those four feats, you can immediately retrain them.

Overmind Dedication.name: 超心智奉献 Overmind Dedication
Overmind Dedication.description:
你的精神力量已经扩展到足以真正被称为超心智。你的思维过程在凡世与认知领域间旅行，因此你学会了如何重新聚焦自己以利用这一事实。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.ViLvoke1fpTVKbuh]{Recenter} 动作，以及 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TZnjvtFYwsv5YMPa]{Ironclad Insight} 或 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.O92xuko846wVwvZo]{Labyrinth of Forking Thoughts} 之一作为加值专长，即使你不满足该专长的等级先决条件（但你必须满足其他先决条件）。

Your mental powers have expanded to the point that you can truly be called an overmind. Your thought processes travel across the mortal and the cognitive realms, and so you've learned how to recenter yourself in order to take advantage of that fact. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.ViLvoke1fpTVKbuh]{Recenter} action, as well as either @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.TZnjvtFYwsv5YMPa]{Ironclad Insight} or @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.O92xuko846wVwvZo]{Labyrinth of Forking Thoughts} as a bonus feat, even if you don't meet the feat's level prerequisite (though you must meet the other prerequisites).

Throw Ally.name: 投掷盟友 Throw Ally
Throw Ally.description:
需求 一名盟友在你的触及内，且你有一只或更多手空闲。

你抓住你的盟友并将其掷出，以令人印象深刻的力量将其发射穿越战场。抱起一个与你相邻、体型与你相同或更小的盟友，并将其投掷到你能看见的、30尺内的一处未被占据的空间（若其体型至少比你小两级，则为40尺内）。其移动不会触发反应动作。你的盟友以站立姿势结束此次移动，且不会因坠落而受到伤害，除非你将其投掷到比其起始方格低10尺或更多的方格中。

Requirements An ally is within your reach, and you have one or more hands free.

You grab your ally and throw them, launching them across the battlefield in an act of impressive strength. Pick up an adjacent ally of your size or smaller and throw them to an unoccupied space you can see within 30 feet (or within 40 feet if they are at least two sizes smaller than you). Their movement doesn't trigger reactions. Your ally ends this movement on their feet and doesn't take damage from the fall unless you hurl them into a square 10 or more feet lower than the square they started in.

Read Demise.name: 阅读终结 Read Demise
Read Demise.description:
你已恢复了足够的力量，能够读出将一名生物引向死亡的愈发凝聚的命运。选择你自己或一名盟友，然后选择你想采取的一个特定行动方案。你花费10分钟阅读这条命运路线，使你能捕捉到最远未来30分钟内死亡的片段。GM暗中掷骰一次 @Check[flat|dc:6]。若为失败，GM总是说出“安全”。若为成功，GM会根据他们的最佳判断揭示“安全”（若他们认为该行动方案不会令所选生物遭遇特别危险的结果）或“死亡”（若他们认为该行动方案可能令所选生物遭遇危险）。为了让回答为“死亡”，该危险并不需要有特别高的概率真正杀死所选生物；它只需要是显著的危险即可。“读取死亡”不会因该行动在克服危险后可能带来良好结果而改变其结果；它只预测危险。

You've regained enough of your power to be able to read the thickening fate that leads to a creature's demise. Choose yourself or an ally and then a specific course of action you'd like to take. You spend 10 minutes reading the course of fate, allowing you to catch glimpses of death from up to 30 minutes in the future. The GM rolls a secret @Check[flat|dc:6]. On a failure, the GM always says "safety." On a success, the GM reveals their best guess of either "safety" if they think the course of action wouldn't lead to a particularly dangerous outcome for the chosen creature or "death" if they think the course of action might lead to danger for the chosen creature. The danger doesn't need to have an especially high chance of actually killing the chosen creature in order for the response to be "death," it just needs to be a significant danger. Read Demise doesn't change its results based on whether the action might lead to a good result if the danger is overcome; it only predicts danger.

Calming Presence.name: 安抚存在 Calming Presence
Calming Presence.description:
频率 每日一次

你以一种抚慰性的存在包围自身，安抚任何接近你的人的情绪。持续1分钟，你在自身周围获得一个半径为@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]的安抚存在灵光。进入灵光的敌人或在灵光内开始其回合的敌人（或在你启动时就在灵光内的敌人）必须尝试一次@Check[will|against:class-spell]豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，结果如下。之后，它们获得持续1分钟的暂时免疫。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受该存在影响。

成功 只要该生物仍处于灵光内，以及离开后1轮内，该生物的攻击掷骰与其敌对效果的DC承受–1状态减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.yQS3xeZd4Srn7mqZ]{效果：安抚存在}

失败 任何将会影响该生物的情绪效果都会被压制，并且只要该生物仍处于灵光内，以及离开后1轮内，该生物不能使用敌对动作。若该生物受到任何其他生物的敌对行为影响，则该效果降低为成功的效果。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但敌对行为不会降低该效果。

Frequency once per day

You surround yourself with a soothing presence that calms the emotions of any who approach you. For 1 minute, you gain a calming presence aura in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] around you. Enemies who enter the aura or begin their turn within the aura (or are in the aura when you activate it) must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC with the following results. Afterwards, they are temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected by the presence.

Success The creature takes a –1 status penalty to their attack rolls and the DCs of their hostile effects for as long as they remain in the aura, and for 1 round after they leave.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.yQS3xeZd4Srn7mqZ]{Effect: Calming Presence}

Failure Any emotion effects that would affect the creature are suppressed and the creature can't use hostile actions for as long as they remain in the aura, and for 1 round after they leave. If the creature is subjected to hostility from any other creature, the effect is reduced to the effect of a success.

Critical Failure As failure, but hostility doesn't reduce the effect.

Life's Blood.name: 生命之血 Life's Blood
Life's Blood.description:
需求 自你上个回合开始以来，你已成功对一个目标使用过 Feed 动作。

你不仅仅是喜欢用新鲜的血肉来满足饥渴，你更是沉溺其中、尽情享受。你沐浴在窃取的生命之中，获得等于目标的等级的临时生命值，并在你保持满足期间持续存在。

Requirements You have successfully used the Feed action on a target since the beginning of your last turn.

You don’t merely enjoy your sating your hunger with fresh flesh and blood, you positively luxuriate in it. You bask in the stolen life, gaining temporary Hit Points equal to the target’s level that last for as long as you are satisfied.

Lunging Strike.name: 突刺打击 Lunging Strike
Lunging Strike.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你猛力突刺，导致自身过度伸展，沿一条直线对每个生物发动攻击。对位于@Template[type:line|distance:15]中的每个生物进行一次近战打击，且每次都承受–2环境减值（若你体型为巨型，则为@Template[type:line|distance:20]）。你只进行一次攻击掷骰，并将结果与每个生物的AC分别比较。此举在计算你的多重攻击减值时计为两次攻击。直到你下个回合开始前，你的AC承受–1环境减值。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

With a great thrust, you overextend yourself, launching an attack against each creature in a line. Make a melee Strike with a –2 circumstance penalty against each creature in a @Template[type:line|distance:15] (or a @Template[type:line|distance:20] if you're Huge). You only make one attack roll and compare the result to each creature's AC. This counts as two attacks for your multiple attack penalty. Until the beginning of your next turn, you take a –1 circumstance penalty to AC.

Woeful Ward.name: 悲惨守护 Woeful Ward
Woeful Ward.description:
你的眼睛可以比其他邪眼更频繁地抵御运势变化。你可以每小时使用一次 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.WMtazDweQF4bJP9q]{邪眼的守护}，而不是每天一次。

Your eye can ward off changes in luck far more often than other evil eyes. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.WMtazDweQF4bJP9q]{Evil Eye's Ward} once per hour, instead of once per day.

On Heavenly Wings.name: 天界之翼 On Heavenly Wings
On Heavenly Wings.description:
频率 每日一次

需求 你必须穿着或手持你的羽毛斗篷

你在坠落时失去了飞行的力量，但只要努力，你就能将其召回。你的斗篷会变形为你原本的翅膀，至少能维持一小段时间。这些翅膀会持续 10 分钟。在你显现翅膀期间，你获得等同于你速度的飞行速度。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You must have your cloak of feathers worn or in hand

You lost the power of flight when you fell, but with effort you can call it back. Your cloak transforms into your original wings, for a short while at least. These wings remain for 10 minutes. You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed while you've manifested your wings.

Powerful Climber.name: 强力攀登者 Powerful Climber
Powerful Climber.description:
你擅长攀爬从树木到峭壁再到高楼大厦的各种表面。你获得10英尺的攀爬速度。

特殊 如果你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.mFbcXSSPhPCL8BgB]{铁爪石像鬼}传承，则当你攀爬石质或木质表面时，你的攀爬速度提升至你的陆地速度

You're adept at scaling everything from trees to cliff faces to tall buildings. You gain a climb Speed of 10 feet.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.mFbcXSSPhPCL8BgB]{Irontalon Gargoyle} heritage, your climb Speed increases to your land Speed when climbing stone or wood surfaces

Path of Grace.name: 优雅之路 Path of Grace
Path of Grace.description:
你已在凡世逗留得足够久，明白你曾经是什么，并不必然决定你现在是什么。这意味着一个抉择——而且是重大的抉择。你可以选择继续忠于天堂，使你在对抗恶魔的所有豁免检定上获得+2环境加值。你可以选择反对天堂及其盟友——无论是作为邪恶的斗士，还是作为忠诚的反对者——使你在对抗天界生物的所有豁免检定上获得+2环境加值。或者你也可以选择走自己的道路，行于两端之间，摒弃所有神祇与所有神圣生物，使你在对抗神圣效果的所有豁免检定上获得+1环境加值。

You have spent long enough in the mortal realm to realize that what you once were need not determine what you are now. This entails a choice—a significant one. You can choose to remain loyal to Heaven, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to all saving throws against fiends. You can choose to oppose Heaven and its allies, whether as a champion of evil or as loyal opposition, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to all saving throws against celestials. Or you can choose to walk your own path, betwixt and between, shunning all gods and all creatures of the divine, gaining a +1 circumstance bonus to all saving throws against divine effects.

Minor Signatory.name: 次要签署者 Minor Signatory
Minor Signatory.description:
你与一个小型魔法生物订立了一份炼狱契约，将其束缚为你效力。你获得一个魔宠。动物的种类由你决定，但蝙蝠、老鼠与黑猫最为常见。该动物可能看起来完全无害，以便更好地充当你的间谍与仆役；或者它可能会显现出一些轻微的恶魔特征，例如在通常不会有分叉舌头的物种上长出一条分叉的舌头。

You've forged an infernal contract with a minor magical being, binding it to your service. You gain a familiar. The type of animal is up to you, but bats, rats, and black cats are most common. The animal might look completely innocuous to better act as your spy and servitor, or it might pick up some minor diabolical features, such as a forked tongue on a species that normally wouldn't have one.

Master the Winds.name: 掌握风势 Master the Winds
Master the Winds.description:
你可以随时飞行，而不再是每天一次持续10分钟。当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.e0TF6kmUPqGzcehB]{Ride the Winds} 时，你的飞行速度获得+20英尺的状态加值，持续10分钟。

特殊 当使用 Ride the Winds 时，你的速度获得的状态加值若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.bU6VWElKi0vJ0kWE]{Firmwing 石像鬼} 传承或 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.LA0NdcTlrymQLIFa]{石像鬼滑翔}，则提高为+30英尺的状态加值。

You can fly at all times, rather than just once per day for 10 minutes. When you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.e0TF6kmUPqGzcehB]{Ride the Winds}, you gain a +20-foot status bonus to your fly Speed for 10 minutes.

Special The status bonus to your Speed when using Ride the Winds increases to a +30-foot status bonus if you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.bU6VWElKi0vJ0kWE]{Firmwing Gargoyle} heritage or @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.LA0NdcTlrymQLIFa]{Gargoyle Glide}.

Swarmreach Spell.name: 群触及法术 Swarmreach Spell
Swarmreach Spell.description:
频率 每小时一次

你的育群从你体内倾泻而出，并以更远的距离传递一个法术效果。若你接下来使用的动作是施放一个具有射程且施放所需动作数为2个或更少的法术，则当你的虫群将其送达时，将该法术的射程增加30英尺。按照增加法术射程的常规规则，若该法术通常的射程为接触，则你将其射程延伸至30英尺。在你花费一个交互动作将你的育群收回体内之前，你无法使用带有swarmblood特征的动作。

Frequency once per hour

Your brood spills out from your body in a and delivers a spell effect at an increased distance. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that has a range and that requires two or fewer actions to cast, increase that spell's range by 30 feet as your swarm delivers it. As normal for increasing spell ranges, if the spell normally has a range of touch, you extend its range to 30 feet. You can't use actions with the swarmblood trait until you spend an Interact action to draw your brood back into your body.

Pinpoint Deflection.name: 精准偏转 Pinpoint Deflection
Pinpoint Deflection.description:
你已学会将有害的投射物偏转回攻击者。当你成功使用 Wing Deflection 时，作为该反应动作（）的一部分，你可以立刻对你的攻击者进行一次远程徒手打击，把他们自己的投射物反射回去。命中时，攻击者承受与被偏转的投射物本应造成的相同伤害。

You've learned to deflect harmful projectiles back at your attackers. When you successfully use Wing Deflection, as part of that reaction, you can immediately make a ranged unarmed Strike at your attacker, firing their own projectile back at them. On a hit, the attacker takes the same damage the deflected projectile would have dealt.

Sword of Flames.name: 烈焰之剑 Sword of Flames
Sword of Flames.description:
频率 每小时一次

如果你是巴利斯，这曾是你的职责：追踪罪人并给他们一个悔改的机会，让他们忏悔其罪行并寻求赎罪；而如果你是莫瓦尼克天界使者，你以谈判为起点保护未出生的灵魂。通常你会成功，但在那些你没有成功的场合，你也并非没有其他工具……包括一把炽烈火焰之剑，用来击退敌人并将其焚为灰烬。你所持握的任意武器获得 flaming 属性符文的效果，持续1分钟或直到你不再持握该武器为止。若这会使一把武器拥有超过其通常上限的属性符文数量，则其中一个既有的属性符文（由你选择）会被压制，直到该法术结束。

特殊 若你是巴利斯，且你正在与一个生物战斗，而在战斗开始前你或你的盟友曾就某项特定罪行真诚地给予其赎罪与悔改的机会且该生物拒绝了，则该专长改为赋予你 greater flaming 属性符文的效果。若你是莫瓦尼克天界使者，则你改为在对抗不死生物以及对未出生灵魂构成威胁的生物时获得此增益。

Frequency once per hour

If you're a balisse, it was once your task to track down sinners and give them a chance to repent, to confess their crimes and see atonement, and if you're a movanic deva, you protected unborn souls starting with negotiation. Usually, you were successful, but on those occasions you weren't, you were not without other tools... including a sword of blazing flame to fight off and burn your foes to cinders. Any weapon you hold gains the effects of the flaming property rune for 1 minute or until you cease holding the weapon. If this would give a weapon more property runes than its normal maximum, one of the existing property runes (you choose) is suppressed until the spell ends.

Special If you're a balisse and you're in combat with a creature that you or your allies have given a good-faith opportunity to atone and repent for a specific crime before combat began, and the creature has refused, then this feat grants you the effects of a greater flaming property rune instead. If you're a movanic deva, you gain this benefit instead against undead and creatures presenting a threat to unborn souls.

Celestial Strikes (Remaster).name: 天界打击（重制版） Celestial Strikes (Remaster)
Celestial Strikes (Remaster).description:
你的每一次接触依旧携带着天堂的威能，而你所持的任何剑都如同燃烧的烙印一般对抗不圣洁之力。你的武器与徒手打击获得圣洁（特征）特征。

Your very touch still carries with it the might of Heaven, and any sword you bear is as good as a burning brand against the forces of the unholy. Your weapon and unarmed Strikes gain the holy trait.

Wanderer's Ward.name: 漫游者的守护 Wanderer's Ward
Wanderer's Ward.description:
你曾见证天堂的至高与地狱的深渊。你曾伫立于冥界之河的河岸，并沐浴在元素位面的混沌之中。你将自身星界天使传承的益处扩展至你20尺内的所有盟友，而非仅限一名。你以及所有获得你所延伸益处的生物，也获得对抗环境危害时AC与豁免的+2环境加值。

You have seen the heights of Heaven and the depths of Hell. You have stood at the banks of the rivers of the underworld and bathed in the chaos of the elemental planes. You extend the benefit of your astral deva heritage to all allies within 20 feet of you rather than just one. You and all creatures to which you extend the benefits also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and saves against environmental hazards.

Accursed Ferocity.name: 诅咒凶暴 Accursed Ferocity
Accursed Ferocity.description:
需求 你处于满足状态

饥饿为你提供动力，你如旋风般发动攻击。进行两次打击，对每次打击照常施加你的多重攻击减值。你不再处于满足状态。
