Requirements You are satisfied

With your hunger fueling you, you attack like a whirlwind. Make two Strikes, applying your multiple attack penalty to each Strike normally. You’re no longer satisfied.

Quick Feed.name: 快速进食 Quick Feed
Quick Feed.description:
你可以以极快的速度啃咬脆弱的敌人。你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.WkmevswChLkVVFkp]{Feed} 行动仅需一个单动作，而非两个动作。

You can gnaw on a vulnerable foe with great haste. Your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.WkmevswChLkVVFkp]{Feed} activity takes only a single action, instead of two actions.

Lingering Toxin.name: 余毒 Lingering Toxin
Lingering Toxin.description:
当你用毒刺打出一记致命一击时，你会在敌人体内留下持续的毒素。当你以毒刺徒手攻击造成大成功时，敌人受到 1d4 持续毒素伤害。

When you achieve a telling blow with your stinger, you leave lingering poison within your foe's body. On a critical hit with your stinger unarmed attack, the foe takes 1d4 persistent poison damage.

Stolen Shape.name: 被盗形态 Stolen Shape
Stolen Shape.description:
血液记得它从何而来。若你已成功对一名具有类人生物（特征）的生物使用你的进食能力，且你仍然从该 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.WkmevswChLkVVFkp]{进食}中处于满足状态，则当你以无阻行走进行变形时，你可以改为化作其形态并@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{伪装}成他们，而非仅仅采取人类形态。若你如此做，当你不再满足时，你会立刻变回你的拉弥亚形态。当你处于另一名生物的形态时，你的变形不会自动战胜用于判定你是否为那个人的察觉DC，不过它仍会如同无阻行走的常规效果那样，战胜用于判定你是否为合适的类人生物类型的察觉DC。

The blood remembers where it came from. If you have successfully used your Feed ability on a creature with the humanoid trait and are still satisfied from that @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.WkmevswChLkVVFkp]{Feed}, you can assume their form and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} them when you transform with Walk Unhindered, instead of simply adopting a human form. If you do, you immediately transform into your lamia form when you are no longer satisfied. While in another creature’s form, your transformation doesn’t automatically defeat Perception DCs to determine if you are that person, though it still defeats Perception DCs to determine if you’re the appropriate type of humanoid as normal for Walk Unhindered.

Alpha or Omega.name: 阿尔法或欧米伽 Alpha or Omega
Alpha or Omega.description:
虽然这种情况在狼人中最为常见，但无论你的类狼人传承为何，你都学会了如何利用自己在族群中处于头位或末位的身份。选择阿尔法或欧米伽，取决于你是带领你的盟友，还是你的盟友带领你。如果你选择阿尔法，当进行探索时，在你带领且盟友正在@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{跟随专家}时，若你在适用的技能上为专家，你给予+3环境加值而非+2；若你为大师，则给予+4环境加值。如果你选择欧米伽，当进行探索时，在你正在@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{跟随专家}时，若带领你的盟友在适用的技能上为专家，你获得+3环境加值而非+2；若带领你的盟友为大师，则你获得+3环境加值。

While most common in werewolves, regardless of your werecreature heritage, you've learned how to take advantage of being the top or bottom place in the pack. Choose alpha or omega. depending on whether you lead your allies or your allies lead you. If you choose alpha, while exploring, when you are leading and allies are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tfa4Sh7wcxCEqL29]{Following the Expert}, you grant a +3 circumstance bonus instead of +2 if you're an expert in the applicable skill, and a +4 circumstance bonus if you're a master. If you choose omega, while exploring, when you are Following the Expert, you gain a +3 circumstance bonus instead of +2 if your ally leading you is an expert in the applicable skill, and a +3 circumstance bonus if your ally leading you is a master.

Uncanny Perception.name: 超自然察觉 Uncanny Perception
Uncanny Perception.description:
你的视觉敏锐到极致，以至于强化了你所有的察觉能力，不仅帮助你注意到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐蔽}的生物，还能让你通过细微表情识破谎言。你获得用于察觉的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.i4yRvVwvXbGZDsD1]{精明悟性}专长。

Your visual acuity is so intense that it heightens all your powers of perception, not only helping you notice @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} creatures but also allowing you to spot lies through microexpressions. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.i4yRvVwvXbGZDsD1]{Canny Acumen} feat for Perception.

Eyes on the Back of Your Eye.name: 眼中之眼的后方注视 Eyes on the Back of Your Eye
Eyes on the Back of Your Eye.description:
你的额外眼睛分布在全身各处，其中一些长在可以转动的眼柄上，让你能够从各个角度观察自身，使得除了最狡猾的敌人之外，几乎没人能包围你。你不会被等级与你相同或更低的生物夹击。

Your extra eyes are placed all around your body, including on stalks that you can pivot to cover yourself from every angle, making it very difficult for all but the sneakiest foes to surround you. You can't be flanked by creatures of your level or lower.

Falling Branch.name: 坠落树枝 Falling Branch
Falling Branch.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{跃} 并从你跃的最高点向下落向一名至少在你下方10英尺的敌人，然后对该生物进行一次近战打击，造成1d8额外伤害。若你在攻击掷骰中大失败，你受到 @Damage[1d8[bludgeoning]] 伤害并倒下为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

Frequency once per minute

You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.d5I6018Mci2SWokk]{Leap} and drop downward toward an enemy at least 10 feet below you from the apex of your Leap, and then make a melee Strike against that creature, dealing 1d8 additional damage. If you critically fail the attack roll, you take @Damage[1d8[bludgeoning]] damage and fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Peerless Acuity.name: 无双敏锐 Peerless Acuity
Peerless Acuity.description:
即使某物被隐藏或遮蔽，你也总能注意到一些细微的视觉线索，让你轻松精确定位其位置。你无需成功进行纯骰检定即可以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}生物为目标，而以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}生物为目标时，你只需要成功进行一次@Check[type:flat|dc:5]。

Even when something is hidden or obscured, you can always spot small visual cues that make it easy for you to pinpoint their positioning. You don't need to succeed at a flat check to target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} creatures, and you only need to succeed at a @Check[type:flat|dc:5] to target @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} creatures.

Verdant Rampage.name: 翠绿狂暴 Verdant Rampage
Verdant Rampage.description:
频率 每日一次

你借用大地的力量、阳光的威能，以及你的根系在一整天中储存的能量，向前横冲直撞，践踏阻挡在路上的敌人。你进行两次跨步，穿过你道路上任意生物的空间，对这些生物造成 @Damage[16d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] 伤害，并让其进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免，豁免DC取你的职业DC与法术DC之中较高者；若该生物体型小于你且在豁免中大失败，则其还会被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。你的移动不会触发反应动作。

Frequency once per day

You draw upon the strength of the earth, the power of sunlight, and the energy stored within your roots throughout the day to rampage forth and trample the foes who stand in the way. You Stride twice, moving through the spaces of any creatures in your way, dealing those creatures @Damage[16d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC; if the creature is smaller than you and critically fails their save, they're also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Your movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Powerful Swimmer.name: 强力游泳者 Powerful Swimmer
Powerful Swimmer.description:
你已经学会在水中以优雅与自信进行机动。你获得等同于你陆地速度的游泳速度。

You've learned to maneuver with grace and confidence in the water. You gain a swim Speed equal to your land Speed.

Cross Training.name: 交叉训练 Cross Training
Cross Training.description:
你一生都与自己融合的其他成员共同生活，因此你在这一路上学会了他们的一些技巧也不足为奇。你获得你融合中另一名成员的一个主要职业的多职业奉献专长，即使你通常要等到从你当前的变体中再获得更多专长后才能选择另一个奉献专长，即使你不满足该变体的属性调整值先决条件。

You've lived with the other members of your fusion your entire life, so it's no surprise that you've picked up some of their tricks along the way. You gain the multiclass dedication feat for one of the main classes of another member of your fusion, even if you normally couldn't take another dedication feat until you take more feats from your current archetype and even if you don't meet the archetypes attribute modifier prerequisite.

Accumulated Hunger.name: 积攒的饥饿 Accumulated Hunger
Accumulated Hunger.description:
当你对一个已经处于该诅咒效果影响下的生物使用诅咒爱抚时，你可以将其进一步推进你那被诅咒的饥饿所带来的渴求深处。即使你尚未满足，你也可以对处于该诅咒效果影响下的生物使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.BBoW3Vhh9uKvEVkC]{Accursed Caress}。如果受影响的目标在对抗你诅咒爱抚的额外豁免中失败，其 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} 呆滞（状态）的状态值增加 1（最高至 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}）。

When you use Accursed Caress on a creature already under the curse’s effects, you can drive them deeper into the cravings of your accursed hunger. You can use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.BBoW3Vhh9uKvEVkC]{Accursed Caress} on a creature under the curse’s effects even if you aren’t satisfied. If the affected target fails additional saves against your Accursed Caress, the condition value for their @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} condition increases by 1 (to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4}).

The Better to Eat You With.name: 吃你更方便 The Better to Eat You With
The Better to Eat You With.description:
你已将牙齿磨得几乎像剃刀般锋利，并能用蛮力用它们抓住生物。你的混合形态的颚部徒手攻击获得擒抱特征。你在选择此专长时也可以选择将其伤害骰从d6提高至d8；若你如此做，该徒手攻击失去灵巧特征。

You have sharpened your teeth to an almost razor-like edge and can grab creatures with them using brute strength. Your hybrid form's jaws unarmed attack gains the grapple trait. You can also choose to increase their damage die from d6 to d8 when you take this feat; if you do, the unarmed attack loses the finesse trait.

Twist Reason.name: 扭曲理由 Twist Reason
Twist Reason.description:
需求 你为“重聚焦：理性”状态

你将理性的岔路扭转缠绕于敌人周身，形成如同圈套与陷阱般的心灵连接，在你沿着奥术思维的轨迹分析其一举一动的同时，阻滞其心智、敏捷或生命力的循环。选择120尺内的一名敌人以扭曲其理性，结果取决于一次对其意志DC进行的 @Check[occultism|against:will] 检定。你消耗你的重聚焦状态。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.2N2FSvfUR26i72af]{效果: 扭曲理性}

大成功或大失败 成功 你将理性在敌人周围压皱、扭曲并拉伸变形，并彻底解析其模式，使你与盟友能够充分利用局势的一切优势。该敌人在你下个回合结束前，其攻击掷骰、AC、豁免与察觉承受–2环境减值。

成功 你已足够扭曲敌人周围的理性，从而分析并利用其攻击或其最重要的防御。该敌人在你下个回合结束前，以下由你选择的一项承受–2环境减值：其攻击掷骰、AC、强韧豁免、反射豁免、意志豁免或察觉。

失败 你仅仅勉强在一次理性的扭转中钩住了敌人的防御模式。在你下个回合结束前的一次机会中，你可以在掷骰前触发的自由动作（）中选择令该敌人以下之一承受–2环境减值：一次攻击掷骰；其针对一次攻击的AC；一次强韧豁免；一次反射豁免；一次意志豁免；一次察觉检定；或其针对一次效果的强韧、察觉、反射或意志DC。一旦你使用此增益，钩挂即会松脱。

大成功或大失败 失败 你尚无法将理性扭转缠绕于敌人周围，但作为交换，你不消耗你的重聚焦状态。

Requirements You are Recentered to reason

You twist the forking paths of reason around your foe, forming mental connections like snares and traps that hinder your foe's mind, agility, or lifeforce circulation while analyzing their every move along the patterns of occult thought. Choose an enemy within 120 feet to twist their reason, with results depending on an @Check[occultism|against:will] check against their Will DC. You expend your Recentered state.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.2N2FSvfUR26i72af]{Effect: Twist Reason}

Critical Success You crumple, warp, and distort reason around your foe and analyze their patterns completely, allowing you and your allies to take every advantage of the situation. The foe takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls, AC, saving throws, and Perception until the end of your next turn.

Success You twist reason around your foe enough to analyze and exploit their attacks or their most important defense. The foe takes a –2 circumstance penalty to your choice of their attack rolls, AC, Fortitude saving throws, Reflex saving throws, Will saving throws, or Perception until the end of your next turn.

Failure You just barely snag your foe's defensive patterns upon a twist of reason. Once before the end of your next turn, as a free action triggered before rolling, you can choose to give the foe a –2 circumstance penalty to one of the following: a single attack roll; their AC against a single attack; a single Fortitude saving throw; a single Reflex saving throw; a single Will saving throw; a single Perception check; or their Fortitude, Perception, Reflex, or Will DC against a single effect. Once you use this benefit, the snag comes loose.

Critical Failure You weren't able to twist reason around your foe yet, but in exchange you don't expend your Recentered state.

Silken Rope.name: 丝绸绳索 Silken Rope
Silken Rope.description:
你用自己的头发编织出一条魔法绳索，其中蕴含着你意志的一部分。这条绳索的效果等同于一把 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.f1gwoTkf3Nn0v3PN]{Whip}，并且可以像平常一样用符文进行附魔。你受训于这条 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-features.Item.GZRczivFJITJDbzP]{Silken Rope}。每当你在另一把武器上获得专家或更高的熟练度时，你也会在这条丝绸绳索上获得相同的熟练度。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.neWySy654cyjfHzT]{Ensnare} 动作。

You've woven a magical rope from your hair, which possesses a fragment of your will. This functions as a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.f1gwoTkf3Nn0v3PN]{Whip}, and can be enchanted with runes as normal. You are trained with this @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-features.Item.GZRczivFJITJDbzP]{Silken Rope}. Whenever you gain expert or higher proficiency with another weapon, you gain the same proficiency with this silken rope. In addition, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.neWySy654cyjfHzT]{Ensnare} action.

Plague Swarm.name: 瘟疫虫群 Plague Swarm
Plague Swarm.description:
你的育群有时会带回瘟疫与疾病，让它们无害地在你体内流经，为你接种并增强你身体的免疫反应。每当你对一种持续中的疾病进行强韧豁免并成功时，你将其阶段降低2；若对抗的是剧毒疾病，则降低1。你对一种持续中的疾病达成的大成功或大失败中的大成功会将其阶段降低3；若对抗的是剧毒疾病，则降低2。

Your brood sometimes brings in plagues and diseases to course through your body harmlessly, inoculating you and boosting your body's immune response. Each time you succeed at a Fortitude save against an ongoing disease, you reduce its stage by 2, or by 1 against a virulent disease. Each critical success you achieve against an ongoing disease reduces its stage by 3, or by 2 against a virulent disease.

Toppling Tail.name: 倾倒尾击 Toppling Tail
Toppling Tail.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你以尾巴画圈猛甩，使你周围的所有人都翻滚着摔倒在地。对你近战触及范围内的每个敌人各进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}。每次绊摔都计入你的多重攻击减值，但在你完成所有攻击之前不要增加你的减值。

特殊 若你同时拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.8V9MmYoCEwe0dHfF]{甩尾石像鬼}传承以及尾巴的徒手攻击，则当你同时使用一只空手与尾巴时，你在进行绊摔的运动检定上获得+1环境加值。

Frequency once per minute

You lash your tail in a circle, sending everyone around you tumbling to the ground. Make a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} against each enemy within your melee reach. Each Trip counts toward your multiple attack penalty, but do not increase your penalty until you have made all your attacks.

Special If you have both the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.8V9MmYoCEwe0dHfF]{Lashingtail Gargoyle} heritage and a tail unarmed attack you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to Trip when you use both a free hand and your tail.

Piercing Spray.name: 穿刺喷射 Piercing Spray
Piercing Spray.description:
频率 每日一次

你可以向你的敌人发射一阵倒刺（如果你是哈马图拉）或骨片（如果你是奥西鲁斯），在一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内造成 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d8)[piercing]] 伤害，并进行一次 @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] 豁免，DC 取你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。若大失败，一名生物还会受到 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))[bleed]] 伤害。11级以及之后每2级，伤害提高1d8，且在大失败时造成的持续流血伤害提高1，最高在19级时达到10d8穿刺伤害与10点持续流血伤害。

Frequency once per day

You can launch a spray of barbs (if you're a hamatula) or bone shards (if you're an osyluth) at your foes, dealing @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d8)[piercing]] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], with a @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell|basic:true] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a critical failure, a creature also takes @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))[bleed]] damage. At 11th level and every 2 levels thereafter, the damage increases by 1d8 and the persistent bleed damage on a critical failure increases by 1, to a maximum of 10d8 piercing damage and 10 persistent bleed damage at 19th level.

Cerebral Superiority.name: 脑力优越 Cerebral Superiority
Cerebral Superiority.description:
你天生的心灵魔法与专精的施法者一样强大，但你没有足够的神秘耐力来施放像那些专精者一样多的法术。你在秘术法术DC和法术攻击掷骰方面成为专家。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R9xqCBblkS5KE4y7] 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi] 法术各作为秘术天生法术每日施放一次。你也可以在进食大脑时用与 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.AVeWdfpCMz0hn2x1]{Cerebral Secrets} 的法术相同的方式将它们替换掉，用一个5环法术替换 sending，并用一个6环法术替换 mislead。

Your innate psychic magic is as powerful as a specialized spellcaster's can be, though you don't have the mystical stamina to pull off as many spells as those specialists. You become an expert in occult spell DCs and spell attack rolls. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R9xqCBblkS5KE4y7] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.WPXzPl7YbMEIGWfi] spells each once per day as occult innate spells. You can swap them out when eating brains in the same way as the spells from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.AVeWdfpCMz0hn2x1]{Cerebral Secrets}, swapping sending for a 5th-rank spell and mislead for a 6th-rank spell.

Blessed Blood (Remaster).name: 受祝福之血（再制版） Blessed Blood (Remaster)
Blessed Blood (Remaster).description:
你或许已经堕落，但你的血液仍带有天堂的香气——其效果与 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.z9T4c1hXwOotsMCp]{圣水} 类似，令许多怪物颇为苦恼。每当恶魔、不死生物，或具有对神圣弱点的生物饮下你的血，或用颚、獠牙或类似攻击对你造成穿刺或挥砍伤害时，该生物受到 @Damage[1d6[spirit]] 伤害。你在使用自己的血作为原料之一来 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{制作} 圣水 时，进行制造检定获得 +4 环境加值。

You may have fallen, but your blood still has the waft of Heaven about it—functioning similarly to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.z9T4c1hXwOotsMCp]{Holy Water}, to many a monster's dismay. Whenever a fiend, undead, or creature with a weakness to holy drinks your blood or deals piercing or slashing damage to you with jaws, fangs, or a similar attack, that creature takes @Damage[1d6[spirit]] damage. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus to Crafting checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft} holy water using your own blood as one of the ingredients.

Protector Arboreal.name: 守护者·树灵 Protector Arboreal
Protector Arboreal.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你的家谱里可能有一两棵守护树，但就算没有，你也训练自己在相邻的盟友遭受攻击时挺身而出为其挡下。每当一个相邻的盟友因一次打击而受到伤害时，你通过将自身的一部分挡在攻击前方来代替其承受该伤害。此效果持续1分钟，或直到你为自身每个等级拦截了5点伤害为止，以先发生者为准；如果你在一次攻击的过程中途中达到伤害上限，则原本的目标承受剩余的伤害。该伤害上限不受任何你可能拥有的会增加或减少所受伤害的抗力、弱点或能力影响。例如，如果你从一把燃烧战斧的攻击中拦截了10点挥砍伤害和5点火焰伤害，并且你对斧类有弱点5且对火焰有弱点5，那么尽管你最终承受了25点伤害，你也只消耗了你守护树灵上限中的15点伤害。类似地，如果你拦截了10点钝击伤害但你对钝击有抗力10，那么即使你没有受到任何伤害，你仍会从你的守护树灵上限中消耗10点伤害。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You might have a protector tree or two in your family tree, but even if you don't, you've trained yourself to interpose for your adjacent allies when they're being attacked. Whenever an adjacent ally takes damage from a Strike, you take the damage instead by interposing parts of yourself in front of the attack. This effect lasts for 1 minute or until you intercept 5 damage for each level you have, whichever comes first; if you hit the damage limit partway through an attack, the original target takes the remaining damage. This damage limit isn't affected by any resistances, weaknesses, or abilities you might have that increase or decrease the incoming damage. For example, if you intercepted 10 slashing damage and 5 fire damage from a flaming battleaxe and had weakness 5 to axes and weakness 5 to fire, even though you took 25 damage in the end, you only used up 15 damage from your Protector Arboreal limit. Similarly, if you intercepted 10 bludgeoning damage but had resistance 10 to bludgeoning, you would still use up 10 damage from your Protector Arboreal limit even though you took no damage.

Visual Initiative.name: 视觉先攻 Visual Initiative
Visual Initiative.description:
你的邪眼视野极为敏锐，在战斗中任何人都很难对你抢得先机，因为在你甚至还没能有意识地注意到之前，你的潜意识就已捕捉到细微的线索。你在使用察觉进行先攻掷骰时获得+2环境加值，并且你在所有先攻的平局中获胜。

Your evil eye vision is so discerning, it's tough for anyone to get the drop on you in combat, since you pick up on little clues in your subconscious before you can even consciously notice them. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus on initiative rolls using Perception, and you win all ties on initiative.

Frenzy of the Moon.name: 月之狂乱 Frenzy of the Moon
Frenzy of the Moon.description:
频率 每日一次

无论你身在何处或一天中的什么时刻，满月的念头都会让你陷入狂乱。你变形为你的混合形态（若你尚未如此）并在1分钟内，以你的混合形态的徒手攻击造成的伤害获得+2环境加值。之后，你在10分钟内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}。如果你拥有强力重击缠手带，此伤害的环境加值提高至+3；若你拥有强力极致重击缠手带，则提高至+4。

特殊 在满月的光照下，你可以每小时使用一次月之狂乱，而不是每日一次。

Frequency once per day

No matter where you are or what time of day it is, the thought of the full moon sends you into a frenzy. You Change Shape into your hybrid form (if you aren't already) and gain a +2 circumstance bonus to damage with your hybrid form's unarmed attacks for 1 minute. Afterward, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 10 minutes. If you have a greater striking handwraps of mighty blows, this circumstance bonus to damage increases to +3, or to +4 if you have a major striking handwraps of mighty blows.

Special Under the light of the full moon, you can use Frenzy of the Moon once per hour instead of once per day.

Amplify Forest.name: 强化森林 Amplify Forest
Amplify Forest.description:
频率 每分钟一次

触发 一名植物盟友对相邻的生物进行一次打击。

如同萨马兰人一样，你学会了如何运用你对翠绿植被的力量在战斗中协助其他植物。你对进行打击的植物盟友使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{援助}，即使你之前没有准备好援助。

Frequency once per minute

Trigger A plant ally makes a Strike against an adjacent creature.

Like a samaran, you've learned how to use your power over verdure to assist other plants in combat. You @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} the Striking plant ally, even if you hadn't prepared to Aid.

Devour Expertise.name: 吞噬专精 Devour Expertise
Devour Expertise.description:
你能从他人的大脑中吞噬比通常更深层的技能知识，使你能在被吞噬的技能或学科上立刻成为专家。你在你已受训的一项自选技能上成为专家。当你吃下一个大脑，并通过 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.itU0Gpaj8AK3jfZi]{Devour Skill} 或 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-features.Item.TTvk7aATqypaUkmP] 替换一个技能，且你所吃的大脑的生物至少为5级时，你即使已经是该技能的专家也可以替换该技能（但如果你在该技能上是大师或传奇，则仍然不能替换）。若你选择如此做，你在该技能上变为未受训，并在你吞噬到的新技能上成为专家。

You can devour deeper skill knowledge than normal from the brains of others, allowing you to become an instant expert in the devoured skill or subject. You become an expert in one skill of your choice in which you are trained. When you eat a brain and swap out a skill from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.itU0Gpaj8AK3jfZi]{Devour Skill} or @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-features.Item.TTvk7aATqypaUkmP] and the creature whose brain you ate was at least 5th level, you can swap out a skill even if you're an expert in that skill (though you still can't swap it out if you're a master or legendary in the skill). If you choose to do so, you become untrained in that skill and become an expert in the new skill you devoured.

Shared Vigilance.name: 共享警戒 Shared Vigilance
Shared Vigilance.description:
触发 你即将掷骰先攻，且你的融合中至少有一名成员以察觉掷骰先攻。

你与融合的其他成员彼此照应，最先注意到危险的人会停下来，确保最不善观察的人也已准备好一起行动。你的融合的三名成员都掷骰先攻，然后你们三人取居中的结果，在同一先攻值上依次行动。若三项结果各不相同，“居中”结果即既非最高也非最低的那项；若其中两项或三项结果相同，“居中”结果即该重复的结果。例如，若你们三人的掷骰结果为25、22与16，你们将在先攻22行动；若掷骰结果为25、25与16，你们将在先攻25行动。

Trigger You're about to roll initiative and at least one member of your fusion is rolling Perception for initiative.

You and the other members of your fusion look out for each other, with the first to notice a danger pausing to make sure the least observant is ready to act together. All three members of your fusion roll initiative, and then all three of you take the result in the middle, acting one after the other at the same initiative. If all three results are different, the "middle" result is that result that is neither the highest nor the lowest, and if two or all three results are the same, the "middle" result is the repeated result. For example, if the three of you rolled results of 25, 22, and 16, you would act at initiative 22, and if you rolled results of 25, 25, and 16, you would act at initiative 25.

Traveler's Aura.name: 旅者灵光 Traveler's Aura
Traveler's Aura.description:
频率 每日一次

作为一名星界天使，你可以产生一道灵光来保护旅行者免受任何敌对环境的侵害，并且你能察觉到你灵光内其他人发起的攻击。你的旅行者灵光半径为20英尺，持续1分钟。你和处于你灵光内的盟友会受到保护，免于来自任何位面的环境所造成的环境伤害，包括严重与极端的高温和低温，但并非能免疫所有环境危害与其他此类危险。对于处于此灵光内的生物，你永远不会 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。

Frequency once per day

As an astral deva, you can produce an aura to protect travelers from any hostile environment, and you're aware of attacks coming from others within your aura. Your traveler's aura is a 20-foot radius and lasts for 1 minute. You and allies in your aura are protected from ambient environmental damage from any plane, including severe and extreme heat and cold, though not from all environmental hazards and other such dangers. You are never @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to creatures within this aura.

Brain Blast.name: 脑部爆破 Brain Blast
Brain Blast.description:
你已经学会如何从大脑中发射灵能冲击。你获得一次脑部冲击徒手攻击，其造成1d4精神伤害，射程增量为20英尺。你的脑部冲击徒手攻击属于斗殴武器组。

特殊 若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.Qnviek28jEy2KSm3] 传承，则你现有的脑部冲击不采用通常的效果：其伤害提升至1d6并获得20英尺的射程增量，且每次你使用它时，若你愿意，你可以选择令其获得非致命（特征）。

You've learned how to shoot psychic blasts from your brain. You gain a brain blast unarmed attack, which deals 1d4 mental damage with a range increment of 20 feet. Your brain blast unarmed attack is in the brawling weapon group.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-heritages.Item.Qnviek28jEy2KSm3] heritage, instead of the normal effects, your existing brain blast increases its damage to 1d6 and gains a range increment of 20 feet, and you can choose to give it the nonlethal trait if you wish each time you use it.

Language of the Beast.name: 野兽语言 Language of the Beast
Language of the Beast.description:
通过嚎叫与咕哝，你能够与这个世界上许多与你共享形态的动物交流。你可以向与自身动物形态相对应的动物以及相似的野兽（例如狼人对应的犬科与狼科野兽）提问、获得回答，并对其使用交涉（技能）；你在此类交涉检定中获得+1环境加值。GM决定哪些动物算作符合此能力的对象。

With howls and grunts, you can communicate with the many animals of the world whose shape you share. You can ask questions of, receive answers from, and use the Diplomacy skill with animals that correspond to your animal form as well as with similar beasts (such as canine and lupine beasts for a werewolf), and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to such Diplomacy checks. The GM determines which animals count for this ability.

Fluttering Heart.name: 颤动之心 Fluttering Heart
Fluttering Heart.description:
你的子嗣一齐出现并同时拍动翅膀，带着你的身体短暂飞行。你飞行。若你没有飞行速度，则在“扑翼之心”期间你获得15尺的飞行速度。若你在移动结束时不在坚实地面上，你会坠落。

Your brood all emerge and flap their wings at once to carry your body for a brief flight. You Fly. If you don't have a fly Speed, you gain a fly Speed of 15 feet for Fluttering Heart. If you aren't on solid ground at the end of your movement, you fall.

Energetic Assault.name: 充能突击 Energetic Assault
Energetic Assault.description:
你对某一类魔法能量产生了亲和力，当你打出关键性一击时，它会从你的攻击中爆发而出。通常这种亲和力在同一融合的成员之间各不相同，有时也与成员的性格相符（例如冷静理性的成员选择寒冷伤害，而火爆冲动的成员选择火焰伤害）。选择酸蚀、寒冷、电击或火焰。当你用徒手攻击或近战武器攻击造成大成功时，你对你攻击的目标造成所选类型的1d4持续性伤害。

You've developed an affinity to a particular type of magical energy that explodes out of your attacks when you strike a telling blow. Often this affinity is different among members of the same fusion, and it sometimes matches the members' personalities (with a cold analytical member choosing cold damage and a fiery hotheaded member choosing fire damage). Choose acid, cold, electricity, or fire. On a critical hit with an unarmed attack or melee weapon attack, you deal 1d4 persistent damage of the chosen type to the target of your attack.

Cerebrophage Lore.name: 噬脑魔传闻 Cerebrophage Lore
Cerebrophage Lore.description:
你了解自己身体诡异的灵能本质，也了解身体与大脑是如何构造与组合的。你获得奥秘学与医药学的受训（熟练度）。如果你会自动在其中一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训（熟练度）。你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长，用于脑食者学识。

You understand the weird psychic nature of your own body as well as the way bodies and brains are put together. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Occultism and Medicine. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Cerebrophage Lore.

Unfallen.name: 未堕者 Unfallen
Unfallen.description:
频率 每日一次

坠落从你身上夺走了许多，但仍有些许天堂的火花萦绕不散。在最危急的时刻，你会想起自己曾经是什么——至少持续短短片刻。每位天使的回忆时刻各不相同，但通常伴随着炫目的光芒与天使号角的声音。除非成功通过一次对抗你职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）的@Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell]豁免，否则你周围10尺内的每个生物都会在1轮内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{失聪}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

如果你原本为中型或更小体型，你变为大型，且你的触及增加5尺（如果你不知为何起初为超小型，则增加10尺）。你必须有足够的空间来扩展，否则该效果失效。你还获得以下益处：

  • 40点临时生命值。
  • 一项等同于你速度的飞行速度。
  • 对抗魔法的豁免获得+1状态加值。
  • 黑暗视觉。
  • 你的拳击攻击造成2d8伤害。
  • 你的徒手攻击与武器攻击额外造成1点善良伤害。

你的未堕形态外观大致与你坠落前相似，你保持该形态1分钟。在你的未堕形态期间，你可以将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{生命之息}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.hVU9msO9yGkxKZ3J]{神圣之怒}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYD0XZ4t3tQq6shc]{狂热信念}作为6环神圣先天法术施放；每次使用本专长时，每个法术各可施放一次。

当你从未堕形态中现出时，你会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{枯竭3}。

特殊 你获得对邪恶的弱点10，并且能够承受邪恶伤害，即使你不是善良阵营。即使你不处于未堕形态时，此效果也适用。

Frequency once per day

The fall took much from you, but some spark of Heaven lingers. In times of dire need, you remember what you once were—for a few moments, at least. Each angel's moment of recollection is different, but typically includes blinding light and the sound of angelic trumpets. Every creature within 10 feet of you is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round unless they succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

If you were Medium or smaller, you become Large and your reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if you somehow started out Tiny). You must have space to expand into, or the effect is lost. You also gain the following benefits:

  • 40 temporary Hit Points.
  • A fly Speed equal to your Speed.
  • A +1 status bonus to saves against magic.
  • Darkvision.
  • Your fist attacks deal 2d8 damage.
  • Your unarmed attacks, and your weapons deal 1 additional good damage.

Your unfallen form looks roughly like you did before the fall, and you remain in that form for 1 minute. While in your unfallen form, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.hVU9msO9yGkxKZ3J]{Divine Wrath}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYD0XZ4t3tQq6shc]{Zealous Conviction}, as 6th-rank divine innate spells, once each per use of this feat.

When you emerge from your unfallen form, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}.

Special You gain weakness 10 to evil and can take evil damage, even if you’re not good. This effect applies even when you're not in your unfallen form.

Wrath of God.name: 神之愤怒 Wrath of God
Wrath of God.description:
频率 每天一次

有时，天界的工作需要的不是微妙，而是压倒性的、令人敬畏的力量。幸运的是，你正好能够提供这一点。你在500尺内降下神明之怒，引发一次神圣光辉的爆发，形成一个@Template[type:burst|distance:60]{60尺半径爆发}。如果神明之怒与一个黑暗效果重叠，它会尝试以反制等级等于你等级的一半（向上取整），以及反制调整值等于你的职业DC – 10与法术DC – 10中较高者来反制该黑暗效果。区域内所有生物受到@Damage[8d10[fire]]伤害，且不死生物额外受到@Damage[8d10[vitality]]{8d10}点正能量伤害，邪魔额外受到@Damage[8d10[good]]{8d10}点善良伤害。不死邪魔会在正能量伤害或善良伤害中取对其更不利者承受。其效果取决于一次@Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell]豁免，豁免DC取你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并且在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

大失败 该生物受到全部伤害，在1轮内处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲}与目眩，并且如果它不在其本位面上，则必须在一次@Check[type:will|against:class-spell]意志豁免中成功（豁免DC取你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者），否则会被放逐回其本位面。

Frequency once per day

Sometimes, the work of the heavens requires not subtlety but overwhelming, awe-inspiring force. Happily, this you are well-positioned to provide. You call down the wrath of god in an explosion of divine radiance with a @Template[type:burst|distance:60]{60-foot radius burst} within 500 feet. If the wrath of god overlaps with a darkness effect, it attempts to counteract the darkness effect with a counteract level equal to half your level rounded up and a counteract modifier equal to the higher of your class DC – 10 or your spell DC – 10. All creatures in the area take @Damage[8d10[fire]] damage, plus @Damage[8d10[vitality]]{8d10} additional positive damage to undead creatures and @Damage[8d10[good]]{8d10} additional good damage to fiends. Undead fiends take one or the other of the positive damage or good damage, whichever is worse for them. The effects depend on a @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} and dazzled for 1 round, and if it's not on its home plane, it must succeed at a @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and your spell DC or be banished to its home plane.

Fast Flutter.name: 快速振翅 Fast Flutter
Fast Flutter.description:
你的融合能够更快速、更高效地振翅。你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.LSv4YwEcXiHVBuI1]{Fusion Flutter} 获得的飞行速度提高至 25 尺。

Your fusion is able to flutter more quickly and efficiently. The fly Speed you gain from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.LSv4YwEcXiHVBuI1]{Fusion Flutter} increases to 25 feet.

Did You Mean Me?.name: 你是在说我吗？ Did You Mean Me?
Did You Mean Me?.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 一名敌人以有害效果指定你融合体中的其他成员为目标且未以你为目标，但他们本可以改为以你为目标。

你迅速扭动身体的各个部分，甚至改变一些由你控制的部分，以承受敌人的袭击。该敌人改为以你为目标，而不是他们试图以之为目标的你融合体成员。

Frequency once per day

Trigger A foe targets one of the other members of your fusion with a harmful effect and doesn't target you, but they could have targeted you instead.

You quickly twist the parts of your body around, or even alter some of the portions under your control, in order to take on a foe's assault. The foe targets you instead of the member of your fusion they attempted to target.

Beseech the Queen.name: 恳求女王 Beseech the Queen
Beseech the Queen.description:
频率 每日一次

“拉弥亚！第一位饮血者与最伟大的怪物！诅咒之母！在神祇眼中亵渎的存在！撕裂帷幕者！粉碎高墙者！拉弥亚！在你子嗣最需要之时前来照看他们！拉弥亚！”你呼唤你的先祖，而某种存在（一道影、一道传讯，又有谁能真正说清）回应了你的召唤。女王是一名化身，拥有15英尺×15英尺的空间；她的速度为60英尺，攀爬速度为60英尺，以及游泳速度为60英尺。

到来（死灵系）：血之泪。每个处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]内的敌方生物都会受到@Damage[4d10[persistent,bleed]]伤害，并需进行一次对抗你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）的@Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell|basic:true|trait:necromancy]豁免。

离去（情绪，恐惧，精神）：亵渎的领悟。每个处于@Template[type:emanation|distance:100]内的敌方生物必须尝试一次对抗你的职业DC或法术DC（取较高者）的@Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:emotion,fear,mental]豁免，并根据其豁免结果产生以下效果。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态） 1}。

失败 该生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧（状态） 3}。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物陷入惊惧（状态）3，并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝}，其数值与其因亵渎的领悟而获得的惊惧（状态）数值相同。

Frequency once per day

"Lamia! First blood drinker and greatest monster! Mother of Curses! Blasphemous in the Sight of the Gods! She who Rends the Veil! She who Shatters the Wall! Lamia! Attend your children in their hour of need! Lamia!" You invoke your ancestor, and something (a shade, a sending, who can truly say) responds to your call. The Queen is an incarnate with a 15-foot by 15-foot space, and she has a Speed of 60 feet, a climb Speed of 60 feet, and a swim Speed of 60 feet.

Arrive (necromancy): Tears of Blood. Each enemy creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:60] takes @Damage[4d10[persistent,bleed]] damage with a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell|basic:true|trait:necromancy] saving throw against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher.

Departure (emotion, fear, mental): Blasphemous Realization. Each enemy creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:100] must attempt a @Check[type:will|against:class-spell|traits:emotion,fear,mental] saving throw against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher, with the following effects depending on their saving throw.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Critical Failure The creature is frightened 3 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied} with the same value as its frightened condition from Blasphemous Realization.

Wings Unbound.name: 无拘之翼 Wings Unbound
Wings Unbound.description:
你的双翼已恢复全部力量，与其他移动方式相匹配，并使你能够将你的炼狱力量分支到其他区域。若你的陆地速度更高，你可以将你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.gfN4CTxj8wq7tLtv]{Infernal Wings} 获得的飞行速度提高至与你的陆地速度相同。此外，你获得一个额外的1级魔鬼族裔专长和一个额外的5级魔鬼族裔专长。

Your wings have regained full power, matching your other forms of mobility and allowing you to branch off your diabolic power into other areas. You can increase your fly Speed from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.gfN4CTxj8wq7tLtv]{Infernal Wings} to be equal to your land Speed if it’s higher. Additionally, you gain a bonus 1st-level devil ancestry feat and a bonus 5th-level devil ancestry feat.

Death be not Proud.name: 死神莫骄傲 Death be not Proud
Death be not Proud.description:
你对坟墓及其召唤的防御甚至比其他来世特工更为强韧，更接近于断绝之前的引魂使。你从“来世特工奉献”以及“引魂使的抗力”族裔专长获得的对负能量与毒素伤害的抗力提升为等同于你的等级。若你在对抗死亡效果、疾病或毒素的豁免上掷出大失败，你改为在该次豁免上获得失败。若你仅因某个死亡效果具有死亡（特征）而会被杀死（而非因你的濒死值所致），你不会死亡，而是进入持续1天的复原性昏迷。在此期间，若你成为任何本可将你复活的效果的目标，你会提前苏醒；否则你将如同死者般沉睡，除非有神祇的干预，否则没有任何事物能让你提前醒来。若你在已处于昏迷时再次会因某个死亡效果而被直接杀死，这只会依据最近一次的死亡效果延长昏迷的持续时间。然而，你仍可如常因濒死值增加而死亡，或因不具备死亡（特征）却能瞬间摧毁你的效果而被杀死，例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik]。

Your defenses against the grave and its call are even stronger than those of other agents of the afterlife, approaching closer to that of a psychopomp before the Severing. Your resistance to negative and poison damage from Agent of the Afterlife Dedication and the Psychopomp's Resistance ancestry feat increases to be equal to your level. If you roll a critical failure on a saving throw against a death effect, disease, or poison, you get a failure on the saving throw instead. If you would be killed by a death effect only because it's a death effect (not because of your dying value), instead of dying, you enter a restorative coma for 1 day. During that time, if you are the target of any effect that could have restored you to life, you awaken early, but otherwise you sleep like the dead and nothing short of the intervention of a deity can wake you early. If you would be killed outright by a death effect again while already in your coma, this simply extends the duration of the coma based on the most recent death effect. However, you can still be killed as normal by increasing your dying value or by effects that destroy you instantly without the death trait, like @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r7ihOgKv19eJQnik].

Devour Secrets.name: 吞噬秘密 Devour Secrets
Devour Secrets.description:
当你仔细挖掘时，有时在吃下某个生物的大脑时，你能瞥见其严密守护的秘密与其他隐秘思绪。每小时一次，当你吃下一颗来自小型或更大型的、有智慧生物的新鲜大脑时，你可以尝试从你刚吃下其大脑的该生物视角，了解最多10个不同问题的答案。对于每个问题，它们分别进行一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免，对抗你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者，并产生以下效果。

成功 你不会获得关于该问题的任何信息。

失败 你接近该生物储存该问题答案的记忆宝库，不过若该生物想要隐藏答案，它残留的潜意识可以尝试欺骗你（对于深藏的秘密或它不愿承认的自我欺瞒，尤其可能）。该生物的大脑可以使用该生物原本的调整值进行一次欺瞒检定，对抗你的吞噬秘密DC；若该生物成功，你不会得知答案；若为大成功或大失败中的大成功，则该生物会给你一个你相信为真实的虚假答案。

大成功或大失败中的大失败 同失败，且若该生物选择如此做，它为向你隐藏信息而进行的欺瞒检定承受 –4 环境减值。

You can sometimes get a glimpse of a creature's closely guarded secrets and other hidden thoughts when you eat their brain if you carefully delve for them. Once per hour, when you eat a fresh brain from a Small or larger sapient creature, you can attempt to learn the answers to up to 10 different questions from the perspective of the creature whose brain you just ate. For each question, they attempt a separate @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC with the following effects.

Success You gain no information about that question.

Failure You approach the creature's vault of memories where they store the answer to the question, though the creature's lingering subconscious can attempt to deceive you if they wish to hide the answer (especially likely for either deeply held secrets or self delusions they aren't willing to admit). The creature's brain can attempt a Deception check using the creature's original modifier against your Devour Secrets DC; if the creature succeeds, you don't learn the answer, and on a critical success, the creature gives you a false answer that you believe is truthful.

Critical Failure As failure, and the creature takes a –4 circumstance penalty to Deception checks to hide the information from you if they choose to do so.

Rapid Cogitation.name: 快速思考 Rapid Cogitation
Rapid Cogitation.description:
频率 每小时一次

你用多条思路同时快速思考各种流程与主题。你可以立刻使用最多四次 @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Recall Knowledge]{回忆知识} 动作。对于这些动作，当你回忆知识时触发的任何特殊能力、反应动作（）或自由动作（）都无法使用。

Frequency once per hour

You quickly think over various processes and topics using multiple thought streams at once. You can instantly use up to four @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Recall Knowledge]{Recall Knowledge} actions. For these actions, you can't use any special abilities, reactions, or free actions that trigger when you Recall Knowledge.

Road to Redemption (Remaster).name: 救赎之路（重制版） Road to Redemption (Remaster)
Road to Redemption (Remaster).description:
你一直努力抹去你过去的邪恶行径，并在你的灵魂中推翻它们的记账。你失去来自 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-features.Item.ukNYRKvnCRYc042U]{Damned} 能力的对神圣的弱点

You’ve worked hard to erase the evil deeds of your past and overturn their accounting within your soul. You lose your weakness to holy from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-features.Item.ukNYRKvnCRYc042U]{Damned} ability

Berserk.name: 狂暴 Berserk
Berserk.description:
频率 每日一次

需求 你的当前生命值少于你最大生命值的一半。

当你受伤时，你体内有什么东西被释放出来，驱使你陷入短暂的狂暴。直到你下个回合结束，你用近战打击造成的伤害增加2点，但你的AC承受–1减值，且你无法使用带有专注（特征）的动作。除非你已被治疗至当前最大生命值的一半或更多，否则你可以花费单动作在你后续的回合延长该效果，使其改为持续至再下一个回合结束。一旦狂暴结束，你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{衰弱 1}，持续1分钟。

在7级时，你进入狂暴状态时造成的额外伤害增加至4点。在13级时，额外伤害增加至6点。在19级时，额外伤害增加至8点。

Frequency once per day

Requirements You have fewer than half your maximum Hit Points.

Something unleashes within you when you are damaged, driving you into a temporary rage. Until the end of your next turn, you deal 2 additional damage with melee Strikes, but you take a –1 penalty to your AC and can't use actions with the concentrate trait. Unless you have been healed to have half or more of your current maximum Hit Points, you can take a single action to extend this effect on your subsequent turns, causing it to last until the end of the following turn insted. Once Berserk ends, you become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute.

At 7th level, the additional damage you deal when you enter a Berserk state increases to 4. At 13th level, the additional damage increases to 6. And at 19th level, the additional damage increases to 8.

Acidic Sap.name: 酸性树液 Acidic Sap
Acidic Sap.description:
当你用你特殊的树木攻击打出沉重一击时，你可以用黏稠的酸性树液覆盖你的敌人。当你用从树木打击专长获得的徒手攻击打出大成功或大失败命中时，你造成额外1d4持续酸性伤害，并且你大成功或大失败命中的生物在承受该持续酸性伤害期间，其速度承受–5尺环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.csqDcDDeAZA2e65g]{效果: 酸性树液}

When you strike a telling blow with your special arboreal attacks, you can cover your foe in sticky acidic sap. When you get a critical hit with your unarmed attacks you gained from the Arboreal Strikes feat, you deal an additional 1d4 persistent acid damage, and the creature you critically hit takes a –5-foot circumstance penalty to their Speeds while suffering the persistent acid damage.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.csqDcDDeAZA2e65g]{Effect: Acidic Sap}

Vigilant Watching.name: 警觉守望 Vigilant Watching
Vigilant Watching.description:
你的虫群可以轻易地守望你。你可以将 Watching Swarm 作为 自由动作（），而非 单动作 来使用。如果你这么做，它只会防止你被 等级 等于或低于你的 生物 夹击，而非所有 生物。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.OFCkgCmAovkPPaC9]{效果: 警觉守望}

Your swarm can watch over you easily. You can use Watching Swarm as a free action, instead of a single action. If you do, it only prevents you from being flanked by creatures of your level or lower, rather than all creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.OFCkgCmAovkPPaC9]{Effect: Vigilant Watching}

Wing Deflection.name: 翼偏转 Wing Deflection
Wing Deflection.description:
触发 你成为你所知悉的一次物理远程攻击的目标。

你用翅膀将来袭的攻击击开，使你对抗该次触发攻击的AC获得+4环境加值。若该次攻击未命中，你便已将其偏斜。你不能使用此专长来偏斜异常巨大的远程投射物（例如巨石或弩炮箭）。

Trigger You are the target of a physical ranged attack that you're aware of.

You batter the incoming attack away with your wing, gaining a +4 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses, you have deflected it. You can't use this feat to deflect unusually massive ranged projectiles (such as boulders or ballista bolts).

Cavern Sight.name: 洞窟视野 Cavern Sight
Cavern Sight.description:
你与大地深处的联结让你的双眼能够穿透黑暗。你获得黑暗视觉。

Your connection to the deep earth lets your eyes pierce through darkness. You gain darkvision.

Matter Over Mind.name: 物质超越心灵 Matter Over Mind
Matter Over Mind.description:
不知为何，即使你的大脑是由无生命的材料构成，思绪仍会在其中奔流。尽管你会受到精神魔法的影响，但你很快就能摆脱这些干扰。每当你受到持续时间至少为2轮的精神效果影响时，你可以将持续时间减少1轮。此外，当你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑（状态）}状态时，你可以选择什么也不做、原地一动不动地站着，而不是胡乱攻击。若你如此做，你会在你的回合结束时陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}状态。

Somehow, thoughts course through your brain, even if it is made out of inanimate material. Though you can be affected by mental magic, it doesn't take long for you to shake off those influences. Whenever you are affected by a mental effect that lasts at least 2 rounds, you can reduce the duration by 1 round. In addition, when you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} condition, you can choose to do nothing, standing stock-still, instead of attacking wildly. If you do so, you fall @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} at the end of your turn.

Tripping Root.name: 绊摔根须 Tripping Root
Tripping Root.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你将你的根延伸至很远的距离，并扰乱其周围的地面，从远处将其绊倒。你尝试对30尺内的一个目标进行[[/act trip]]，即使你没有空闲的手也可以。

特殊 若你拥有来自@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.1rHVTcNC9AweQ4GB]{Arboreal Strikes}专长的根部徒手攻击，则此次绊摔尝试使用该根部，因此你将你根部攻击掷骰所获得的任何物品加值照常应用于此次绊摔尝试，就如同具有绊摔特征的徒手攻击一样。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You extend your root to a great distance and disrupt the ground around it, tripping it from afar. You attempt to [[/act trip]] a target within 30 feet, even if you don't have a hand free.

Special If you have a root unarmed attack from the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.1rHVTcNC9AweQ4GB]{Arboreal Strikes} feat, this Trip attempt uses that root, so you apply any item bonus to your root attack rolls to the Trip attempt as normal for an unarmed attack with the trip trait.

Eye of the Swarm.name: 虫群之眼 Eye of the Swarm
Eye of the Swarm.description:
频率 每小时一次

你的育群从皮肤中涌出，彼此交错，用它们的身体锁链将你包围。你获得隐蔽直到你下个回合结束；在持续时间内任何与你相邻的盟友也同样获得隐蔽，只要他们保持与你相邻。你可以维持该效果，最大持续时间为5轮。当一个被“虫群之眼”赋予 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 的盟友将要因一次攻击而受到伤害时，作为反应动作（），你可以将该盟友受到的伤害减少40；在你这么做之后，“虫群之眼”结束。在你花费一个交互动作将育群收回体内之前，你无法使用带有虫群血脉特征的动作。

Frequency once per hour

Your brood streams out of your skin, interlocking with each other and surrounding you with chains of their bodies. You gain concealment until the end of your next turn, as do any allies adjacent to you during the duration as long as they remain adjacent to you. You can Sustain the effect for a maximum duration of 5 rounds. When an ally who is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} by Eye of the Swarm would take damage from an attack, as a reaction, you can reduce the damage to that ally by 40; after you do, Eye of the Swarm ends. You can't use actions with the swarmblood trait until you spend an Interact action to draw your brood back into your body.

Stunning Blast.name: 震撼爆发 Stunning Blast
Stunning Blast.description:
频率 每日一次

你集中全部心灵能量，并从你所有触手中发出一阵震慑冲击，形成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:60]。区域内的生物可能会陷入震慑状态，并进行一次 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] 意志豁免，对抗你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

失败 该生物为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}。

Frequency once per day

You concentrate all your psychic energy and send out a stunning blast from all your tentacles in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60]. Creatures in the area might become stunned, with a @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 3}.

Shadow Stalker.name: 暗影潜行者 Shadow Stalker
Shadow Stalker.description:
你天生就是夜行的猎手，与阴影合而为一，并在夜色中安然自得。你在昏暗光照或黑暗的区域中进行用于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{躲藏} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 的隐匿检定时，获得+1环境加值。对不具有黑暗视觉的生物时，该环境加值提高为+2。

You're a nocturnal hunter at heart, at one with the shadows and at peace in the night. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Stealth checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} in areas of dim light or darkness. This increases to a +2 circumstance bonus against creatures that don't have darkvision.

Destructive Strikes.name: 毁灭性打击 Destructive Strikes
Destructive Strikes.description:
你强力的打击能轻易摧毁物体。你的近战打击无视一个生物或物体至多5点硬度。

Your powerful blows easily destroy objects. Your melee Strikes ignore up to 5 of a creature or object's Hardness.

Pollen Cloud.name: 花粉云 Pollen Cloud
Pollen Cloud.description:
频率 每日一次

如同树冠长老一般，你可以从栖居在你枝干上的附生植物中释放一团浓密的花粉云，使生物患病并遮蔽其视线。花粉云以你为中心向外发散，形成一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:40]。花粉云不会随你移动，并在原地持续[[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6轮}后消散。云内的生物变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽}，且云外的所有生物对云内的生物而言也变为隐蔽。花粉云内除植物与真菌以外的生物必须尝试一次@Check[fortitude|against:class-spell]豁免，对抗你更高的职业DC或法术DC。若失败，该生物为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}；若大失败，该生物为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 3}，并且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}1轮。无论结果如何，该生物随后对你这树冠长老花粉云导致恶心与失明的效果暂时免疫24小时。

Frequency once per day

Like a canopy elder, you can release a dense cloud of pollen from the epiphytes living in your branches to sicken creatures and occlude their vision. The pollen cloud emanates from you in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:40]. The pollen cloud doesn't move with you and remains in place for [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds} before dissipating. Creatures inside the cloud become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}, and all creatures outside the cloud become concealed to creatures within it. Creatures within the pollen cloud other than plants and fungi must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}, and on a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round. Regardless of the result, a creature is then temporarily immune to the sickening and blinding effects of your canopy elder pollen cloud for 24 hours.

Entangling Plants.name: 纠缠植物 Entangling Plants
Entangling Plants.description:
你可以召唤附近的植物去抓住你的敌人并减缓他们的移动。你可以每小时以原始先天法术施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J6vNvrUT3b1hx2iA]。

You can call upon the nearby plants to grasp at your foes and slow down their movement. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.J6vNvrUT3b1hx2iA] once per hour as a primal innate spell.

Living Rampart.name: 活体壁垒 Living Rampart
Living Rampart.description:
你体型巨大，足以成为盟友的壁垒或障碍——很难看穿你或从你身旁移动。你在针对穿过你空间进行的攻击时提供掩蔽，而非较小掩蔽，并且你在他人试图 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8] 你的空间时，你的反射DC获得+2环境加值。

You're so big that you serve as a rampart or blockade for your allies—it's difficult to see or move past you. You provide cover, rather than lesser cover, against attacks made through your space, and you gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Reflex DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8] your space.

Basic Psychopomp Magic.name: 基础灵魂引渡者魔法 Basic Psychopomp Magic
Basic Psychopomp Magic.description:
在你的本质深处，你是一个异界存在，而魔法就在触及之内。从神圣法术列表中选择一个常见神圣戏法（或你有许可的另一个神圣戏法）。你可以随意将此戏法作为神圣天生法术施放。戏法会被升阶到等于你等级的一半（向上取整）的法术等级。

At your core, you're an otherworldly being, and magic lies within reach. Choose one common divine cantrip (or another divine cantrip to which you have access) from the divine spell list. You can cast this cantrip as a divine innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell level equal to half your level rounded up.

Beast Walker.name: 兽行者 Beast Walker
Beast Walker.description:
频率 每日一次

通过拥抱你原初的自我，你可以变形为与你的传承相关的动物。你在 1 分钟内获得 2 环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal Form} 的益处，但你只能变形为取决于你的传承的形态（如下所述）。在 7 级时，你改为获得 3 环animal form的益处。在 9 级时，你改为获得 4 环animal form的益处。在 11 级时，你改为获得 5 环animal form的益处。

熊

  • 速度 30 英尺
  • 近战 1 颚，伤害 2d8 穿刺
  • 近战 1 爪（灵巧），伤害 1d8 挥砍

野猪

  • 速度 30 英尺
  • 近战 1 獠牙，伤害 2d6 穿刺外加 1d6 流血

鳄鱼

  • 速度 25 英尺，游泳速度 25 英尺
  • 近战 1 颚，伤害 2d8 穿刺

老鼠

  • 速度 20 英尺，攀爬速度 20 英尺，游泳速度 15 英尺
  • 近战 1 颚，伤害 2d6 穿刺

老虎

  • 速度 40 英尺
  • 近战 1 颚，伤害 2d6 穿刺
  • 近战 1 爪（灵巧），伤害 1d10 挥砍

狼

  • 速度 40 英尺
  • 近战 1 颚，伤害 2d8 穿刺

特殊 在满月之光下，你可以将野兽行者的使用频率从每日一次改为每小时一次。

Frequency once per day

By embracing your primal self, you can transform into the animal related to your heritage. You gain the benefits of a 2nd-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wp09USMB3GIW1qbp]{Animal Form} for 1 minute, though you can only transform into a form depending on your heritage (as noted below). At 7th level, you gain the benefits of a 3rd-rank animal form instead. At 9th level, you gain the benefits of a 4th-rank animal form instead. At 11th level, you gain the benefits of a 5th-rank animal form instead.

Bear

  • Speed 30 feet
  • Melee 1 jaws, Damage 2d8 piercing
  • Melee 1 claw (agile), Damage 1d8 slashing

Boar

  • Speed 30 feet
  • Melee 1 tusk, Damage 2d6 piercing plus 1d6 bleed

Crocodile

  • Speed 25 feet, swim Speed 25 feet
  • Melee 1 jaws, Damage 2d8 piercing

Rat

  • Speed 20 feet, climb Speed 20 feet, swim Speed 15 feet
  • Melee 1 jaws, Damage 2d6 piercing

Tiger

  • Speed 40 feet
  • Melee 1 jaws, Damage 2d6 piercing
  • Melee 1 claw (agile), Damage 1d10 slashing

Wolf

  • Speed 40 feet
  • Melee 1 jaws, Damage 2d8 piercing

Special On the light of the full moon, you can use Beast Walker once per hour instead of once per day.

Swarmshield.name: 蜂群护盾 Swarmshield
Swarmshield.description:
你的子嗣遍布于你全身，彼此交错并形成一面盾牌，保护你免受伤害。你获得对AC的+1环境加值。该加值持续至你使用一个交互动作将子嗣收回体内为止。在你花费一个交互动作将子嗣收回体内之前，你无法使用带有群血特征的动作。

Your brood spreads out across your form, interlocking with each other and forming a shield to protect you from harm. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your AC. This bonus lasts until you use an Interact action to draw your brood back into your body. You can't use actions with the swarmblood trait until you spend an Interact action to draw your brood back into your body.

Drink Deep.name: 深饮 Drink Deep
Drink Deep.description:
活体猎物的滋味中有种令人垂涎的美味。如果你在已经满足时对一个生物进行进食，并且此次进食在其他情况下本应能够满足你，你会变为完全满足。你会保持完全满足3小时，之后你会变为满足1小时。如果你在某个能力将结束你的满足时处于完全满足状态，你将不再完全满足，但仍保持满足。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.uqKP2L8Jzt0Qa0L1]{效果：完全满足}

There is something delicious in the taste of living prey. If you Feed on a creature while you were already satisfied, and the Feeding would have otherwise been able to satisfy you, you become fully satisfied. You stay fully satisfied for 3 hours, after which you become satisfied for 1 hour. If you’re fully satisfied when an ability would end your satisfaction, you cease being fully satisfied but remain satisfied.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.uqKP2L8Jzt0Qa0L1]{Effect: Fully Satisfied}

I'll Form the Leg.name: 我来组成腿 I'll Form the Leg
I'll Form the Leg.description:
当你的昆特质组合成昆特隆融合体时，你总是构成昆特隆的一条腿。每当你的融合体以组合动作进行疾奔或挪步时（通常是你的融合体每次移动时，除了像 Emergency Shunt 这样的特殊能力），你的融合体可以选择让你进行疾奔或挪步，即使这不是你的回合。这在你拥有优势时可能很有帮助，比如更好的速度，或允许你在移动时无视反应动作（）的能力。照常，如果融合体的任何成员处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}，这不会允许你的融合体移动。

When your quintrite combines into the quintron fusion, you always form one of the quintron's legs. Whenever your fusion Strides or Steps as a combined action (typically every time your fusion moves, except special abilities like Emergency Shunt) your fusion can choose to have you Stride or Step even if it isn't your turn. This might be helpful if you have an advantage such as a better Speed or an ability that allows you to ignore reactions when you move. As normal, this doesn't allow your fusion to move if any member of the fusion is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}.

True Spirit Touch.name: 真实灵魂接触 True Spirit Touch
True Spirit Touch.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你将炼狱的全部威能灌注进你的攻击之中。持续5轮，你的武器与徒手攻击造成的物理伤害将改变为：对活体生物造成虚空伤害，对不死生物造成活力伤害。

特殊 若你正在使用“天命之指”徒手攻击，且其已造成负能量或正能量伤害，则你的“天命之指”的骰子体型从1d4提升至1d8。若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.IxYhGVAVX7AFJ8rH]{Improved Spirit Touch} 专长，则在“真实灵魂接触”的效果期间，你的“强化灵魂接触”所赋予的额外伤害提高为每个武器伤害骰+1伤害。

Frequency once per minute

You infuse your attacks with the full might of Purgatory. For 5 rounds, the physical damage from your weapons and unarmed attacks changes to void damage against living creatures and vitality damage against undead.

Special If you are using a fated finger unarmed attack, which already deals negative or positive damage, the die size of your fated finger increases from 1d4 to 1d8. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.IxYhGVAVX7AFJ8rH]{Improved Spirit Touch} feat, the additional damage granted by your Improved Spirit Touch increases to 1 damage per weapon damage die during the effects of True Spirit Touch.

Make my Fusion Grow!.name: 让我的融合成长！ Make my Fusion Grow!
Make my Fusion Grow!.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你与融合中的其他成员会在短时间内增大你们共享的体型，以便更好地击败敌人。你获得4环法术enlarge的效果，持续1分钟

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.H7ZPBb4hEYYz0Dlz]{法术效果: Enlarge}

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You and the other members of your fusion increase your shared size for a short time, the better to defeat your foes. You gain the effects of 4th-rank enlarge for 1 minute

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.H7ZPBb4hEYYz0Dlz]{Spell Effect: Enlarge}

Friend of Nature.name: 自然之友 Friend of Nature
Friend of Nature.description:
在所有天界天使之中，莫瓦尼天使最热衷于自然世界，并且常常会有驯服的荒野生物相伴。你获得一只魔宠。动物的种类由你决定，但鸽子与白鼠都是常见选择。

Of all of the celestial angels, movanic devas take the greatest interest in the natural world and are often found accompanied by tame creatures of the wild. You gain a familiar. The type of animal is up to you, but doves and white rats are both common choices.

Enveloping Chains.name: 包覆锁链 Enveloping Chains
Enveloping Chains.description:
频率 每小时一次

你与融合中的其他成员挥舞你们的链条，并用魔法创造并延伸出更多链条，制造出一片巨大的包覆链条区域，将附近的敌人锁在原地并阻止他们传送离开。区域内的每个敌人（@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]）都必须尝试一次 @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell|traits:damaging-effect] 豁免，对抗你选择在其回合施展“包覆链条”的那名融合成员的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

大成功或大失败 该生物完全避免受到链条的任何阻碍，但仍会被擦到并受到等同于你等级一半的钝击伤害（@Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[bludgeoning]]）。

成功 该生物暂时被链条缠绕。它受到等同于你等级的钝击伤害，并在1轮内（@Damage[@actor.level[bludgeoning]]），其速度承受–10尺的环境减值，且“包覆链条”会尝试反制任何作用于它的传送效果或任何会将它移动至不同位面的效果。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.MT7vLC4yodIzDXDM]{效果：包覆链条}

失败 该生物被链条完全包覆。它受到等同于你等级的钝击伤害，并被链条施加 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}，持续至多1分钟。生物可以照常以对抗链条DC来进行挣脱。此外，若它在其每个回合结束时仍被链条擒抱，则必须尝试一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 豁免，对抗链条DC，以在精神上抵抗链条的力量。它在意志豁免成功时挣脱链条；在失败时受到等同于你等级的钝击伤害（@Damage[@actor.level[bludgeoning]]）。此外，在1分钟内，其速度承受–10尺的环境减值，且“包覆链条”会尝试反制任何作用于它的传送效果或任何会将它移动至不同位面的效果。

大成功或大失败 该生物完全任由链条摆布。如同失败，但该生物在1轮内为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{束缚}，且初始伤害与每次意志豁免失败所受的伤害各增加7（@Damage[(@actor.level +7)[bludgeoning]]）。

Frequency once per hour

You and the other members of your fusion whirl your chains around and create and elongate more chains using magic, creating an enormous region of enveloping chains that lock nearby foes in place and prevent them from teleporting away. Each foe within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] must attempt a @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell|traits:damaging-effect] save against the higher of the class DC and the spell DC of the member of the fusion on whose turn you choose to perform the Enveloping Chains.

Critical Success The creature avoids being hindered by the chains in any way, but they're still grazed and take bludgeoning damage equal to half your level (@Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2))[bludgeoning]]).

Success The creature is temporarily entwined by the chains. They take bludgeoning damage equal to your level and for 1 round (@Damage[@actor.level[bludgeoning]]), they take a –10-foot circumstance penalty on their Speeds and Enveloping Chains attempts to counteract any teleportation effect on them or any effect that would move them to a different plane.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.MT7vLC4yodIzDXDM]{Effect: Enveloping Chains}

Failure The creature is fully enveloped by the chains. They take bludgeoning damage equal to your level and are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the chains for up to 1 minute. Creatures can Escape normally against the chains' DC. Additionally, they must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save against the chains' DC at the end of each of their turns if they remain grabbed by the chains to resist the chains' power mentally. They escape the chains on a successful Will save, and they take bludgeoning damage equal to your level on a failure (@Damage[@actor.level[bludgeoning]]). In addition, for 1 minute, they take a –10-foot circumstance penalty on their Speeds and Enveloping Chains attempts to counteract any teleportation effect on them or any effect that would move them to a different plane.

Critical Failure The creature is completely at the chains' mercy. As failure, but the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} for 1 round and the initial damage and damage for failing a Will save each increase by 7 (@Damage[(@actor.level +7)[bludgeoning]]).

Purgatorial Fulmination.name: 炼狱雷霆轰击 Purgatorial Fulmination
Purgatorial Fulmination.description:
频率 每小时一次

你释放一阵能量爆发，会伤害活物与不死生物，对你所选择的 @Template[type:line|distance:30] 或 @Template[type:cone|distance:15]（每次使用 Purgatorial Fulmination 时选择）中的所有生物造成 3d6 伤害。这次爆发对活体生物造成 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[void]]{void} 伤害，对不死生物造成 @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[vitality]]{vitality} 伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免，对抗你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

该伤害在第7等级以及其后每2等级增加 1d6。

Frequency once per hour

You release a blast of energy that harms both the living and the undead, dealing 3d6 damage to all creatures in your choice of a @Template[type:line|distance:30] or a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] (chosen whenever you use Purgatorial Fulmination). This blast deals @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[void]]{void} damage to living creatures and @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2))d6[vitality]]{vitality} damage to undead creatures. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

This damage increases by 1d6 at 7th level and every 2 levels thereafter.

Look Both Ways.name: 左右查看 Look Both Ways
Look Both Ways.description:
你谨慎地改变你的视角，以填补你的融合的其他成员的视线所留下的空隙。选择你自己或你的融合的其他成员之一。你所选择的融合成员获得全方位视觉，直到你下个回合开始。这使其能够向所有方向看见，并防止其被夹击。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.7g0yzkbD9tsutIv0]{效果：左右兼顾}

You carefully change your perspective to fill in the gaps left by the gazes of the other members of your fusion. Choose yourself or one of the other members of your fusion. The member of your fusion you chose gains all-around vision until the start of your next turn. This lets them see in all directions and prevents them from being flanked.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.7g0yzkbD9tsutIv0]{Effect: Look Both Ways}

Purging Flame.name: 净化之焰 Purging Flame
Purging Flame.description:
频率 每小时一次

触发 你受到火焰伤害。

如同林地藉由周期性的森林火灾烧掉灌木而恢复生机一般，你让火焰烧掉你的树皮，转而留下临时的木炭覆层；它更柔软，更容易被压碎或刺穿，但不再易受斧头与火焰影响。在结算火焰伤害后，你在1分钟内失去树皮皮肤族裔能力。这意味着在持续时间内，你不再具有钝击与穿刺抗力，也不再具有火焰与斧头弱点。

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You take fire damage.

Like a woodland restoring itself by burning off brush with periodic forest fires, you allow the flame to burn off your bark and leave behind a temporary charcoal coating instead that's softer and easier to crush or pierce but no longer vulnerable to axes and flame. After resolving the fire damage, you lose the skin of bark ancestry ability for 1 minute. This means you no longer have the bludgeoning and piercing resistance and your fire and axe weakness for the duration.

Diabolic Schemer Dedication.name: 魔契谋略家献身 Diabolic Schemer Dedication
Diabolic Schemer Dedication.description:
你学会了各种诡计和谋划，让你无论面对什么对手都能占上风。你学到的第一个也是最重要的把戏，是如何确保自己活下去。你获得欺瞒技能的受训（熟练度）。如果你本会自动在欺瞒技能上成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），则你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训（熟练度）。此外，你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick}反应动作（）。

You've learned all sorts of tricks and schemes that allow you to come out on top no matter who your opponent might be. The first and most important trick you've learned is how to make sure you stay alive. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Deception. If you would automatically become trained in Deception (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} reaction.

Intuit Flaw.name: 洞悉缺陷 Intuit Flaw
Intuit Flaw.description:
需求你处于洞见再定心状态

你运用你的洞见，找出敌人抗力中那唯一微小的弱点或阿喀琉斯之踵。选择120英尺内的一名敌人，并选择一种你已知该敌人拥有的抗力。进行一次对抗该生物等级对应标准DC的@Check[perception]检定。你发现一个弱点，其效果取决于你的察觉检定结果。你消耗你的再定心状态。

大成功或大失败你的洞见出类拔萃，你发现了一个严重弱点，使你和你的盟友能够绕过除最坚固之外的所有抗力。直到你下个回合结束前，你可以无视敌人所选抗力中至多等同于你等级两倍的数值。任何你与之分享该信息的盟友也在你下个回合结束前获得该增益。

成功你的洞见强而有力，你发现了对手抗力中的一个弱点。直到你下个回合结束前，你可以无视敌人所选抗力中至多等同于你等级的数值。任何你与之分享该信息的盟友也在你下个回合结束前获得该增益。

失败你瞥见了一个转瞬即逝的弱点，使你得以绕过该生物的抗力，但仅限一次。在你下个回合结束前的一次机会中，你或一名你与之分享该信息的盟友可以无视敌人所选抗力中至多等同于你等级的数值。一旦你或一名盟友使用了此增益，利用该弱点的机会便会消失。

大成功或大失败你尚未能发现弱点，但作为交换，你不会消耗你的再定心状态。

Requirements You are Recentered to insight

You use your insight to find the one tiny weak point or Achilles' heel to the enemy's resistance. Choose an enemy within 120 feet and choose a resistance you are aware that enemy possesses. Attempt a @Check[perception] check against the standard DC for the creature's level. You spot a weak point, with effects depending on your Perception check. You expend your Recentered state.

Critical Success Your insight proves prodigious, and you spot a grievous weak point, allowing you and your allies to bypass all but the most sturdy resistance. You can ignore an amount of the enemy's chosen resistance up to twice your level until the end of your next turn. Any allies with whom you share the information gain the benefit as well until the end of your next turn.

Success Your insight is strong, and you spot a weak point in your foe's resistance. You can ignore an amount of the enemy's chosen resistance up to your level until the end of your next turn. Any allies with whom you share the information gain the benefit as well until the end of your next turn.

Failure You glimpse a fleeting, momentary weak point, allowing you to slip past the creature's resistance, though only once. Once before the end of your next turn, you or an ally with whom you share the information can ignore an amount of the enemy's chosen resistance up to your level. Once you or an ally uses this benefit, the opportunity to exploit the weak point passes.

Critical Failure You weren't able to spot a weak point yet, but in exchange you don't expend your Recentered state.

Scratch-Proof Coating.name: 防刮涂层 Scratch-Proof Coating
Scratch-Proof Coating.description:
尽管你可能并不像其他类人生物那样有血，但当你被流血效果击中时，你仍会泄漏重要的魔法，因此你用化学品或魔法处理了你的外部，以帮助阻止这种困境。你用于结束持续流血伤害的纯骰检定的DC从15降低至10，或在获得特别恰当的协助后从10降低至5。

Though you may not have blood like other humanoids per se, you still leak vital magic when struck with bleeding effects, so you treated your exterior with chemicals or magic that helps stop that plight. Your DC on flat checks to end persistent bleed damage is reduced from 15 to 10, or from 10 to 5 after receiving especially appropriate assistance.

Antique Weapon.name: 古董武器 Antique Weapon
Antique Weapon.description:
你与自己的古董武器之间有着强烈的联系，使你几乎只需一个念头就能毫不费力地将其拔出。选择你起始拥有的其中一把武器作为你的古董武器。尽管它具有与普通武器相同的耐久度与生命值，但由于其年代久远而处于损坏状态且无法修复；不过，只有你在使用它时不会因此承受任何通常的惩罚。若你曾遗失它、将它落在某处，或它被偷走，它不知何故终将自己回到你身边。当你以【交互】来拔出你的古董武器时，你可以选择让该【交互】动作失去操作（特征）并改为获得专注（特征），仿佛你的武器几乎是在帮助你用意念将其拔出。若你的古董武器是一把军用武器，则在计算熟练度的目的上，你将其视为一把简易武器。到第5等级时，每当你用你的古董武器造成一次大成功或大失败命中时，你获得其致命专精效果。

You possess a strong connection to your antique weapon, which allows you to draw it seamlessly with little more than a thought. Choose one of the weapons you started with to be your antique weapon. Though it has the same durability and Hit Points as a normal weapon, it is broken due to its age and can't be repaired, though you and you alone suffer none of the usual penalties for using it despite that fact. If you ever lose it or leave it behind, or if it's ever stolen, it somehow eventually finds its way back to you. When you Interact to draw your antique weapon, you can choose to have that Interact action lose the manipulate trait and gain the concentrate trait instead, as your weapon almost helps you draw it with a thought. If your antique weapon is a martial weapon, you treat it as a simple weapon instead for the purpose of proficiency. At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with your antique weapon, you get its critical specialization effect.

Fetters of Malebolge.name: 马勒博吉亚的枷锁 Fetters of Malebolge
Fetters of Malebolge.description:
需求 你上一个动作是一次成功的打击，所用武器为带刺链枷或具有擒抱特征的近战武器。

如同地狱束缚的角魔一样，你可以将敌人拉向你，然后用你的武器将其固定在原地。尝试一次运动检定以[[/act grapple]]你用上一次打击命中的敌人，使用命中他们的那次攻击所受的同样的多重攻击减值。成功时，除使其因你的武器而成为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{受擒}外，你还可以将该敌人向你拉近至多20尺。若你用该武器再进行一次攻击或将其释放，该生物的受擒状态会立即结束，此外也会按擒抱动作结束受擒状态的正常方式结束。

特殊 若目标正因你的@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick}反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则他们在对抗你“玛勒博吉枷锁”的擒抱检定时，其强韧DC也承受同样的环境减值，并且他们尝试逃脱时也承受同样的环境减值。

Requirements Your previous action was a successful Strike with a spiked chain or a melee weapon that has the grapple trait.

Like a Hellbound cornugon, you can pull your foe toward you and then hold them in place with your weapon. Attempt an Athletics check to [[/act grapple]] the foe you hit with the previous Strike, using the same multiple attack penalty from the attack that hit them. On a success, you can pull the foe up to 20 feet toward you, in addition to causing them to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by your weapon. If you make another attack with the weapon or Release it, the creature's grabbed condition immediately ends, in addition to the normal ways to end the grabbed condition from a Grapple action.

Special If the target is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their Fortitude DC against your Grapple check for Fetters of Malebolge as well as their attempts to Escape it.

Stygian Inquisitor.name: 冥渊审判官 Stygian Inquisitor
Stygian Inquisitor.description:
频率 每分钟一次

如同被地狱束缚的osyluth一般，你能对任何拒绝回答你问题的人施加痛苦倒刺。选择一个你能看见的、30尺内的生物并向其提问。若其能听见并理解该问题，并在1轮后仍拒绝回答，则其受到等同于你等级的精神伤害（@Damage[(@actor.level)[mental]]），并进行一次对抗你职业DC与法术DC中较高者的@Check[will|against:class-spell|basic]豁免。它们可以用含糊其辞的方式回答，或直接说谎而不承受该伤害。受到冥河审讯官影响的生物知晓：若它们拒绝回答你的问题就会受到伤害；若它们尝试回答，或想要回答但因故无法回答（例如，它们处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]），则不会受到伤害。

特殊 若目标因你的@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{诡计诳骗}反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则当其在回答你的问题时选择对你说谎，它的欺瞒检定（以及其对抗你的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]的欺瞒DC）也承受同样的环境减值。

Frequency once per minute

Like a Hellbound osyluth, you can inflict barbs of pain on any who refuse to answer your questions. Choose a creature you can see within 30 feet and ask them a question. If they can hear and understand the question and refuse to answer it after 1 round, they take mental damage equal to your level (@Damage[(@actor.level)[mental]]) with a @Check[will|against:class-spell|basic] saving throw against the higher of your class DC and spell DC. They're free to answer the question evasively or flat-out lie without taking the damage. A creature affected by Stygian Inquisitor knows that they'll take damage if they refuse to answer your question, and they don't take damage if they attempt to answer or want to answer but are unable to do so (for instance, if they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]).

Special If the target is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their Deception check (and their Deception DC against your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]) if they choose to lie to you when answering your question.

Hydrodynamic Hydra.name: 流体力学九头蛇 Hydrodynamic Hydra
Hydrodynamic Hydra.description:
先决条件 九头蛇传承 你可以控制你们共享身体的部分，使你更容易在九头蛇喜欢栖息的沼泽与湿地中游泳。你获得15尺游泳速度，且你融合的四名成员都获得两栖（特征）。

特殊 如果你融合的每名成员都选择此专长，你的游泳速度提升为等同于你的陆地速度。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.inHoI9dE5u1dIQBZ]{流体动力九头蛇（特征）}

Prerequisites hydra heritage You’re in control of parts of your shared body that make it easier for you to swim through the swamps and marshes where hydras love to live. You gain a 15-foot swim Speed and all four members of your fusion gain the amphibious trait.

Special If every member of your fusion takes this feat, your swim Speed improves to be equal to your land Speed.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.inHoI9dE5u1dIQBZ]{Hydrodynamic Hydra (Trait)}

Venomous Stinger.name: 毒刺 Venomous Stinger
Venomous Stinger.description:
你的尾巴变得更长，并长出一个致命的毒刺，能够将有害的毒液直接注入你的目标的静脉。你的尾巴徒手攻击获得多用穿刺特征。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.KfYMlJEn35e4DU6Q]{注入毒液} 动作。

Your tail grows in length and sprouts a deadly stinger, which can inject a noxious venom directly into your targets' veins. Your tail unarmed attack gains the versatile piercing trait. In addition, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.KfYMlJEn35e4DU6Q]{Inject Venom} action.

Evangelization.name: 福音传播 Evangelization
Evangelization.description:
你或许不再运用你的才能去宣扬地狱的教义，但在用他人自身缺陷哲学的悖论来迷惑他人方面，你的接触并未退步。你在交涉上成为专家，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.YgbcLfAEdi4xxvX5]{Evangelize} 专长作为额外技能专长，即使你不满足等级先决条件或“交涉大师”的先决条件。

You might no longer use your talents to evangelize Hell’s doctrines, but you haven’t lost your touch when it comes to confounding others with the paradoxes of their own flawed philosophies. You become an expert in Diplomacy, and you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.YgbcLfAEdi4xxvX5]{Evangelize} feat as a bonus skill feat, even if you don’t meet the level prerequisite or the prerequisite of being a master in Diplomacy.

Shape Object.name: 塑形物体 Shape Object
Shape Object.description:
你可以从虚无中拉出原材料，然后将其塑造成一个至多为轻度负载的普通物体。该物体不能具有精细的工艺或复杂的可动部件，不能是炼金、魔法或消耗品物品，不能用于满足某项花费，也不能由贵重材料（例如银或冷铁）制成。以这种方式创造物品是一个 10 分钟行动，具有专注与操作（特征）。如果你是云巨人，该物体由凝结的云构成；如果你是火焰巨人，则由金属构成；如果你是石巨人，则由石头构成。该物体明显是临时魔法的产物，不能被出售或冒充为贵重物品。被创造的物品持续 1 小时，之后会崩解。

如果你在制作中拥有专家熟练度，你可以创造一个至多为 1 负载的物品。如果你在制作中拥有大师熟练度，你可以创造一个至多为 2 负载的物品，并且以这种方式创造的物品持续 4 小时。如果你在制作中拥有传奇熟练度，你可以创造一个至多为 3 负载的物品，并且以这种方式创造的物品持续 8 小时。

You can pull raw material from nowhere, then shape it into one mundane object of up to light Bulk. This object can't have intricate artistry or complex moving parts, can't be an alchemical, magical, or consumable item, can't fulfill a cost, and can't be made from valuable materials such as silver or cold iron. Creating an item in this way is a 10-minute activity that has the concentrate and manipulate traits. This object is constructed from solidified clouds if you're a cloud giant, from metal if you're a fire giant, or from stone if you're stone giant. The object is obviously the product of temporary magic and can't be sold or passed off as a valuable item. The created item lasts 1 hour, after which point it disintegrates.

If you have expert proficiency in Crafting, you can create an item of up to 1 Bulk. If you have master proficiency in Crafting, you can create an item of up to 2 Bulk and items created in this way last 4 hours. If you have legendary proficiency in Crafting, you can create an item of up to 3 Bulk and items created in this way last for 8 hours.

Silkbow.name: 丝弓 Silkbow
Silkbow.description:
你可以将你特殊的炼狱丝绸变形成一把弓。你拥有一段特殊丝绸，只要它在你手中，你就可以将其变形成复合短弓或复合长弓。你可以在以交互动作抽出或拾起该丝绸时作为该动作的一部分将丝绸变形为任一类型的弓，也可以在你握持丝绸（无论其为普通形态还是弓形态）时的任何时候将其变形。若你未持用该丝绸，它会立刻变回原状。若你曾遗失该丝绸，你可以在休整模式中花费1天纺出一捆新的丝绸。

就熟练度而言，你将你的丝绸弓（但不包括其他复合短弓或复合长弓）视为简易武器而非军用武器。第5等级起，每当你用丝绸弓造成一次大成功或大失败时，你获得其大成功或大失败专精效果。你可以在丝绸弓处于弓形态或作为一捆丝绸时为其刻印符文。若你选择刻印一枚仅对复合短弓或复合长弓之一生效、而无法同时对两者生效的符文，则当丝绸弓处于另一种弓形态时，该符文为未激活状态。

You can transform your special Purgatorial silk into a bow. You possess a length of special silk, which you can transform into either a composite shortbow or composite longbow as long as it's in your hands. You can transform the silk into either type of bow either as part of the Interact action to draw or pick up the silk or at any time while you're holding the silk in its mundane or bow form. If you aren't wielding the silk, it transforms back immediately. If you ever lose the silk, you can spin a new bundle by spending 1 day of downtime to do so.
