You treat your silkbow (though not other composite shortbows or composite longbows) as a simple weapon instead of a martial weapon for the purpose of proficiency. At 5th level, whenever you get a critical hit with your silkbow, you get its critical specialization effect. You can apply runes to your silkbow whether in bow form or as a bundle of silk. If you choose to apply a rune that would only work on a composite shortbow or a composite longbow but not both, the rune is inactive when the silkbow is in the form of the other type of bow.

Summer's Tangle.name: 夏之纠缠 Summer's Tangle
Summer's Tangle.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

你召唤盛夏野蛮生长的力量，制造一团野性纠缠，将敌人困在其中。你15尺内的所有方格在你下个回合开始前变为困难地形，但你不会被这种生长所阻碍；在夏季期间，这些方格改为强效困难地形。此外，回合结束时位于受影响空间内的生物必须对抗你更高的职业DC或法术DC进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] 豁免，失败则获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{定身} 状态，持续至该生物下个回合结束，或直到其进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{挣脱} 为止，以先发生者为准（挣脱DC同样为你更高的职业DC或法术DC）。

特殊 每当季节从夏季变为秋季时，你可以选择立即将“盛夏纠缠”专长重训为 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.I6SQrqNpO0LZpoGf]{秋之脱落}，若你愿意的话。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You call upon the power of summer's wild growth to create a wild tangle and ensnare your foes within. All squares within 15 feet of you become difficult terrain until the start of your next turn, though you aren't impeded by this growth; during the summer, the squares become greater difficult terrain instead. In addition, a creature that ends its turn in an affected space must succeed at a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until the end of that creature's next turn or until they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}, whichever comes first (the Escape DC is also the higher of your class DC or spell DC).

Special Whenever the season changes from summer to autumn, you can choose to instantly retrain the Summer's Tangle feat to @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.I6SQrqNpO0LZpoGf]{Autumn's Abscission} if you prefer.

One with the Storm.name: 与风暴合一者 One with the Storm
One with the Storm.description:
多亏你血脉中蕴含的风暴之力，你可以命令天气为你效力，随心所欲地让风暴成形或消散。你每周可以施放两次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XkDCzMIyc0YOjw05]{Control Weather} 仪式，且不需要次要施法者。当你这样做时，施法时间缩短为1小时，并且你将该仪式主检定中掷出失败或大成功或大失败的结果视为成功（无论如何仍要进行主检定的掷骰，以查看你是否大成功，并且不进行任何次要检定）。

Thanks to the power of the storm within your blood, you can command the weather to do your bidding, causing storms to form and fragment at your whim. You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XkDCzMIyc0YOjw05]{Control Weather} ritual twice per week without the need for secondary casters. When you do, the casting time is reduced to 1 hour and you treat a roll of a failure or critical failure on the ritual's primary check as a success instead (roll the primary check anyway to see if you critically succeed, and don't roll any secondary checks).

Ancient Uprooted.name: 远古连根拔起者 Ancient Uprooted
Ancient Uprooted.description:
频率 每天一次

大多数树栖族学习与适应都很缓慢，但作为一名离根者，你对任何新情况的反应都要快得多。你反思自身的古老智慧，更换你通过 Ancient Wood 选择的技能（如果你拥有该专长，也更换你通过 Ancient Expert 选择的技能）。

Frequency once per day

Most arboreals learn and adapt slowly, but as an uprooted, you react much more quickly to any new situation. You reflect on your ancient wisdom, changing the skill you selected with Ancient Wood (and the skill you selected with Ancient Expert if you have that feat).

Mental Link.name: 心灵链接 Mental Link
Mental Link.description:
正如你从自己吃掉的大脑中汲取灵能一样，你也能与其他生物的心智建立链接，并将信息迅速灌注其中。你可以每小时一次将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs] 作为异能天生法术施放。

Just as you draw psychic energy from the brains you eat for yourself, you can link with other creature's minds and pour information into them quickly. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.D442XMADp01qJ7Cs] once per hour as an occult innate spell.

Golem's Grip.name: 魔像之握 Golem's Grip
Golem's Grip.description:
你强壮而坚固的魔像裔手臂与双手足以制伏一名体型远超你的生物。你在运动中成为专家（若你已在运动中为专家，则改为选择另一项技能成为专家），并且无论你是中型还是大型魔像裔，你都可以[[/act grapple]]体型至多为超巨型的生物。若你已经拥有擒抱超巨型生物的能力，则你改为在擒抱体型类别比你大一级的生物时获得+1环境加值，因为更大的生物更难躲开一名强大且体型小得多的对手的握制。若你同时也是运动大师，则该环境加值提升至+2。

Your powerful and sturdy golemborn arms and hands are capable of holding down a creature that dwarfs your size. You become an expert in Athletics (or another skill if you were already an expert in Athletics) and you can [[/act grapple]] a creature of up to size Gargantuan, regardless of whether you are a Medium or Large golemborn. If you already have the ability to Grapple Gargantuan creatures, you instead gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Grapple creature of a size category larger than you, as the bigger creature has trouble eluding the grip of a powerful and much smaller opponent. If you're also a master in Athletics, this circumstance bonus increases to +2.

Shield Push.name: 盾击推撞 Shield Push
Shield Push.description:
频率 每 10 分钟一次

你鼓起能量，举盾向前冲锋，以如同树木守卫般的势头将敌人撞开。你先疾走，然后在你的移动结束时用盾牌、盾刺或盾钉进行一次打击。若该攻击命中，你将目标推开 10 尺。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

You muster up your energy and rush forward with your shield, knocking your foe along with your momentum like an arboreal warden. You Stride, and then make a Strike with a shield, shield boss, or shield spikes at the end of your movement. If the attack hits, you push the target 10 feet.

Golem Conversion.name: 魔像转换 Golem Conversion
Golem Conversion.description:
频率 每日一次

通过一次接触，你可以将触及范围内的1个生物变形成与你相似的存在。目标会变为你传承的基本材料，其效果取决于目标针对你职业DC与法术DC中较高者进行的 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] 豁免结果。对血肉魔像而言，这会将其变为一尊由缝合在一起的死肉构成的雕像。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 1（状态）}，持续1轮，因为你的基本材料开始在其身体上成形。

失败 目标获得缓慢 1，并且必须在其每个回合结束时尝试一次 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell|traits:incapacitation] 豁免；这次持续的豁免具有失能（特征）。在豁免失败时，缓慢（状态）增加1（大失败则增加2），因为你的基本材料的增生逐渐蔓延其全身。豁免成功则使缓慢（状态）减少1。当某个生物因源自“魔像转化”的缓慢（状态）而完全无法行动时，该效果随即结束，使目标永久变形为由你的基本材料构成的雕像（除此之外使用石化（状态））。如果缓慢（状态）被移除，该效果也会结束，并使材料无害地脱落。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pr1ruNTbzGn3H9w5] 法术可以逆转该永久变形，即使你的魔像转化并未将生物变为石头；任何在 @Check[type:arcana|dc:20] 或 @Check[type:crafting|dc:20] 检定中成功的生物都能察觉这一点。

大失败 同失败，但目标起始时获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 2（状态）}。

Frequency once per day

With a touch, you can transform one creature within your reach into a being like yourself. The target transforms into the fundamental material of your heritage, with effects depending on their @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and your spell DC. For flesh golems, this transformed them into a statue of stitched-together dead flesh.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round as your fundamental material begins to form on their body.

Failure The target is slowed 1 and must attempt a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class-spell|traits:incapacitation] save at the end of each of its turns; this ongoing save has the incapacitation trait. On a failed save, the slowed condition increases by 1 (or 2 on a critical failure) as your fundamental material's growths creep across their body. A successful save reduces the slowed condition by 1. When a creature becomes fully unable to act due to the slowed condition from Golem Conversion, the effect then ends, leaving the target transformed permanently into a statue of your fundamental material (otherwise using the petrified condition). The effect also ends if the slowed condition is removed, which causes the material to break off harmlessly. The @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Pr1ruNTbzGn3H9w5] spell can reverse the permanent transformation even if your Golem Conversion didn't transform a creature into stone, and that fact is apparent to any creature who succeeds at a @Check[type:arcana|dc:20] or @Check[type:crafting|dc:20] check.

Critical Failure As failure, but the target is initially @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2}.

Slowing Chill.name: 迟缓寒意 Slowing Chill
Slowing Chill.description:
你冻结敌人的能力有所提升。每当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.cGnag0RcALzSAMdx]{Numbing Chill} 且一名生物的豁免失败或大失败时，除了 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} 之外，你还可以使一名生物在相同的持续时间内成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}。

Your ability to freeze your enemies has improved. Whenever you use @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.cGnag0RcALzSAMdx]{Numbing Chill} and a creature fails or critically fails their saving throw, you can cause a creature to become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for the same duration, in addition to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}.

Psychic Sight.name: 灵能视界 Psychic Sight
Psychic Sight.description:
你运用心灵的力量来看见无形之物。你改变你的视觉皮层，为你勾勒出 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} 的生物和物体的轮廓。它们在你眼中呈现为半透明的形状，并且对你而言处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} 状态。这会降低隐形带来的好处，但除此之外并不会帮助你找到一个 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf] 生物。

You use the power of your mind to see the invisible. You alter your visual cortex to outline @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} creatures and objects for you. They appear to you as translucent shapes, and they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to you. This reduces the benefit of invisibility but doesn't otherwise help you in finding a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf] creature.

Misfortune Resistance.name: 厄运抗力 Misfortune Resistance
Misfortune Resistance.description:
你是拉弥亚的继承者，诸神所诅咒者。认为一个低等的厄运会困扰你实在可爱。每当一名生物以一个厄运效果将你作为目标时，进行一次 @Check[type:flat|dc:16]。若成功，你不受影响。

You are an heir to Lamia, Accursed of the Gods. The idea that a lesser jinx might trouble you is adorable, really. Whenever a creature targets you with a misfortune effect, make a @Check[type:flat|dc:16]. On a success, you are unaffected.

Fundamental Polarity.name: 基本极性 Fundamental Polarity
Fundamental Polarity.description:
虽然你并不像那些无心智的魔像表亲那样对大多数魔法拥有完全免疫，但你仍对某些类型的能量或魔法有一定防护。根据你的传承，你获得对一种伤害类型或带有一种或多种特征的魔法效果的抗力，数值等于你等级的一半（最低 1）。若伤害来源为魔法效果（石制或木制魔裔始终如此），则该抗力再增加 1；这项针对魔法效果的额外抗力在 13 级时提升为 2。

黏土魔裔 对酸蚀伤害的抗力。

血肉魔裔 对电击伤害的抗力。

寒冰魔裔 对寒冷伤害的抗力。

铁制魔裔 对火焰伤害的抗力。

石制魔裔 对带有土（特征）的魔法效果的抗力。

木制魔裔 对带有植物或木（特征）的魔法效果的抗力。

While you don't have the complete immunity to most magic that your mindless golem cousins have, you are somewhat protected from certain types of energy or magic. Depending on your heritage, you gain resistance to one type of damage or one or more traits of magical effects equal to half your level (minimum 1). If the source of the damage is a magical effect (which is always the case for stone or wood golemborn), the resistance increases by 1; this additional resistance for magical effects increases to 2 at 13th level.

Clay Golemborn resistance to acid damage.

Flesh Golemborn resistance to electricity damage.

Ice Golemborn resistance to cold damage.

Iron Golemborn resistance to fire damage.

Stone Golemborn resistance to magical effects with the earth trait.

Wood Golemborn resistance to magical effects with the plant or wood trait.

Chimera Breath.name: 奇美拉吐息 Chimera Breath
Chimera Breath.description:
你深吸一口气，并以强力的呼气释放你的个人能量。选择酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或毒素。若你选择酸蚀或电击，你的奇美拉吐息为30尺线形；否则为15尺锥形，并造成2d4点你所选择类型的伤害。区域内的每个生物都必须针对你职业DC或法术DC中较高者进行一次基础反射豁免。若伤害类型为毒素，则该豁免改为强韧而非反射。你在10分钟内无法再次使用此能力；自等级3起，你改为在1d4轮内无法再次使用该能力。

伤害在5级时增加1d4，此后每2个等级再增加1d4，至19级时最多为10d4点伤害。

特殊 若你还拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.VKnH57GDAkwt2EDW]{奇美拉抗力}族裔专长，你必须选择相同的伤害类型。

You breathe in deeply and release your personal energy in a powerful exhalation. Choose acid, cold, electricity, fire, or poison. Your chimera breath is a 30-foot line if you chose acid or electricity or a 15-foot cone otherwise, and deals 2d4 damage of the type you chose. Each creature in the area must attempt a basic Reflex saving throw against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. If the damage type is poison, the saving throw is Fortitude instead of Reflex. You can't use this ability again for 10 minutes; starting at level 3, you instead can't use the ability again for 1d4 rounds.

The damage increases by 1d4 at 5th level and every 2 levels thereafter, to a maximum of 10d4 damage at 19th level.

Special If you also have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.VKnH57GDAkwt2EDW]{Chimerical Resistance} ancestry feat, you must choose the same damage type.

Winged Eye.name: 翼眼 Winged Eye
Winged Eye.description:
频率 每天一次

你从身体里长出翅膀——这一过程比长出你正常的柄眼要复杂得多——并用它们在短时间内漂浮和飞行。你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度，持续5分钟。

Frequency once per day

You grow wings out of your body—a process that is much more complex than growing your normal stalks—and use them to float and fly for a brief time. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed for 5 minutes.

Let's Split Up, Gang!.name: 我们分头行动吧，伙计们！ Let's Split Up, Gang!
Let's Split Up, Gang!.description:
你汇聚神秘能量，随后在一阵绚丽的闪光中分裂，为你融合中的每一名成员形成各自独立的身体，且每个身体的体型均为中型（双头巨人看起来大致像类人，刻耳柏洛斯看起来像狼或人类大小的狗，九头蛇看起来像人类大小的巨蛇）。在分裂期间，融合的每个成员都有自己的身体并分别移动，暂时失去融合身体与组合移动族裔能力的效果。此外，在分裂期间，你不能使用任何组合动作，但当所有成员彼此相邻时，你可以再次使用 Let's Split Up Gang! 以回到你的组合形态；并且你不能使用通常会作用于你融合中其他成员的其他效果（例如能力：自动使用接触心灵感应，或 Did You Mean Me? 与 Shared Mind 的反应动作（）），具体由你的 GM 决定。

特殊 如果你是九头蛇，由于你在分裂的身体中只有一个头，你的头不会在 0 点生命值时被砍掉；你会像常规一样因斩首而死亡，或在濒死 4 时死亡。

You gather mystic energy and then split in a flash of colorful light, forming separate bodies for every member of your fusion that are each size Medium (a two-headed giant looks roughly like a humanoid, a cerberus looks like a wolf or human-sized dog, and a hydra looks like a human-sized serpent). While split, each member of the fusion has their own body and moves separately, temporarily losing the effects of the fused body and combined movement ancestry abilities. Additionally, while split, you can't use any combined actions except that you can use Let's Split Up Gang! again when all members are adjacent to each other to return to your combined form, and you can't use other effects that normally apply to other members of your fusion (like the ability to automatically use touch telepathy or the Did You Mean Me? And Shared Mind reactions), as determined by your GM.

Special If you're a hydra, since you only have one head in your split body, your head isn't cut off at 0 Hit Points and you die normally from decapitation or at dying 4.

Arboreal Lore.name: 树木传说 Arboreal Lore
Arboreal Lore.description:
你在根源深处理解林地，并能在需要时运用自己的力量保护它们。你获得运动和自然的受训（熟练度）。如果你原本会自动在这些技能之一上成为受训（熟练度）（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训（熟练度），或获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore}专长（森林学识）。你还获得Additional Lore专长（树木学识）。

You understand the woodlands deep in your roots, and you can exercise your strength to protect them when needed. You gain the trained proficiency rank in Athletics and Nature. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead either become trained in a skill of your choice or gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Forest Lore. You also gain the Additional Lore feat for Arboreal Lore.

Unlock Soul's Magic.name: 解锁灵魂的魔法 Unlock Soul's Magic
Unlock Soul's Magic.description:
你基于你的传承解锁了新的魔法能力。你可以选择获得基于你传承的法术、“任意”类别中的法术，或两者都选。若你只选择一个法术，你每天可以施放所选法术两次；若你同时选择两个法术，则你每天各能施放一次，且它们均为神圣先天法术。

Calaca: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Yv3AFIO55FONQYMH]

Catrina: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.b515AZlB0sridKSq]

Morrigna: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9s5tqqXNzcoKamWx]

Nosoi: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]

Olethros: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]

Shoki: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3ehSrqTAm7IPqbIZ]

Vanth: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3JG1t3T4mWn6vTke]

任意: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]

You've unlocked new magical abilities based on your heritage. You choose to gain the spell based on your heritage, the spell from the "any" category, or both. You gain the ability to cast the spell you chose twice per day if you only chose one, or once per day each if you chose both spells, as divine innate spells.

Calaca: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Yv3AFIO55FONQYMH]

Catrina: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.b515AZlB0sridKSq]

Morrigna: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9s5tqqXNzcoKamWx]

Nosoi: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]

Olethros: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]

Shoki: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3ehSrqTAm7IPqbIZ]

Vanth: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3JG1t3T4mWn6vTke]

Any: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]

Racing Thoughts.name: 思绪如飞 Racing Thoughts
Racing Thoughts.description:
你与融合中的其他成员进行的争论、辩论与讨论，已经达到了即使进行复杂讨论也能无言沟通的程度。你获得接触心灵感应，使你只要共享一种语言，就能通过接触与任何生物纯以心灵进行交流。此心灵感应也会延伸至你融合中的其他成员，无需明确接触他们所控制的身体部位。

Your arguments, debates, and discussions with the other members of your fusion have reached the point where you can communicate wordlessly, even for a complex discussion. You gain touch telepathy, allowing you to communicate purely mentally via touch with any creature if you share a language. This telepathy extends to other members of your fusion without needing to explicitly touch a part of the body they control.

Primal Scent.name: 原初气味 Primal Scent
Primal Scent.description:
你能像与你共享形态的动物一样，凭借风中哪怕最微弱的气味也能追踪你的猎物。你获得不精确嗅觉，射程为30英尺。

You can catch even the faintest odor of your prey on the wind, like the animal whose shape you share. You gain imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet.

Shattering Stomp.name: 碎裂践踏 Shattering Stomp
Shattering Stomp.description:
频率 每分钟一次

你跺一下脚，震碎地面，留下破碎的瓦砾以阻碍移动。与你相邻的、数量等于1加上你的力量调整值（最少1）的若干空间变为困难地形。你无视你以这种方式创造的困难地形。

Frequency once per minute

With a stomp of your foot, you shatter the ground, leaving behind fractured rubble to impede movement. A number of adjacent spaces equal to 1 plus your Strength modifier (minimum 1) become difficult terrain. You ignore difficult terrain you create this way.

Wrath of God (Remaster).name: 神之愤怒（重制版） Wrath of God (Remaster)
Wrath of God (Remaster).description:
频率 每天一次

有时，天界的工作所需并非微妙，而是压倒性的、令人敬畏的力量。好在，你正适合提供这一点。你在500尺内召唤神之震怒，以神圣光辉的爆发降临，形成一个@Template[type:burst|distance:60]{60尺半径爆发}。如果神之震怒与一个黑暗效果重叠，它会尝试以反制等级等于你等级的一半（向上取整），以及反制调整值等于你的职业DC – 10或你的法术DC – 10中较高者，来反制该黑暗效果。区域内所有生物受到@Damage[8d10[fire]]伤害，此外，不死生物还会受到@Damage[8d10[vitality]]{8d10}额外活力伤害，邪魔则会受到@Damage[8d10[spirit]]{8d10}额外灵魂伤害。不死邪魔承受活力伤害或灵魂伤害之一，以对其更不利者为准。效果取决于一次@Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell]豁免，其对抗值为你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

大成功或大失败：成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，且在1轮内获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩}。

大成功或大失败：失败 该生物受到全部伤害，在1轮内获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明}与目眩，并且若其不在自身的本位面上，则它必须进行一次@Check[type:will|against:class-spell]意志豁免，对抗值为你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者，否则将被放逐至其本位面。

Frequency once per day

Sometimes, the work of the heavens requires not subtlety but overwhelming, awe-inspiring force. Happily, this you are well-positioned to provide. You call down the wrath of god in an explosion of divine radiance with a @Template[type:burst|distance:60]{60-foot radius burst} within 500 feet. If the wrath of god overlaps with a darkness effect, it attempts to counteract the darkness effect with a counteract level equal to half your level rounded up and a counteract modifier equal to the higher of your class DC – 10 or your spell DC – 10. All creatures in the area take @Damage[8d10[fire]] damage, plus @Damage[8d10[vitality]]{8d10} additional vitality damage to undead creatures and @Damage[8d10[spirit]]{8d10} additional spirit damage to fiends. Undead fiends take one or the other of the vitality damage or spirit damage, whichever is worse for them. The effects depend on a @Check[type:reflex|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} and dazzled for 1 round, and if it's not on its home plane, it must succeed at a @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC and your spell DC or be banished to its home plane.

Compel Condemned.name: 强迫受谴责者 Compel Condemned
Compel Condemned.description:
频率 每小时一次

你通过言语或歌声，以魔法强迫30尺内的一名生物接近你。目标必须尝试一次 @Check[will|against:class-spell] 豁免，其DC等于你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者。

成功 该生物不受影响，且在1小时内暂时免疫“强迫受谴”。

失败 该生物必须在其下个回合的第一个动作中尽快向你移动，同时避开明显的危险。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但该生物必须在其下个回合用尽所有动作向你移动。若其抵达你身边，则在其回合剩余时间保持静止，不进行任何其他动作。你可以在后续的轮中维持此能力，使持续时间延长1轮。若你如此做，则目标再次尝试该豁免，并使用其新的结果。

Frequency once per hour

You magically compel a creature within 30 feet to approach you, either through word or song. The target must attempt a @Check[will|against:class-spell] save with a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Success The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune to Compel Condemned for 1 hour.

Failure The creature must spend the first action on its next turn to move closer to you as quickly as possible, while avoiding obvious dangers.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature must use all its actions on its next turn to move closer to you. If it reaches you, it remains still for the rest of its turn, taking no other actions. You can Sustain this ability on subsequent rounds, extending the duration by 1 round. If you do, the target attempts the saving throw again, using its new result.

Shared Mind.name: 共享心智 Shared Mind
Shared Mind.description:
触发 你融合中的另一名成员即将针对一个可能影响到你但并未以你为目标的精神效果进行意志豁免。

虽然你与融合中的其他人是独立的个体，但你们的心智并未完全断开，你可以将它们交融在一起以帮助抵御精神攻击。即便你起初并非目标，你们每个人都要对触发的效果进行意志豁免，但你们双方使用两个d20结果中较高的那个，各自加上自己独立的意志豁免调整值并承受相应效果。

Trigger Another member of your fusion is about to attempt a Will save against a mental effect that could affect you but didn't target you.

While you're a separate person from the others in your fusion, your minds aren't completely disconnected, and you can blend them together to help ward off a mental attack. Even though you originally weren't targeted, each of you attempts the Will save against the triggering effect, but you both use the higher of the two d20 results, adding your own individual Will save modifiers and taking the appropriate effects.

Omega Beam.name: 欧米伽光束 Omega Beam
Omega Beam.description:
频率 每日一次

你将四个头一同使用，蓄力并发射一道难以置信的强力光束来湮灭你的敌人，造成几乎胜过任何其他魔法或效果的破坏；该光束为一条最宽 2 英尺、最长可达 @Template[type:line|distance:300]{300 feet long} 的直线区域。当你的融合为欧米伽光束花费其动作时，你会明显开始为光束充能；该光束会在你本回合内最后一名行动的融合成员的回合发射。光束路径上的生物受到 @Damage[40d12[force]] 伤害，其结果取决于它们进行的强韧或反射豁免（取较低者），对抗融合成员中最高的职业DC或法术DC。

大成功 该生物能够在很大程度上避开并硬扛欧米伽光束，受到 @Damage[40[force]] 伤害。

成功 该生物抵抗或闪避了部分光束，但仍受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受光束的全部威力，受到全额伤害，并获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮。

大失败 该生物被光束蹂躏。其受到全额伤害，外加额外 100 点力场伤害（@Damage[(40d12 + 100)[force]]），并目眩 1 分钟且 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{昏迷 1}。

Frequency once per day

Using all four of your heads together, you charge up and fire off an incredibly powerful beam to annihilate your foes, creating devastation more damaging than just about any other magic or effect in a line up to 2 feet wide and up to @Template[type:line|distance:300]{300 feet long}. As soon as your fusion spends the actions for Omega Beam, you visibly begin charging the beam, which fires on the turn of the last member of your fusion to act in that turn. Creatures in the beam's path take @Damage[40d12[force]] damage, with a result depending on their Fortitude or Reflex save (whichever is lower) against the highest class DC or spell DC among the members of the fusion.

Critical Success The creature is able to mostly avoid and shrug off the Omega Beam and takes @Damage[40[force]] damage.

Success The creature resists or dodges some of the beam but still takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes the beam's full force and takes full damage, and they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is ravaged by the beam. They take full damage, plus an additional 100 force damage (@Damage[(40d12 + 100)[force]]) and are dazzled for 1 minute and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Furious Fusillade.name: 狂怒齐射 Furious Fusillade
Furious Fusillade.description:
需求 你正持用一把弓

如同地狱缚誓的厄瑞尼厄斯一般，你可以朝一个方向对附近的敌人倾泻狂暴的箭雨。若你正在飞行，你在原地悬停（使你即使在本回合不进行飞行也能留在空中），然后你用弓向 @Template[type:cone|distance:30] 内任意数量的生物射出箭矢，每个敌人一箭。分别为每次攻击掷骰，但在你完成狂怒齐射的所有攻击之前，这些攻击不会使你的多重攻击减值增加。

特殊 若目标正因你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} 反应动作（）而在其攻击掷骰上承受环境减值，则他们在对抗狂怒齐射的弓打击时，其AC也承受相同的环境减值。

Requirements you are wielding a bow

Like a Hellbound erinys, you can unleash a furious fusillade of arrows at nearby foes in one direction. If you were flying, you hover in place (allowing you to remain in the air even if you don't Fly this turn), and then you fire arrows from your bow at any number of creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30], one arrow for each foe. Roll each attack separately, but don't increase your multiple attack penalty from these attacks until you complete all the attacks from your Furious Fusillade.

Special If the target is taking a circumstance penalty to its attack rolls from your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.XGup7ar5eow5NANE]{Scheming Trick} reaction, they take the same circumstance penalty to their AC against the bow Strike from Furious Fusillade.

Walk Unhindered.name: 无碍行走 Walk Unhindered
Walk Unhindered.description:
你可以通过一定的努力，将你怪物般的本性收束在体内。你的下半身变为类人生物的双腿，而你看起来——就任何人所能判断的程度——就像是一个人类或其他与你上半身外观相符的类似类人生物（不过由于你的上半身并未改变，任何曾以拉弥亚的身份见过你的人都能立刻认出你）。使用 Walk Unhindered 在使用 Deception 来进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} 时，算作创造了一个伪装，而你的变化会自动战胜用于判断你是否为正常人类的 察觉 DC；只有主动掷出 察觉 来检查你的生物才可能注意到该伪装。处于你的变形形态时，你无法使用徒手攻击或其他需要你从拉弥亚形态获得的身体特征的能力——例如，你无法进行獠牙攻击或使用 Feed。你可以无限期维持你的另一形态，并且可以通过再次使用该动作来变回你的拉弥亚形态。

特殊 你可以选择以族裔增益获得 Change Shape，而不必选择此专长，作为交换你将不再拥有昏暗视觉。若你做出此选择，你之后不能再 重训 Walk Unhindered，但你可以通过花费一个1级专长来重新获得昏暗视觉。

You can, with a certain amount of effort, contain your monstrous nature inside yourself. Your lower body turns into humanoid legs, and you appear to be, as near as anyone can tell, a human or other similar humanoid that matches your upper body’s appearance (though since your upper body hasn’t changed, anyone who has met you as a lamia can instantly recognize you). Using Walk Unhindered counts as creating a disguise when using Deception to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate}, and your transformation automatically defeats Perception DCs to determine if you’re a normal human; only creatures actively rolling Perception to examine you might notice the disguise. While in your shapeshifted form, you can’t use unarmed attacks or other abilities that require physical features you receive from your lamia form—for instance, you can’t make fangs attacks or use Feed. You can remain in your alternate form indefinitely and can shift back to your lamia form by using this action again.

Special You can choose to gain Change Shape as an ancestry benefit without taking this feat in exchange for not having low-light vision. If you make this choice, you can’t retrain Walk Unhindered later, but you can regain low-light vision by spending a 1st level feat.

Piercing Hymn.name: 穿刺圣歌 Piercing Hymn
Piercing Hymn.description:
对天堂圣歌团的天使而言，用声音震碎玻璃不过是小把戏。震碎石头——这才是值得的挑战。你的穿刺之歌远程徒手攻击造成 1d6 音波伤害而非 1d4，射程增量提升至 40 尺，并且在大成功时，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{耳聋} 效果的持续时间提升为武器伤害骰数量的两倍。你的穿刺之歌会无视等同于武器伤害骰数量的、一个无生命物体的硬度。

For an angel of the heavenly choir, shattering glass with one's voice is a cheap trick. Shattering stone—now that's a worthy challenge. Your piercing song ranged unarmed attack deals 1d6 sonic damage instead of 1d4, the range increment increases to 40 feet, and the duration of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} effect on a critical hit increases to twice the number of weapon damage dice. Your piercing song ignores an amount of an inanimate object's Hardness equal to the number of weapon damage dice.

Accursed Eruption.name: 诅咒喷发 Accursed Eruption
Accursed Eruption.description:
需求 你处于满足状态。

你可以将你的诅咒在你周围爆发为翻涌的亵渎之力之团，以其掌控包裹所有附近的敌人。若你的下一个动作是使用你的 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.BBoW3Vhh9uKvEVkC]{Accursed Caress}，你可以影响处于 @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] 内的所有敌人，而非你触及内的单一生物。虽然你必须处于满足状态才能使用 Accursed Eruption，但使用它不会让你不再处于满足状态（不过使用 Accursed Caress 仍如常会）。

Requirements You are satisfied.

You can erupt your curse around you in a roiling mass of blasphemous power, enveloping all nearby foes in its grasp. If your next action is to use your @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.BBoW3Vhh9uKvEVkC]{Accursed Caress}, you can affect all foes in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20], rather than a single creature in your reach. While you must be satisfied to use Accursed Eruption, using it doesn’t make you no longer satisfied (though using Accursed Caress does as normal).

Fusion Magic.name: 融合 魔法 Fusion Magic
Fusion Magic.description:
你汲取你融合中其他个体之一的魔法，使你获得一个他们已知的戏法。选择一个来自你的融合中其他成员之一所知的奥术、神圣、异能或原初法术列表中的戏法（例如，来自一位法师成员的法术书或一位术士成员的法术库）。你可以将该戏法作为先天法术施放，其根源与该融合成员相同。即使该成员之后失去该法术（例如通过重训将该法术从其法术库中移除），你仍可通过此专长继续维持它。

You draw upon the magic of one of the other individuals in your fusion, granting you a cantrip they know. Choose a cantrip from any of the arcane, divine, occult, or primal spell lists known to one of the other members of your fusion (for instance, in a wizard member's spellbook or a sorcerer member's spell repertoire). You can cast this cantrip as an innate spell from the same tradition as the other member of your fusion. Even if the other member later loses the spell (such as by retraining the spell out of their repertoire), you can continue to maintain it through this feat.

Wrest Mind.name: 扭曲心智 Wrest Mind
Wrest Mind.description:
频率 每小时一次

你暂时控制60尺内的一名生物，并将其作为你在战斗中的棋子使用。该效果取决于其针对取你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者的意志豁免。

大成功或大失败 目标不受影响。

成功 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}，但抵抗住你的控制。

失败 你控制目标至多10分钟。其获得被控制（状态），但它可以在其每个回合结束时尝试一次意志豁免。成功时，它不再被控制。

大成功或大失败 同失败，但只有当你给予其一个违背其天性的全新命令时，目标才会进行一次新的豁免（对大多数生物而言，这包括杀死其盟友）。

Frequency once per hour

You temporarily take control of a creature within 60 feet and use them as your pawn in battle. The effect depends on your Will save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} but fights off your control.

Failure You control the target for up to 10 minutes. It gains the controlled condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, it is no longer controlled.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if you give it a new order that is against its nature (for most creatures, that includes killing its allies).

Golem Lore.name: 魔像学识 Golem Lore
Golem Lore.description:
你已经了解将魔像赋予生命所需的魔法与塑造技能。你在奥术学识与制作中成为受训。如果你原本会自动在其中一项技能中成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你则改为在你选择的一项技能中成为受训。你还获得用于“魔像学识”的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{额外学识} 专长，其中包含关于像你这样的魔像裔的信息。

You have learned about the magic and sculpting skills needed to bring golems to life. You become trained in Arcana and Crafting. If you would automatically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Golem Lore, which includes information about golemborn such as yourself.

Embrace of Home.name: 家园的拥抱 Embrace of Home
Embrace of Home.description:
感受你的育群回归身体的拥抱会强化你的决心。当你花费一个交互动作将你的育群拉回体内时，你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值。你会在你下个回合结束时，或你下一次使用一次虫群血脉动作时（以先发生者为准）失去任何剩余的临时生命值。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.BvDgsu5YLKiHFrs5]{效果：归家之拥}

Feeling the embrace of your brood coming home to your body fortifies your resolve. When you spend an Interact action to draw your brood back into your body, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level. You lose any remaining temporary Hit Points at the end of your next turn or the next time you use a swarmblood action, whichever comes first.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.BvDgsu5YLKiHFrs5]{Effect: Embrace of Home}

Swarmkind Form.name: 虫群形态 Swarmkind Form
Swarmkind Form.description:
你释放你的虫群后代并蜕下皮肤，变形为与你的虫群同类型的动物，使你能够独自侦察一片区域，并伪装成一只看起来无害的动物。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl]法术的效果，但你必须采取与虫群中的生物相匹配的超小型战斗形态。你可以再次使用此动作以返回你的正常形态。

特殊：如果你的后代中的生物能够飞行，且你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.F76zhXcx59rIDtXr]族裔专长，你获得4环害虫形态法术的效果，且你的虫群同类形态获得飞行速度。

You release your brood and shed your skin, transforming into an animal of the same type as your swarm and allowing you to scout an area by yourself, posing as an innocuous-looking animal. You gain the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.gfPjmG6Fe6D3MFjl] spell, except that you must assume a Tiny battle form that matches the creatures of your swarm. You can use this action again to return to your normal form.

Special: If the creatures of your brood can fly and you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.F76zhXcx59rIDtXr] ancestry feat, you gain the effects of a 4th-rank pest form spell and your swarmkind form gains a fly speed.

Last Impressions.name: 最后印象 Last Impressions
Last Impressions.description:
你能从你吞食的每一颗大脑中获得灵能印象，感受到死者的情感回响。每当你吃下一颗来自小型或更大的有感知生物的新鲜大脑时，你会从他们生命中的情绪事件中获得灵能印象。这通常会带来一条具体的信息，但大量较小的情绪联结会让你更容易理解他们的感受，并作为通灵媒介，令你在用于安抚丧亲者的技能检定上获得+1环境加值（若你在用于充当通灵媒介的该技能上为大师，则改为+2）。通常这会是欺瞒检定、交涉检定，或与充当通灵媒介相关的学识检定，不过GM也可能裁定其他技能同样适用。

You can gain a psychic impression from each brain you devour, feeling an emotional echo of the deceased. Whenever you eat a fresh brain from a Small or larger sapient creature, you gain psychic impressions from emotional events in their lives. This typically results in one concrete piece of information, but the numerous smaller emotional links make it easier to understand their feelings and act as a medium, granting a +1 circumstance bonus on skill checks to satisfy the bereaved (or +2 if you're a master in the skill you're using to act as a medium). Typically these are Deception checks, Diplomacy checks, or Lore checks associated with acting as a medium, though the GM might decide other skills might apply.

Vine Splint.name: 藤蔓夹板 Vine Splint
Vine Splint.description:
频率 每日一次

你在折断的枝干周围生长出一张藤蔓网，修复你树木形态所受的伤害。你恢复等于你等级三倍的生命值（@Damage[(3*@actor.level)[治疗]]）。

Frequency once per day

You grow a mesh of vines around your broken branches, repairing damage to your arboreal form. You regain Hit Points equal to three times your level (@Damage[(3*@actor.level)[healing]]).

Truespeech.name: 真言 Truespeech
Truespeech.description:
许多天使是天界的信使，这要求他们能够说话各种奇异而有趣的语言。你可以将 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K] 作为神术类先天法术每日一次施放，仅能以你自己为目标。当你在施放前已与之共享一种语言的生物说话时，在该法术的持续时间内，你在交涉检定上获得+1状态加值。

如果你愿意，在法术期间你还可以让每位听众——甚至包括你未察觉到的那些——都以他们认为的母语或最偏好的说话方式听到你；如果你不想，你不需要选择单一听众。

Many angels are messengers of the heavens, which requires them to be able to speak any number of strange and curious tongues. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SwUiVavHKMWG7t5K] as a divine innate spell once per day on yourself only. You gain a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks for the duration of the spell when speaking to creatures with whom you already shared a language before casting.

If you desire, during the spell you can also have each listener, even those of whom you're not aware, hear you in whatever they consider their native or most favored speech—you don't need to select a single listener if you don't want to.

Giant's Stampede.name: 巨人的践踏冲锋 Giant's Stampede
Giant's Stampede.description:
频率 每日一次

你呼唤自身传奇之力，推动你庞大的身躯穿过任意数量的敌人，以你的体重碾碎较小的敌人，并在你经过时的余波中猛击甚至更大的生物。你【Stride】两次，穿过阻挡你去路的任何生物的空间，对这些生物造成 @Damage[16d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害；这些生物必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] 豁免，豁免DC取你的职业DC与法术DC中较高者；若该生物体型比你更小且其豁免大失败，则其还会被击倒 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。你的移动不会触发基于移动的反应动作（）。

Frequency once per day

You call upon the power of your legend and propel your massive body through any number of your foes, crushing smaller enemies beneath your weight and thrashing even larger creatures in your passing wake. You Stride twice, moving through the spaces of any creatures in your way, dealing those creatures @Damage[16d6[bludgeoning]] damage with a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC and spell DC; if the creature is smaller than you and critically fails their save, they're also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Your movement doesn't trigger reactions based on movement.

Liar, Liar.name: 骗子，骗子 Liar, Liar
Liar, Liar.description:
你像呼吸一样轻松地说谎与误导。你在欺瞒中成为专家。到第7等级时，你在欺瞒中成为大师；到第15等级时，你在欺瞒中成为传奇。你还可以从 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{Charming Liar} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Dvz54d6aPhjsmUux]{Lie to Me} 技能专长中选择其一获得。

You lie and mislead as easily as you breathe. You become an expert in Deception. At 7th level, you become a master in Deception, and at 15th level, you become legendary in Deception. You also gain your choice of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.B6HbYsLBWb1RR6Fx]{Charming Liar} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Dvz54d6aPhjsmUux]{Lie to Me} skill feats.

Fade Away.name: 淡出 Fade Away
Fade Away.description:
频率 见下文

你以自身的断绝之魔法笼罩自己，随即仅仅从视野中淡去。你成为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]。这会使你对所有生物处于未被察觉状态，除非他们已知你的位置，如同隐形的常规规则；生物仍可尝试寻找你，使你改为对他们处于隐藏状态。如果你使用敌对动作，则该效果在该敌对动作完成后结束；你也可以以自由动作（）结束该效果，该动作具有操作（特征）。否则，你最多保持隐形10分钟。你无法在“淡隐离去”仍处于生效期间再次使用它；并且在“淡隐离去”的效果结束后，你在一段时间内无法再次使用它，该时间等于其持续时间的三倍；若隐形持续1轮或更短，则最短为3轮。例如，若你隐形了2轮，则你在6轮内无法使用“淡隐离去”；若你隐形了完整的10分钟，则你在30分钟内无法使用“淡隐离去”。

Frequency see below

You shroud yourself in the magic of your Severing and simply fade from view. You become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]. This makes you undetected to all creatures unless they already knew your location, as is normal for invisibility, and creatures can still attempt to find you, making you hidden to them instead. If you use a hostile action, this effect ends after that hostile action is completed, and you can end the effect as a free action, which has the manipulate trait. Otherwise, you remain invisible for up to 10 minutes. You can't use Fade Away while it's still active, and once Fade Away's effect ends, you can't use it again for an amount of time equal to three times as long as it lasted, to a minimum of 3 rounds if the invisibility lasts for 1 round or less. For instance, if you were invisible for 2 rounds, you couldn't use Fade Away for 6 rounds, and if you were invisible for the full 10 minutes, you couldn't use Fade Away for 30 minutes.

Werecreature Lore.name: 兽化生物学识 Werecreature Lore
Werecreature Lore.description:
你研究过各地狼人类生物古老而原始的行事之道。你在自然和生存上成为受训。如果你会在其中一项技能上自动成为受训（例如来自你的背景或职业），你改为在你选择的一项技能上成为受训。你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} 专长，用于狼人类生物学识。

You have studied the ancient, primal ways of werecreatures every-where. You become trained in Nature and Survival. If you would auto-matically become trained in one of those skills (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.BocFD2KV0qgUC76x]{Additional Lore} feat for Werecreature Lore.

Truly Giant.name: 真正的巨人 Truly Giant
Truly Giant.description:
你是个格外巨大的巨人，甚至比其他人、乃至你的巨人同族还要高大。你变为超大体型，并且你的触及从5尺增加到10尺。

特殊 如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.14FTuPNXbRPS3qG3]{巨人的触及} 专长，它将不再给予你任何好处，因此你立即将其重训为一个不同的族裔专长。

You're an especially large giant who towers high above others, even over your giant kin. You become Huge and your reach increases from 5 to 10 feet.

Special If you had the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.14FTuPNXbRPS3qG3]{Giant's Reach} feat, it no longer gives you any benefit, and as a result, you immediately retrain it for a different ancestry feat.

Fusion's Reach.name: 融合的触及 Fusion's Reach
Fusion's Reach.description:
无论是因为更长的脖子，还是因为对你的手臂或肢体有更好的控制，你都可以轻松从远处打击敌人。只要你处于大型，你的触及就会增加到10英尺。

Whether from a longer neck or better control of your arms or limbs, you can easily strike foes from a distance. Your reach increases to 10 feet as long as you are Large.

Rapid Riddler.name: 迅捷谜语者 Rapid Riddler
Rapid Riddler.description:
斯芬克斯极少会被任何类型的谜语难倒，而你的头脑能够快速推演各种可能性，直到你发现正确答案。你可以每天施放一次 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]，作为神圣先天法术。

A sphinx is very rarely stumped by any sort of riddle, and your mind can rapidly work through possibilities until you discover the correct solution. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0] once per day as a divine innate spell.

Draw Upon the Well.name: 汲取深井力量 Draw Upon the Well
Draw Upon the Well.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你即将为回忆知识进行一次检定的掷骰，在掷骰该检定之前。

无论是通过研习还是观察，你都积累了令人印象深刻的知识储备，可用于确保你的调查准确而彻底。这使你在触发的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo] 检定上获得+1状态加值。若你在该检定上掷出大失败，则改为失败。若该次掷骰成功且目标是生物，你将获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You're about to roll a check to Recall Knowledge, before rolling the check.

Whether through study or observation, you've stored up an impressive well of knowledge that you can use to ensure your inquest is accurate and thorough. This grants you a +1 status bonus on the triggering @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo] check. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the roll is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature.

Devour Ancestry.name: 吞噬族裔 Devour Ancestry
Devour Ancestry.description:
你从某个特定族裔那里吃下了足够多的大脑，以至于你开始理解他们的文化。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{收养族裔}通用专长，并且你还从你为{收养族裔}专长所选择的族裔中获得一个1级族裔专长。

You've eaten enough brains from a particular ancestry that you've come to understand their culture. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.ihN8gkHSdPG9Trte]{Adopted Ancestry} general feat, and you also gain one 1st-level ancestry feat from the ancestry you chose for the Adopted Ancestry feat.

Strengthened Wings.name: 强化之翼 Strengthened Wings
Strengthened Wings.description:
经过大量训练，你强化了自己的翅膀，现在可以用它们更快地飞行。你从 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.2vHbuDwdv9eehojJ]{弹跃之翼} 获得的飞行速度提升至25尺。

After extensive training, you strengthened your wings and now can use them to fly faster. The fly Speed you gain from @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.2vHbuDwdv9eehojJ]{Bounding Wings} increases to 25 feet.

Warden of the Cycle.name: 轮回守望者 Warden of the Cycle
Warden of the Cycle.description:
守护灵魂轮回有时需要独修天使不仅对生者（或视情况而定的不朽者）施加暴力，也要对死者如此。你以武器与徒手攻击进行的、针对无实体生物的打击变为魔法。若它们已是魔法，则改为获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch}属性符文的效果。

Guarding the cycle of souls sometimes requires a monadic deva to apply violence not only against the living (or immortal, as the case may be), but against the dead as well. Your weapon and unarmed attack Strikes against incorporeal creatures become magical. If they are already magical, they instead gain the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property rune.

Sleep of a Thousand Years.name: 千年沉眠 Sleep of a Thousand Years
Sleep of a Thousand Years.description:
每周一次，若你将因除年代之外的任何原因死亡，你不会死去，而是变为石化，转变成一座无生命的坚实石像。这座雕像具有硬度50，且生命值为你最大生命值的一半。只要在下一个日落结束时，这座雕像仍至少剩余1点生命值，雕像便会崩解成尘埃，而你将以虚弱状态现身，但仍然活着，且生命值等于雕像剩余的生命值。

若你将因年代死亡，你不会死去，而是转变成一座无生命的坚实石像。这座雕像无法被大多数手段破坏或伤害，不过神祇、神器，以及同等强大的存在与物品可能有能力做到这一点，或更早唤醒你（由GM决定；但作为经验法则，任何强大到能一击粉碎整座城堡，或能举起整座城堡并把它携带到云层之上的存在，可能都足以摧毁你的雕像或提前唤醒你）。一千年后，雕像崩解成尘埃，而你将现身，转生为一名无名、无巢、石像鬼青年。你保留对前世遥远而朦胧的记忆，仿佛一场梦，尽管细节通常足以让你回归你的守望……如果在千年之后，你所守护之物仍然存在的话。若你被强大力量提前唤醒，你的记忆可能比平常更完整，而你所守护之物也更可能仍在。

Once per week, if you would die from anything other than old age, you instead become petrified, turning into an inanimate, solid stone statue. This statue has Hardness 50 and half as many Hit Points as your maximum Hit Points. As long as the statue has at least 1 Hit Point remaining at the end of the next sunset, the statue crumbles to dust and you emerge weakened, but alive, with a number of Hit Points equal to the statue's remaining Hit Points.

If you would die of old age, you instead turn into an inanimate, solid stone statue. This statue can't be damaged or harmed by most means, though deities, artifacts, and similarly powerful beings and items might be capable of doing so, or of awakening you earlier (the GM decides, but as a rule of thumb, anything powerful enough to crush an entire castle in one blow or to pick up a whole castle and carry it above the clouds might be powerful enough to destroy your statue or awaken you early). A thousand years later, the statue crumbles to dust and you emerge, reincarnated as a nameless, clutchless, gargoyle youth. You retain the distant, hazy memories of your past life as if it were a dream, though the details are usually sufficient to return to your vigil... if your ward even still exists after a millennium. If you're awakened early by a powerful force, your memories might be more complete than normal, and your ward is more likely to remain.

Wild Might.name: 野性威能 Wild Might
Wild Might.description:
你用爪与獠牙发动的最强力攻击能将敌人击倒在地。当你用混合形态的徒手攻击进行一次打击并获得大成功时，你可以选择适用以下大成功专精效果，而不是使用搏斗武器组的通常大成功专精效果：目标必须成功通过一次对抗你职业DC的 @Check[type:fortitude|against:class] 豁免，否则被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

Your most powerful attacks with your claws and fangs can bring an enemy to the ground. When you critically succeed at a Strike with your hybrid form's unarmed attack, you can choose to apply the following critical specialization effect, instead of the normal critical specialization effect for the brawling weapon group: the target must succeed at a @Check[type:fortitude|against:class] save against your class DC or be knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.
